synopsis_en:
Mark Jenkin’s thorny postcard from New York and its surrounds presents a world of jackhammers, MAGA caps and celebrity spotting.

While his breakout feature Enys Men (MIFF 2022) was wowing the international festival circuit, Mark Jenkin crafted this melancholic 2022 dispatch from his holiday in New York, a city whose familiar sights and sounds are rendered in the filmmaker’s signature super-8 style. Inspired by reminiscences of movies and punctuated with a spot of celebrity spotting, the film finds a city in the grip of sociopolitical chaos.
synopsis_zh:
马克·詹金从纽约及其周边寄来的这张棱角分明的明信片，呈现了一个充斥着风镐轰鸣、MAGA红帽和偶遇明星的世界。

当他的成名作《埃尼斯·门》（2022年墨尔本电影节展映）正在国际电影节巡回中大放异彩时，马克·詹金用他标志性的超8毫米胶片风格，把这座城市熟悉的景象与声响一一记录，完成了这部略带忧郁的2022年纽约度假手记。影片以对老电影的追忆为灵感，点缀着几次偶遇明星的小插曲，捕捉到一座深陷社会政治混乱之中的城市。
highlight_zh: 《埃尼斯·门》导演超8胶片纽约日记，忧郁又锋利的城市速写

synopsis_en:
An extended family go on a religious pilgrimage and navigate their interpersonal dramas along the way in this deeply personal reflection on modern Thailand.

When Sakol hears an unsettling, weirdly specific prophecy about his ageing mother’s imminent death, he springs into action. Knowing that nine is a fortuitous number in Thai culture, he bundles the same amount of family members into a mini-van to visit nine temples in one day. It’s an ambitious attempt to cultivate enough karma for “Grandma” to find a peaceful afterlife, but things don’t go as planned. As three generations of family members squabble over religion and personal responsibility, and they encounter a mix of genuinely kind and commercially opportunistic monks, Sakol’s grand plan starts to feel like a futile undertaking. As the day comes to an end, will his faith finally be rewarded?

Sompot Chidgasornpongse’s debut, the documentary Railway Sleepers (MIFF 2017), bunked down with passengers taking long-distance train rides across Thailand. His second feature – and first venture into fiction – is a beautifully observed portrait of the relationship between religious tradition and capitalist society, drawing from personal experiences of his own family pilgrimages to Buddhist temples. Produced by Apichatpong Weerasethakul, on whose own films Sompot regularly worked as an assistant, and premiering at Cannes Directors’ Fortnight, 9 Temples to Heaven is a sensitive, involving saga.
synopsis_zh:
一个大家庭踏上一场宗教朝圣之旅，一路上各种家庭内部的恩怨纠葛轮番上演——这是一部对当代泰国的深情凝视，也带着导演强烈的个人印记。

当萨功听到一则关于年迈母亲将不久于人世的预言时——诡异的是，预言的细节还格外具体——他立刻行动起来。深知“九”在泰国文化中是吉祥数字的他，把九位家人塞进一辆小面包车，要在一天之内拜遍九座寺庙。这是一场雄心勃勃的功德之旅，为的是让“奶奶”积攒足够的善业、安然往生，然而事情并没有按计划进行。三代人一路上为宗教信仰和个人责任争执不休，途中遇到的僧人有的真诚善良，有的却满身铜臭，萨功的宏大计划渐渐显出徒劳的意味。当这一天走向尾声，他的虔诚最终能得到回报吗？

索姆波特·奇德加索恩蓬瑟的处女作、纪录片《铁路catnap》（《卧铺列车》，MIFF 2017）曾与乘坐长途火车穿行泰国的旅客们同眠共宿。这部第二部长片是他首次尝试剧情片，取材于他自己家庭赴佛寺朝圣的亲身经历，以细腻入微的观察描绘了宗教传统与资本社会之间的关系。影片由阿彼察邦·韦拉斯哈古监制——索姆波特长期在阿彼察邦的电影中担任助理——并在戛纳导演双周单元举行全球首映。《九庙朝圣》是一部敏感动人、引人入胜的家庭史诗。
highlight_zh: 阿彼察邦监制、戛纳导演双周首映的泰式家庭朝圣悲喜剧

synopsis_en:
Emerging voices and fresh perspectives from across Australia and New Zealand.

This showcase of trans-Tasman talent features terrific short films from a new generation, including a road trip that becomes a cosmic coming of age, a stylish thriller set entirely within an unnerving London share house and a beautifully restrained tale of queer yearning executive-produced by Jane Campion.
synopsis_zh:
来自澳大利亚与新西兰的新生力量与新鲜视角。

这一跨塔斯曼海的新锐影人集锦汇集了新一代创作者的精彩短片：一场公路旅行演变为一次宇宙尺度的成长仪式；一部风格化惊悚片全程发生在伦敦一间令人不安的合租屋内；还有一则由简·坎皮恩担任监制、克制而动人的酷儿情愫故事。
highlight_zh: 简·坎皮恩监制加持，澳新新锐短片一次看全

synopsis_en:
New visions. Bold stories. The thrilling future of local filmmaking.

Films that will rattle your senses, move you to tears and have you in stitches: the region’s hottest new filmmakers bring you tales of Auckland’s spooky Waitākere Ranges, a near-future world in catastrophic ruin and an unsettling slice of rural body horror; plus, a queer Indigenous woman who upends small-town Australia and a teenage rapper who teaches his grandma to swear.
synopsis_zh:
新锐视野，大胆故事，本土电影激动人心的未来。

这些影片将震撼你的感官，让你潸然泪下，也让你捧腹大笑：本地区最炙手可热的新锐电影人带来一系列精彩故事——奥克兰怀塔克雷山脉的灵异传说、一个陷入灾难性废墟的近未来世界、一段令人不安的乡村身体恐怖；还有一位酷儿原住民女性搅动澳大利亚小镇的平静，以及一名少年说唱歌手教奶奶讲脏话的爆笑日常。
highlight_zh: 澳新新锐短片精选，灵异、科幻、爆笑一网打尽。

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

Animation, found images and video recordings collide against a mind-bending dialogue between two computer-generated voices.

Reality wobbles and warps in Sara Magenheimer and Michael Bell-Smith’s cryptic collision of jagged pixels and smeared colours, a visual kaleidoscope that unfurls against an unhinged discussion between a pair of disembodied voices on the nature of meaning. A loopy reflection on existence in the age of artificial intelligence.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含频闪画面

动画、现成影像与视频素材相互碰撞，交织于两个电脑合成语音之间一场烧脑的对话。

在莎拉·马根海默与迈克尔·贝尔-史密斯这部谜一般的作品里，现实摇晃、扭曲：锯齿状的像素与晕染的色彩迎面相撞，化作一场视觉万花筒，而背景中，两个没有实体的声音正就“意义的本质”展开一场癫狂的讨论。这是对人工智能时代存在境况的一次迷离沉思。
highlight_zh: AI时代的迷幻视觉实验，像素与合成语音的烧脑对话。

synopsis_en:
In this candid and heartwarming portrait of transition – through gender and into adulthood – a filmmaker mother and trans son capture the power of acceptance and authenticity.

Adam Sieswerda always knew he was a boy, but the aspiring singer-songwriter feared his artistic prospects because he also knew his voice wouldn’t drop. At 15, with support from his parents, he received his first testosterone shot – and so began Adam’s journey to becoming his true self. As he embraces his growing identity as a fledgling young adult male, his mother, filmmaker Amy Jenkins, documents various milestones – psychologist appointments, university applications, a ‘boob funeral’ – with both curiosity and compassion.

Screening at SXSW and CPH:DOX, Jenkins’s eight-years-in-the-making film chronicles Adam’s transformative experiences of gender-affirming care while giving glimpses into the logistical, physiological and emotional demands of the process. At times, she even lets Adam take the reins – her handheld footage and archival clips interwoven with his smartphone videos – lending further intimacy to a film already brimming with energetic honesty. Amid the threats to trans rights in their home country and around the world, Adam’s Apple is an urgent and undeniably touching testament to familial solidarity and trans affirmation.
synopsis_zh:
在这部坦诚而温暖的肖像式纪录片中，一位导演母亲与她的跨性别儿子，共同记录下一段双重的“转变”——跨越性别，也走向成年——见证接纳与真我的力量。

亚当·西斯维尔达从小就知道自己是个男孩。但作为一名怀揣音乐梦想的创作歌手，他一度为自己的艺术前途担忧——因为他同样清楚，自己的嗓音不会自然变声。十五岁那年，在父母的支持下，他接受了第一针睾酮注射，就此踏上成为真正自己的旅程。随着亚当逐渐拥抱自己作为年轻男性的新身份，他的母亲、电影人艾米·詹金斯用镜头记录下一个个人生节点——心理医生的诊疗、大学申请，甚至一场“告别乳房的葬礼”——目光中既有好奇，也满含体恤。

这部历时八年拍摄、曾亮相西南偏南电影节（SXSW）与哥本哈根纪录片电影节（CPH:DOX）的作品，记录了亚当接受性别肯定关怀的蜕变历程，也让观众得以一窥这一过程在现实、生理与情感层面的种种考验。詹金斯有时甚至把镜头交到亚当手中——她的手持影像与家庭档案素材，同亚当的手机视频交织在一起，为这部本已充满率真能量的影片更添一份亲密。在跨性别权益于其祖国乃至世界各地屡遭威胁的当下，《亚当的喉结》是一份紧迫而动人的证词，见证着家人的坚定守望与对跨性别者的深情肯定。
highlight_zh: 母亲掌镜八年记录跨性别儿子成长，SXSW展映、外媒盛赞的温暖之作

synopsis_en:
Winner of Rotterdam’s Youth Jury Award, this beautifully affecting portrayal of young sisters navigating their parents’ divorce revolves around a pair of stunning child performances.

In 90s Singapore, seven-year-old Swee Swee – or “Ah Girl”, as her family calls her – is trying to understand what’s going on in her world. Living with her grandparents as her parents go through a separation, she’s looking out for her younger sister, Ah Tian, and searching for some sense of stability. Instead, her erratic, often-absent mother is prone to making unrealistic promises of an imagined future together, while her father – dating a string of potential new partners – is wondering if the kids should go live with an aunt and uncle in Australia. Torn between competing adults and growing increasingly curious about the world, Ah Girl begins to realise that her family life isn’t normal, and that adults can’t be relied on.

As Ah Girl and Ah Tian respectively, newcomers Ong Xuan Jing and Sydney Wong give two of the most incredible child-actor performances you’ll ever see, emotions alive across their tiny faces. Shooting her two leads in close-up and anchoring the entire narrative from a child’s perspective, writer/director Ang Geck Geck Priscilla upends all the familiar tropes of the divorce drama. “Children shouldn’t care about adult problems,” Ah Girl is told; but what she realises is that, as a kid, you’re going to be dragged through the problems of adults no matter how much you try to avoid them. As she retorts: “All adults are liars.”
synopsis_zh:
这部荣获鹿特丹电影节青年评审团奖的作品，以一对惊艳的儿童表演为核心，细腻动人地描绘了一对小姐妹如何面对父母的离异。

上世纪九十年代的新加坡，七岁的水水——家人都叫她“阿女”——正努力弄明白自己的世界发生了什么。父母闹分居，她寄住在祖父母家，一边照看妹妹阿天，一边渴望找到一点安稳的感觉。可是，行踪不定、常常缺席的妈妈总爱许下不切实际的承诺，描绘一个想象中的团圆未来；而忙着和一个个新对象约会的爸爸，则盘算着要不要把孩子送去澳大利亚的姑姑姑丈家。夹在大人们的拉扯之间、对世界的好奇心却与日俱增的阿女，渐渐意识到自己的家并不寻常，而大人是靠不住的。

分别饰演阿女和阿天的新人王宣静与黄雪妮，献上了你所能见到的最令人惊叹的儿童表演——情绪在两张小脸上鲜活流转。编剧兼导演洪玉玉以特写镜头贴近两位小主角，让整个故事完全从孩子的视角展开，颠覆了离婚题材剧情片的一切套路。有人对阿女说：“小孩子不该操心大人的事。”但她明白的却是：作为孩子，无论怎么躲，你终究会被拖进大人的问题里。于是她回敬道：“大人都是骗子。”
highlight_zh: 鹿特丹青年评审团奖得主，两位小演员的表演惊为天人

synopsis_en:
Hugo Weaving and Shabana Azeez lead the cast of this compelling new drama series about a chaplain with an unorthodox approach to solving an airport’s daily crises, consistently overstepping boundaries to help passengers and workers alike.

At a bustling international airport, lost people seek missed connections, while others carry heavy personal baggage. Tobias Wallace (Hugo Weaving, The Rooster, MIFF 2023) shepherds them all. Scruffy and benevolent in his hi-vis “Chaplain”-printed vest and always on call, he’ll bend rules to help passengers and workers alike – that includes Asha, a young woman hiding in the prayer room whose murky history stirs Tobias’s own deeply buried traumas. Not everybody is a fan of his methods, however: ambitious new terminal manager Mira (Shabana Azeez, The Pitt; Lesbian Space Princess, MIFF 2025) has liability nightmare Tobias marked for redundancy. But as crises appear everywhere – overworked baggage handlers, security breaches, families torn apart and grief-stricken relatives – maybe this infuriating chaplain could be Mira’s salvation.

Multi-award-winning screenwriter Elise McCredie (Stateless; Ride Like a Girl) based this much-anticipated new drama series, commissioned by SBS, on co-creator and Wooden Horse producer Jude Troy’s (The Clearing) encounter with a Melbourne Airport chaplain who helped her recover a lost handbag – and her identity. In this world premiere of the first three episodes, director Bonnie Moir (Not Dark Yet, MIFF 2022) warmly illuminates a morally complex protagonist, while his multicultural, multigenerational co-workers are portrayed by a fully booked flight of Aussie talent, from screen legend Claudia Karvan (Bump; The Big Steal, MIFF 2017) and Thomas Weatherall (Heartbreak High; Narrow Road to the Deep North) to Kavitha Anandasivam (The Hunting) and Erroll Shand (Wolfram).
synopsis_zh:
雨果·维文与沙巴娜·阿泽兹领衔主演这部引人入胜的全新剧集：一位行事不按常理出牌的机场牧师，为了帮助旅客和员工屡屡越界，日复一日地化解机场里的大小危机。

在一座熙熙攘攘的国际机场里，有人为错过的航班四处奔走，有人则背负着沉重的心事。托拜厄斯·华莱士（雨果·维文，《公鸡》，2023年MIFF）守护着他们所有人。他衣着邋遢却心地善良，穿着印有"牧师"字样的荧光背心随叫随到，为了帮人不惜打破规则——其中就包括躲在祈祷室里的年轻女子艾莎，她扑朔迷离的过往搅动了托拜厄斯自己深埋心底的创伤。然而并非人人都买他的账：野心勃勃的新任航站楼经理米拉（沙巴娜·阿泽兹，《匹兹堡医护前线》《太空拉拉公主》，2025年MIFF）早已把这个"责任隐患"列入裁员名单。可当危机四起——不堪重负的行李搬运工、安保漏洞、骨肉分离的家庭、悲痛欲绝的家属——这个让人头疼的牧师，或许恰恰是米拉的救星。

屡获殊荣的编剧伊莉丝·麦克雷迪（《无国界》《赛马女孩》）创作了这部备受期待的新剧，由SBS委约制作。灵感源自联合主创、Wooden Horse制片人裘德·特罗伊（《林中迷案》）的亲身经历：墨尔本机场的一位牧师曾帮她找回丢失的手提包——也找回了她的身份。本次全球首映放映前三集，导演邦妮·莫伊尔（《天未全黑》，2022年MIFF）以温暖的笔触刻画了一位道德复杂的主人公，而他多元文化、跨越世代的同事们则由一整班澳洲实力派出演：从荧幕传奇克劳迪娅·卡万（《孕转人生》《大劫案》，2017年MIFF）、托马斯·韦瑟罗尔（《心碎高中》《通往深北的窄路》），到卡维塔·阿南达西瓦姆（《狩猎》）和埃罗尔·尚德（《钨》）。
highlight_zh: 雨果·维文领衔SBS新剧全球首映，机场牧师温情救场

synopsis_en:
Virginie Efira and Tao Okamoto shared Best Actress Awards at Cannes for their sterling work in the latest long-form opus from master filmmaker Ryusuke Hamaguchi.

Marie-Lou (Virginie Efira, Parallel Tales, MIFF 2026) runs an aged-care facility on the outskirts of Paris. She’s devoted to her job and her patients, and firmly believes that the elderly should be treated with dignity. It’s tough work, and, like so many of her employees, she’s dealing with burnout. But her spirit is rekindled when she meets Japanese playwright Mari (Tao Okamoto), who’s staging a theatre piece about the history of mental asylums in Italy. As they plunge headlong into all-night conversations about mortality, philosophy and the degradations of capitalism, Mari and Marie-Lou’s new friendship will change both of their lives.

The films of Ryusuke Hamaguchi – often in-depth explorations of human connection fostered by theatre and workshops – operate at a distinctive register and rhythm, and his first film made outside of Japan is no exception. In All of a Sudden, Hamaguchi interrogates the state of elder care, using it to reflect the ways contemporary societies function. His mastery meets its match in leads Efira and Okamoto, who shared the Best Actress award at Cannes for remarkable performances that shift between French and Japanese and work through a complex array of emotions.
synopsis_zh:
维尔日妮·埃菲拉与冈本多绪凭借在电影大师滨口龙介这部最新长篇力作中的精彩表演，共同摘得戛纳影后桂冠。

玛丽露（维尔日妮·埃菲拉，《平行故事》，MIFF 2026）在巴黎郊区经营一家养老院。她全身心投入工作、悉心照料院里的老人，坚信老年人应当被有尊严地对待。这份工作艰辛异常，和许多员工一样，她也正被职业倦怠所困。直到遇见日本剧作家真理（冈本多绪），她心中的火光才重新被点亮——真理正在排演一部关于意大利精神病院历史的戏剧作品。两人彻夜长谈，从生死、哲学聊到资本主义对人的磨损，这段新生的友谊将改变彼此的人生。

滨口龙介的电影常常借由戏剧与工作坊深入探究人与人之间的联结，有着独树一帜的气质与节奏，这部他首次在日本之外拍摄的作品也不例外。在《突然之间》中，滨口以老年照护为切口，映照当代社会的运转方式。他的大师手笔遇上了旗鼓相当的对手——埃菲拉与冈本多绪在法语与日语之间自如切换，演绎出层次繁复的情感，双双荣膺戛纳最佳女演员奖。
highlight_zh: 滨口龙介首部海外力作，双女主同封戛纳影后

title_en: All The Lovers In The Night
synopsis_en:
Based on Mieko Kawakami’s evocative novel, this tale of lost souls finding unexpected connection enchantingly explores loneliness and love.

Fuyuko is a professional proofreader, a solitary person of quiet routines. She rarely leaves the house, but loves taking walks late at night, when only “half the world remains”. One evening, she meets Mitsutsuka, a soft-spoken physics lecturer who’s just as reticent and fastidious as she is. Soon, they start taking walks together, sitting in cafés and talking the night away – two lonely satellites briefly, tenderly brought into shared orbit. But can their relationship survive the cold light of day?

Adapting the book of the same name by Mieko Kawakami (author of the hit novel Breasts and Eggs), Yukiko Sode takes on a gentle, beautiful story grounded in interior experience, delicately hinting at the difficulty of connecting with others – and the preciousness of the rare moments when it occurs. Starring prolific big- and small-screen Japanese actors Yukino Kishii and Tadanobu Asano (here taking on a relatively subdued role), this lovely two-hander is a film that dwells on conversation and the spaces lurking between the words we say to one another.
synopsis_zh:
改编自川上未映子笔触动人的同名小说，这个关于孤独灵魂意外相遇的故事，以迷人的方式探索着孤独与爱。

冬子是一名职业校对员，性情孤僻，过着安静而规律的生活。她很少出门，却喜欢在深夜散步——那是只剩下"半个世界"的时刻。一天晚上，她遇见了三束，一位说话轻声细语的物理讲师，和她一样沉默寡言、一丝不苟。很快，两人开始一起散步，坐在咖啡馆里彻夜长谈——两颗孤独的卫星，短暂而温柔地进入了同一条轨道。可是，这段关系能经得起白昼冷光的照射吗？

川上未映子（畅销小说《乳与卵》的作者）的同名原著，被荻上直子门下之外另一位备受瞩目的导演城定？不——由导演苏打百合子（Yukiko Sode，《继承人生》导演）改编成这部温柔美丽、根植于内心体验的作品，细腻地暗示着与他人建立联结之难，以及那些罕有的联结时刻何其珍贵。影片由活跃于日本大银幕与荧屏的岸井雪乃与浅野忠信（在片中出演一个相对内敛的角色）主演，是一部沉浸于对话的双人戏，凝视着我们彼此言语之间潜藏的空隙。
highlight_zh: 川上未映子小说改编，岸井雪乃与浅野忠信演绎深夜孤独者的温柔相遇。

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains archival footage of war and conflict; distressing scenes

An unapologetic cry for humanity that reveals the on-the-ground reality of the genocide in Gaza and the experiences of the frontline medical volunteers who put their principles into practice.

Across late 2024 and early 2025, three doctors from the United States – Jewish orthopaedic surgeon Mark Perlmutter, Zoroastrian trauma surgeon Feroze Sidhwa and Palestinian emergency doctor Thaer Ahmad – worked in hospitals in the Gaza Strip trying to save some of the many lives being destroyed by the US-backed Israeli Defence Forces. Back home in North America, they attempt to reconcile these experiences with their day-to-day lives, as they also strive to raise awareness in the face of a world that would much prefer to look away.

The feature-length directorial debut of journalist and producer Poh Si Teng, American Doctor provides an unflinching exposé of the consequences of war as experienced by physicians: the suffering they encountered; the personal danger; the physical and emotional toll. In this challenging but compelling and essential documentary, the three men’s vastly different personalities bring into sharp focus the inequalities of privilege even among professional equals, reinforcing the urgency of their shared call for a more just world.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含战争与冲突的档案影像，部分场景令人不安

这是一声毫不妥协的人道呐喊，揭示加沙种族灭绝的实地真相，以及那些将信念付诸行动的前线医疗志愿者的亲身经历。

2024年底至2025年初，三位美国医生——犹太裔骨科医生马克·珀尔马特、琐罗亚斯德教徒创伤外科医生费罗兹·西德瓦，以及巴勒斯坦裔急诊医生塔伊尔·艾哈迈德——先后前往加沙地带的医院工作，试图从美国支持的以色列国防军的炮火下抢救生命。回到北美后，他们努力让这些经历与日常生活达成和解，同时在一个宁愿移开视线的世界里奔走疾呼，唤起人们的关注。

《美国医生》是记者、制片人郑宝丝（Poh Si Teng）执导的首部长片，以毫不回避的镜头呈现了医生眼中的战争代价：他们目睹的苦难、亲历的危险，以及身心承受的重负。在这部沉重却极具感染力、不容错过的纪录片中，三位男主角迥异的个性，鲜明地映照出即便在专业地位平等的人之间，特权的不平等依然存在——这也让他们共同发出的呼声愈发迫切：世界需要更多正义。
highlight_zh: 三位美国医生亲历加沙前线，好莱坞报道者盛赞的人道主义纪录片

synopsis_en:
The feature debut of Portuguese master Manoel de Oliveira returns to the screen, beautifully restored, as a charming, proto-neorealist revelation.

Young Carlitos’s heart beats a little faster for Terezinha; so does Eduardo’s. Terezinha, for her part, has eyes mainly for a doll in the window display of a shop, the latter of which has the tantalising and lightly ominous name Temptations. Hoping to win his crush’s admiration, Carlitos swipes the doll for her – and, in doing so, introduces a new tension and moral murkiness into the lives of this gang of Porto urchins.

Working from a short story by José Joaquim Rodrigues de Freitas, Portuguese director Manoel de Oliveira (The Strange Case of Angelica, MIFF 2010) anticipated the eruption of neorealism in Italy several years later by choosing to use nonprofessional actors and shoot on location in his home city. But while its greatness is now recognised, Aniki-Bóbó was largely dismissed in its day, and de Oliveira – the only filmmaker whose career stretched from the silent to the digital era, and one who remarkably continued directing beyond his 100th birthday – would not make another feature-length film for 21 years. In its spareness, the auteur’s first fiction film is an edifying counterpoint to his later, lavishly stylised works, and enchanting in its own right.
synopsis_zh:
葡萄牙电影大师曼努埃尔·德·奥利维拉的长片处女作经精心修复后重返银幕——这部迷人的作品，堪称新现实主义的先声。

小男孩卡利托斯一见到特蕾茜尼亚就心跳加速，爱德华多也是如此。而特蕾茜尼亚的心思，却主要放在一家商店橱窗里的洋娃娃上——那家店有个诱人又隐隐透着不祥的名字：「诱惑」。为了博得心上人的青睐，卡利托斯偷走了那个洋娃娃。这一举动，也给波尔图这群街头孩童的生活带来了新的紧张与道德困境。

葡萄牙导演曼努埃尔·德·奥利维拉（《安吉莉卡奇遇》，2010年墨尔本电影节）根据若泽·若阿金·罗德里格斯·德·弗雷塔斯的短篇小说改编，启用非职业演员，在家乡波尔图实地拍摄——比意大利新现实主义浪潮的爆发早了好几年。尽管如今其伟大已获公认，《阿尼基·博博》在当年却几乎无人问津，德·奥利维拉此后二十一年未再拍摄长片。他是影史上唯一一位职业生涯横跨默片时代与数字时代的导演，年过百岁仍在执导筒。这部质朴简练的首部剧情片，与他后期华丽考究的风格形成耐人寻味的对照，其本身亦自有一种动人的魅力。
highlight_zh: 百岁传奇奥利维拉处女作，先于意大利数年的新现实主义先声，修复重映。

synopsis_en:
A collection of films that explode the boundaries of cinematic imagination.

The latest from acclaimed American filmmaker Don Hertzfeldt and Swedish auteur Niki Lindroth von Bahr feature in this dazzling collection of animated shorts from around the world, which range from expressionist, oil-painted visuals and charming felt characters to an animated celebration of the Ntaria Choir from Hermannsburg, central Australia.
synopsis_zh:
一组冲破电影想象力边界的作品合集。

美国知名动画人唐·赫兹菲尔德与瑞典鬼才妮基·林德罗斯·冯·巴尔的最新力作，领衔这份来自世界各地的炫目动画短片选辑——风格横跨表现主义的油画影像、憨态可掬的毛毡角色，还有一部以动画礼赞澳大利亚中部赫曼斯堡恩塔利亚合唱团的作品。
highlight_zh: 赫兹菲尔德与冯·巴尔新作领衔，全球顶尖动画短片一网打尽

synopsis_en:
Winner of the FIPRESCI Prize at the Berlinale, this deadpan satire of late capitalism sees a convenience store become a stage for darkly funny horror.

Sakai – played by Japanese star Shota Sometani (Himizu, MIFF 2012) – is an assistant manager at the Tokyo convenience store managed by his father (Masahiko Nishimura), both men deadened by the rigid procedures and relentless monotony of retail. The arrival of a sparky new employee, Ogawa (Erika Karata, Asako 1 + 2, MIFF 2018), who still has dreams beyond just restocking shelves, stirs something in Sakai – but such anomalies as Ogawa threaten to upend the store’s delicate ecosystem, with surreal, blood-drenched results.

Writer/director Yusuke Iwasaki’s story is one informed by personal experience, having been dismayed by the changes he perceived in his own father during his tenure as a convenience store owner. In this auspicious feature debut, Iwasaki – assisted by an impressive cast – mounts a strident critique of conformity in his home country and the systems that enforce it, infusing the abundant aisles of AnyMart with a creeping, comic dread before the wild escalation of the film’s riotous and unpredictable final act.
synopsis_zh:
荣获柏林电影节费比西影评人奖，这部冷面讽刺晚期资本主义的作品，把一家便利店变成了上演黑色幽默恐怖戏码的舞台。

酒井——由日本明星染谷将太（《庸才》，2012年墨尔本电影节）饰演——是东京一家便利店的副店长，店长正是他的父亲（西村雅彦）。日复一日的死板流程和无休止的单调劳作，早已磨平了父子俩的心气。直到活力四射的新店员小川（唐田英里佳，《夜以继日》，2018年墨尔本电影节）到来——她还怀揣着补货上架之外的梦想——酒井心中某种东西被悄然唤醒。然而像小川这样的"异类"，随时可能打破便利店脆弱的生态平衡，引发超现实、血浆四溅的后果。

编剧兼导演岩崎裕介的故事源于切身经历：他曾亲眼目睹父亲在经营便利店的岁月里逐渐变了一个人，为此深感痛心。在这部令人瞩目的长片处女作中，岩崎在出色演员阵容的助力下，对日本社会的从众文化及其背后的规训体系发起了尖锐批判——他先让 AnyMart 琳琅满目的货架间弥漫起一种令人发毛又忍俊不禁的诡异气息，随后在狂野失控、难以预料的最终章里彻底引爆。
highlight_zh: 柏林费比西奖加持，染谷将太主演，便利店里的冷面恐怖喜剧。

title_en: Armani Beauty Cinema Club Opening Night: Wishful Thinking
synopsis_en:
Armani Beauty brings its signature glow to Australia’s premier cinema event.

Hosted at The Capitol, the Armani Beauty Cinema Club Opening Night blends the elegance of global cinema with local prestige, offering guests an immersive evening of beauty experiences and a premium screening of MIFF Headliner Wishful Thinking.

PRESENTED BY

This SXSW Grand Jury Award–winning high-concept rom-com playfully questions the notion that love is the most powerful force in existence … for better or worse.

Charlie and Julia are deeply in love. They are also fundamentally incompatible – Charlie wants to get married and start a family; Julia doesn’t – and they spend as much time fighting as they do making up. Desperate to fix their relationship, they visit twin TikTok love gurus Tilly and Tilly, whose mysterious counsel reminds the couple how and why they fell for each other. It also unlocks something else, with earth-shattering repercussions … literally.

Cheekily interpreting the real-world implications of Rhonda Byrne’s pseudoscientific self-help hit The Secret, first-time feature director Graham Parkes creates a wonderfully witty, lived-in love story with a supernatural through-line that’s as hilarious as it is horrifying. Utilising ingenious split-screen techniques and capturing the stunning vistas of the Pacific Northwest, Parkes and cinematographer Christopher Ripley ensure the film looks incredible, while Lewis Pullman (The Testament of Ann Lee) and Maya Hawke (Once Upon a Time in Hollywood, MIFF 2019; Stranger Things) are phenomenal as Charlie and Julia, exuding chemistry while anchoring every emotional heartbeat and delivering every punchline to perfection. With a supporting cast that includes Randall Park, Kate Berlant and Jon Hamm as himself in a brilliantly executed recurring bit, Wishful Thinking is a boldly original, funny and insightful study of the wonderful delusion at the heart of all love: that its exhilarating highs and heartbreaking lows can change the world.
synopsis_zh:
阿玛尼美妆为澳大利亚首屈一指的电影盛事带来其标志性的璀璨光彩。

阿玛尼美妆电影俱乐部开幕之夜将在国会剧院（The Capitol）举行，全球影坛的优雅气质与本地的尊贵格调在此交融，宾客们将沉浸于一整晚的美妆体验，并欣赏 MIFF 重磅单元影片《心想事成》的尊享放映。

特别呈现

这部斩获西南偏南电影节（SXSW）评审团大奖的高概念爱情喜剧，以俏皮的方式发问：爱真的是世间最强大的力量吗……无论是福是祸。

查理和茱莉亚深爱着彼此，却又根本合不来——查理想结婚生子，茱莉亚不想——两人吵架的时间和和好的时间一样多。为了挽救这段关系，他们孤注一掷，去求助一对在 TikTok 上走红的双胞胎“爱情导师”蒂莉与蒂莉。这对姐妹神秘的指点让两人重新想起当初是如何、又为何爱上对方的，但同时也解开了某种别的东西，其后果足以天崩地裂……这可不是比喻。

初执导筒的格雷厄姆·帕克斯拿朗达·拜恩那本伪科学畅销书《秘密》开涮，戏谑地想象“心想事成”在现实世界会带来什么，拍出了一个机智风趣、烟火气十足的爱情故事，其中贯穿的超自然线索既爆笑又惊悚。帕克斯与摄影指导克里斯托弗·里普利运用巧妙的分屏手法，捕捉太平洋西北地区的壮美风光，让影片的视觉效果无可挑剔；刘易斯·普尔曼（《安·李的圣约》）与玛雅·霍克（《好莱坞往事》，MIFF 2019 展映；《怪奇物语》）分别饰演查理和茱莉亚，两人表现惊艳，火花四溅，既撑起了每一次情感起伏，也把每个笑点都拿捏得恰到好处。配角阵容包括朴兰道、凯特·伯兰特，还有乔恩·哈姆以本人身份出演一个反复出现、执行得妙极了的梗。《心想事成》大胆原创、妙趣横生又富于洞察，探讨了一切爱情核心处那个美妙的妄念：它令人狂喜的高峰与心碎的低谷，真的能改变世界。
highlight_zh: SXSW评审团大奖爱情喜剧，玛雅·霍克火花四溅，乔恩·哈姆本色出演爆笑客串。

synopsis_en:
With ecstatic sequences reminiscent of Alejandro Jodorowsky’s The Holy Mountain, this complex portrait of new-age commune life is a striking feature debut.

It’s 1978, and Spanish society is struggling to find a post-dictatorship identity in the wake of Franco’s death. A host of activist workers from a Basque factory, disillusioned by the seeming inevitability of capitalism, attempt a complete rebellion, setting out to join a commune in rural Navarre. Eme (played by a magnetic Maite Mugerza Ronse) wants to believe that Arco Iris offers a new way of living, but she soon learns it’s just as political as a picket line: the commune is riddled with personality clashes and ideological disagreements, and its sexual practices are underpinned by patriarchal power imbalances. Despite what the thousands of pilgrims who flock to its large-scale spiritual rituals might think, this rainbow family isn’t particularly harmonious.

Irati Gorostidi Agirretxe has been building to this debut feature through her short films, chronicling life within an intentional community in both documentary (2021’s San Simón 62) and fiction (2023’s Contadores). The connection is personal: Gorostidi Agirretxe’s own parents lived in a new-age commune before she was born. Boasting a wryly comic cameo from the charismatic Oliver Laxe (director of MIFF 2025 stand-out Sirāt) as a seedy tantric sex guru, her debut feature is a slippery film sitting at the intersection of sincerity and scepticism. Evoking both the daily routines of Direct Action (MIFF 2024) and the ecstatic rituals of The Testament of Ann Lee, Aro berria introduces a vital new voice in Basque cinema.
synopsis_zh:
影片中那些令人迷狂的段落，让人想起佐杜洛夫斯基的《圣山》——这部描绘新纪元公社生活的复杂群像，是一部惊艳的长片处女作。

1978年，佛朗哥去世后的西班牙社会正在艰难寻找后独裁时代的身份认同。一群来自巴斯克工厂的工人活动家，对资本主义看似不可逆转的大势深感幻灭，决意彻底反叛，前往纳瓦拉乡间加入一个公社。艾梅（迈特·穆赫尔萨·龙塞饰，魅力十足）愿意相信"彩虹"公社代表着一种全新的生活方式，但她很快发现，这里的政治斗争丝毫不比罢工纠察线少：公社内部充斥着性格冲突与意识形态分歧，其性实践的底层逻辑仍是父权制的权力失衡。尽管成千上万的朝圣者涌来参加公社盛大的灵性仪式，这个"彩虹大家庭"其实远谈不上和谐。

伊拉蒂·戈罗斯蒂迪·阿吉雷切通过一系列短片一步步走向这部长片首作，以纪录片（2021年的《圣西蒙62号》）和剧情片（2023年的《计数者》）两种形式记录理念共同体中的生活。这份关切源自她的亲身经历：她的父母在她出生前就曾生活在一个新纪元公社里。魅力非凡的奥利维尔·拉克斯（2025年墨尔本电影节焦点影片《西拉特》的导演）在片中客串一位油腻的谭崔性爱导师，带来一段冷幽默十足的亮相。这部处女作游走于真诚与怀疑的交界地带，令人捉摸不定；它既让人想起《直接行动》（2024年墨尔本电影节）中的日常劳作，也呼应着《安·李的遗言》中的迷狂仪式。《新纪元》宣告了巴斯克电影一个重要新声音的诞生。
highlight_zh: 巴斯克新锐惊艳首作，《圣山》式迷狂描绘公社乌托邦幻灭

synopsis_en:
After arriving in Aotearoa as refugees, a mother and daughter find their roles upended in the face of a new and unfamiliar world.

The tension between leaving home and facing the unknown is at the core of this sensitive, emotionally engaging drama from Somalian-born, Wellington-raised filmmaker Ahmed Osman, who drew upon his own memories to evoke the experience of a child forced to navigate the world on behalf of their parent. A delicate, playful work about loss, memory and the cost of starting anew.
synopsis_zh:
一对母女以难民身份来到新西兰奥特亚罗瓦，在陌生的新世界面前，两人的角色悄然颠倒。

离开故土与直面未知之间的张力，是这部细腻动人的剧情片的核心。索马里出生、惠灵顿长大的导演艾哈迈德·奥斯曼从自身记忆出发，刻画了一个孩子被迫替父母与世界打交道的经历。这是一部关于失去、记忆与重新开始之代价的作品，轻盈灵动，又饱含温柔。
highlight_zh: 索马里裔导演以亲身经历拍就的难民母女情，细腻动人

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

In this ecstatic vision of the body in flux, a newborn encounters their digital mutation 25 years on.

Crackling with sensuality and raucous invention, Yace Sula’s delirious portrayal of queer sexuality – which won an Emerging Experimental Video Artist award at the Ann Arbor Film Festival – uses footage of the director’s own christening as a playground for a series of analog and digital aberrations, a kind of phantom presence haunting the infant from the future.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含频闪画面

在这场关于身体流变的迷醉幻象中，一个新生儿遇见了25年后自己的数字变异体。

影片洋溢着感官张力与恣意妄为的创造力。Yace Sula 以自己婴儿时期受洗的影像为游乐场，叠加层层模拟与数字的畸变，宛如一个来自未来的幽灵萦绕着襁褓中的婴孩，谵妄地呈现酷儿的情欲——该片曾获安娜堡电影节新锐实验影像艺术家奖。
highlight_zh: 安娜堡电影节获奖实验短片，受洗影像与数字畸变的酷儿幻梦

synopsis_en:
An Iraqi mother meets a US marine, years after his squad killed her loved ones. Both suffer from the knowledge that bullets can never be un-fired.

After the US invades Iraq in 2003, Mariam Khachaturian and her family try to get on with their lives; but when a bomb explodes near their relatives’ Baghdad home, they decide to head home. Instead, they drive right into a chaotic firefight involving US marines, which kills Mariam’s husband and two sons. Twelve years later, Mariam – now living in the US with her daughter – receives a request from an American journalist she met in hospital after the shooting: one of the marines wants to meet her.

Adapting a 2012 New Yorker article by Pulitzer Prize–winning combat journalist Dexter Filkins, Reed Van Dyk’s (DeKalb Elementary, MIFF 2017) debut feature astutely avoids centring the grip of PTSD on the US soldier (played by a career-best Boyd Holbrook) over his victims’ years of anguish; instead, this complex, layered narrative explores civilian trauma and veteran guilt as mutually inextricable violences of war. Hiam Abbass (Gaza Mon Amour, MIFF 2021; Succession) is breathtakingly restrained as Mariam; Kenneth Branagh, meanwhile, brings gravitas to his performance as a fictionalised Filkins. While its kinetic in medias res action sequences are visceral, Atonement finds heartbreaking power in its compassionate portrayal of shared humanity.
synopsis_zh:
一位伊拉克母亲与一名美国海军陆战队员相见——多年前，正是他所在的小队杀死了她的至亲。子弹一旦射出便无法收回，这份认知折磨着他们两人。

2003年美军入侵伊拉克后，玛丽亚姆·哈恰图良和家人努力维持着原本的生活；然而当一枚炸弹在巴格达亲戚家附近爆炸后，他们决定返回自己的家。不料途中他们正撞上一场美军海军陆战队卷入的混乱交火，玛丽亚姆的丈夫和两个儿子命丧枪下。十二年后，已与女儿定居美国的玛丽亚姆收到一位美国记者的请求——她曾在枪击后的医院里与他相识：当年的一名陆战队员想要见她。

本片改编自普利策奖得主、战地记者德克斯特·菲尔金斯2012年发表于《纽约客》的报道，是里德·范·戴克（《德卡尔布小学》，2017年墨尔本电影节）的长片处女作。影片敏锐地避开了以美国士兵的创伤后应激障碍为叙事中心、而将受害者多年的煎熬推向边缘的俗套（博伊德·霍布鲁克贡献了生涯最佳表演）；这个复杂而层次丰富的故事，将平民创伤与老兵负罪感呈现为战争暴力中互相纠缠、无法割裂的两面。希亚姆·阿巴斯（《加沙，我的爱》，2021年墨尔本电影节；《继承之战》）饰演的玛丽亚姆克制得令人屏息；肯尼思·布拉纳则为以菲尔金斯为原型的记者一角赋予了沉稳的分量。片中身临其境的动作场面凌厉而震撼，但《赎罪》真正令人心碎的力量，来自它对人性共通之处的悲悯刻画。
highlight_zh: 阿巴斯与布拉纳同台，直面战争创伤与救赎的催泪之作

synopsis_en:
Do we see what other moviegoers see? A fascinating act of cinematic misdirection for our age of misinformation.

Missed information becomes misinformation in this audacious work of found footage and formal playfulness from Canadian visual artist Darren Dominique Heroux, in which audience members receive different decoder glasses at random – and no two viewing experiences are the same. Winner of the Peter Wilde Award for Most Technically Innovative Film at Ann Arbor.
synopsis_zh:
我们看到的，和邻座观众看到的是同一部电影吗？一场精彩的电影障眼法，献给这个信息错乱的时代。

在加拿大视觉艺术家达伦·多米尼克·埃鲁这部大胆的作品中，错过的信息变成了错误的信息——影片由拾得影像与形式游戏构成，观众入场时会随机领到不同的解码眼镜，没有任何两个人的观影体验是相同的。本片荣获安娜堡电影节彼得·怀尔德奖（最具技术创新影片）。
highlight_zh: 随机发放解码眼镜，每个人看到的都是不同的电影

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander viewers should be aware that a film in this package contains images, voices or names of deceased persons.

Exciting new work from some of the nation’s most electrifying filmmakers.

A taste of the finest in short-form Australian filmmaking, this eclectic selection includes a polyamorous screwball comedy from the co-writer and star of MIFF 2025’s Best Australian Short The Eviction, a haunting look at colonial violence, and the story of a man’s obsession with a mind-controlling worm in the family backyard. Plus, the SXSW Grand Jury Award–winning short from MIFF Accelerator Lab alum Renée Marie Petropoulos.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片单中有一部影片包含已故人士的影像、声音或姓名，请原住民及托雷斯海峡岛民观众留意。

来自澳大利亚最具锋芒的电影人的振奋新作。

这组风格各异的精选短片，堪称澳大利亚短片创作的一次极佳品鉴：既有MIFF 2025最佳澳大利亚短片《驱逐》的联合编剧兼主演带来的多角恋神经喜剧，也有对殖民暴力的幽魂式凝视，还有一个男人对自家后院里一条能控制心智的蠕虫的痴迷故事。此外，还将放映MIFF加速器实验室校友蕾妮·玛丽·佩特罗普洛斯荣获SXSW评审团大奖的短片。
highlight_zh: 澳洲新锐短片精选，含SXSW评审团大奖之作

synopsis_en:
In Tamil Nadu, two tuktuk drivers – close friends and staunch union comrades – dare to challenge their industry’s rampant sexism.

On the restless streets of Chennai, quietly determined autorickshaw driver Mohana is president of the first ever women-led drivers’ union, while sparky Leela combats the relentless discrimination and harassment they face in their male-dominated profession. As adeptly as they weave through chaotic traffic, these fierce feminists are revving up a mobility revolution sparked by camaraderie, humour and profound sisterhood.
synopsis_zh:
在印度泰米尔纳德邦，两位嘟嘟车（机动三轮车）司机——她们既是亲密好友，也是坚定的工会战友——勇敢向行业内根深蒂固的性别歧视发起挑战。

在金奈熙攘不息的街头，沉静而坚韧的三轮车司机莫哈娜担任着史上第一个由女性领导的司机工会的主席，而泼辣爽利的莉拉则奋力对抗她们在这个男性主导的行业里遭受的无休止的歧视与骚扰。正如她们在混乱车流中灵巧穿行一样，这两位无畏的女性主义者正凭借情谊、幽默与深厚的姐妹情，发动一场轰鸣上路的出行革命。
highlight_zh: 印度女司机组建首个女性工会，笑对歧视的姐妹情纪录片

synopsis_en:
Two Afro-Taiwanese men with US military fathers muse on how no single perspective can contain the weight of ancestry, identity, belonging and language.

Michael and Jim reflect on how their mixed-race heritage makes them difficult to place in the eyes of society, and at times invisible within their own families. One speaks Hakka, the other Taiwanese Hokkien; together, their bodies carry the weight of a colonial fantasy they cannot escape, marked by the legacy of US military presence in Taiwan. The film’s split-screen view finds quiet rhythms in gaps and silences, prompting poignant questions of where and how we gaze.
synopsis_zh:
两位父亲是驻台美军的台非混血男子，娓娓道出一个体悟：血缘、身份、归属与语言的重量，任何单一视角都无法承载。

Michael 和 Jim 回望自己的混血身世——在社会眼中难以归类，在自己的家庭里有时也形同隐形。一人说客家话，一人说台语；他们的身体共同背负着一段无法摆脱的殖民幻想，烙印着美军驻台历史的遗痕。影片以分屏画面在留白与静默之间寻得安静的节奏，引人深思：我们从何处凝视，又如何凝视。
highlight_zh: 分屏影像凝视台非混血身世，美军驻台历史遗痕下的身份诗篇。

synopsis_en:
Be immersed in a dance-driven VR journey into the inner world of ALS patients, whose frozen bodies conceal minds and souls burning with resilience.

Vision becomes the primary anchor to reality for patients in the later stages of motor neurone disease – also known as amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, or ALS. Twin interdisciplinary choreographers Hsieh Hsiao-Ting and Hsieh Hsiao-Wei invite you, too, to watch without moving. Poetic, abstract dance evokes ALS patients’ rich, heightened consciousness as everyday objects dissolve under the weight of illness: a motionless wheelchair; drifting curtains; a dining table for two; a fish in its bowl. Winner of the Humanity Award in the 2026 XR Competition at NewImages Festival in Paris, this meditative work entwines the sensory and virtual to express something hidden but intensely human.
synopsis_zh:
沉浸于一场以舞蹈驱动的VR之旅，走进渐冻症患者的内心世界——他们冻结的身体之下，藏着燃烧着坚韧之火的心灵与灵魂。

对于运动神经元疾病（即肌萎缩侧索硬化症，ALS，俗称"渐冻症"）晚期的患者而言，视觉成为他们与现实相连的主要锚点。跨领域编舞家谢筱婷与谢筱薇这对双胞胎姐妹，邀请你也以静止之姿去观看。诗意而抽象的舞蹈，唤起渐冻症患者丰富而敏锐的意识世界：在疾病的重压下，日常之物渐次消融——静止的轮椅、飘动的窗帘、一张双人餐桌、鱼缸里的一尾鱼。这部冥想式作品曾获2026年巴黎NewImages电影节XR竞赛单元"人文奖"，它将感官与虚拟交织，道出隐而不显却深刻动人的人性。
highlight_zh: 获奖VR舞蹈之作，以静止之躯潜入渐冻症患者的内心世界。

synopsis_en:
Let loose in Laos without a crew, master auteur Tsai Ming-liang delivers a quiet, contemplative meditation on place and belonging.

Slow-cinema legend Tsai Ming-liang accompanies actor Anong Houngheuangsy (Days, MIFF 2021) back to his hometown, a rural Lao village situated amid rice paddies. Armed with only a Leica camera and a Canon camcorder, Tsai undertakes a minimalist meditation on the power of place. More drawn to the surrounding environment than the reunion between Anong and his family, Tsai’s ever-patient camera gazes on dogs, cats, cows, goats and house plants. For the Buddhist filmmaker, these lives are just as interesting as those of family members, farmers selling their wares at markets and stonemasons carving statues of Buddha.

Tsai calls this film, shot over two weeks, a work of “handcrafted cinema”. Premiering at Venice, Back Home offers another still, quiet study for those attuned to Tsai’s filmmaking approach, and particularly the entries in his ongoing Walking series (Abiding Nowhere, MIFF 2021; Journey to the West, MIFF 2014). Tsai first graced Melbourne screens with his sumptuous Vive l’amour in 1995; each new outing for cinema’s Zen master is a humble treasure to behold.
synopsis_zh:
没有剧组、只身深入老挝，大师级作者导演蔡明亮交出一部安静而沉思的作品，凝视地方与归属。

慢电影传奇蔡明亮陪同演员亚侬·弘尚希（《日子》，2021年墨尔本电影节）回到他的家乡——一座坐落于稻田之间的老挝乡村。只带着一台徕卡相机和一台佳能摄像机，蔡明亮展开了一场关于"地方之力"的极简主义冥想。比起亚侬与家人的重逢，他更着迷于周遭的环境：那台一贯耐心的摄影机久久注视着狗、猫、牛、羊和屋里的绿植。对这位信奉佛教的导演而言，这些生命与家人、集市上叫卖的农人、雕凿佛像的石匠一样值得凝视。

蔡明亮称这部历时两周拍摄的影片为"手工电影"。《回家》于威尼斯电影节首映，为熟悉蔡明亮创作方式的观众——尤其是他仍在延续的"行者"系列（《无所住》，2021年墨尔本电影节；《西游》，2014年墨尔本电影节）的拥趸——再度献上一次静谧的凝视。1995年，蔡明亮以华美的《爱情万岁》首次登上墨尔本银幕；此后这位影坛"禅师"的每一部新作，都是一件谦逊而珍贵的礼物。
highlight_zh: 蔡明亮威尼斯首映新作，独闯老挝的手工慢电影

synopsis_en:
An unexpected rainstorm on a summer day sparks moments of inspiration and connection among neighbours in an apartment building.

Apartment residents are busying themselves on their balconies, their individual routines gently overlapping and colliding, when a blustery interruption draws them into a shared moment as one neighbour decides to serenade the storm on her flute. This captivating, playfully drawn film celebrates the small moments that break us free from our separate lives, reminding us of the joy we can find in community.
synopsis_zh:
夏日里一场不期而至的暴雨，在公寓楼的邻居之间激起了灵感与联结的火花。

公寓里的住户们各自在阳台上忙碌，日常的琐碎轨迹轻轻交叠、彼此碰撞。一阵狂风骤雨打断了这一切，一位邻居决定用长笛为风暴奏上一曲，众人由此被卷入同一个共享的时刻。这部画风俏皮、引人入胜的动画短片，礼赞那些将我们从各自孤立的生活中解放出来的细小瞬间，提醒我们：社区与邻里之间，藏着触手可及的快乐。
highlight_zh: 一场骤雨一支长笛，画风俏皮的邻里温情动画小品。

synopsis_en:
Avant-garde lesbian filmmaker Barbara Hammer’s life and pioneering work take centre stage in this archive-driven tribute to a queer cinema icon.

Fearless Los Angeles–born artist Barbara Hammer was 30 years old and married to a man when she first heard the word “lesbian”. This life-changing discovery would, in turn, lead to the expansion of the vocabulary of queer cinema itself. Across her prolific career from her groundbreaking 1974 short Dyketactics through to her feature-length breakout Nitrate Kisses (MIFF 1993) and beyond – works variously composed of frankly sensual depictions of friends and lovers and cinematic images from a bygone era – Hammer’s filmography was as playful as it was relentless in decentring the heterosexual gaze.

Brydie O’Connor’s energising tribute to this LGBTQIA+ icon artfully weaves together footage from the director’s personal archive with clips from her films, all accompanied by commentary from Hammer herself – with some sections recorded shortly before her passing in 2019 – as well as from Florrie Burke, the filmmaker’s widow. Winner of a Teddy Award at the 2026 Berlinale along with a prize for editing at Sundance, Barbara Forever looks to the future of queer filmmaking by honouring one of its greatest revolutionaries.
synopsis_zh:
先锋女同性恋电影人芭芭拉·哈默的一生与开创性作品，是这部以档案影像为主体的致敬之作的核心——献给一位酷儿电影的标志性人物。

这位生于洛杉矶、无所畏惧的艺术家，直到30岁、还身处一段异性婚姻中时，才第一次听到“女同性恋”这个词。这次改变一生的发现，最终也拓展了酷儿电影本身的语汇。从1974年开创先河的短片《Dyketactics》，到令她声名鹊起的长片《硝酸盐之吻》（1993年墨尔本电影节展映），再到其后的诸多创作——这些作品有的坦率而感性地记录朋友与爱人，有的取材于旧时代的电影影像——在哈默高产的创作生涯中，她的作品始终带着游戏般的轻盈，却又毫不留情地消解着异性恋的凝视。

布莱迪·奥康纳为这位LGBTQIA+偶像献上的这部充满能量的致敬之作，将导演私人档案中的影像与其电影片段巧妙交织，全片贯穿哈默本人的自述——其中部分录制于她2019年离世前不久——以及她的遗孀弗洛莉·伯克的讲述。本片获2026年柏林电影节泰迪熊奖，并在圣丹斯电影节摘得剪辑奖。《永远的芭芭拉》以致敬酷儿电影最伟大的革新者之一的方式，望向这一影像传统的未来。
highlight_zh: 柏林泰迪熊奖+圣丹斯剪辑奖，致敬酷儿实验电影先驱芭芭拉·哈默

synopsis_en:
In a stand-out performance, Kim Novak has a bewitching good time toying with Jimmy Stewart’s clueless mortal.

Among the jazz bars and beatnik scene of 1960s Greenwich Village resides a thriving community of witches and warlocks. Gillian Holroyd (Kim Novak), one of the most powerful among them, lives behind the shop she runs selling African artefacts, while her aimless sorcerer brother (Jack Lemmon, The Apartment) plays bongos at a local club and her trickster aunt (played by a delightful Elsa Lanchester, Bride of Frankenstein) keeps tabs on her from the apartment above. When mild-mannered publisher Shep Henderson (James Stewart) moves into the building, she decides on an impulse to playfully seduce him with the help of her familiar, a cat named Pyewacket. What she doesn’t quite bargain for is the very real emotion that ensues.

Re-teaming with her Vertigo co-star Stewart, Novak gives one of the most natural and lived-in performances of her career. Her innate charm and vulnerability are a perfect fit for Gillian’s seemingly elusive witch, and she brings genuine emotional gravitas, through which you can really feel her struggle with letting her guard down. Beneath its charm and whimsy, Bell, Book and Candle offers a sly meditation on conformity, desire and the vulnerability required to truly connect with another person.
synopsis_zh:
金·诺瓦克献上一段令人着迷的出色表演，把詹姆斯·斯图尔特饰演的懵懂凡人玩弄于股掌之间，看得人心痒又心动。

在格林尼治村的爵士酒吧与垮掉派街区之间，隐居着一个兴旺的女巫与男巫社群。吉莉安·霍尔罗伊德（金·诺瓦克）是其中法力最强的一位，她经营着一家非洲工艺品小店，就住在店铺后面；她那无所事事的巫师弟弟（杰克·莱蒙，《桃色公寓》）在附近的俱乐部里打邦戈鼓，古灵精怪的姑妈（艾尔莎·兰彻斯特倾情出演，《科学怪人的新娘》）则住在楼上，时刻盯着她的动静。当温文尔雅的出版人谢普·亨德森（詹姆斯·斯图尔特）搬进这栋楼时，她一时兴起，决定借助自己的灵宠——一只名叫派维凯特的猫——施法逗弄、勾引这位新邻居。她万万没有料到的是，随之而来的竟是真真切切的感情。

与《迷魂记》搭档斯图尔特再度合作，诺瓦克交出了她职业生涯中最自然、最松弛的表演之一。她与生俱来的魅力和脆弱感，与吉莉安这个若即若离的女巫角色天作之合，她赋予角色真挚的情感分量，让人切实感受到她在卸下心防时的挣扎。在迷人俏皮的外表之下，《夺情记》悄悄探讨着从众与欲望，以及与另一个人真正相知所必需的那份坦诚与柔软。
highlight_zh: 《迷魂记》金·诺瓦克与斯图尔特再聚首，女巫恋上凡人的经典奇幻爱情喜剧。

synopsis_en:
Javier Bardem enthrals as a legendary director with ambiguous intentions who casts his estranged daughter in an upcoming film.

Esteban, a widely laurelled enfant terrible of global cinema, has returned to Spain to shoot a period film entitled Desert. He wants his daughter Emilia – who’s had roles on TV, and whom he hasn’t seen in 30 years – to play the lead. Despite having baggage around his alcoholism and aggression, she takes the part. Once together, the pair feel the heat not just of the production’s Canary Islands setting but also of the tensions that simmer between them.

The plot line of the latest feature from Goya Award–winning director Rodrigo Sorogoyen (The Beasts; Mother, MIFF 2018) may evoke Sentimental Value, but it trades in Joachim Trier’s optimistic take on filial reconciliation for a far more scorching account of familial messiness. Alongside questions of nepotism, ulterior motives and creative exploitation, The Beloved makes ingenious use of myriad film stocks – from sombre black-and-white to shaky, vibrant handheld; from 16mm to 35mm to digital – to convey differing mental states, circumstances and slants on the past. Matching Javier Bardem’s career-best performance as a morally murky agent of patriarchal power, Victoria Luengo (Bitter Christmas, MIFF 2026) portrays Emilia’s guardedness and resentment with sophisticated grace.
synopsis_zh:
哈维尔·巴登魅力全开，饰演一位居心莫测的传奇导演，将疏远多年的女儿选为新片主演。

埃斯特班是享誉世界影坛、屡获殊荣的“坏孩子”导演，此番回到西班牙拍摄一部名为《沙漠》的时代片。他希望由女儿艾米莉亚出演女主角——她演过一些电视剧角色，而父女俩已有三十年未见。尽管父亲的酗酒与暴戾曾给她留下阴影，她还是接下了这个角色。重聚之后，两人感受到的不只是加那利群岛拍摄地的灼人热浪，还有彼此之间暗暗翻涌的紧张关系。

戈雅奖得主罗德里戈·索罗戈延（《如野兽般》；《母亲》，2018年墨尔本电影节）新作的故事设定或许会让人想起《情感的价值》，但它舍弃了约阿希姆·提尔那种对父女和解的乐观笔触，转而呈现一幅更为灼热的家庭乱局图景。除了裙带关系、别有用心与创作剥削等议题，《挚爱》还巧妙动用了多种胶片质感——从沉郁的黑白到晃动而鲜活的手持镜头，从16毫米、35毫米到数字摄影——用以传达不同的心境、处境与对往事的不同视角。哈维尔·巴登以生涯最佳表演诠释了一个道德暧昧的父权化身，与之旗鼓相当的维多利亚·卢恩戈（《苦涩圣诞》，2026年墨尔本电影节）则以细腻优雅的表演，刻画出艾米莉亚的戒备与怨怼。
highlight_zh: 巴登生涯最佳表演，戈雅奖导演灼热剖开父女裂痕

synopsis_en:
This year’s Cannes Caméra d’Or winner is an unflinching, deeply felt portrait of a community seeking justice, and closure, in the wake of genocide.

It’s 2012 in Kibeho, a rural village in the mountains of south Rwanda. Though it’s been a generation since the 1994 genocide, people haven’t stopped seeking justice, and community-led Gacaca tribunals – more village assembly than formal trial – are ongoing. Vénéranda, who is deeply committed to the reconciliation process, has been asked to publicly forgive the man who killed most of her family, but her sister Suzanne is outraged at the suggestion. Meanwhile, Vénéranda has just learned with dismay that her daughter Tina is unexpectedly pregnant, news that complicates her commitment to healing and deepens her own reckoning with the past.

A decade in the making, Marie-Clémentine Dusabejambo’s debut film is a humanist portrait of the legacy of genocide and the challenges of reconciliation. Working largely with non-professional actors and drawing deeply from interviews with victims and recorded Gacaca testimonies, it deftly evokes the difficulty of moving on as individuals and communities. Blessed with an incandescent turn from Isabelle Kabano as the seething Suzanne, this is a profoundly intimate story of a nation still reckoning with its past
synopsis_zh:
本片是今年戛纳电影节金摄影机奖（最佳处女作）得主，以毫不回避又饱含深情的笔触，描绘了一个在种族大屠杀之后寻求正义与释怀的社区。

故事发生在2012年的基贝霍，一个位于卢旺达南部山区的乡村。距离1994年的大屠杀已过去了一代人的时间，但人们对正义的追寻从未停止，由社区主导的“加卡卡”法庭——与其说是正式审判，不如说更像村民集会——仍在持续进行。维内兰达全心投入和解进程，如今被要求当众宽恕那个杀害了她大部分家人的凶手，她的妹妹苏珊娜却对这一提议怒不可遏。与此同时，维内兰达沮丧地得知女儿蒂娜意外怀孕，这个消息动摇了她对疗愈的信念，也让她不得不更深地直面自己的过去。

玛丽-克莱芒蒂娜·杜萨贝让博的这部处女作历时十年打磨，是一幅关于大屠杀创伤遗产与和解之艰难的人文主义肖像。影片大量起用非职业演员，深入取材于受害者访谈和加卡卡法庭的庭审实录，细腻呈现了个人与社区在“向前走”这件事上的重重困境。伊莎贝尔·卡巴诺饰演的苏珊娜怒火中烧、光芒四射，让这个关于一个仍在与自身历史清算的国家的故事，显得格外私密动人。
highlight_zh: 戛纳金摄影机奖得主，卢旺达大屠杀后宽恕与和解的十年磨一剑之作

synopsis_en: A program of the award-winning short films, as chosen by the MIFF Shorts Awards jury.
synopsis_zh: 由墨尔本国际电影节短片奖评审团亲自甄选的获奖短片集锦展映。
highlight_zh: 评审团钦点的获奖短片合集，一场看尽本届最佳

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

Beastie Boys, Sonic Youth, Foo Fighters, Bikini Kill, Pavement and more, all at one fateful Aussie music festival. Get in line – we’re heading to 1995.

December 1995: riding high on her hit comedy Billy Madison and numerous celebrated music videos, Tamra Davis (Jean-Michel Basquiat: The Radiant Child, MIFF 2010) brought her Sony Hi8 camcorder to Australia on tour with her new husband, Mike D of the Beastie Boys. At Summersault, an upstart festival hoping to outshine the Big Day Out, Davis recorded electric live sets from the Beasties and pals Pavement, Sonic Youth, Dave Grohl’s new band Foo Fighters and Kim Deal’s Breeders-hiatus project The Amps. And as Bikini Kill’s Kathleen Hanna playfully interviewed other musos backstage, Davis unknowingly documented the riot grrrl icon falling for future husband Adam ‘Ad-Rock’ Horovitz.

Thirty years later, Davis found a shoebox of old 8mm videotapes while evacuating her home during the Los Angeles Palisades wildfire. This precious time capsule – a last hurrah of scrappy underground camaraderie before landmark albums and arena superstardom – formed the basis for this wistful feature-length window into another era. Summersault didn’t last, but its young promoter Steve Pavlovic went on to found cult label Modular Recordings, decisively shaping Australian indie music. “It was such a different time,” Davis told the crowd at the film’s 2026 Sundance premiere – and this shaggy hangout travelogue will take you right back there.
synopsis_zh:
Beastie Boys、音速青年、喷火战机、Bikini Kill、Pavement……这些名字齐聚在一场命运般的澳洲音乐节上。排好队——我们出发去1995年。

1995年12月，塔姆拉·戴维斯（《让-米歇尔·巴斯奇亚：光芒之子》，2010年墨尔本电影节）正凭喜剧《阿呆闯学堂》和多支广受赞誉的音乐录影带春风得意。她带着索尼Hi8摄像机来到澳大利亚，随新婚丈夫、Beastie Boys成员Mike D一起巡演。在一个立志盖过Big Day Out的新兴音乐节Summersault上，戴维斯拍下了Beastie Boys及好友们火花四溅的现场：Pavement、音速青年、戴夫·格罗尔的新乐队喷火战机，还有金·迪尔在Breeders休整期间组建的The Amps。而当Bikini Kill的凯瑟琳·汉娜在后台俏皮地采访其他乐手时，戴维斯不经意间记录下这位riot grrrl偶像与未来的丈夫Adam 'Ad-Rock' Horovitz坠入爱河的瞬间。

三十年后，洛杉矶帕利塞兹山火来袭，戴维斯在撤离家园时翻出了一鞋盒尘封的8毫米录像带。这份珍贵的时间胶囊——地下音乐圈那份粗粝情谊的最后狂欢，此后他们将迎来里程碑式的专辑和体育馆级的巨星生涯——成为这部感怀之作的基础，为我们打开一扇回望旧时代的窗。Summersault音乐节没能延续下去，但它年轻的主办人Steve Pavlovic后来创立了传奇厂牌Modular Recordings，深刻塑造了澳大利亚独立音乐的面貌。“那真是一个截然不同的年代，”戴维斯在影片2026年圣丹斯首映式上对观众说——而这部松弛惬意的巡演漫游记，会把你径直带回那里。
highlight_zh: 1995年绝版现场：Beastie Boys、音速青年、喷火战机同台的私藏影像

title_en: Better Go Mad in the Wild
synopsis_en:
Karlovy Vary’s Crystal Globe winner is an enchanting portrait of solitude and free-spirited abandon following eccentric twin brothers living in the Czech wilderness.

In a farmstead deep in the Šumavan Mountains, situated near Czechia’s western borders with Austria and Germany, live identical twins František and Ondřej Klišík. Now in their sixties, the brothers exist in bucolic bliss: drinking, bickering, swimming in glacial lakes and wandering – sometimes in the nude – through nearby forests. On other occasions, they commune with the animals in their midst: their chickens and cows; their dog Joint; and their majestic bull Nandy, whose voiceover recounts the brothers’ storied pasts and current concerns.

Informed by the eponymous book by journalist Aleš Palán and showered with three Czech Lion Awards as well as the top prize at the Karlovy Vary International Film Festival, Better Go Mad in the Wild is a dreamy and poetic glimpse into a life of wilful seclusion. Produced over a five-year period, during which director Miro Remo and his crew spent 60 days with the twins, it leverages its hybrid form – not quite essay film or observational documentary – to transport viewers to a world both elemental and unmoored from modern society. It’s a stunning work propelled by emotion and tone, joining František and Ondřej as they muse on mortality, their misadventures and the dreams keeping their maverick ways alive.
synopsis_zh:
这部卡罗维发利电影节水晶球奖得主，是一幅关于孤独与自由不羁的迷人肖像，讲述一对隐居捷克荒野的古怪双胞胎兄弟的故事。

在舒马瓦山脉深处的一座农庄里——靠近捷克与奥地利、德国接壤的西部边境——住着一对同卵双胞胎：弗朗齐歇克和翁德热·克利希克。兄弟俩已年过六旬，过着田园牧歌式的生活：喝酒、拌嘴、在冰川湖里游泳、在附近的森林里游荡——有时还一丝不挂。闲暇时，他们与身边的动物为伴：鸡和牛、狗狗“大麻卷”，还有威风凛凛的公牛南迪——影片借南迪的旁白，娓娓道来兄弟俩传奇的过往与眼下的心事。

影片取材于记者阿莱什·帕兰的同名著作，斩获三项捷克狮子奖，并摘得卡罗维发利国际电影节最高奖。《宁愿在荒野中发疯》以如梦似诗的笔触，凝视一种主动选择的遁世生活。影片历时五年拍摄，导演米罗·雷莫和团队与这对双胞胎共同生活了六十天，其介于散文电影与观察式纪录片之间的混合形态，将观众带入一个既原始质朴、又游离于现代社会之外的世界。这是一部由情感和氛围驱动的惊艳之作——跟随弗朗齐歇克和翁德热，听他们聊生死、话荒唐，以及那些让他们特立独行至今的梦想。
highlight_zh: 卡罗维发利最高奖纪录片：双胞胎老兄弟的荒野遁世诗篇

synopsis_en:
Set in a coastal New Zealand town over the summer of 2006, this queer coming-of-age story – executive-produced by Jane Campion – is a bittersweet slice of pre-smartphone-era teendom.

In the hazy days between Christmas and the new school year, 14-year-old Sid Bookman has a chance to reinvent herself for the tourists who flock to her small New Zealand beach town of Ōmaha. She dabbles in all the rebellious teenage rites of passage – drinking, smoking weed, self-piercing and generally trying anything to impress the popular crowd – but also dips her toe into the tantalising and dangerous realms of the internet. As Sid encounters strangers in chat rooms, she flirts with the girl she has a crush on by impersonating her best friend’s brother on an instant-messaging app. Despite her desperate bids for acceptance, she captures the attention of her older sister’s friend Freya, who sees the real Sid underneath all the posturing.

The debut feature from writer/director Paloma Schneideman (Gate Crash, MIFF 2023), a former MIFF Accelerator Lab participant and graduate of Jane Campion’s film school program A Wave in the Ocean, Big Girls Don’t Cry is a sensitive, intimate and unflinchingly honest portrayal of queer adolescence. Ani Palmer’s remarkable debut performance steers the film, conveying Sid’s youthful angst, burgeoning sexual curiosity and uneasiness in her own skin with impressive restraint; while Noah Taylor (Predestination, MIFF 2014) plays a key supporting role.
synopsis_zh:
故事发生在2006年夏天的新西兰海滨小镇。这部由简·坎皮恩担任监制的酷儿成长故事，是一段苦乐参半的智能手机时代来临前的青春记忆。

在圣诞节与新学期之间那段慵懒迷离的日子里，14岁的席德·布克曼迎来了一个重塑自我的机会——每年夏天，游客们都会涌入她所在的新西兰海滨小镇奥马哈。她把叛逆少年的各种成人礼尝试了个遍：喝酒、抽大麻、自己打耳洞，想尽办法讨好受欢迎的小圈子；与此同时，她也开始试探互联网那个诱人又危险的世界。席德在聊天室里结识陌生人，还在即时通讯软件上冒充闺蜜的哥哥，与自己暗恋的女孩调情。就在她拼命寻求认同的时候，姐姐的朋友弗蕾娅注意到了她——透过所有的伪装，弗蕾娅看见了那个真实的席德。

这是编剧兼导演帕洛玛·施奈德曼（《不速之客》，2023年墨尔本电影节）的长片处女作。她曾参加墨尔本电影节加速器实验室，也是简·坎皮恩电影培训项目"海洋中的一朵浪"的毕业生。《大女孩不哭》以细腻、私密而毫不回避的诚实笔触，刻画了一段酷儿少女的青春期。阿妮·帕尔默的银幕首秀令人惊艳，她以克制而精准的表演，传递出席德的少年愁绪、萌动的性好奇与浑身不自在的别扭感；诺亚·泰勒（《前目的地》，2014年墨尔本电影节）则出演了一个重要配角。
highlight_zh: 简·坎皮恩监制的酷儿成长处女作，好莱坞报道盛赞

synopsis_en:
Pedro Almodóvar returns with this witty, award-winning metafiction that satirises the vampiric nature of creativity.

It’s 2004, and the wells of inspiration are drying up for movie director Elsa. Worse still, despite her firefighter/stripper boyfriend’s coddling, she’s as burdened by migraines as she is with her friends’ troubles. But all of this is merely a story; a creation of filmmaker Raúl, Elsa is the protagonist of the film that he’s struggling to complete in 2026, much to the dismay of his supportive partner, Santi. That spark suddenly returns when Raúl’s assistant Mónica takes leave to help a friend who has just lost a child, a tragedy that becomes a plot point in his own script. Perhaps this new inspiration will give Raúl insights into his own life and relationships; but how far is too far when an artist continually cribs from the experiences of others?

Much like Pain and Glory (MIFF 2019), Pedro Almodóvar’s latest Competition headliner at Cannes – where it shared the Soundtrack Award – is an ingenious piece of self-portraiture that interrogates creativity and its impediments. The enthralling film-within-a-film explodes onto the screen with the director’s signature vivid colours and sumptuous settings, which are enhanced by the piquant soundtrack by long-time collaborator Alberto Iglesias. Leads Bárbara Lennie and Leonardo Sbaraglia are stellar as mirror images of each other and of Almodóvar himself, propelling an autofictional triumph that ponders art’s (mis)appropriation of life.
synopsis_zh:
佩德罗·阿莫多瓦携这部机智诙谐、屡获殊荣的元电影归来，讽刺创作那种近乎吸血的本性。

2004年，电影导演艾尔莎的灵感之井正在枯竭。更糟的是，尽管有消防员兼脱衣舞男的男友百般呵护，她依然被偏头痛和朋友们的烦心事双重折磨。但这一切其实只是一个故事——艾尔莎是导演劳尔笔下的人物，是他在2026年苦苦无法完成的那部电影的主角，这让他一直默默支持他的伴侣桑蒂颇为忧心。转机突然降临：劳尔的助理莫妮卡请假去照顾一位刚刚痛失孩子的朋友，而这场悲剧竟成了他剧本里的一个情节。这份新的灵感或许能让劳尔看清自己的生活与感情；可当一个艺术家不断从他人的经历中取材，界限究竟在哪里？

与《痛苦与荣耀》（2019年墨尔本电影节展映）一脉相承，阿莫多瓦这部新作是戛纳主竞赛的重头戏——并在那里分享了最佳配乐奖——一幅精妙的自画像，直面创作及其种种阻碍。这部引人入胜的戏中戏在银幕上轰然绽放，导演标志性的浓烈色彩与华美布景一应俱全，长期合作者阿尔贝托·伊格莱西亚斯辛辣的配乐更为之增色。两位主演芭芭拉·蕾妮与莱昂纳多·斯巴拉格利亚光彩夺目，互为镜像，也共同映照出阿莫多瓦本人，成就了这部叩问艺术如何（错误地）挪用生活的自我虚构杰作。
highlight_zh: 阿莫多瓦戛纳获奖新作，戏中戏叩问创作与道德的边界。

synopsis_en:
A landmark film of the Brazilian Cinema Novo movement, this underseen 1964 Cannes Competition western returns to the screen in a stunning 4K restoration.

In the 1940s, during a drought in the Brazilian sertão, or hinterlands, fed-up ranch hand Manuel (Geraldo Del Rey) kills his deceitful boss and goes on the lam with his wife Rosa (Yóna Magalhães). Together, they venture to the holy site of Monte Santo, where, now outlaws, they align themselves with the violent, self-proclaimed holy man Sebastião (Lídio Silva), who is leading a revolt against wealthy landowners. The mercenary Antônio das Mortes (Maurício do Valle), hired by the church and rich locals, is sent to kill Sebastião – and, in turn, the bandit Corisco (Othon Bastos) is out to stop Antônio.

Causing a sensation at Cannes when it premiered in Competition in 1964, Black God, White Devil won the FIPRESCI Prize and further established the career of director Glauber Rocha, who was only 25 years old at the time. A sweeping, urgent political allegory suffused with mythmaking and history, Rocha’s second film was described by Luis Buñuel as “the most beautiful thing I have seen in a decade, filled with a savage poetry”. “Rocha’s hectic drama is, in effect, a political western that rages at Brazil’s governmental corruption and plutocratic oppression [with] raw, grand, urgent images.” – The New Yorker

4K restoration from Metropoles Productions, based on original 35mm materials preserved by the Cinemateca Brasileira. Restoration by Cinecolor Digital and JLS Studios.
synopsis_zh:
作为巴西新电影运动（Cinema Novo）的里程碑之作，这部鲜为人知的1964年戛纳主竞赛西部片以惊艳的4K修复版重返银幕。

故事发生在1940年代，巴西腹地（sertão）大旱之际，忍无可忍的牧场工人曼努埃尔（杰拉尔多·德尔·雷伊 饰）杀死了欺骗他的老板，带着妻子罗莎（尤娜·马加良斯 饰）踏上逃亡之路。两人前往圣地蒙特桑托，如今已沦为逃犯的他们，投靠了自封圣人的暴力布道者塞巴斯蒂昂（利迪奥·席尔瓦 饰）——此人正领导着一场反抗富有地主的暴动。受教会和当地富人雇佣的杀手安东尼奥·达斯·莫尔特斯（毛里西奥·多·瓦莱 饰）奉命刺杀塞巴斯蒂昂，而土匪科里斯科（奥东·巴斯托斯 饰）则誓要阻止安东尼奥。

1964年在戛纳主竞赛单元首映时轰动一时，《黑上帝白魔鬼》斩获费比西影评人奖，也进一步奠定了导演格劳贝尔·罗恰的地位——当时他年仅25岁。这部罗恰的第二部长片是一则气势恢宏、迫切有力的政治寓言，交织着神话与历史。布努埃尔盛赞它是"我十年来见过的最美之物，充满野性的诗意"。《纽约客》评价道："罗恰这部激烈躁动的作品实质上是一部政治西部片，以粗粝、宏大、迫切的影像，怒斥巴西的政府腐败与财阀压迫。"

4K修复版由Metropoles Productions出品，基于巴西电影资料馆保存的35毫米原始素材，由Cinecolor Digital与JLS Studios共同修复。
highlight_zh: 巴西新电影开山之作，布努埃尔盛赞的戛纳获奖政治西部片，4K修复重现

synopsis_en:
Screen icon Isabelle Huppert mesmerises as a glamorous vampire in iconoclastic queer filmmaker Ulrike Ottinger’s high-camp comedy.

Countess Elizabeth Báthory awakens from a four-century-long slumber in modern-day Vienna, costumed in extravagant crimson gowns and a perfectly coiffed copper updo. Reunited with her faithful handmaid Hermine and her self-hating vegetarian vampire nephew Rudi Bubi Baron von Strudl (with his sceptical psychotherapist in tow), the countess sets out to find and destroy an ancient magical book that has the power to end vampire immortality. With police inspectors and a duo of dithering vampirologists in hot pursuit, the eccentric entourage scours the city’s baroque libraries and cathedrals – but the countess soon realises that her nephew’s plans for the book are very different from her own.

A glorious addition to an astonishing oeuvre, The Blood Countess is brought to eternal life by one-of-a-kind New German Cinema filmmaker Ulrike Ottinger (Paris Calligrammes, MIFF 2020), who is the subject of an entire strand devoted to her work and influences this year, Ulrike Ottinger: Radical Travels. Co-written by Nobel laureate and author of The Piano Teacher Elfriede Jelinek, this playful reimagining of one of history’s most notorious serial killers is a sumptuous visual feast. In a role she was born to play, Isabelle Huppert embodies the coolly fabulous countess, leading a committed cast including Birgit Minichmayr (Everyone Else, MIFF 2016), Lars Eidinger (Dying, MIFF 2024), Thomas Schubert (Afire, MIFF 2023) and iconic former Eurovision winner Conchita Wurst.
synopsis_zh:
银幕传奇伊莎贝尔·于佩尔化身魅惑吸血鬼，在离经叛道的酷儿导演乌尔莉克·奥廷格这部极尽坎普趣味的喜剧中光芒四射。

伊丽莎白·巴托里伯爵夫人在沉睡四个世纪后于当代维也纳苏醒，一袭华丽猩红长裙，一头一丝不苟的铜色高髻。她与忠心的侍女赫尔敏娜重逢，还有那位自我厌弃的素食吸血鬼侄子鲁迪·布比·冯·施特鲁德男爵（身后还跟着他满腹狐疑的心理医生）。伯爵夫人此行的目标，是找到并毁掉一本足以终结吸血鬼永生的古老魔法书。在警探和一对手忙脚乱的吸血鬼学家的穷追不舍之下，这支古怪的队伍搜遍了全城的巴洛克图书馆与大教堂——但伯爵夫人很快发现，侄子对这本书另有打算，与她的计划背道而驰。

《血色女伯爵》为一份惊人的创作履历再添华彩，赋予它不朽生命的正是新德国电影独一无二的作者乌尔莉克·奥廷格（《巴黎图志》，2020年墨尔本影展）——今年影展还专门开设了「乌尔莉克·奥廷格：激进之旅」单元，全面呈现她的作品与影响。影片由诺贝尔文学奖得主、《钢琴教师》作者埃尔弗里德·耶利内克联合编剧，将历史上最臭名昭著的连环杀手之一进行了一次妙趣横生的重新想象，堪称一场奢华的视觉盛宴。于佩尔仿佛天生就该出演这位冷艳绝伦的伯爵夫人，与她同台的还有毕尔吉特·米尼希迈尔（《完美第二对》，2016年墨尔本影展）、拉斯·艾丁格（《将死之人》，2024年墨尔本影展）、托马斯·舒伯特（《红色天空》，2023年墨尔本影展），以及传奇的欧洲歌唱大赛冠军肯奇塔·沃斯特。
highlight_zh: 于佩尔演吸血鬼女伯爵，耶利内克编剧的高坎普酷儿喜剧

synopsis_en:
A filmmaker sifts through old videos and memories in this emotionally devastating coming-of-age marvel, a multiple award winner at Locarno and Toronto.

Eight-year-old Sasha (Eylul Guven) is growing up surrounded by brothers, one of a sprawling Hungarian immigrant family on Vancouver Island in the 1990s. The big family’s attention is captured by troubled elder brother Jeremy (Edik Beddoes), whose rebellious behaviour seems like a cry for help. Years later, now a filmmaker, Sasha (Amy Zimmer) combs through old home videos and bittersweet memories, trying to make sense of her formative years.

Earning comparisons to Charlotte Wells’s beloved Aftersun (MIFF 2022), Blue Heron won the Swatch First Feature Award upon its premiere at Locarno and was crowned Best Canadian Discovery at TIFF. Sophy Romvari has directed a number of celebrated shorts including 2020’s Still Processing, effectively an autobiographical companion to Blue Heron; her hugely impressive, affecting debut feature further confirms her as a major emerging voice in cinema.
synopsis_zh:
一位电影人翻检旧录像与记忆碎片——这部情感冲击力惊人的成长杰作，在洛迦诺和多伦多电影节上斩获多项大奖。

上世纪九十年代的温哥华岛，八岁的萨莎（埃伊吕尔·居文 饰）在一群兄弟的环绕中长大，是一个庞大的匈牙利移民家庭的一员。全家人的注意力都被问题重重的大哥杰里米（埃迪克·贝多斯 饰）所牵动，他的叛逆行径更像是一声无助的呼救。多年后，已成为电影人的萨莎（艾米·齐默 饰）翻看一盘盘家庭录像，在苦乐参半的回忆中，试图理清那段塑造了自己的岁月。

《蓝鹭》被拿来与夏洛特·威尔斯广受喜爱的《晒后假日》（2022年墨尔本电影节展映）相提并论，首映即摘得洛迦诺电影节斯沃琪最佳处女作奖，又在多伦多电影节获封最佳加拿大新发现。导演索菲·罗姆瓦里此前已拍出多部备受赞誉的短片，包括2020年的《仍在冲洗》——那几乎是《蓝鹭》的自传体姊妹篇；这部动人心魄、令人惊艳的长片首作，进一步确立了她作为影坛重要新声的地位。
highlight_zh: 洛迦诺、多伦多双料获奖，媲美《晒后假日》的催泪成长杰作。

synopsis_en:
A poetic evocation of the senses through the grain of film.

Matthew Berka’s gorgeously tactile rendering of the body’s senses and the delicacy of perception deploys macro shots of eye movements, impossibly fine fibres and barely audible piano to wondrous effect. A film in which the senses blur, the body becomes the camera and vice versa.
synopsis_zh:
一首借胶片颗粒唤醒感官的影像之诗。

马修·贝尔卡以极富触感的绝美影像，呈现身体的感官与知觉的微妙：眼球转动的微距特写、纤细得不可思议的纤维、几不可闻的钢琴声，交织出奇妙的效果。在这部影片里，感官彼此交融——身体成为摄影机，摄影机也成为身体。
highlight_zh: 胶片颗粒里的感官之诗，身体与摄影机彼此交融的实验影像。

synopsis_en:
A disgraced, sex-addicted cop is thrust into Sydney’s crime-ridden gay district – and into a raunchy entanglement – in this neon-soaked queer erotic thriller.

Battling both sex addiction and sexual misconduct allegations, twentysomething undercover cop Aiden (Tim Pocock, Godless: The Eastfield Exorcism , MIFF 2023) is reassigned to an inner-city precinct among Sydney’s nightclubs, bathhouses and drag venues. While investigating, he hooks up with hot bartender and sex worker Cody (Tom Rodgers) – a chance encounter that also gets him embroiled in the machinations of drag mob boss Fat Frankie (Paul Capsis, Head On, MIFF 1998). Caught up in drug deals, shootouts, a deadly heist and more, Aiden must find a way out before he loses himself in this sinister web.

Set mostly around Sydney’s Oxford Street, Dean Francis’s (Drown) intriguing tale of danger and desire transports the audience to an intricate underworld of crime, conspiracy and duplicitous allegiances. Taking visual cues from Brian De Palma and Gregg Araki, Body Blow is a stunning lovechild of classic film noir and 1990s erotic thrillers, infusing its gripping tale of (anti)heroism and redemption with a playful critique of hyper-masculinity and deprivation. Pocock delivers a formidable lead performance, embodying Aiden’s pent-up lust and dubiously masked fragility, while newcomer Rodgers is beguiling as the film’s seductive spin on the femme fatale.
synopsis_zh:
一名声名扫地、深陷性瘾的警察被调往悉尼罪案频发的同志街区，随即卷入一段火辣纠葛——这是一部霓虹浸染的酷儿情色惊悚片。

二十多岁的卧底警察艾登（蒂姆·波考克 饰，曾出演《无神：伊斯特菲尔德驱魔》，2023年墨尔本电影节展映）一边与性瘾搏斗，一边背负着性行为不端的指控，被调派到市中心分局，辖区遍布悉尼的夜店、澡堂和变装表演场所。调查期间，他与性感酒保兼性工作者科迪（汤姆·罗杰斯 饰）勾搭上了——这场偶然的邂逅也让他被卷入变装黑帮头目“胖弗兰基”（保罗·卡普西斯 饰，曾出演《迎头撞上》，1998年墨尔本电影节展映）的阴谋算计之中。毒品交易、枪战、致命劫案接踵而至，艾登必须在迷失自我之前，从这张阴暗的罗网中找到出路。

影片主要围绕悉尼牛津街展开，迪恩·弗朗西斯（《溺》）用这个危险与欲望交织的故事，将观众带入一个充满罪恶、阴谋与尔虞我诈的复杂地下世界。《重击》在视觉上师承布莱恩·德·帕尔玛与格雷格·阿拉基，堪称经典黑色电影与九十年代情色惊悚片的惊艳结晶，在讲述（反）英雄主义与救赎的紧张故事之余，还对过度男性气质与压抑匮乏投以戏谑的批判。波考克奉献了一场极具压迫感的主演表演，将艾登压抑的欲望与遮掩不住的脆弱演绎得淋漓尽致；新人罗杰斯则化身影片对“蛇蝎美人”的诱人变奏，令人着迷。
highlight_zh: 霓虹酷儿黑色情色惊悚片，把类型片的同性潜文本大胆写成明文。

synopsis_en:
Desperate for independence, Sonja discovers the vibrant world of krump dancing, where she embraces expressiveness, challenges social judgement and finds her people.

When her mother suddenly dies, Sonja (played by impressive newcomer Olivia Hargroder) is thrown into tumult. Dealing with early-twenties existential angst and a sense of responsibility for her teenage younger sister Emma (Julia Savage, Blaze, MIFF 2022), she has a lot on her plate. Suddenly under the care of her controlling grandma and – as a young woman living with Down syndrome – constantly faced with a society that judges what she’s capable of, Sonja is desperate to be herself and take charge of her own life. When a chance encounter with the charismatic Hakim (Elijah Williams, Home and Away) leads her to a krump class, Sonja discovers a life-changing outlet for expression.

Since her Tropfest-winning 2009 short Be My Brother, filmmaker Genevieve Clay-Smith has long been an advocate for stronger onscreen representation of people of diverse backgrounds and identities; her 2018 short Inclusion Makes the World More Vibrant effectively distils her mission statement in its title. Filled with energy, enthusiasm, optimism and a gentle dose of provocation, Clay-Smith’s debut fiction feature is a moving, empowering, feel-good Aussie film.

The Sat 22 Aug screening of this film is a Sensory Friendly session. More information about our Access offerings is available here [https://miff.com.au/access].
synopsis_zh:
渴望独立的桑雅偶然闯入狂派舞（krump）的炫彩世界，在这里她尽情释放自我、直面世俗眼光，也找到了属于自己的同伴。

母亲骤然离世，让桑雅（由令人惊艳的新人奥利维亚·哈格罗德饰演）的生活陷入动荡。她既要应付二十岁出头的人生迷茫，又觉得自己有责任照顾还在念中学的妹妹艾玛（茱莉亚·萨维奇，曾出演2022年墨尔本电影节影片《烈焰》）——肩上的担子着实不轻。如今她被交由控制欲极强的外婆照管，而作为一名唐氏综合征患者，她还要时时面对社会对她能力的质疑与评判。桑雅渴望做真正的自己，掌控自己的人生。一次偶然的机会，她结识了魅力十足的哈基姆（伊莱贾·威廉姆斯，出演过《聚散离合》），并跟随他走进狂派舞课堂，从此找到了改变一生的表达出口。

自2009年凭短片《做我的兄弟》拿下Tropfest短片节大奖以来，导演吉纳维芙·克莱-史密斯一直致力于让多元背景与身份的人群在银幕上获得更多呈现；她2018年的短片《包容让世界更多彩》，片名本身就是她的创作宣言。这部导演剧情长片处女作充满能量、热情与乐观，又带着一丝温和的锋芒，是一部动人、励志、让人心头一暖的澳大利亚电影。

本片8月22日（周六）场次为感官友好专场。有关无障碍观影服务的更多信息，请访问 https://miff.com.au/access。
highlight_zh: 唐氏女孩借狂派舞夺回人生主导权，暖心励志的澳洲佳作

synopsis_en:
In this striking animation set in a world of anthropomorphic animals, a queer coyote breaks the wall of silence with her mother nine years after her coming out.

Bouchra, a coyote, is a New York–based Moroccan filmmaker in the throes of creating a semi-autobiographical feature. Unable to access the inspiration she seeks, she decides to call her mother, Aïcha, who lives in Casablanca, to address the topic they’ve left untouched for almost a decade: Bouchra’s sexuality. Despite staying in touch, mother and daughter have never discussed Bouchra’s same-sex relationships, nor her ‘out’ life in the US. As the filmmaker starts devising storyboards, we’re pulled into a genre-defying hybrid work that blends memory, fantasy and metafiction.

Winning the top queer prize at the Chicago International Film Festival, Bouchra recalls directors Orian Barki and Meriem Bennani’s 2020 miniseries 2 Lizards in its evocation of a hyperreal world where animals act and interact like humans. Blending live action, photogrammetry and 3D scanning, it uses actual snippets of conversation between Bennani and her mother to launch into confabulation, with Bouchra’s film-within-a-film offering a medium for catharsis, conjecture and wish fulfilment. Empathetic and visionary, Bouchra meditates on the act of mediation itself – how cinema, just like discussions held across distance and time, necessarily hinges on our version of the truth.
synopsis_zh:
在这部设定于拟人化动物世界的惊艳动画中，一只酷儿郊狼在出柜九年后，终于打破了与母亲之间的沉默之墙。

郊狼布什拉是一位旅居纽约的摩洛哥电影人，正埋头创作一部半自传性质的长片。苦于找不到想要的灵感，她决定打电话给住在卡萨布兰卡的母亲阿伊莎，谈一谈那个母女俩搁置了近十年的话题：布什拉的性取向。尽管一直保持联络，母女之间却从未谈起布什拉的同性恋情，也没提过她在美国的“出柜”生活。随着这位电影人开始绘制分镜，我们被卷入一部难以归类的混合之作——记忆、幻想与元虚构在其中交织。

《布什拉》摘得芝加哥国际电影节最高酷儿奖项，其对一个超真实世界的营造——动物们像人类一样行事与相处——令人想起两位导演奥里安·巴尔基与梅里埃姆·本纳尼2020年的迷你剧《两只蜥蜴》。影片融合实拍、摄影测量与3D扫描技术，以本纳尼与母亲真实对话的片段为起点展开虚构叙事，布什拉的“片中片”则成为宣泄、揣想与愿望达成的载体。这部充满共情与远见的作品，最终是对“中介”这一行为本身的沉思——电影，正如跨越距离与时间的对话，终究依赖于我们各自版本的真相。
highlight_zh: 芝加哥电影节酷儿大奖动画，郊狼母女出柜九年后打破沉默

synopsis_en:
An annoyingly selfish public-transport passenger provokes an imaginative, strikingly tactile reflection on the space we owe one another.

When a person on a bus reclines their seat too far into a young woman’s lap, she pushes back, provoking a more surreal and expansive meditation on how we intrude upon and defend both physical and territorial boundaries, individually and collectively. This clever blend of hand-drawn linework and stop-motion paper cut-outs uses its tactile textures to express subtly provocative ideas.
synopsis_zh:
一位在公共交通上自私得令人恼火的乘客，引发了一场关于我们彼此该保留多少空间的想象力十足、质感鲜明的思考。

公交车上，有人把座椅靠背放得太低，几乎压进一位年轻女子的膝间，她奋力顶了回去——由此展开一场更超现实、更开阔的冥想：无论作为个体还是群体，我们如何侵入、又如何守卫身体与领地的边界。影片巧妙融合手绘线条与定格剪纸动画，以可触可感的质地传达出暗含锋芒的观点。
highlight_zh: 手绘与剪纸定格交织，一场关于人际边界的超现实动画短片。

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

From chart-topper to tabloid fodder and back again, the legendary British rock balladeer Marianne Faithfull reflects candidly on her storied past.

Plucked from obscurity by the manager of The Rolling Stones, Marianne Faithfull had her first hit in 1964 with ‘As Tears Go By’. She was 17. Hers would be a monumental career spanning six decades, punctuated by both high-profile love affairs and highly publicised struggles with drug abuse, anorexia and homelessness. But, for all its wealth of archival materials, Broken English is no conventional rock doc. Here, in a playful but sincere twist, the husky-voiced chanteuse is interviewed by a record keeper (George MacKay, Rose of Nevada, MIFF 2026) at the fictional Ministry of Not Forgetting – a bureaucratic institution overseen by none other than Tilda Swinton – while luminaries such as Courtney Love and Beth Orton chime in with their own reflections.

Directors Iain Forsyth and Jane Pollard have specialised in immersive, form-defying documentaries built around musicians, from Nick Cave in 20,000 Days on Earth (MIFF 2014) to Emiliana Torrini in The Extraordinary Miss Flower (MIFF 2025). This inventive portrait of a legendary singer-songwriter is suffused with a particular, unanticipated pathos: Faithfull died in January 2025 while the film was still in production, making the rendition we see of her 2018 track ‘Misunderstanding’ – accompanied by Cave and Warren Ellis – her final recorded performance.
synopsis_zh:
从榜单冠军到小报头条，再重回舞台中央——英国传奇摇滚歌者玛丽安·菲斯福尔坦诚回望自己跌宕起伏的一生。

1964年，被滚石乐队经纪人从默默无闻中发掘的玛丽安·菲斯福尔凭一曲《As Tears Go By》一炮而红，那年她只有17岁。此后她的音乐生涯横跨六十年，其间既有备受瞩目的恋情，也有被媒体大肆报道的毒瘾、厌食症与流落街头的挣扎。不过，尽管坐拥海量珍贵档案素材，《破碎英语》绝非一部循规蹈矩的摇滚纪录片：影片以一个俏皮又真挚的巧思，让这位烟嗓歌后接受一位档案管理员（乔治·麦凯，《内华达玫瑰》，2026年墨尔本电影节）的访谈——地点设在虚构的“不忘记部”，一个由蒂尔达·斯文顿亲自坐镇的官僚机构；科特妮·洛芙、贝丝·奥顿等名家也纷纷现身，讲述她们心中的菲斯福尔。

导演伊恩·福赛斯与简·波拉德一向擅长以音乐人为核心打造沉浸式、打破形式边界的纪录片，从《地球两万天》（2014年墨尔本电影节）里的尼克·凯夫，到《非凡的弗劳尔小姐》（2025年墨尔本电影节）里的艾米莉安娜·托里尼。这部关于传奇创作歌手的别出心裁的肖像，还笼罩着一层始料未及的哀婉：菲斯福尔于2025年1月离世，彼时影片仍在制作之中——片中她与尼克·凯夫、沃伦·埃利斯合作演绎的2018年曲目《Misunderstanding》，就此成为她生前最后的录音演出。
highlight_zh: 玛丽安·菲斯福尔的绝唱：蒂尔达·斯文顿加持的反套路摇滚纪录片

title_en: By the Faith of José Gerónimo
synopsis_en:
A transfixing, meditative journey into faith, history and cultural identity in the Dominican Republic.

Heralding a major new talent in Juliano Kunert, this ephemeral trip through the Antilles retraces paths of popular faith and ancestral experiences that shaped the filmmaker’s own childhood. Religion, memory and colonial echoes overlap in the film’s exuberant compositions, high-contrast cuts and startling bursts of colour.
synopsis_zh:
一场令人屏息的冥想式旅程，深入多米尼加共和国的信仰、历史与文化认同。

本片宣告了胡利亚诺·库纳特这位重要新锐的诞生。这趟穿越安的列斯群岛的空灵之旅，重访了塑造导演童年的民间信仰之路与先祖记忆。宗教、记忆与殖民历史的回响，在影片浓烈的构图、高反差的剪辑和惊艳迸发的色彩中层层交叠。
highlight_zh: 新锐导演的冥想式影像诗，加勒比信仰与殖民记忆交织。

title_en: Can She Bake a Cherry Pie?
synopsis_en:
Recently restored to 4K, this underseen odd-couple romance is a sweet slice of 1980s New York life featuring cameos from Larry David and Orson Welles.

After her husband unceremoniously leaves her one morning, Zee heads out to wander the streets of the Upper West Side in a daze, muttering to herself about what she could have done differently. When she stops at Café Central to eat her feelings with a big bowl of chocolate ice cream, Zee’s loud sobs are noticed by Eli, a fellow divorcee, sitting at the next table. Before long, the two strangers develop a distinctly neurotic New York–style case of amour fou, philosophising, bickering and engaging in a courtship characterised by acts of mutual wallowing.

This dryly funny romance from iconoclastic American independent filmmaker Henry Jaglom (who died just last September) is an invaluable time capsule of 1980s New York. Filmed on the streets among real pedestrians, its freewheeling style lends the film a refreshing spontaneity, enhanced by the wonderfully quirky central performances by Karen Black (Five Easy Pieces) and the director’s brother Michael Emil (Insignificance, MIFF 1985), as well as memorable cameos from Carol Kane, a young Larry David and Orson Welles – Jaglom’s friend and business partner – as a movie magician.
synopsis_zh:
这部鲜为人知的欢喜冤家式爱情片新近完成4K修复，是一块关于1980年代纽约生活的甜美切片，还有拉里·大卫和奥逊·威尔斯的客串亮相。

一天早晨，丈夫毫无征兆地离开了齐。她失魂落魄地在上西区的街头游荡，喃喃自语着自己当初还能做些什么。当她走进中央咖啡馆，想用一大碗巧克力冰淇淋浇愁时，响亮的抽泣声引起了邻桌伊莱的注意——他同样刚刚离婚。没过多久，这两个陌生人之间就滋生出一段典型纽约式的神经质痴恋：高谈阔论、拌嘴斗气，在彼此的顾影自怜中完成了一场别样的求爱。

这部冷面幽默的爱情片出自特立独行的美国独立电影人亨利·雅格洛姆之手（他于去年九月刚刚离世），是一枚记录1980年代纽约的珍贵时间胶囊。影片在真实街头、真实路人中间拍摄，自由随性的风格赋予它一种清新的即兴感，而凯伦·布莱克（《五支歌》）与导演的哥哥迈克尔·埃米尔（《无足轻重》，1985年墨尔本电影节）妙趣横生的主演表演更为其增色不少。此外还有卡罗尔·凯恩、年轻的拉里·大卫，以及雅格洛姆的挚友兼生意伙伴奥逊·威尔斯令人难忘的客串——后者饰演一位电影魔术师。
highlight_zh: 4K修复的80年代纽约爱情小品，奥逊·威尔斯与青年拉里·大卫惊喜客串

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

SUPPORTED BY

A tribute to the resilience, camaraderie and cultural significance of Chinese Australians in football.

A community’s efforts to belong see a group of young Chinese Australian men come together and play their national game of Aussie Rules with true-blue passion and gusto.
synopsis_zh:
呈现方

支持方

这部影片致敬华裔澳大利亚人在澳式足球中展现的坚韧、情谊与文化意义。

为了融入与归属，一群年轻的华裔澳大利亚小伙子走到一起，以地道的澳洲热血与豪情，投身这项国民运动——澳式足球。
highlight_zh: 华裔小伙闯荡澳式足球场，用热血赢得归属感的动人故事。

synopsis_en:
A lawyer receives a cash settlement after finding a finger in her fast food – but things start to go sideways when the company investigates how it got there.

Jess (Judy Greer, Lemon, MIFF 2017), a lawyer in a nondescript Midwestern town, is struggling. With her daughter having left for college, she’s struck by how empty an empty nest feels, particularly when left alone with her nice but not overly exciting husband (Sean Astin) and no money to go anywhere. Her problems seem to be solved when, at local fast food joint Blake Junior’s, she finds a finger in her chilli con carne bowl and a damage-controlling franchise executive offers her a $100,000 settlement on the spot. But when the restaurant’s owner and namesake (John Goodman) hears of the payout, he smells something fishy, and puts his shady yet trusted friend Dave (Bryan Cranston) on the case.

Based (very loosely) on a true story that took place in California in 2005, this tar-black crime comedy evokes the early works of the Coen brothers but determinedly follows its own spicy path. Blessed with a cast of incredible character actors all having a ball, Chili Finger is headlined by an electric Greer. So often consigned to supporting parts, she goes to town on her meaty leading role, digging into Jess’s emotional complexity and giving the best performance of her career. It all adds up to a wild, hilarious ride of bad decisions and worse consequences.
synopsis_zh:
一位律师在快餐里吃出一根手指，拿到了一笔现金和解金——但当公司开始调查手指的来历，事情逐渐失控。

杰丝（朱迪·格里尔，《柠檬》，2017年墨尔本电影节）是美国中西部一座平凡小镇上的律师，日子过得并不顺心。女儿离家上大学后，她才真切体会到空巢有多空——身边只剩一个人不错但乏善可陈的丈夫（西恩·奥斯汀），又没钱出门散心。转机似乎从天而降：在本地快餐店“小布莱克”，她在一碗辣肉酱里吃出了一根手指，忙着控制事态的加盟商高管当场开出10万美元的和解金。可当餐厅的老板兼冠名人（约翰·古德曼）听说了这笔赔偿，他嗅到了猫腻，随即派出自己那位不太靠谱却深得信任的老友戴夫（布莱恩·科兰斯顿）去查个究竟。

本片（非常松散地）取材于2005年发生在加州的真实事件，这部黑到发亮的犯罪喜剧令人想起科恩兄弟的早期作品，却又坚定地走出了自己的辛辣路数。全片汇集了一众演技派性格演员，人人演得酣畅淋漓，而领衔的格里尔更是光芒四射。她长年被困在配角位置，这次终于在一个有血有肉的主角身上大展拳脚，深挖杰丝的情感层次，交出了职业生涯最好的一次表演。这一切汇成一场荒唐决定与更糟后果连环相扣的疯狂爆笑之旅。
highlight_zh: 科恩式黑色犯罪喜剧，老白与约翰·古德曼飙戏，格里尔生涯最佳

title_zh: 烟囱小镇的普佩尔：时间冻结
synopsis_en:
This thoughtful, visually vivid sequel to anime mega-hit Poupelle of Chimney Town is an epic adventure about the power of belief.

Though now hailed as the hero of Chimney Town, Lubicchi is struggling to move on after the departure of Poupelle, his magical friend made of garbage. When an accident transports him to a mythical world populated by talking animals and impish spirits, he is told by the realm’s rat queen that he can only return home if he manages to restart the land’s giant clock, which has been frozen at 11.59 for decades. With the help of Fluff, a large white cat with attitude, Lubicchi discovers that a grieving clockmaker and a plant spirit in human form are two figures who hold the key to his quest.

The film adaptation of Poupelle of Chimney Town struck a chord in Japan and abroad when it emerged during the pandemic; Akihiro Nishino’s original picture book has since also been adapted into musicals, ballet and kabuki. Working from an original script by Nishino, this sequel is another grand family adventure dealing with big themes like grief and coming of age. Where Poupelle radiated steampunk vibes, however, Frozen in Time takes on a more fantastical, psychedelic style, constructing a visual world reminiscent of Hayao Miyazaki’s all-time classic Spirited Away.
synopsis_zh:
这部续作承接现象级动画《烟囱小镇的普佩尔》，画面绚丽、心思细腻，是一场关于"相信的力量"的宏大冒险。

鲁比奇如今已被誉为烟囱小镇的英雄，却始终无法从垃圾人普佩尔——那位神奇挚友——的离去中走出来。一场意外将他带入一个住着会说话的动物和顽皮精灵的神话世界。当地的鼠之女王告诉他：想回家，就必须让这片土地上的巨钟重新走动——它已停在11点59分数十年之久。在一只态度傲娇的白色大猫"绒绒"的帮助下，鲁比奇发现，一位沉浸在丧亲之痛中的钟表匠和一个化作人形的植物精灵，正是解开谜题的关键。

《烟囱小镇的普佩尔》电影版诞生于疫情期间，在日本国内外引发强烈共鸣；西野亮广的原作绘本此后还被改编为音乐剧、芭蕾和歌舞伎。这部续集由西野亮广亲自撰写原创剧本，依然是一场探讨哀伤与成长等厚重主题的家庭冒险。不过，相较前作的蒸汽朋克气质，本片转向更奇幻迷离的视觉风格，构建出一个令人联想到宫崎骏经典《千与千寻》的绮丽世界。
highlight_zh: 《烟囱小镇的普佩尔》续作，致敬《千与千寻》的奇幻治愈冒险。

synopsis_en:
Depicting life under constant bombardment, a Berlin award winner highlights how humour and humanity persist amid the horrors of war.

In an unidentified war zone under constant attack, life for locals must go on. Survival doesn’t just mean dodging bombs and sniper fire, but also trying to find food, warmth, a cigarette or the time and privacy to have sex. While former filmmaker Arafat scavenges for food and medicine, a group of young friends break into his boarded-up video store, debating whether to burn the old videotapes to make a fire or just trade memories of their favourite movies.

Long-time human rights activist Abdallah Alkhatib was born in Syria’s Yarmouk refugee camp, one of the largest settlements of displaced Palestinians; his 2021 documentary Little Palestine: Diary of a Siege chronicled life in Yarmouk and its fall during the Syrian civil war. Here, drawing from his own experiences of living under fire, he builds a drama that is at once urgent, defiant and unexpectedly funny. The recipient of the Best First Feature award at Berlin this year, Chronicles From the Siege delivers a searing portrait of lives that refuse to be overlooked.
synopsis_zh:
一部柏林获奖影片，描绘持续轰炸下的生活，展现战争恐怖之中幽默与人性如何依然存续。

在一个不断遭受袭击、身份不明的战区里，当地人的生活还得继续。活下去不只是躲避炸弹和狙击手的子弹，还要设法找到食物、取暖的办法、一支烟，或者一点做爱的时间和私密空间。曾是电影人的阿拉法特四处搜寻食物和药品，而一群年轻朋友闯进他钉死的录像带店，争论着是该烧掉那些旧录像带取暖，还是聊聊各自最爱的电影、交换回忆。

资深人权活动家阿卜杜拉·哈提卜出生于叙利亚的耶尔穆克难民营——巴勒斯坦流离失所者最大的聚居地之一；他2021年的纪录片《小巴勒斯坦：围城日记》记录了耶尔穆克的生活及其在叙利亚内战中的陷落。这一次，他从自己在炮火下生活的亲身经历出发，构筑出一部既紧迫、不屈，又出人意料地充满笑意的剧情片。《围城纪事》荣获今年柏林电影节最佳处女作奖，为那些拒绝被遗忘的生命刻下一幅灼热的肖像。
highlight_zh: 柏林最佳处女作奖，战火中笑与生的灼热群像。

synopsis_en:
In this wild, one-of-a-kind shrine to the wonders of research, an academic falls down a multimedia rabbit hole of hoax, conspiracy and Vatican intervention.

Béatrice Courte (played by real-life professor Anne Laure Sellier) is a polylingual academic with research interests in the darkest corners of philosophy. When she encounters a short paragraph on the Chronovisor – a device built in the 1950s that claimed to “photograph the past” as a kind of spectral, visual time machine – she soon becomes obsessed. Camping out at libraries, poring over pages and chasing up leads in four different languages, Béatrice is hot on the trail of the machine’s inventor: an eccentric real-life Benedictine monk named Father Pellegrino Ernetti. Is he still alive? Is his machine a hoax? And how is the Catholic Church involved?

With its closing crawl listing a bunch of “creditors” including Jorge Luis Borges, Umberto Eco, Roberto Bolaño and Paul Auster, this hyper-literary work of sleuthing offers an experimental, lo-fi riff on reading-room conspiracy classics like The Ninth Gate (MIFF 2000), Neil LaBute’s Possession and even The Da Vinci Code. Neither strictly documentary nor fiction, the debut feature of directors and academics Kevin Walker and Jack Auen fashions an uncanny bricolage from largely authentic books, magazines, journals and degraded videos. Shot on 16mm in a host of shadowy, Gothic libraries, this is an atmospheric, slyly funny oddity that cast a spell on audiences at Rotterdam and New Directors/New Films.
synopsis_zh:
在这部狂野而独一无二的、献给研究之乐的奇作中，一位学者跌入了一个由骗局、阴谋与梵蒂冈干预交织而成的多媒体兔子洞。

贝阿特丽丝·库尔特（由现实中的教授安娜·洛尔·塞利耶饰演）精通多门语言，研究兴趣直指哲学最幽暗的角落。当她偶然读到一小段关于“时间透视仪”的文字——一台建造于1950年代、号称能“拍摄过去”的装置，宛如一部幽灵般的视觉时光机——她很快便深陷其中。她在图书馆安营扎寨，埋首故纸堆，用四种语言追查线索，一步步逼近这台机器的发明者：一位真实存在的古怪本笃会修士——佩莱格里诺·埃尔内蒂神父。他还活着吗？他的机器是场骗局吗？天主教会又在其中扮演了什么角色？

影片片尾字幕列出了一串“债主”名单，其中包括博尔赫斯、翁贝托·埃科、罗贝托·波拉尼奥和保罗·奥斯特——这部书卷气十足的侦探式作品，以实验性的低保真手法，致敬了《第九道门》（2000年墨尔本电影节）、尼尔·拉布特的《迷梦情缘》乃至《达·芬奇密码》等“阅览室阴谋”经典。它既非严格意义上的纪录片，也不是虚构剧情片：两位导演凯文·沃克与杰克·奥恩本身也是学者，他们用大量真实的书籍、杂志、期刊和画质斑驳的录像带，拼贴出一件令人不安的奇异之作。全片以16毫米胶片摄于一座座幽暗的哥特式图书馆，氛围迷人、暗藏狡黠的幽默，曾在鹿特丹电影节和纽约新导演/新电影展上令观众如痴如醉。
highlight_zh: 鹿特丹口碑奇片：追查“拍摄过去”的神秘机器，真假莫辨的书斋侦探迷梦

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

Singular visions through the looking glasses.

Expect a bespectacled spectacle as we take you on a voyage through contemporary cinema’s most thrilling stereoscopic work. Strap on your 3D goggles and experience new films from maverick magicians Darren Dominique Heroux, Peter Rose, Blake Williams and Victor Van Rossem. Plus, dive into the visionary world of Austrian shapeshifter and MIFF favourite Johann Lurf, who joins us in person for a conversation on the artistic possibilities of the form.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含频闪画面

透过镜片，看见独一无二的影像世界。

戴上你的3D眼镜，准备迎接一场名副其实的"眼镜奇观"——我们将带你巡游当代影坛最激动人心的立体电影创作，呈现达伦·多米尼克·埃鲁、彼得·罗斯、布莱克·威廉姆斯、维克托·范·罗塞姆等特立独行的影像魔术师的最新作品。此外，还将带你潜入奥地利"变形大师"、MIFF常客约翰·卢尔夫的奇想世界——他将亲临现场，畅谈这一形式的艺术可能。
highlight_zh: 戴上3D眼镜看实验短片集，名导卢尔夫亲临现场对谈

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains suicide themes
