Sophie Okonedo is sublime as a contemporary Nigerian Mrs. Dalloway in a star-stacked drama that deftly revitalises Virginia Woolf’s themes of memory and regret.

As elegant Lagos society wife Clarissa (Sophie Okonedo, Mouse, MIFF 2026) prepares to host an opulent party, she remembers one golden summer with the friends of her youth: aspiring writer Peter (Toheeb Jimoh, Ted Lasso), outspoken Sally (Ayo Edebiri, Theater Camp, MIFF 2023; The Bear) and cheerful Ugo. Why didn’t she marry the passionate Peter, or explore her attraction to Sally? When Clarissa unexpectedly runs into the now-dispirited expat Peter (David Oyelowo, Selma), she invites him to the party, where the quartet reunite and reckon with their past choices – choices that were, in their own way, also privileges.

Boldly following their debut Eyimofe (This Is My Desire) (MIFF 2021) – whose star Fortune Nwafor plays Septimus, Clarissa’s tormented working-class counterpoint – twin brothers Arie and Chuko Esiri transform Virginia Woolf’s 1925 novel Mrs. Dalloway into a potent meditation on Nigerian class and colonialism. Here, as in the book, the eponymous character sets out to buy herself flowers; casting Nina Gold deserves plenty of her own for assembling this gifted ensemble of British/US/Nigerian talent, including luminous India Amarteifio (Queen Charlotte: A Bridgerton Story) as the young Clarissa.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：包含自杀主题

索菲·奥科内多奉献了精湛演出，化身当代尼日利亚版的达洛维夫人。这部星光熠熠的剧情片巧妙地让弗吉尼亚·伍尔夫笔下关于记忆与遗憾的主题焕发新生。

优雅的拉各斯上流社会主妇克拉丽莎（索菲·奥科内多，《Mouse》，2026年墨尔本电影节）正筹备一场盛大的派对，思绪却飘回与青春挚友共度的那个金色夏天：怀揣作家梦的彼得（托希布·吉莫，《足球教练》）、直言不讳的萨莉（艾约·埃德比里，《剧院营地》，2023年墨尔本电影节；《熊家餐馆》），还有开朗的乌戈。她为什么没有嫁给热情似火的彼得？为什么没有正视自己对萨莉的心动？当克拉丽莎偶然遇见如今意志消沉、旅居海外归来的彼得（大卫·奥耶洛沃，《塞尔玛》），她邀请他来参加派对。四人重聚一堂，直面各自当年的选择——而那些选择，某种意义上也是一种特权。

继大胆的处女作《生活的模样》（2021年墨尔本电影节）之后——该片主演福琼·恩瓦福在本片中饰演塞普蒂默斯，一个与克拉丽莎形成对照的饱受折磨的工人阶级角色——孪生兄弟阿里·埃西里和丘科·埃西里将伍尔夫1925年的小说《达洛维夫人》改编成一部关于尼日利亚阶级与殖民主义的有力沉思。与原著一样，女主人公出门为自己买花；而选角导演妮娜·戈尔德也值得收下满怀鲜花——她为影片召集了这批横跨英美尼三国的杰出演员班底，其中包括光彩照人的英迪娅·阿玛特菲奥（《夏洛特王后：布里杰顿前传》），饰演年轻时的克拉丽莎。
highlight_zh: 全明星阵容重构《达洛维夫人》，尼日利亚版伍尔夫获影评盛赞

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains suicide themes

Transcending true-crime cliché, this masterful study of obsession documents a father’s quest for answers in the wake of his teenage son’s disappearance.

The last-known footage of 16-year-old Krzysztof Dymiński – “Chris” to his friends – was captured in the early hours of the morning in May 2023 on CCTV: he is seen standing on a bridge overlooking Warsaw’s Vistula River; the camera pans away and back, and Chris is gone. One year on, little hope remains that Chris is still alive, but his father Daniel pours his immense grief into the task of at least filling in the narrative blanks. He trawls his son’s social media profiles and the river itself for clues, increasingly consumed by his search.

Bringing a steady, sensitive gaze to this heart-rending material, director Michał Marczak withholds archival material of Chris in favour of a present-tense approach grounded in his absence. As in his previous film, the 2016 raver-romance docufiction All These Sleepless Nights, Marczak’s prodigious cinematography gives Daniel’s dogged pursuit an uncanny resemblance to fiction. Premiering at Sundance and winning the top prize at the Thessaloniki Documentary Film Festival, Closure makes for uneasy but spellbinding viewing.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：包含自杀相关主题

这部大师级的作品超越了真实罪案题材的俗套，讲述一位父亲在少年儿子失踪后执着寻找答案的故事，是一次对"执念"的深刻凝视。

16 岁的克日什托夫·迪明斯基——朋友们叫他"克里斯"——最后一次出现在影像中，是 2023 年 5 月的一个凌晨：监控摄像头拍到他站在华沙维斯瓦河上的一座桥上；镜头扫开再转回来时，克里斯已经不见了。一年过去，克里斯生还的希望已十分渺茫，但他的父亲丹尼尔将巨大的悲痛倾注于一件事——至少要把这段空白的叙事补上。他翻遍儿子的社交媒体账号，也一遍遍搜寻那条河，越来越深地陷入这场追寻。

面对这段令人心碎的素材，导演米哈乌·马尔恰克以沉稳而体贴的目光注视一切：他刻意不使用克里斯生前的影像资料，而是选择一种立足当下、以"缺席"为核心的呈现方式。正如他 2016 年那部锐舞青春爱情纪录剧情片《这些无眠之夜》一样，马尔恰克出众的摄影让丹尼尔执拗的追寻呈现出一种近乎剧情片的奇异质感。本片在圣丹斯电影节首映，并夺得塞萨洛尼基纪录片电影节最高奖，观感令人不安，却又摄人心魄。
highlight_zh: 《无眠之夜》导演十年新作，圣丹斯首映、塞萨洛尼基纪录片节最高奖

title_en: The Clouds Are Two Thousand Meters Up
synopsis_en:
Venture to the cutting edge of XR in this haunting, reality-bending pilgrimage between digital worlds and a living forest.

A big screen overlooking a bustling intersection broadcasts the news of a terrible train accident, alerting protagonist Guan to the death of his wife. Discovering in the aftermath of this tragedy that she was working on a novel, Guan is inspired to follow its narrative, charting a path that shifts masterfully between the digital realm of her cloud storage and the fantasy-tinged real-life forest where the book is set, home to an endangered leopard and Taiwan’s Indigenous Rukai people.

Singing Chen’s staggering new immersive work – adapted from a short story by acclaimed Taiwanese author Wu Ming-Yi, and the winner of the Venice Immersive Grand Prize – poignantly expands on the theme of memory the artist explored in Afterimage for Tomorrow (MIFF 2019) while taking the medium of extended reality to new technological heights. Rather than adopting a first-person perspective, the user figures as Guan’s shadow: a ghostly presence moving freely through an eight-square-metre space. Co-presented by Now or Never, The Clouds Are Two Thousand Meters Up unfolds a seamless new horizon of storytelling.
synopsis_zh:
走进 XR 技术的最前沿，开启这场萦绕心头、虚实交错的朝圣之旅，在数字世界与真实森林之间穿行。

喧闹路口上方的大屏幕播报着一场惨烈的火车事故，主人公「关」由此得知妻子的死讯。悲剧之后，他发现妻子生前正在创作一部小说，于是决定循着小说的叙事前行——这条路径在她云端硬盘的数字空间与小说所设定的、带着奇幻色彩的真实森林之间流转穿梭。那片森林里，栖息着濒危的云豹，也生活着台湾原住民鲁凯人。

陈芯宜这部令人震撼的沉浸式新作改编自著名台湾作家吴明益的短篇小说，荣获威尼斯影展沉浸式竞赛单元最高奖。它深情延续了艺术家在《留给未来的残影》（2019 年墨尔本影展）中对记忆主题的探索，同时将扩展现实这一媒介推向新的技术高度。作品没有采用第一人称视角，而是让体验者化作「关」的影子：一个幽灵般的存在，在八平方米的空间中自由游走。本片由 Now or Never 联合呈现，《云在两千米》为叙事艺术展开了一片浑然天成的新地平线。
highlight_zh: 威尼斯沉浸式单元大奖，改编吴明益小说的 XR 神作

synopsis_en:
A young Fijian-Indian Australian rapper and his grandma bond over a time-honoured cultural tradition: swearing up a storm.

In this delightful, laugh-out-loud comedy from emerging writer/director Ravi Chand, 19-year-old bedroom rapper Dev takes his non-English-speaking grandma home after having ruined his grandpa’s funeral. Full of pitch-perfect cultural details and a handy how-to guide to swearing in both English and Fiji Hindi, this is a burst of Melbourne suburban life at its most vibrant.
synopsis_zh:
一位年轻的斐济印度裔澳大利亚说唱歌手和他的奶奶，因一项历史悠久的文化传统而拉近了距离：痛痛快快地爆粗口。

在新锐编剧兼导演拉维·钱德这部令人捧腹的欢乐喜剧中，19岁的卧室说唱歌手戴夫在搞砸了爷爷的葬礼后，把不会说英语的奶奶接回家同住。影片满是精准到位的文化细节，还附赠一份英语和斐济印地语双语爆粗实用指南，把墨尔本市郊生活最鲜活的一面展现得淋漓尽致。
highlight_zh: 祖孙俩用爆粗口传承文化，墨尔本市郊爆笑喜剧

synopsis_en:
With its star-making, Cannes award-winning turn, this coming-of-age tale about a teenage refugee whose musical ambitions might just save his life is as poetic as it is uplifting.

Seventeen-year-old Robert is trying his best to make ends meet. But as a Congolese refugee in Bangui, in the Central African Republic, the odds are stacked against him. His parents have been jailed for the ‘crime’ of being refugees, and Robert must look after his four younger siblings. He’s also got his final exams to worry about. He copes by writing songs and lyrics, in the process holding on to his dream of making it as a musician.

Based on director Rafiki Fariala’s own experiences, Congo Boy is the first Central African film to screen at Cannes, where it received a standing ovation along with charismatic star Bradley Fiomona’s Un Certain Regard Best Actor prize. Leading a stellar cast of non-professionals who add a further layer of authenticity to the story, Fiomona shines through Robert’s poignant interactions with his siblings and his thrilling skills on the mic, showcasing a rousing soundtrack of tunes written by Fariala. Shot on location in Bangui, Congo Boy is a paean to the indomitable human spirit and an undeniable pleasure to boot.
synopsis_zh:
这部关于一位少年难民的成长故事诗意而振奋人心——音乐梦想或许能拯救他的人生。影片凭借令人惊艳的表演在戛纳斩获大奖，也让主演一举成名。

十七岁的罗贝尔正竭尽全力维持生计。但作为一名流落在中非共和国首都班吉的刚果难民，命运对他并不友善。他的父母因为“身为难民”这一莫须有的罪名被关进监狱，罗贝尔不得不独自照顾四个弟弟妹妹，还要应付迫在眉睫的毕业考试。写歌填词成了他的出口，也让他始终紧握着成为音乐人的梦想。

《刚果男孩》取材于导演拉菲基·法里亚拉的亲身经历，是首部入围戛纳的中非电影，放映后全场起立鼓掌，魅力四射的主演布拉德利·菲奥莫纳更凭此片摘得“一种关注”单元最佳男演员奖。影片全部启用非职业演员，为故事增添了一层真实质感；菲奥莫纳与弟妹们相处的动人戏份和麦克风前的惊艳表现尤为亮眼，配乐中的歌曲均由法里亚拉亲自创作，热血沸腾。全片在班吉实地拍摄，《刚果男孩》是一曲献给不屈人性的赞歌，更是一场纯粹的观影享受。
highlight_zh: 首部入围戛纳的中非电影，主演摘得“一种关注”影帝，励志又好听。

synopsis_en:
Join visiting international critics Miriam Bale and Maya S. Cade along with Sweet Milk Lake’s Harvey Zielinski for a lively chat through the what and the why of pop culture right now. Hosted by Michael Sun.

Each year at the Melbourne International Film Festival, a panel of guests gather to dissect the highs and lows of the zeitgeist. Host Michael Sun will be joined by two of MIFF’s visiting Critics Campus mentors – Los Angeles–based film programmer and critic Miriam Bale and writer and creator/curator of Black Film Archive Maya S. Cade, who originally hails from New Orleans – along with Melbourne’s own Harvey Zielinski, the writer, director and star of MIFF Bright Horizons Competition film Sweet Milk Lake. They’ll discuss the most overrated, underrated and personal–favourite moments in movies, TV, podcasts and books of the past 12 months. If all goes to plan, there’ll be hot takes, heated discussions and great recommendations to enjoy post-festival.

Miriam Bale is a critic and film programmer. She has written for The New York Times, the New York Daily News, W Magazine, Gagosian Quarterly, The New Republic, Film Comment, IndieWire, Sight and Sound and many other publications. She was the artistic director of the Indie Memphis Film Festival in Tennessee, and has curated multiple repertory film programs worldwide.

Maya S. Cade is the creator and curator of Black Film Archive and the inaugural CCDI scholar-in-residence at the Library of Congress. Her work has been featured in publications including The New York Times, the Los Angeles Times, NPR, The Paris Review and Vulture, and she has been awarded special distinctions by the New York Film Critics Circle and the National Society of Film Critics for the Archive.

Harvey Zielinski wrote, directed, produced and starred in his debut feature, Sweet Milk Lake (MIFF 2026). Harvey is developing his second feature, Thugs, with Screen Australia support. He’s been nominated for two AWGIEs and the Betty Rowland prize. As an actor, Harvey’s credits include Deadloch, White Fever and Don’t Look Deeper.

Michael Sun is a critic, essayist and editor from China and Australia. He is currently film programmer at Art Gallery of New South Wales, and his writing on culture has been published in The Guardian, The Paris End, Esquire, Sydney Review of Books and at the ABC, among many others.

This event has a ‘Pay What You Wish’ ticket option, and is ticketed by The Wheeler Centre. This means that if you are not in a position to pay for your ticket but would like to attend this event, you can simply enter an amount of $0 or any other amount you feel comfortable paying and select the number of tickets you would like to book.

PRESENTED WITH
synopsis_zh:
来自海外的客座影评人米里亚姆·贝尔（Miriam Bale）、玛雅·S·凯德（Maya S. Cade），将与《甜奶湖》的哈维·齐林斯基（Harvey Zielinski）一起，畅聊当下流行文化的种种现象与背后缘由。主持人：迈克尔·孙（Michael Sun）。

每年墨尔本国际电影节都会请来一组嘉宾，共同剖析这一年时代风潮的高光与低谷。今年，主持人迈克尔·孙将与两位MIFF“影评人训练营”（Critics Campus）导师对谈——常驻洛杉矶的电影策展人、影评人米里亚姆·贝尔，以及来自新奥尔良的作家、“黑人电影档案馆”（Black Film Archive）创始人兼策展人玛雅·S·凯德——同席的还有墨尔本本地的哈维·齐林斯基，他自编自导自演的《甜奶湖》正入围本届MIFF“光明地平线”竞赛单元。他们将盘点过去十二个月里电影、剧集、播客与图书中最被高估、最被低估以及各自私心最爱的时刻。如果一切顺利，现场会有犀利观点、激烈交锋，还有一份可供节后慢慢消化的精彩片单。

米里亚姆·贝尔是影评人兼电影策展人，曾为《纽约时报》《纽约每日新闻》《W》杂志、高古轩季刊、《新共和》《电影评论》、IndieWire、《视与听》等众多刊物撰稿。她曾任田纳西州印第孟菲斯电影节艺术总监，并在世界各地策划过多个经典回顾影展。

玛雅·S·凯德是“黑人电影档案馆”的创始人兼策展人，也是美国国会图书馆首位CCDI驻馆学者。她的作品曾见于《纽约时报》《洛杉矶时报》、NPR、《巴黎评论》、Vulture等媒体，并因该档案馆项目获得纽约影评人协会和美国国家影评人协会的特别表彰。

哈维·齐林斯基自编自导自制自演了他的长片处女作《甜奶湖》（MIFF 2026），目前正在澳大利亚银幕局的支持下开发第二部长片《Thugs》。他曾两度获澳大利亚编剧协会奖（AWGIE）提名，并入围贝蒂·罗兰奖。作为演员，他曾出演《小镇疑云》（Deadloch）、《白热》（White Fever）和《别看得太深》（Don't Look Deeper）。

迈克尔·孙是拥有中国和澳大利亚背景的评论人、随笔作家和编辑，现任新南威尔士州美术馆电影策展人，其文化评论散见于《卫报》《The Paris End》《时尚先生》《悉尼书评》及ABC等多家媒体。

本场活动设有“随心付”（Pay What You Wish）票价选项，由惠勒中心（The Wheeler Centre）售票。也就是说，如果你暂时不便购票但仍想到场，可以在购票时填写0元或任何你觉得合适的金额，并选择所需票数。
highlight_zh: 影评人年度文化圆桌，盘点过去一年高估与低估之作，随心付票价。

synopsis_en:
Lured to a mansion in the woods of upstate New York, party-loving bros find a threesome of witchy femmes who are down for much darker carnal pursuits.

In the sultry New York summer of 1998, night-life photographer and small-time drug dealer Sayo (Jeff Wahlberg) reluctantly accepts a party invitation from rising movie star Vince (Brodie Townsend, Heartbreak High), his long-time friend for whom he has complicated feelings. Their boisterous club buddy Ross is keen to tag along, so the three head upstate to an isolated mansion estate, ready to get rowdy. Instead, they find Billie, Wren and Cata – three mysterious women whose disturbing agenda draws them into a dark web of seduction and terror.

Corpus is the feature directorial debut of Corrin Evans, whose interest in exploring eroticism onscreen led her to become an in-demand intimacy coordinator, who has plied her trade on such spicy fare as Ti West’s MaXXXine and Larry Charles’s Dicks: The Musical. She’s joined on this super-horny horror film by co-writer and producer Lily Cowles, who also takes centre stage onscreen as sinister photographer Billie. Steaming into MIFF from its premiere at Montreal’s Fantasia International Film Festival, Corpus announces Evans as an exciting new voice in genre film.
synopsis_zh:
一群爱玩的兄弟被引诱到纽约上州森林深处的一座豪宅，迎接他们的是三个巫气十足的神秘女子——而她们想要的，是远比寻欢更黑暗的肉体游戏。

1998年闷热的纽约之夏，夜店摄影师兼小毒贩萨约（杰夫·沃尔伯格 饰）勉强接受了老友、当红新星文斯（布罗迪·汤森，《心碎高中》）的派对邀请——对这位相识多年的朋友，他心里的感情一言难尽。爱凑热闹的夜店伙伴罗斯也执意同行，三人便驱车北上，来到一座与世隔绝的庄园豪宅，准备狂欢一场。然而等待他们的却是比莉、雯恩和卡塔——三个来历不明的女人，她们令人不安的图谋将三人拖入一张交织着诱惑与恐怖的黑网。

《肉身》是科琳·埃文斯的长片导演处女作。她对银幕情色表达的浓厚兴趣，让她成为一位炙手可热的亲密戏协调师，曾参与泰·韦斯特的《玛克辛》和拉里·查尔斯的音乐喜剧《老二：音乐剧》等重口味作品。与她联手的是编剧兼制片人莉莉·考尔斯，后者还亲自出演片中阴森的摄影师比莉一角。本片在蒙特利尔奇幻国际电影节全球首映后热辣登陆墨尔本电影节，宣告埃文斯成为类型片领域一个令人兴奋的新声音。
highlight_zh: 《玛克辛》亲密戏协调师转型执导，情色巫术恐怖处女作

synopsis_en:
An immersive sensory dive into the depths of the sea.

The underwater world definitely isn’t quiet … and what we hear there tells a story. Through waves, boat engines, marine animals communicating, the icepack cracking or the sound of flowing water – proof of steady melting – this immersive film explores a little-known component of this ecosystem: its soundscape.

Écosystème is the result of a long residency combining research and creation. The project originated from a team of marine ecology researchers who wanted to experiment with the links between art and science. Back from a polar mission, they called upon the talents of electronic music producer Maxime Dangles to create new musical material from their underwater sound recordings. To illustrate this sound journey, visual artist Dylan Cote set out to create a dark and enigmatic aquatic universe inhabited by synthetic and minimalist entities. The animated film dives into this world and explores its imaginary lands, guided by a narrative thread showing their progressive disturbance.
synopsis_zh:
一场沉浸式的感官之旅，潜入深海之底。

水下世界其实并不安静……那里的声音在讲述着故事。海浪、船只引擎、海洋动物的交流、冰盖的开裂声，还有流水的声响——那是冰川持续消融的证据。这部沉浸式影片探索的，正是海洋生态系统中一个鲜为人知的组成部分：它的声音景观。

《生态系统》诞生于一次融合研究与创作的长期驻留计划。项目最初源自一支海洋生态学研究团队，他们希望尝试打通艺术与科学之间的联结。结束极地科考归来后，他们邀请电子音乐制作人马克西姆·当格勒，用水下声音采录素材创作全新的音乐。为了给这段声音旅程赋予影像，视觉艺术家迪伦·科特打造了一个幽暗而神秘的水下宇宙，其中栖息着极简的合成生命体。这部动画影片潜入这个世界，沿着一条展现其逐步被扰动的叙事线索，探索其中的想象之境。
highlight_zh: 科学家携手电子音乐人，用深海真实录音打造视听沉浸之旅。

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains suicide themes

Lukas Dhont’s stirring latest film – which won its leads a pair of Best Actor prizes at Cannes – depicts a clandestine romance between two young men that blooms in the trenches of WWI.

It’s 1916, and Pierre and Francis have been conscripted to fight on the Western Front. Nicknamed “Quiet Mouse”, the former is a handsome, brawny farmer who struggles to express himself; the latter, a tailor’s son, is flamboyant and creative. Francis is enlisted to direct a theatre troupe that will entertain the soldiers, a role that includes cross-dressing as the female lead. When Pierre is tasked with assisting the troupe, the pair’s opposing qualities draw them together – and collaboration evolves into something more.

Following the Cannes Grand Prix–winning Close (MIFF 2022) and Queer Palm–awarded Girl (MIFF 2018), Lukas Dhont crafts another testament to LGBTQIA+ resistance amid repressive circumstances. But Dhont is less interested in an anachronistic ‘queering’ of history than in holding a mirror to the homosocial foundations of wartime camaraderie. While returning cinematographer Frank van den Eeden (Small Things Like These) doesn’t avoid the conflict’s horrors, his camera observes Emmanuel Macchia and Valentin Campagne (Species, MIFF 2026) with an intimacy recalling Beau Travail (MIFF 2000), their undeniable chemistry fuelling an emotive drama about forbidden love on the front lines.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：包含自杀相关内容

卢卡斯·东特这部动人心魄的新作——两位主演凭借本片双双摘得戛纳最佳男演员奖——讲述了一段在一战战壕中悄然绽放的隐秘恋情。

1916年，皮埃尔和弗朗西斯被征召到西线作战。绰号“安静小鼠”的皮埃尔是个英俊健壮的农夫，拙于言辞；弗朗西斯则是裁缝之子，张扬而富有创造力。弗朗西斯受命组建一个为士兵演出的剧团，还要反串出演女主角。当皮埃尔被派去协助剧团时，两人截然相反的性格反而让彼此靠近——合作渐渐演变成了更深的情愫。

继斩获戛纳评审团大奖的《亲密》（2022年墨尔本电影节）和荣获酷儿棕榈奖的《女孩》（2018年墨尔本电影节）之后，卢卡斯·东特再度谱写了一曲LGBTQIA+群体在压抑环境中不屈抗争的赞歌。但东特无意对历史做时代错置的“酷儿化”改写，而是要照见战时袍泽情谊背后的男性同性社交根基。回归掌镜的摄影师弗兰克·凡·登·伊登（《小事如这般》）并未回避战争的残酷，但他的镜头以一种令人想起《军中禁恋》（2000年墨尔本电影节）的亲密感注视着埃马纽埃尔·马基亚与瓦朗坦·康帕涅（《物种》，2026年墨尔本电影节）——两人之间难以否认的化学反应，点燃了这部关于前线禁忌之爱的动人剧作。
highlight_zh: 《亲密》导演新作，戛纳双影帝加冕的一战战壕禁忌之恋

synopsis_en:
Sick of being maimed by his shoddy tools, Wile E. Coyote sues the company responsible. Prepare to witness a legal comedy that’s dynamite … in every sense of the word.

For decades, pure-hearted predator Wile E. Coyote has suffered the slings and anvils of outrageous fortune: every gimmicky mail-order product he bought from the ACME Corporation has failed grievously instead of helping him catch the infuriatingly swift Road Runner. He’s been battered by boulders, dudded by detonators, rattled by rocket-skates, tricked by tunnels and walked into thin air off every cliff in the American Southwest. Now he’s suing the profit-obsessed ‘everything store’. But can his small-time lawyer Kevin Avery (Will Forte, Extra Ordinary, MIFF 2019) and Kevin’s plucky niece Paige (Lana Condor, To All the Boys I’ve Loved Before) win against Buddy Crane (John Cena), ACME’s slick corporate counsel – and Kevin’s old boss?

Blending live action with classic 2D animation in the spirit of Who Framed Roger Rabbit?, this warm-hearted underdog comedy produced by James Gunn and Chris DeFaria echoed its own plot behind the scenes: the completed film was to be shelved in 2023 as a tax write-off, but fan outcry helped it sprint back to the big screen. Don’t miss the Australian premiere of this legendary Looney Tunes reunion, whose cartoon cast includes Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Elmer Fudd, Yosemite Sam, Foghorn Leghorn, Sylvester the Cat and Tweety – it will be dynamite.
synopsis_zh:
受够了被劣质工具坑得遍体鳞伤，歪心狼威利决定把罪魁祸首告上法庭。准备好迎接一部'炸裂'的法庭喜剧——字面意义上的炸裂。

几十年来，这只心地纯良的捕食者威利狼饱受命运的飞石与铁砧之苦：他从ACME公司邮购的每一件花哨产品，非但没能帮他抓住那只快得气人的哔哔鸟，反而次次坑他于水火。他被巨石砸过、被雷管坑过、被火箭滑轮甩过、被假隧道骗过，还从美国西南部的每一处悬崖上凌空踏出、直坠谷底。如今，他要起诉这家唯利是图的'万物商店'。可是，他那位不入流的小律师凯文·艾弗里（威尔·福特，《非凡除灵师》，2019年墨尔本电影节展映）和凯文勇敢的侄女佩姬（陈丽娜，《致所有我曾爱过的男孩》），真能斗得过ACME油嘴滑舌的企业法律顾问巴迪·克兰（约翰·塞纳）——他还是凯文的前老板？

这部真人与经典二维动画混搭的作品，颇有《谁陷害了兔子罗杰》的神韵。由詹姆斯·古恩与克里斯·德法利亚监制的这部暖心逆袭喜剧，戏外的命运竟与剧情如出一辙：影片2023年完成后一度被华纳当作税务减记打算永久雪藏，最终在影迷的强烈抗议下重返大银幕。别错过这场传奇乐一通全家福的澳大利亚首映——卡通阵容包括兔八哥、达菲鸭、爱发先生、约塞米蒂·山姆、莱亨公鸡、傻大猫和崔弟——它一定会炸翻全场。
highlight_zh: 华纳雪藏又复活的乐一通真人动画喜剧，古恩监制，笑泪齐飞

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

A Palestinian woman confronts an existential threat on a deserted road to Ramallah.

Driving home from her night shift, Palestinian surgeon Lubna blows a tyre on a desolate stretch of West Bank road. When a man pulls over, her every instinct screams danger – and what she does next will change everything. This terrifying slow-burn thriller hits MIFF after scooping multiple festival awards, including Best Short Film at BFI London and a Special Jury Mention for Bravery in Storytelling at AFI Fest.
synopsis_zh:
一名巴勒斯坦女性在通往拉姆安拉的荒僻公路上，直面生死攸关的威胁。

夜班结束后驱车回家的巴勒斯坦外科医生卢布娜，在约旦河西岸一段荒凉的公路上爆了胎。一名男子停车靠近，她的每一根神经都在发出危险警报——而她接下来的选择，将改变一切。这部令人窒息的慢燃惊悚片横扫多个电影节奖项后登陆墨尔本电影节，包括BFI伦敦电影节最佳短片，以及AFI电影节“叙事勇气”评审团特别提及。
highlight_zh: BFI伦敦最佳短片，巴勒斯坦公路惊悚，慢燃窒息

synopsis_en:
Spanning 13 years, this lively documentary chronicles the incredible rise of a group of young Nigerian filmmakers working outside the system.

When The Critics, as they call themselves, first formed, its members were not even teenagers. Though the Nigerian cinema emerging from the Nollywood hub of Lagos is famously prolific, the collective’s members live hundreds of kilometres away in the northern city of Kaduna (also known as Croc City). The films that truly inspire these young adults – predominantly sci-fi blockbusters – were made not in Nollywood but in Hollywood. Hand-sewn green screen, makeshift tripods, borrowed iPhones: schooling themselves via Wikipedia and YouTube tutorials, The Critics use whatever’s on hand to furnish their playful but grand moviemaking visions. In the process, they attract thousands of fans online, including Star Trek director J.J. Abrams.

New Zealand director Pietra Brettkelly (Yellow Is Forbidden, MIFF 2018) worked with behind-the-scenes footage – shot over more than a decade by The Critics themselves – to co-author an account of their story to date. Tracing the group’s burgeoning political consciousness alongside their creative development and launching its international festival run at this year’s Berlinale, Crocodile reveals the tensions that arise between members as well as the harsh realities that their love of cinema has enabled them to transcend.
synopsis_zh:
这部生动的纪录片时间跨度长达13年，记录了一群尼日利亚年轻电影人在体制之外白手起家的惊人崛起。

这个自称“影评人”（The Critics）的团体成立时，成员们甚至还未满十三岁。虽然以拉各斯为中心的“瑙莱坞”以高产闻名，但这群年轻人却住在数百公里之外的北部城市卡杜纳（也被称为“鳄鱼城”）。真正点燃他们的电影——主要是科幻大片——并非出自瑙莱坞，而是来自好莱坞。手工缝制的绿幕、临时拼凑的三脚架、借来的iPhone：靠着维基百科和YouTube教程自学成才，“影评人”们就地取材，实现他们既顽皮又宏大的电影梦想。在这个过程中，他们在网上收获了成千上万的粉丝，其中包括《星际迷航》导演J.J.艾布拉姆斯。

新西兰导演皮特拉·布雷特凯利（《黄色禁忌》，2018年墨尔本电影节）利用“影评人”们自己拍摄十余年的幕后素材，与他们共同讲述了这段至今仍在书写的故事。影片在追溯团体成员创作成长的同时，也记录了他们政治意识的觉醒，并在今年柏林电影节开启国际影展之旅。《鳄鱼》既揭示了成员之间滋生的矛盾张力，也展现了他们凭着对电影的热爱所超越的严酷现实。
highlight_zh: 尼日利亚少年用iPhone拍科幻片，连J.J.艾布拉姆斯都成了粉丝。

synopsis_en:
Why is a successful, stylish young mother floundering? This sensuous portrait of dissociation refuses easy answers.

Argentinian designer Catalina has just won a prestigious award in Geneva, but something within her has clearly come unmoored. She drifts aimlessly through city streets in her turquoise coat, then casually throws herself off a bridge into the river below. Though she survives the attempt, back home in Buenos Aires she can’t shake a new, debilitating fear of water, which she’s too ashamed to share with her husband Pedro and small daughter Sofia. Her hair becomes increasingly bedraggled – one of the few visible signs of an inner turbulence that buffets Catalina between mental agony, dissociation and an almost sublime sensitivity.

Bowing in TIFF’s Platform strand, The Currents went on to win San Sebastián’s RTVE – Another Look Award for the work at the festival best capturing “subjects related to the female world”. Immersing us in Catalina’s experience, director Milagros Mumenthaler’s deeply observational storytelling invites comparisons to her compatriot Lucrecia Martel (Zama, MIFF 2018), submerging Catalina’s traumas in metaphor through a flow of light and textures.
synopsis_zh:
一位事业有成、光鲜亮丽的年轻母亲，为什么会突然失去方向？这部感官细腻的解离症画像，拒绝给出简单的答案。

阿根廷设计师卡塔利娜刚在日内瓦捧得一项重要大奖，内心深处却分明有什么东西脱了锚。她身穿湖绿色大衣在城市街头漫无目的地游荡，随后若无其事地从桥上纵身跃入河中。她在这次轻生中幸存下来，但回到布宜诺斯艾利斯的家后，一种全新的、令人无力的恐水症挥之不去——她羞于向丈夫佩德罗和年幼的女儿索菲亚吐露。她的头发日渐凌乱，成为内心风暴为数不多的外在痕迹之一；这场风暴让卡塔利娜在精神煎熬、解离状态与一种近乎崇高的敏感之间来回颠簸。

本片在多伦多电影节 Platform 单元首映，随后于圣塞巴斯蒂安电影节斩获 RTVE“另一种目光”奖，该奖项授予最能捕捉“女性世界相关主题”的作品。导演米拉格罗斯·穆门塔勒以深度观察式的叙事让我们沉浸于卡塔利娜的体验之中，其手法令人联想到她的同胞卢克雷西亚·马特尔（《扎马》，2018 年墨尔本电影节），在流动的光影与质感中，将卡塔利娜的创伤化入隐喻。
highlight_zh: 多伦多首映、圣塞巴斯蒂安获奖，媲美马特尔的女性心理力作。

synopsis_en:
To find the Swedish girl who’d won his heart, a young Indian artist set out to cross the world – by bike. Find out what happened next in this moving true story.

When P.K. Mahanandia was a baby, an astrologer predicted he’d marry a woman from outside India. But how? Mahanandia was Dalit – the lowest, poorest caste. Then, in 1975, Swedish backpacker Lotta von Schedvin paid the gentle, curious 23-year-old to sketch her portrait on a Delhi street, and soon fell for him. After two magical months together, von Schedvin returned home – but for Mahanandia, it wasn’t over. With his last $80, he bought a secondhand Raleigh bicycle and pedalled off on the hippie trail on what would become a 6000-mile quest. The Proclaimers would’ve given up long before … but, for this Tour de Romance, artistic talent and the kindness of many strangers were more than enough fuel to keep the wheels turning.

Documentarian Orlando von Einsiedel (Evelyn, MIFF 2019) is always looking for the best aspects of humanity, whether it be among gorilla-protecting Congolese rangers in Virunga (MIFF 2014) or Syria’s volunteer civil defenders in his 2016 Oscar-winning short The White Helmets. Here, he weaves the couple’s photos, letters and heartfelt interviews through beguilingly vintage-textured re-enactments of their courtship and Mahanandia’s odyssey, adding unscripted interactions with some of the colourful characters the director meets while filming along his subject’s original route. Be prepared to fall head over handlebars for these dreamers.
synopsis_zh:
为了找到那个让他倾心的瑞典姑娘，一位年轻的印度画家决定横跨半个地球——骑一辆自行车。这个动人的真实故事，后来怎样了？

P.K.·马哈南迪亚还是婴儿时，占星师就预言他将娶一位印度之外的女子。可这怎么可能？马哈南迪亚是达利特——种姓制度中最底层、最贫穷的一群人。然而在1975年，瑞典背包客洛塔·冯·谢德温在德里街头请这位温和而好奇的23岁青年为她画肖像，很快便对他动了心。两个月的美好时光之后，冯·谢德温回国了——但对马哈南迪亚来说，故事才刚刚开始。他用身上最后的80美元买下一辆二手兰令自行车，沿着嬉皮士之路一路向西，踏上这段长达六千英里的寻爱之旅。换作旁人恐怕早就半途而废……但在这场“浪漫环法”里，绘画的才华加上一路陌生人的善意，足以让车轮一直转下去。

纪录片导演奥兰多·冯·艾因西德尔（《伊芙琳》，2019年MIFF展映）一向善于捕捉人性中最美好的一面：无论是《维龙加》（2014年MIFF展映）里保护大猩猩的刚果护林员，还是2016年奥斯卡最佳纪录短片《白头盔》中叙利亚的民防志愿者。这一次，他将两人的老照片、书信与真挚的访谈，编织进质感复古、令人着迷的情景重现之中，再现了这段恋情与马哈南迪亚的漫漫长路；导演还沿着主人公当年的路线实地拍摄，收录了与沿途各色人物的即兴相遇。准备好为这对追梦人彻底倾倒吧。
highlight_zh: 奥斯卡获奖导演暖心新作：穷小子骑行六千英里跨国追爱

synopsis_en:
An angsty teenage girl tags along with her feminine-hygiene-product salesman dad on a business trip to New York, where their relationship gets put to the test.

Drawing upon her own awkward teenage experiences, Yael Grunseit crafts a tender, funny and endearingly human portrait of a strained father–daughter connection, brought to life by evocative handheld photography and a dynamic pair of lead performances. Winner of Best Local Short Film and Best Cinematography in an Australian Short at Flickerfest.
synopsis_zh:
一个满腹心事的青春期女孩，跟着当女性卫生用品推销员的爸爸去纽约出差，一路上，父女俩的关系经受了考验。

雅埃尔·格伦塞特从自己尴尬的青春期经历中取材，刻画出一段紧张而微妙的父女情，温柔、幽默又格外真实动人。灵动的手持摄影与两位主演极具张力的对手戏，让这段旅程跃然银幕。本片荣获澳大利亚短片电影节（Flickerfest）最佳本土短片奖与澳大利亚短片最佳摄影奖。
highlight_zh: Flickerfest双料获奖，笑中带泪的父女出差之旅

synopsis_en:
A freewheeling family saga bounces between a wedding in France and a funeral in Guinea-Bissau, exuberantly exploring identity and belonging.

Fifty-year-old Gloria has been a devoted single mother to her daughter, Nour. But when Nour announces she’s getting married, Gloria has to look at her own life, from past mistakes to future hopes. Across two grand public ceremonies – Nour’s upmarket wedding in France and a death ritual for Gloria’s late father in his home village in Guinea-Bissau – mother and daughter explore their connection to family, cultural heritage and each other.

Filled with his own family members and interrogating notions of fact/fiction, screen representation and cross-continental cultural identities, Alain Gomis’s vibrant, thematically rich family saga is named after the perpetual circular movement whose flow unites the world. Recalling MIFF 2025 highlight I Only Rest in the Storm with its Bissau-Guinean setting, narrative sprawl, dense conversations and philosophical air, this sweeping cine-mosaic is a uniquely personal and deeply thoughtful work. Premiering in competition in Berlin, Dao is a joyous follow-up to the director’s Silver Bear–winning social-realist drama Félicité (MIFF 2017), marking a triumphant return to narrative filmmaking after his drawn-from-the-archive documentary portrait of jazz legend Thelonious Monk, Rewind & Play (MIFF 2022).
synopsis_zh:
一部信马由缰的家族史诗，在法国的一场婚礼与几内亚比绍的一场葬礼之间来回穿梭，酣畅淋漓地探讨身份与归属。

五十岁的格洛丽亚一直是个尽心尽力的单亲妈妈，独自把女儿努尔拉扯大。当努尔宣布自己要结婚时，格洛丽亚不得不重新审视自己的人生——那些过去的遗憾，还有对未来的期许。在两场盛大的公共仪式之间——努尔在法国的体面婚礼，以及为格洛丽亚亡父在几内亚比绍老家村庄举行的丧礼——母女俩重新梳理着自己与家族、与文化根脉、与彼此之间的联结。

阿兰·戈米斯让自己的家人亲自出镜，追问着真实与虚构、银幕再现与跨洲文化身份等命题。这部生机勃勃、意蕴丰厚的家族史诗，片名取自那种周而复始的循环运动——正是它的流转将世界连为一体。影片以几内亚比绍为背景，叙事铺陈开阔，对话绵密，充满哲思气息，令人想起2025年墨尔本电影节的高光之作《我只在风暴中歇息》。这幅恢弘的电影马赛克，是一部极为私人又深具思辨性的作品。《道》在柏林电影节主竞赛单元首映，是导演继银熊奖社会现实主义力作《菲丽希缇》（2017年墨尔本电影节展映）之后一次欢腾的回归——在完成了取材于档案影像的爵士传奇塞隆尼斯·蒙克纪录片《倒带与播放》（2022年墨尔本电影节展映）之后，他重返剧情片创作，交出了一份漂亮的答卷。
highlight_zh: 银熊奖导演戈米斯新作，柏林主竞赛首映的跨洲家族史诗。

synopsis_en:
Multiple MIFF award winner Maryam Tafakory returns with an epistolary tale of suppressed desire.

The winner of last year’s MIFF Best Documentary Short Film for Razeh-del, acclaimed Iranian filmmaker Maryam Tafakory constructs another speculative, secret history of her homeland, using her signature reimagining of archival film footage to relay one woman’s letter to another – a dispatch marked by domestic abuse, divorce and a profound lack of agency. This is a vibrant feminist work from one of the world’s foremost experimental filmmakers.
synopsis_zh:
多次斩获墨尔本电影节大奖的玛丽亚姆·塔法科里携新作归来，以书信体讲述一段被压抑的欲望。

凭借《Razeh-del》摘得去年墨尔本电影节最佳纪录短片奖的伊朗知名导演玛丽亚姆·塔法科里，再度以她标志性的档案影像重构手法，为故乡书写一段思辨式的秘密历史：一个女人写给另一个女人的信——字里行间是家暴、离婚，以及深深的身不由己。这是一部生命力充沛的女性主义作品，出自当今世界最重要的实验电影人之一。
highlight_zh: MIFF获奖伊朗导演新作，档案影像书写女性秘史

synopsis_en:
In a merry adaptation of a century-old short story, two sisters seize the courage to live anew after their overbearing father’s death.

After their dreadful, controlling father finally dies, middle-aged sisters Constantia and Josephine are emboldened to repel the sleazy advances of clergyman Mr. Farolles. In cheeky pen scribbles and watercolour blots that could have been torn from a repressed lady’s journals, Elizabeth Hobbs retells Katherine Mansfield’s celebrated 1920 modernist short story with deadpan verve, granting her heroines an irreverence to fuel their awakening independence. A Cannes Directors’ Fortnight selection.
synopsis_zh:
在这部改编自百年前短篇小说的欢快之作中，两姐妹在专横父亲去世后鼓起勇气，重新开始生活。

可怕又控制欲极强的父亲终于去世后，中年姐妹康斯坦西娅和约瑟芬终于有胆量回击牧师法罗尔斯先生油腻的示好。伊丽莎白·霍布斯用俏皮的钢笔涂鸦与水彩晕染——仿佛从一位压抑淑女的日记本里撕下的页面——以冷面幽默重新讲述凯瑟琳·曼斯菲尔德1920年的现代主义短篇名作，赋予两位女主角一股离经叛道的劲头，点燃她们逐渐觉醒的独立意识。本片入选戛纳导演双周单元。
highlight_zh: 戛纳导演双周入选，手绘水彩动画改编曼斯菲尔德名篇

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

An Ektachrome city symphony that captures a London lost to the quicksand of time.

The day after David Bowie’s death in 2016, Mark Jenkin took to the streets of London to film a city in flux, watching on as decades of so-called progress appeared to collapse in on one another. In the resulting 2018 short, Jenkin narrates the footage with excerpts from his diary, turning a black-and-white dream into an ecstatic Beat poem.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片含频闪画面

一部用 Ektachrome 胶片拍摄的城市交响曲，捕捉一个正消逝于时间流沙中的伦敦。

2016 年大卫·鲍伊去世的第二天，马克·詹金走上伦敦街头，拍下这座变迁中的城市，看着几十年来所谓的“进步”层层坍塌、彼此吞没。在这部 2018 年完成的短片中，詹金以自己的日记片段为影像配上旁白，把一场黑白之梦化作一首恣意昂扬的垮掉派诗歌。
highlight_zh: 《诱饵》导演胶片悼念鲍伊，伦敦街头的黑白影像诗。

synopsis_en:
Ever-industrious South Korean auteur Hong Sang-soo meditates on the nature of performance in this tale of a celeb coming in from the cold.

An actor sits in a restaurant for three back-to-back interviews with journalists about her role in a new independent film, which marks her return to the screen after a 12-year hiatus – a time period that coincided with her (recently ended) marriage. Over coffee and, later, a few crisp lagers, the movie star and her interlocutors chat about everything from dog breeds to divorce, from ageing to authentic self-expression. Despite the press cycle’s familiar beats, epiphanies emerge from both the conversations and the reflective silences in between.

The MIFF program would almost feel incomplete without a film from treasured festival fixture Hong Sang-soo, a master of minimalist, conversational works that mine true poetry from everyday exchanges. In his 34th feature – anchored by a beguiling turn from regular collaborator Song Seon-mi (Walk Up, MIFF 2023) – Hong interrogates the various modes of performance: not only the craft of acting, but also the ways in which we modify our self-presentation for different contexts.
synopsis_zh:
高产不辍的韩国作者导演洪常秀，借一位女明星重返公众视野的故事，静静思索“表演”的本质。

一位女演员坐在餐厅里，接连接受三位记者的采访，话题是她在一部新独立电影中的角色——这是她息影十二年后的银幕回归，而这十二年恰好与她刚刚结束的那段婚姻重合。从咖啡聊到几杯冰爽的拉格啤酒，明星与访问者们无所不谈：狗的品种、离婚、变老、如何真诚地表达自我。尽管媒体宣传期的套路人人熟悉，但顿悟却在对话之间、也在对话间隙的沉默里悄然浮现。

若少了影展常客洪常秀的新作，MIFF 的片单几乎称不上完整——他是极简对话电影的大师，总能从日常交谈中淘出真正的诗意。在这部第 34 部长片中，老搭档宋善美（《小说家的电影》后再合作，曾凭《塔楼上》亮相 2023 年 MIFF）贡献了令人着迷的表演；洪常秀借此审视“表演”的种种形态：不仅是演员的技艺，也是我们在不同场合下对自我呈现的微妙修饰。
highlight_zh: 洪常秀第34部长片，宋善美主演，对话间藏诗意，媒体盛赞其生涯最佳之一。

synopsis_en:
A top-notch cast led by Bill Skarsgård and Dacre Montgomery play out a hair-raising real-life 1970s hostage situation in this blackly comedic thriller from Gus Van Sant.

All Tony Kiritsis (Bill Skarsgård) wants is debt forgiveness, an apology and $5 million. Bullish about his vision for a new shopping mall, the Indianapolis businessman has taken on a hefty loan only to fall behind on the repayments. Convinced that he’s been duped by his mortgage brokers – a father–son duo played by Al Pacino (Once Upon a Time in Hollywood, MIFF 2019) and Stranger Things’ Dacre Montgomery (Went up the Hill, MIFF 2025) – Tony abducts the younger man and rigs a shotgun to his head. His cracked quest for righteous revenge soon becomes a media spectacle, eagerly watched over by national TV crews and narrated by a local soul DJ (Colman Domingo, Sing Sing, MIFF 2024).

The first film by stalwart indie auteur Gus Van Sant since Don’t Worry, He Won’t Get Far on Foot (MIFF 2018) finds him in a paranoid 70s groove, harking back to landmark works of that era like Sidney Lumet’s Dog Day Afternoon and Network in his fictionalised retelling of the 1977 kidnapping of Richard Hall. Just like those two “mad as hell” films, Dead Man’s Wire is a riveting tale trip-wired to a piquant social critique.
synopsis_zh:
比尔·斯卡斯加德与戴克·蒙哥马利领衔的一流卡司，在格斯·范·桑特这部黑色喜剧惊悚片中，演绎了一场发生在1970年代、令人手心冒汗的真实劫持事件。

托尼·基里齐斯（比尔·斯卡斯加德 饰）想要的不过是免除债务、一句道歉，外加500万美元。这位印第安纳波利斯商人一心想建一座新购物中心，为此背上了巨额贷款，却渐渐还不上钱。他坚信自己被抵押贷款经纪人——一对父子，分别由阿尔·帕西诺（《好莱坞往事》，2019年墨尔本电影节）和《怪奇物语》的戴克·蒙哥马利（《上山》，2025年墨尔本电影节）饰演——设局坑害，于是绑架了儿子，并把一支霰弹枪绑在他的头上。这场偏执的"正义复仇"很快演变成一场媒体奇观：全国电视台的摄制组蜂拥围观，还有一位本地灵魂乐DJ（科尔曼·多明戈，《大声唱》，2024年墨尔本电影节）在电波中实时"解说"。

这是独立电影名导格斯·范·桑特自《别担心，他不会走远的》（2018年墨尔本电影节）之后的首部作品。他重拾1970年代的偏执气质，向西德尼·吕美特的《热天午后》《电视台风云》等那个时代的里程碑之作致敬，以虚构手法重述了1977年理查德·霍尔绑架案。正如那两部"怒不可遏"的经典，《死结》既是一个扣人心弦的故事，也暗藏一根引向辛辣社会批判的引线。
highlight_zh: 范·桑特新作，斯卡斯加德绑架帕西诺之子，黑色真实案件惊悚。

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains depictions of violence towards animals

In this profound experiment in oral history, a former dog trainer who worked for the Chilean dictatorship struggles to confront his past.

Ricardo Rifo has farmed peacefully for decades, unable to speak of his apprenticeship to Íngrid Olderöck, the feared Chilean secret-police enforcer who sadistically tortured the dictatorship’s enemies using trained dogs. Filmed in raw black-and-white, Rifo and his own dogs wander a wildfire-devastated wasteland, whose bold textures speak eloquently of political atrocities, traumatic memories and ecological destruction.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含有针对动物的暴力画面

在这部深刻的口述历史实验之作中，一位曾为智利独裁政权效力的驯犬师，艰难地直面自己的过去。

里卡多·里福平静地务农数十年，却始终无法开口谈起自己曾师从英格丽德·奥尔德罗克——那位令人闻风丧胆的智利秘密警察打手，她曾用训练过的狗对独裁政权的敌人施以虐待式酷刑。影片以粗粝的黑白影像拍摄，里福和他自己的狗游荡在一片被山火摧毁的荒原上，那些浓烈的画面质感无声地诉说着政治暴行、创伤记忆与生态毁灭。
highlight_zh: 黑白影像直面智利独裁酷刑往事，口述历史的大胆实验。

synopsis_en:
Narrated by director Mark Jenkin, this poetic vignette follows a Cornishman’s travels in Ireland – through Wexford, Waterford and Cork – in search of the familiar.

Awash in gentle nostalgia and ambient sound, this cinematic postcard from 2016 summons distant memories and a youth that seems to only exist in dream. Mark Jenkin narrates, relaying experiences of his homeland to the enigmatic Marianne while Kodachrome images shuttle behind him.
synopsis_zh:
这部诗意的小品由导演马克·詹金亲自旁白，跟随一位康沃尔人在爱尔兰的旅程——途经韦克斯福德、沃特福德和科克——寻找似曾相识的风景。

影片浸润在温柔的乡愁与环境声响之中，宛如一张寄自2016年的电影明信片，唤起遥远的记忆，以及一段仿佛只存在于梦中的青春。马克·詹金娓娓道来，向神秘的玛丽安讲述故乡的种种，柯达克罗姆胶片的影像在他身后流转。
highlight_zh: 《铁包金》导演詹金的胶片散文诗，一封寄给故乡的电影明信片

synopsis_en:
As Ecuador erupts in protest, the custodian of a threatened way of life contemplates the future of his family line and his people.

In a village deep in the Amazon jungle, Indigenous shaman Rafael Santi practises the sacred customs of his ancestors. As this community elder approaches the end of his life, he hopes to pass his mantle on to his teenage grandson, a devoted student who is nonetheless torn between this heavy responsibility and the opportunities offered by Western education. What’s at stake here is more than just one community’s future, however: this crisis of succession occurs against the backdrop of rising economic pressures and a steady incursion of mining and oil corporations into the Amazon, granted a green light by Ecuador’s pro-market government. As the nation’s Indigenous peoples launch a countrywide protest that takes them to the streets of Quito and into violent conflict with armed forces, Santi uses the traditional medicine of ayahuasca to seek answers from the spirit world.

Australian filmmaker Dan Jackson spent over a decade developing connections with the Indigenous communities of Amazanga to tell this intimate story of one man, his family and an age-old struggle – one that echoes around the world, including here in Australia – between postcolonial states and the peoples they displaced but haven’t defeated. Presenting raw recordings of protest alongside stunning photography of the jungle landscape, archival footage of generations past and vivid depictions of hallucinogenic experience, this MIFF Premiere Fund–supported documentary takes us on a journey deep into the fault lines of our modern world and out into the realm beyond.
synopsis_zh:
当厄瓜多尔全国爆发抗议之际，一位濒危生活方式的守护者，正思索着家族血脉与族人的未来。

在亚马逊丛林深处的一座村庄里，原住民萨满拉斐尔·桑蒂延续着祖先传下的神圣习俗。这位部落长者已近暮年，希望把衣钵传给十几岁的孙子——这个虔诚的学徒却左右为难：一边是沉重的传承责任，一边是西式教育带来的种种机会。然而这里的赌注远不止一个部落的存续：这场传承危机的背后，是不断加剧的经济压力，以及在厄瓜多尔亲市场政府的默许下，矿业与石油公司对亚马逊雨林的步步侵入。当全国原住民发起大规模抗议、走上基多街头并与武装部队爆发激烈冲突时，桑蒂借助死藤水这一传统药物，向灵界寻求答案。

澳大利亚导演丹·杰克逊花了十余年时间与阿马桑加的原住民社区建立信任，才得以讲述这个关于一个人、一个家族的私密故事，以及一场古老的抗争——后殖民国家与那些被驱离却从未被征服的民族之间的抗争，其回声遍及世界各地，也包括澳大利亚本土。影片将抗议现场的原始记录、震撼的丛林风光摄影、往昔世代的档案影像与致幻体验的鲜活呈现交织在一起。这部由 MIFF 首映基金支持的纪录片，带我们深入现代世界的断层线，并抵达其外的另一重境界。
highlight_zh: 导演深耕十年拍成：亚马逊萨满传承危机与原住民抗争纪录片

synopsis_en:
Unicorn Wars director Alberto Vázquez returns with another visionary, Goya Award–winning animated polemic.

Middle-aged mouse Arnold is unemployed, and his cartoonist wife María’s salary sometimes falls short when the bills arrive. As if these pressures weren’t bad enough, he’s also convinced that the town they live in is a theatre set (or decorado in Spanish). With the all-powerful Almighty Limitless Megacorporative Agency tightening its grip on the townsfolk, Arnold risks losing both his home and his marriage – so he enlists the ghost of his recently deceased best friend Ramiro and the outcast Mr. Mushroom, and sets out to reclaim what’s left of his life.

Expanding on Alberto Vázquez’s lauded short of the same name (MIFF 2016), Decorado swaps out the overt violence of his award-winning feature debut Unicorn Wars (MIFF 2022) for a seething sense of menace, capturing the paranoia that can come from being a mere hamster (or mouse) on a wheel. Evoking The Truman Show, Nineteen Eighty-Four and classic Disney, the film is visually bold and narratively breathtaking, tapping into the existential, industrial and psychological crises of a present riddled with inequality and fake news. If all the world’s a stage, this dystopian work dares to ask, are we its actors obliged to keep the show going on?
synopsis_zh:
《独角兽战争》导演阿尔贝托·巴斯克斯携新作归来，再度奉上一部极具想象力、荣获戈雅奖的动画寓言。

中年老鼠阿诺德失业在身，靠漫画家妻子玛丽亚的薪水勉强度日，可账单一到，钱又常常不够花。仿佛这些压力还不够糟，他还坚信自己居住的小镇不过是一个搭建出来的布景（西班牙语中的"decorado"）。眼看着无所不能的"至高无限巨型企业代理"对镇民的控制愈收愈紧，阿诺德面临失去房子、也失去婚姻的危机——于是他找来刚刚离世的挚友拉米罗的鬼魂，以及遭人排挤的蘑菇先生，一同踏上夺回残存人生的旅程。

《布景人生》脱胎自巴斯克斯广受赞誉的同名短片（墨尔本电影节2016），却抛开了他那部获奖长片处女作《独角兽战争》（墨尔本电影节2022）中赤裸的暴力，转而酝酿出一股暗流涌动的威压感，精准捕捉了"轮上仓鼠（或老鼠）"般身不由己所滋生的偏执。影片令人联想到《楚门的世界》《一九八四》与经典迪士尼动画，画面大胆凌厉，叙事扣人心弦，直击这个充斥着不平等与假新闻的当下所面临的存在、工业与心理三重危机。倘若整个世界果真是一座舞台，这部反乌托邦之作大胆发问：身为其中的演员，我们是否就注定要让这出戏一直演下去？
highlight_zh: 《独角兽战争》导演戈雅奖新作，暗黑动画版《楚门的世界》

synopsis_en:
Rising stars Joe Bird and Ed Oxenbould play brothers agonising over whether to stay with their grandmother in a looming environmental collapse.

As a volcanic ash cloud plunges northern Australia into an eternal night, Cole (Joe Bird, Leviticus) begs his emphysemic brother Moss (Ed Oxenbould, Head South, MIFF 2024) to flee the sealed apartment where they’ve been caring for their ailing grandmother. A quiet struggle unfolds between them as an oppressive inertia swallows their city.
synopsis_zh:
新星乔·伯德与艾德·奥克森博尔德饰演一对兄弟，在迫近的环境崩溃中，为是否留下陪伴祖母而痛苦挣扎。

火山灰云将澳大利亚北部拖入永夜，科尔（乔·伯德，《利未记》）苦苦哀求患有肺气肿的哥哥莫斯（艾德·奥克森博尔德，《南下》，2024年墨尔本电影节）逃离那间密闭的公寓——他们一直在里面照料病重的祖母。当令人窒息的迟滞渐渐吞没整座城市，一场无声的拉锯在兄弟之间悄然展开。
highlight_zh: 两位澳洲新星对手戏，永夜末日下的兄弟情困局

synopsis_en:
Romania’s premier provocateur returns, as razor-sharp as ever, with a finely wrought parable skewering the ‘good intentions’ of the bourgeoisie.

Gianina is a live-in nanny for a wealthy family in Bordeaux. One of the many Romanians who go to France seeking better economic conditions, she keeps the extravagant home shipshape, cooks the family their favourite Thai meals and cares for their occasionally bratty young son. In the evenings, Gianina divides her time between rehearsals for a play – specifically, a bawdy, experimental adaptation of the titular 1900 Octave Mirbeau novel previously brought to screen by Jean Renoir and Luis Buñuel – and video-calling her daughter, who jealously pines for her back in their home village.

Feted at Cannes, Radu Jude’s latest class satire operates in a realist, somewhat melancholic register closer to that of Kontinental ’25 (MIFF 2025) than to his anarchic Dracula. Anchored by excellent performances from Ana Dumitraşcu as Gianina and Mélanie Thierry and Vincent Macaigne (Suspended Time, MIFF 2024) as her employers – as well as Ilinca Manolache, the irrepressible star of Jude’s 2023 opus Do Not Expect Too Much From the End of the World – this left-of-field literary riff is both deeply compassionate and merciless in dramatising the sometimes absurd, often humiliating, plight of migrant workers.
synopsis_zh:
罗马尼亚头号“挑衅者”导演回归，锋芒不减，用一则打磨精巧的寓言，狠狠戳穿资产阶级的“好心好意”。

吉亚妮娜在波尔多一户富裕人家做住家保姆。和无数为了更好的生计远赴法国的罗马尼亚人一样，她把这个奢华的家打理得井井有条，为主人一家烹制他们最爱的泰国菜，照看他们那个时不时耍性子的小儿子。到了晚上，她的时间一分为二：一边排练话剧——一部改编自米尔博1900年同名小说的大胆实验之作，这部小说此前已被让·雷诺阿和路易斯·布努埃尔先后搬上银幕——一边跟远在家乡村庄的女儿视频通话，女儿在那头满心委屈地盼着妈妈。

拉杜·裘德的这部最新阶级讽刺片在戛纳广受赞誉，整体走的是写实而略带忧郁的路子，气质更接近《大陆'25》（2025年墨尔本电影节展映），而非他那部狂放不羁的《德古拉》。安娜·杜米特拉什库饰演的吉亚妮娜表演出色，梅拉尼·蒂埃里和文森特·马凯涅（《悬停时光》，2024年墨尔本电影节展映）饰演她的雇主夫妇，此外还有伊林卡·马诺拉切——裘德2023年力作《对末日别抱太多期待》中那位光彩夺目的女主角。这部剑走偏锋的文学改编之作，既饱含深切的悲悯，又毫不留情地呈现了移民劳工时而荒诞、常常屈辱的处境。
highlight_zh: 裘德新作戛纳获誉，翻拍经典《女仆日记》，辛辣解剖阶级伪善。

synopsis_en:
In this tender, intimate and humorous documentary, experience the adventures and frustrations of a pair of inseparable lovers as they dream of building a life together.

Archibald Prize–selected painter Digby Webster and his girlfriend, trainee chef Camille Collins, have been mutually smitten since they first met eight years ago in a Sydney pub. Living with Down syndrome and now in their thirties, they imagine a future of wedded bliss, children and a home of their own – but more difficult truths have to be embraced first, as they navigate the demands of jobs and devoted parents who tend to squeeze the brakes on their loftier ambitions. As the couple experience numerous small frustrations and triumphs from moment to moment, however, their passion for one another never wavers.

Award-winning filmmaker Trevor Graham (Chef Antonio’s Recipes for Revolution, MIFF 2021) worked closely with Webster to co-author this unique, heartwarming documentary consisting of fly-on-the-wall footage filmed over several years alongside animated flights of fancy inspired by Webster’s art. Supported by the MIFF Premiere Fund, Digby & Camille ditches the ‘inspirational’ sheen of so many films about disability for a sensitive and honest portrayal of everyday life – one that might just renew your faith in the power of love.

The Mon 10 Aug screening of this film is a Sensory Friendly session. More information about our Access offerings is available here [https://miff.com.au/access].
synopsis_zh:
在这部温柔、私密又不乏幽默的纪录片中，你将走进一对形影不离的恋人的生活，见证他们在共筑未来的梦想路上经历的种种冒险与挫折。

入围过阿奇博尔德奖的画家迪格比·韦伯斯特与女友、见习厨师卡米尔·柯林斯，八年前在悉尼一家酒吧初遇便一见倾心。两人都是唐氏综合征人士，如今已步入而立之年，憧憬着婚姻的幸福、孩子和一个属于自己的家——但在此之前，他们必须先直面更艰难的现实：工作的压力，以及深爱他们却总在他们的远大抱负面前踩下刹车的父母。然而，无论日常生活中经历多少细小的挫败与胜利，两人对彼此的深情始终未曾动摇。

屡获殊荣的导演特雷弗·格雷厄姆（《安东尼奥主厨的革命食谱》，2021年墨尔本电影节）与韦伯斯特密切合作，共同创作了这部独特而暖心的纪录片：既有历时数年拍摄的贴身纪实影像，也有取材自韦伯斯特画作的天马行空的动画段落。本片由墨尔本电影节首映基金支持，摒弃了众多残障题材影片惯有的“励志”滤镜，以细腻而诚实的笔触呈现日常生活的本来面目——它或许会让你重新相信爱的力量。

本片8月10日（周一）场次为感官友好场。有关无障碍观影服务的更多信息请见 https://miff.com.au/access。
highlight_zh: 唐氏恋人共筑爱巢的真实日常，温柔幽默，拒绝励志滤镜

synopsis_en:
A play-it-loud trip through 70 years of Lebanese history.

“Disorientation is part of the journey. Welcome to Lebanon.” So pronounces Do You Love Me, which jams on Lebanese collective memory in ways both joyous and harrowing. Stitching together still photos, home movies, old celluloid, TV clips, radio broadcasts and podcasts, this free-associative portrait of life in Beirut is filled with acts of humanity and inhumanity. From garbage strikes to bomb strikes, news reports to pop-cultural ephemera, this wild ride through the archives is an act of resistance filled with singing and dancing.

Lebanon has no national archive, so filmmaker and interdisciplinary artist Lana Daher set out to make her own. Combing through 20,000 hours of footage drawn from across seven decades, Daher and co-writer/editor Qutaiba Barhamji – whose previous editing work has included Four Daughters, Smoke Sauna Sisterhood (both MIFF 2023) and the Oscar-nominated The Voice of Hind Rajab – forgo talking heads, voiceovers and explanatory intertitles. Instead, their exuberant supercut is shot through with energy, daring and an undeniable sense of humour.
synopsis_zh:
一场大音量穿越黎巴嫩七十年历史的旅程。

“迷失方向本身就是旅程的一部分。欢迎来到黎巴嫩。”《你爱我吗》如此宣告。这部影片以既欢腾又令人心碎的方式，即兴演绎着黎巴嫩人的集体记忆。老照片、家庭录像、旧胶片、电视片段、广播与播客被缝合在一起，构成一幅关于贝鲁特生活的自由联想式肖像，其间满是人性的光辉与残酷。从垃圾罢工到炸弹袭击，从新闻报道到流行文化碎片，这场穿行于档案之间的狂野之旅是一次充满歌声与舞蹈的抵抗行动。

黎巴嫩没有国家档案馆，于是导演、跨领域艺术家拉娜·达赫尔决定亲手建一座。她与联合编剧兼剪辑师库塔伊巴·巴尔哈姆吉——其剪辑作品包括《四个女儿》《烟熏桑拿姐妹情》（均入选2023年墨尔本电影节）以及奥斯卡提名影片《欣德·拉杰布之声》——从横跨七十年的两万小时素材中披沙拣金，摒弃了受访者谈话、旁白与解说字幕。取而代之的，是一部洋溢着能量、胆识与不可否认的幽默感的酣畅混剪。
highlight_zh: 两万小时档案混剪黎巴嫩七十年，《卫报》盛赞的歌舞式抵抗

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains depictions of violence towards animals

Eye-opening nonfiction work from every corner of the world.

Experience a hypnotic ride through Australia’s salt-lake speed-racing subculture, watch birds take poetic flight over Spain during lockdown, and go inside the world of Tamil Nadu tuktuk drivers as they battle industry sexism. These short films prove that nothing moves us quite like portraits of real life.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含有针对动物的暴力画面

来自世界各个角落、令人大开眼界的非虚构作品。

跟随镜头进入澳大利亚盐湖极速赛车亚文化的迷幻之旅，看封锁期间的西班牙上空群鸟诗意翱翔，再走进印度泰米尔纳德邦嘟嘟车司机的世界，看她们如何对抗行业中的性别歧视。这些短片证明：没有什么比真实人生的肖像更打动人心。
highlight_zh: 横跨三大洲的真实人生切片，盐湖赛车、封城飞鸟与女司机抗争

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains depictions of violence towards animals

Films that challenge convention, inspire dialogue and meet the political moment.

How does cinema respond to a world in turmoil? In these bracing, emotionally resonant shorts, we bear witness to a Palestinian childhood under occupation, the confessions of a former dog trainer who worked for the Chilean dictatorship, and the enigmatic babblings between fountains in Bratislava, custodians of a secret history of civic culture.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含有针对动物的暴力画面

这些影片挑战常规、激发对话，直面当下的政治时刻。

面对动荡的世界，电影该如何回应？在这组尖锐而动人的短片中，我们将见证占领之下的巴勒斯坦童年、一位曾为智利独裁政权效力的训犬师的自白，以及布拉迪斯拉发喷泉之间神秘的呢喃——它们是这座城市公民文化秘史的守护者。
highlight_zh: 直面时代的纪录短片合辑：巴勒斯坦童年、独裁政权训犬师自白。

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

Super-8 images of a little white dog on a bleak northern beach are resurrected through the magic of film.

Commissioned by the BFI for the Film on Film Festival in 2023, Mark Jenkin’s playful short began as a latent image in a two-decade-old super-8 cartridge, in which the titular pet scampers along a grim, windswept shoreline. A moving meditation on the power of analog filmmaking, as light, chemicals and sprockets conspire to bring life to a long-gone companion.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片含频闪画面

超8毫米胶片上，一只小白狗在荒凉的北方海滩上奔跑的影像，借电影的魔力重获新生。

这部俏皮的短片由英国电影协会（BFI）为2023年“胶片上的电影”影展委约创作。它的起点是一卷尘封二十年的超8胶片中的潜影：片名里的那只小狗，正沿着一片阴郁多风的海岸线撒欢。当光线、药水与齿孔齐心协力，让一位早已离去的伙伴重新活过来，这也成了一次关于胶片电影之力量的动人冥想。
highlight_zh: 《敌巴嫩》导演马克·詹金以尘封廿年胶片复活亡犬的动人实验短片

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains depictions of violence towards animals

Stray dogs survive and forage in their landfill home, which in a few days will be bulldozed to build a prison.

In a city dump at the edge of Edirne, stray dogs go about harsh and precarious daily lives: emerging from their dens among the debris, they nose about for news, discover food left by humans and snooze on discarded furniture. Their world, however, will soon be levelled to construct a new prison complex. Simply and sensitively, this film commemorates a landscape in its dog days.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含有针对动物的暴力画面

流浪狗在垃圾填埋场的家园里觅食求生，而几天之后，这里将被推平，改建成一座监狱。

在埃迪尔内城郊的垃圾场，流浪狗过着艰辛而朝不保夕的日子：它们从废墟间的窝里钻出来，四处嗅探消息，寻找人类留下的食物，在被丢弃的家具上打盹。然而它们的世界即将被夷为平地，让位于一座新的监狱建筑群。这部影片以质朴而细腻的笔触，为一片行将消逝的风景留下最后的注脚。
highlight_zh: 垃圾场流浪狗的末日挽歌，质朴细腻的动物纪录片

synopsis_en:
When you invite someone into your home, how do you treat them? Play along with little Juniper and help her learn the kindness her family lacks.

In the handmade paper diorama of her dollhouse, nine-year-old Juniper untangles her feelings of guilt about how her family treated Magnolia, a refugee who worked as a cleaner in their house. Re-enacting troubled memories with her dolls, an ashamed Juniper finds the courage to disagree with her parents and follow her heart. Using childlike textures inspired by puppetry, this animated interactive XR work explores how power dynamics arise intimately in our homes, passing between generations. Audiences at Cannes, Annecy, BFI London Film Festival and SXSW have already discovered it’s never too late to be kind – can you help Juniper figure out how?
synopsis_zh:
当你邀请一个人走进你的家，你会如何对待她？和小朱尼珀一起玩，帮她学会她的家人所缺失的善意。

在手工纸艺搭建的娃娃屋立体场景里，九岁的朱尼珀试图解开心中的愧疚——她的家人曾如何对待玛格诺莉亚，一位在她家做保洁的难民。她用玩偶重演那些令人不安的记忆，羞愧的朱尼珀最终鼓起勇气反驳父母、听从自己的内心。这部动画互动XR作品以偶戏般的童趣质感，探讨权力关系如何在家庭这一最亲密的空间里悄然滋生、代代相传。戛纳、安纳西、BFI伦敦电影节和SXSW的观众已经发现：善良永远不嫌太迟——你能帮朱尼珀找到答案吗？
highlight_zh: 戛纳、安纳西入选的互动XR动画，童真纸偶戏审视家中的权力与善意

title_en: Dorian Gray in the Mirror of the Yellow Press
title_zh: 黄色新闻镜中的道林·格雷
synopsis_en:
Delphine Seyrig stars opposite model Veruschka (in drag) in this acerbic Oscar Wilde adaptation, an avant-garde take on fake news.

As Dr. Mabuse, Delphine Seyrig is the high-femme head of an international media empire. Seeking to boost circulation figures, she has a cunning plan: create a character for her readers to fall in love with, and then ruin him before their very eyes. Dorian Gray (Veruschka von Lehndorff) is just the dandy: young, rich and handsome. Pliable and immaculately dressed, he takes courses in art history and literature; attends philanthropic meetings; and journeys out on memorable trips to the opera, the Press Ball and much further to the underworld. As Dr. Mabuse’s creation begins to take hold in society, a battle of wills emerges.

In the third and final film in her ‘Berlin Trilogy’ (following 1979’s Ticket of No Return and 1981’s Freak Orlando), Ulrike Ottinger borrows loosely from both Oscar Wilde’s 1890 Gothic horror The Picture of Dorian Gray and Norbert Jacques’s infamous Dr. Mabuse character – by way of Fritz Lang’s film series – with a great sense of queer irony to create a delicious satire of ego and capitalism. Ottinger’s own striking production design is complemented by Gisela Storch’s gender-crossing costuming and memorable performances from the two leads, along with frequent collaborator Tabea Blumenschein as Dorian Gray’s love interest.

“During the 1980s heyday of the New German Cinema, Ulrike Ottinger constituted a one-woman avant-garde opposition to the sulky male melodramas of Wenders, Fassbinder and Herzog.” – The New York Times

2K Digitisation
synopsis_zh:
德菲因·塞里格与超模薇露希卡（反串出演）联袂主演，这部改编自奥斯卡·王尔德的辛辣之作，以先锋姿态审视"假新闻"。

塞里格饰演的马布斯博士，是一个国际传媒帝国的女魔头。为了拉动发行量，她想出一条毒计：炮制一个让读者爱上的人物，再当着众人的面亲手毁掉他。道林·格雷（薇露希卡·冯·莱恩多夫饰）正是绝佳人选：年轻、富有、英俊。他温顺可塑、衣着无可挑剔，修习艺术史与文学课程，出席慈善集会，出入歌剧院与新闻舞会，甚至深入更远的地下世界。随着马布斯博士的"造物"逐渐在社会上站稳脚跟，一场意志的较量就此展开。

作为"柏林三部曲"的终章（前两部为1979年的《有去无回的车票》和1981年的《怪人奥兰多》），乌尔莉克·奥廷格松散地借用了王尔德1890年的哥特恐怖小说《道林·格雷的画像》与诺伯特·雅克笔下臭名昭著的马布斯博士形象——经由弗里茨·朗的系列电影——以浓烈的酷儿反讽，酿成一出关于自我与资本主义的美味讽刺剧。奥廷格亲自操刀的醒目美术设计，配上吉塞拉·施托希跨越性别的服装造型和两位主演令人难忘的表演，其长期合作者塔贝亚·布卢门沙因则饰演道林·格雷的恋人。

"在1980年代新德国电影的鼎盛时期，乌尔莉克·奥廷格以一己之力构成了先锋派的反对阵线，对抗文德斯、法斯宾德与赫尔佐格那些阴郁的男性情节剧。"——《纽约时报》

2K修复版
highlight_zh: 塞里格搭档反串超模薇露希卡，奥廷格柏林三部曲终章，酷儿先锋讽刺经典2K修复

synopsis_en:
In his newest work, fresh from its Cannes 2026 premiere, visionary director Lisandro Alonso revisits his acclaimed debut with a beguilingly rhythmic rural family tale.

Misael is content with his spartan life in a remote corner of Argentina’s picturesque La Pampa province. Dwelling in a shack, he spends his days cutting down trees, treating the wood and dealing with local traders. Soon, however, an unexpected responsibility upends his life, and the logic of his days fades away in a place where human reason holds no meaning.

Lisandro Alonso returns 25 years later to the protagonist of his debut feature, 2001’s simple, soft-spoken landmark of slow cinema La libertad. This latest feature, whose title – in Spanish, La libertad doble – directly calls back to its predecessor, reunites Alonso with the same nonprofessional lead, Misael Saavedra, along with cinematographer Cobi Migliora, once again shooting on 35mm. Through this mirroring, the director reflects on how life in Argentina has grown more precarious over the past quarter-century, for lumberjacks and filmmakers alike.
synopsis_zh:
在这部刚于2026年戛纳电影节首映的新作中，颇具远见的导演利桑德罗·阿隆索重返他广受赞誉的处女作，讲述一个韵律迷人的乡村家庭故事。

米萨埃尔满足于自己在阿根廷风景如画的潘帕斯省一隅的清苦生活。他栖身于一间简陋的木屋，日复一日地砍伐树木、处理木材，与当地商贩打交道。然而不久，一份意外降临的责任彻底打乱了他的生活，在这个人类理性毫无意义的地方，他日常的秩序也随之消散。

二十五年后，利桑德罗·阿隆索重新找回了他2001年处女作《自由》中的主人公——那部质朴、寡言的慢电影里程碑之作。这部新片的片名（西班牙语 La libertad doble）直接呼应前作，阿隆索再度携手同一位非职业主演米萨埃尔·萨维德拉，以及摄影师科比·米格里奥拉，并再次采用35毫米胶片拍摄。透过这样的镜像映照，导演反思了过去四分之一个世纪里，阿根廷的生活如何变得愈发朝不保夕——无论对伐木工还是电影人而言。
highlight_zh: 戛纳名导阿隆索时隔25年重返处女作，35毫米胶片诗意慢电影

synopsis_en:
Almost a decade after Western, Valeska Grisebach returns with this similarly rough-hewn, simmering tale of border town intrigue that claimed the Cannes Jury Prize.

The ostensibly sleepy town of Svilengrad sits on the Bulgarian border, with Türkiye to the east and Greece to the south. The laconic Said has hardly been there a day when his car is stolen. Not that it appears to bother him unduly – this rangy former local is an unruffled sort, returned, it seems, to broker a shady fuel deal. A chance encounter reunites him with Veska, an old acquaintance who’s in town helming an archaeological dig. Her attraction to Said sees her venture dangerously deep into Svilengrad’s boozy, machismo-laden underworld.

Awarded the Jury Prize at Cannes, The Dreamed Adventure is as sinewy, assured and enigmatic as Said, played by the striking non-professional actor Syuleyman Letifov (Western, MIFF 2017), while the brilliant Yana Radeva gradually takes centre stage in the film as Veska. In this sprawling, arid noir, the latent threat of violence charges even minor gestures, whether it be the pouring of another drink, the lighting of another cigarette or the simple act of leaning back in a plastic lawn chair. It’s a subtly masterful work, well worth the long wait.
synopsis_zh:
《西部》问世近十年后，瓦莱斯卡·格里泽巴赫带着这部同样粗粝质朴、暗流涌动的边境小镇故事回归，并一举斩获戛纳评审团奖。

表面沉睡的小镇斯维伦格勒坐落在保加利亚边境，东临土耳其，南接希腊。沉默寡言的赛义德刚到镇上没多久，车就被偷了。但他似乎并不怎么在意——这个瘦高的前本地人向来处变不惊，此番归来，似乎是为了做一桩见不得光的燃油生意。一次偶遇让他与旧相识薇丝卡重逢，后者正在镇上主持一处考古发掘。对赛义德的心动，让她一步步深入斯维伦格勒酒气弥漫、雄性气息浓重的地下世界，险象环生。

荣获戛纳评审团奖的《梦中的冒险》正如赛义德本人一般精悍、笃定而神秘——他由气质出众的非职业演员苏莱曼·莱蒂佛夫（《西部》，2017年墨尔本电影节）出演，而出色的雅娜·拉德娃所饰演的薇丝卡则渐渐走向影片的中心。在这部辽阔干燥的黑色电影里，潜伏的暴力威胁让每一个细微的动作都带上电流：再倒一杯酒、再点一支烟，甚至只是往塑料躺椅上一靠。这是一部低调而精湛的杰作，十年等待，值得。
highlight_zh: 《西部》导演暌违十年新作，戛纳评审团奖加冕的边境黑色电影。

synopsis_en:
A young woman’s disappearance prompts an investigative road trip tinted with magic realism in this strangely gorgeous, wildly lo-fi Georgian gem.

When sports photographer Lisa vanished, she was working on an assignment documenting ramshackle football fields across the country. She has left behind a letter for her parents in Tbilisi instructing them not to follow her – a request that her father, Irakli (played by the filmmaker’s own father, David Koberidze), disregards. He attempts to retrace her cross-country path together with her colleague Levan – who, like many of the characters in this gentle and transfixing saga, happens to be invisible – but theirs is destined to be a sublimely digressive quest, punctuated by curious encounters.

Shot entirely on an old Sony Ericsson camera phone and unfolding across an epic timescale, Alexandre Koberidze’s latest feature – winner of both a Competition Special Mention and the FIPRESCI Prize at Locarno Film Festival – combines the sense of melancholic whimsy that distinguished his previous feature, What Do We See When We Look at the Sky? (MIFF 2021), with its daring formal gambit, giving its images of the Georgian countryside a surprising, pixelated beauty at times verging on abstraction.
synopsis_zh:
一位年轻女子的失踪，引出一场浸染着魔幻现实主义色彩的调查公路之旅——这部来自格鲁吉亚的瑰宝，美得离奇，又低保真到肆意大胆。

体育摄影师丽莎失踪时，正在为一项拍摄任务奔走，记录这个国家各处破败失修的足球场。她给第比利斯的父母留下一封信，叮嘱他们不要来找她——但她的父亲伊拉克利（由导演本人的父亲大卫·科贝里泽饰演）并未听从。他与丽莎的同事列万一同踏上重走她横跨全国之路的旅程——而列万，正如这部温柔而令人入迷的传奇中的许多角色一样，恰好是隐形的。他们注定要展开一场妙趣横生、不断岔开的追寻，一路上点缀着种种奇异的相遇。

影片全程用一部老旧的索尼爱立信拍照手机拍摄，在史诗般的时间跨度中徐徐铺展。这是亚历山大·科贝里泽的最新长片，斩获洛迦诺电影节主竞赛单元特别提及与费比西国际影评人奖。它既延续了他前作《当我们仰望天空时看见什么？》（2021年墨尔本国际电影节）中那种忧郁而俏皮的气质，又以大胆的形式冒险，为格鲁吉亚乡间的影像赋予一种出人意料、由像素构成的美感，时而近乎抽象。
highlight_zh: 洛迦诺双奖，老手机拍出的抽象诗意公路魔幻

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains themes of racial discrimination and instances of violence towards First Nations people. Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander people should be aware that this film contains images, voices or names of deceased persons.

A regional First Nations filmmaker explores the Wotjobaluk Nations’ underdog fight for recognition, revealing Treaty as a complex mosaic with deeply local, lived realities unfolding far from Melbourne.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片涉及种族歧视主题及针对原住民的暴力场景。澳大利亚原住民及托雷斯海峡岛民请注意，本片包含已故人士的影像、声音或姓名。

一位来自地区的原住民电影人，深入记录沃乔巴卢克族群为争取承认而进行的抗争。这场以弱抗强的斗争揭示出：《条约》并非一纸抽象文书，而是一幅复杂的马赛克拼图，由远离墨尔本的一个个深刻而具体的在地现实拼合而成。
highlight_zh: 原住民导演亲述沃乔巴卢克族争取承认的抗争，《条约》背后的在地真相。

synopsis_en:
A student accuses her teachers of a same-sex affair in this luminous drama based on an early-19th-century case that scandalised Scotland’s justice system.

Edinburgh, 1810: wealthy aristocrat Lady Cumming Gordon arrives at a new girls’ boarding school, wishing to enrol her illegitimate teenage granddaughter Jane. When Jane – born to an Indian mother – is bullied by her peers for her dark skin, progressive teachers Miss Pirie and Miss Woods take her under their wings. But the close bond that develops leads to complicated feelings of jealousy, and a shift in the trio’s dynamic instigates an accusation by Jane that will alter the course of the teachers’ lives.

This dramatisation of the true story that inspired Lillian Hellman's famous play The Children's Hour – which in turn was adapted into the 1961 William Wyler film of the same name starring Audrey Hepburn and Shirley MacLaine – deals frankly with the layers of intersectional power that impacted the real-life events behind it. Up-and-comer Mia Tharia (also starring in Taika Waititi’s upcoming adaptation of Kazuo Ishiguro’s Klara and the Sun) gives a deftly nuanced performance as Jane, while Fiona Shaw is in typically fine form as the acerbic and haughty Lady Cumming Gordon. Aftersun (MIFF 2022) fans will also be delighted to spot Frankie Corio in a supporting role.
synopsis_zh:
一名学生指控自己的两位老师有同性恋情——这部光影动人的剧情片，改编自19世纪初一桩震动苏格兰司法界的真实案件。

1810年，爱丁堡。富有的贵族卡明·戈登夫人来到一所新开办的女子寄宿学校，希望为自己的私生外孙女、少女简办理入学。简的母亲是印度人，她因肤色较深而遭到同学欺凌，思想开明的皮里小姐和伍兹小姐将她护在羽翼之下。然而三人之间日渐亲密的情谊，却滋生出复杂的嫉妒心，关系的微妙变化最终促使简提出一项指控，彻底改变了两位老师的人生轨迹。

这桩真实案件曾启发莉莲·海尔曼写下名剧《双姝怨》（The Children's Hour），该剧后来又被威廉·惠勒改编为1961年的同名电影，由奥黛丽·赫本与雪莉·麦克雷恩主演。本片直面事件背后层层交织的身份与权力问题，坦率而不回避。新星米娅·塔莉亚（她还将出演塔伊加·维迪提改编自石黑一雄小说《克拉拉与太阳》的新作）细腻演绎了简这一角色；菲奥娜·肖则一如既往地稳健，将尖刻傲慢的卡明·戈登夫人演得入木三分。《晒后假日》（MIFF 2022）的影迷还能惊喜地发现弗兰基·科里奥在片中客串配角。
highlight_zh: 《双姝怨》真实案件原型，菲奥娜·肖坐镇的古典时代剧

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Accompanying short film contains stroboscopic imagery

James Benning, America’s master of slow cinema, invites audiences to consider bridges: structural and political, physical and metaphorical.

Eight American bridges – San Francisco’s Golden Gate; New Mexico’s Rio Grande Gorge; Selma, Alabama’s Edmund Pettus; Florida’s Seven Mile; the George Washington that connects New Jersey and Manhattan; the Dubuque-Wisconsin that crosses the Mississippi River; North Dakota’s Hi-Line; and the Astoria-Megler running from Oregon to Washington – are viewed for 10 minutes each. Each shot is simultaneously static and full of life, the long takes painting with light, sound and composition the point where nature meets human ingenuity, activity and history.

The latest visual essay from minimalist legend James Benning, Eight Bridges is cinema distilled to its purest form: a single take presented as is for audiences to contemplate; repeat. This formalism is Benning’s signature, as seen most recently at MIFF in little boy (MIFF 2025), Allensworth (MIFF 2023) and The United States of America (MIFF 2022). But more than his recent films, Eight Bridges harks back to and builds upon earlier long-take observational works such as 13 Lakes and Ten Skies. Shooting digitally, Benning mimics the structural syntax of these 16mm works (10 minutes approximating the duration of a standard reel of 16mm film) to deliver another essential cinematic essay on looking and listening.

“Eight Bridges is, by turns, meditative and contemplative … Benning offers an extended moment, if not of therapy, at least of quiet thoughtfulness and awareness – and cinematic pleasure.” – Documentary

Screens with short film Forever…Forever (21 mins).
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：随片放映的短片含频闪画面

美国慢电影大师詹姆斯·班宁邀请观众凝视桥梁：结构的与政治的，实体的与隐喻的。

八座美国桥梁——旧金山金门大桥、新墨西哥州里奥格兰德峡谷大桥、阿拉巴马州塞尔玛的埃德蒙·佩特斯大桥、佛罗里达七英里大桥、连接新泽西与曼哈顿的乔治·华盛顿大桥、横跨密西西比河的迪比克—威斯康星大桥、北达科他州海莱恩大桥，以及从俄勒冈延伸至华盛顿州的阿斯托里亚—梅格勒大桥——每座各凝视十分钟。每个镜头既静止又生机盎然，长镜头以光影、声音与构图，描绘出自然与人类智慧、活动和历史交汇的所在。

作为极简主义传奇詹姆斯·班宁的最新影像随笔，《八座桥》是提纯至最本真形态的电影：一个长镜头原样呈现，供观众静观；然后重复。这种形式主义是班宁的标志，近年在墨尔本影展放映的《小男孩》（MIFF 2025）、《艾伦斯沃斯》（MIFF 2023）和《美利坚合众国》（MIFF 2022）中皆可见到。但相比近作，《八座桥》更多地回溯并延展了他早期的长镜头观察式作品，如《十三湖》与《十片天空》。班宁以数字方式拍摄，却沿用这些16毫米作品的结构语法（十分钟约等于一卷标准16毫米胶片的时长），再度献上一篇关于观看与聆听的必看电影随笔。

“《八座桥》时而冥想、时而沉思……班宁给出了一段绵长的时刻，即便算不上疗愈，至少也是一种安静的省思与觉察——以及电影的纯粹愉悦。”——《Documentary》杂志

随片放映短片《永远……永远》（21分钟）。
highlight_zh: 慢电影大师班宁新作，八座桥各凝视十分钟的纯粹影像随笔

synopsis_en:
This Cannes Un Certain Regard Jury Prize–winning thriller set among a Nepalese third-gender community sees one matriarch choosing between duty and love.

On the fringes of the village of Thori, near a forest inhabited by wild elephants, live a community of Kinnar women united by a vow of chastity. They often perform sacred rites for the villagers, but their third-gender status brings both reverence and ridicule. One of the Kinnar matriarchs, Pirati, has fallen for a local man and dreams of eloping with him to Delhi. But when her adoptive daughter Apsara disappears and the townsfolk refuse to help, she’s faced with an impossible decision.

Receiving a seven-minute standing ovation at Cannes, Elephants in the Fog is the first Nepali feature ever selected for the festival’s Un Certain Regard section, where it won the Jury Prize. The feature directorial debut of Shambhala (MIFF 2024) and The Black Hen (MIFF 2016) co-writer Abinash Bikram Shah, it’s at once a riveting crime saga and a robust dramatisation of threats to trans rights across South Asia. Real-world LGBTQIA+ activist Puspa Thing Lama embodies Pirati’s defiant fortitude with an authenticity born of lived experience, while the on-location cinematography by Noé Bach (Animalia, MIFF 2023) permeates proceedings with an otherworldly, almost menacing air.
synopsis_zh:
这部荣获戛纳电影节“一种关注”单元评审团奖的惊悚片，将镜头对准尼泊尔的第三性别社群：一位社群中的大家长，必须在责任与爱情之间做出抉择。

在托里村的边缘、一片有野象出没的森林旁，生活着一群立誓守贞的“金娜”（Kinnar）女性。她们常为村民主持神圣仪式，但第三性别的身份让她们既受敬畏，也遭嘲弄。社群的大家长之一皮拉蒂爱上了当地一名男子，梦想与他私奔去德里。然而当她的养女阿普萨拉失踪、镇上的人却袖手旁观时，她被迫面对一个无解的抉择。

《雾中之象》在戛纳首映时收获了长达七分钟的起立鼓掌，是史上首部入选戛纳“一种关注”单元的尼泊尔长片，并一举夺得评审团奖。本片是《香巴拉》（2024年墨尔本影展）与《黑母鸡》（2016年墨尔本影展）联合编剧阿比纳什·比克拉姆·沙阿的长片导演处女作，既是一部扣人心弦的犯罪传奇，也有力地呈现了南亚各地跨性别群体权益所面临的威胁。现实中的LGBTQIA+活动家普什帕·廷·拉玛以亲身经历淬炼出的真实感，演活了皮拉蒂的倔强与坚韧；诺埃·巴赫（《动物王国》，2023年墨尔本影展）的实景摄影则为全片笼罩上一层超脱尘世、近乎不祥的气息。
highlight_zh: 戛纳“一种关注”评审团奖，尼泊尔影史首部入围长片

synopsis_en:
Something sinister lurks on the fringes of a seemingly empty business complex.

In the dead of night, a high-tech surveillance video hovers over an unassuming corporate block where everything is not quite what it seems. Perched in the liminal space between architecture and paranoia, Johann Lurf’s eerie, jaggedly synth-scored 2014 short peels back the camouflage of the arms industry, using their own security devices to expose them.
synopsis_zh:
某个看似空无一人的商业园区边缘，潜伏着不祥的气息。

夜深人静，一段高科技监控影像悬浮在一座毫不起眼的办公楼群上空——这里的一切都并非表面那么简单。约翰·卢尔夫这部 2014 年的短片游走于建筑与偏执妄想之间的暧昧地带，配以尖锐冷峻的合成器配乐，气氛诡谲，层层揭开军火工业的伪装——用他们自己的安防设备，反过来曝光他们自己。
highlight_zh: 用军火商自己的监控镜头反向曝光军火工业的实验短片

title_en: The Enchantment of the Blue Sailors
synopsis_en:
With glitter, feathers and gender-bending sailors, Ulrike Ottinger’s rarely screened early experimental film sets the scene for her work to come.

An exotic sea laps upon the sands of a distant beach, and a woman in an extravagant red gown and matching headdress crosses the dunes, singing. Gay sailors in classic white-and-blue uniforms kiss (years before French artists Pierre et Gilles made such imagery iconic). A woman in a leopard-print party dress fringed with pink, cake-like layers settles in for a solo picnic, while another woman in full-feathered bird regalia prowls nearby, her tinselled wings shimmering in the light. Scantily clad characters cavort and canoodle with bacchanalian pleasure.

An assemblage of vivid imagery, The Enchantment of the Blue Sailors was Ulrike Ottinger’s second mid-length experimental film, following Laocoon & Sons: The Story of the Transformation of Esmeralda del Rio (1972/73), and her first in riotous colour. Notably, it is the only work in Ottinger’s filmography that she shares a directorial credit on: joining her at the helm here is her partner and frequent collaborator Tabea Blumenschein, who also oversaw the film’s costumes and make-up. Both women appear onscreen, with Ottinger playing the “Nymph of German Romanticism” alongside influential queer filmmaker Rosa von Praunheim (It Is Not the Homosexual Who Is Perverse, but the Society in Which He Lives) as one of the titular sailors.
synopsis_zh:
亮片、羽毛与颠覆性别的水手——乌尔莉克·奥廷格这部难得一见的早期实验电影，为她日后的创作埋下了伏笔。

异域的海水拍打着远方的沙滩，一位身着华丽红色长裙、头戴同色头饰的女子边唱边走过沙丘。穿着经典蓝白制服的男同志水手们相互亲吻——比法国艺术家组合皮埃尔与吉尔将这类影像变为经典早了好些年。一位穿着豹纹派对裙、裙摆缀着粉色蛋糕般层叠花边的女子独自铺开野餐，另一位全身鸟羽盛装的女子在旁逡巡，缀满金属丝的翅膀在光线中闪烁。衣着暴露的角色们嬉戏调情，尽享酒神式的欢愉。

《蓝色水手的魅惑》以缤纷影像拼贴而成，是奥廷格继《拉奥孔与儿子们：埃斯梅拉达·德尔·里奥的变形记》（1972/73）之后的第二部中长片实验电影，也是她首部色彩恣意的彩色作品。值得一提的是，这是奥廷格所有作品中唯一一部与人联合执导的影片：与她共同掌镜的是她的伴侣、长期合作者塔贝亚·布卢门沙因，后者还包办了本片的服装与化妆。两人都在片中出镜——奥廷格饰演“德国浪漫主义仙女”，而与她同台的还有饰演片名中水手之一的酷儿电影名导罗莎·冯·布劳恩海姆（《变态的不是同性恋者，而是他所处的社会》）。
highlight_zh: 奥廷格罕见放映的早期酷儿实验片，唯一联合执导之作

synopsis_en:
Anthropomorphic animals lose themselves in mundane activities as an apocalypse descends.

In a world on the brink of cataclysm, anthropomorphic animals at an airport indulge familiar modern habits, such as struggling with luggage, queuing tiredly at security checkpoints or for coffee, or staring at reality TV shows on their phones. Swedish animation auteur Niki Lindroth von Bahr (Something to Remember, MIFF 2020) charms with another gorgeously detailed stop-motion fable, whose star-stacked voice cast includes Noomi Rapace, Alexander Skarsgård and Denis Lavant.
synopsis_zh:
末日降临之际，拟人化的动物们仍沉溺于琐碎的日常。

在这个濒临大灾变的世界里，机场中一群拟人化的动物照旧维持着熟悉的现代生活习惯：与行李较劲、在安检口或咖啡摊前疲惫地排队，或是盯着手机上的真人秀节目出神。瑞典动画作者尼基·林德罗特·冯·巴尔（《值得铭记之事》，2020 年墨尔本电影节）再度以一则精雕细琢、美轮美奂的定格动画寓言令人倾倒，其豪华配音阵容包括劳米·拉佩斯、亚历山大·斯卡斯加德与德尼·拉旺。
highlight_zh: 瑞典定格动画大师新作，末日机场寓言，明星配音阵容

synopsis_en:
Charli xcx stars as a British tourist crisscrossing Warsaw with an old friend in this effervescent indie that’s equally roiling with emotion.

Bethany (pop music icon Charli xcx) is a London gal who’s arrived in Warsaw with her boyfriend Rob. He believes he’s in for a romantic getaway culminating in a picturesque marriage proposal, but Bethany has other ideas. She wastes no time peeling off to track down an old friend, Nel, who runs a flower shop and with whom she shares a uniquely electric connection. Through the lens of their mutual infatuation – teetering on romance – the city shimmers with party-girl possibility.

Fresh from her star turn in The Moment, a deglammed Charli proves a magnetic screen presence; Erupcja is similarly buoyed by vivid performances from Will Madden, Lena Góra and Jeremy O. Harris (The Sweet East, MIFF 2023) as Claude, an artist friend of Nel’s who takes on the role of Rob’s bemused but kindly babysitter. In shaping the project together with his cast, US-born Warsaw-based director Pete Ohs has created an intimate, bittersweet paean to his adoptive home – a film that bubbles with understated eruptive potential.
synopsis_zh:
Charli xcx 在这部轻盈灵动、又暗流涌动的独立电影中饰演一位英国游客，与老友一起穿行于华沙的大街小巷。

贝萨妮（流行乐偶像 Charli xcx 饰）是个伦敦姑娘，与男友罗伯一同来到华沙。罗伯满心以为这是一场浪漫之旅，最后还能来一场风景如画的求婚，但贝萨妮另有打算。她迫不及待地甩开男友，去寻找老朋友内尔——一位经营花店的姑娘，两人之间有着一种独一无二的电光石火般的默契。透过这份游走在爱情边缘的相互迷恋，整座城市都闪烁着派对女孩式的无限可能。

刚刚在《The Moment》中完成主演首秀的 Charli 洗尽铅华，展现出极具磁性的银幕魅力；威尔·马登、莱娜·古拉与杰瑞米·O·哈里斯（《甜蜜的东方》，2023 年墨尔本电影节）的生动表演同样为影片增色不少——哈里斯饰演内尔的艺术家朋友克劳德，一位对罗伯既无奈又心善的“临时保姆”。生于美国、定居华沙的导演彼特·奥斯与演员们共同打磨了这个项目，献给他的第二故乡一封亲密而苦乐参半的情书——一部涌动着克制的“喷发”潜能、气泡翻腾的电影。
highlight_zh: Charli xcx 主演，华沙街头的派对女孩心事，暧昧涌动的独立小品。

synopsis_en:
A precursor to Mark Jenkin’s acclaimed debut feature Bait (MIFF 2019), this audiovisual stream of consciousness pays homage to the Beat poets via the mythical Cornish west.

Mark Jenkin’s 2016 vision of what may be a cove fisherman’s final voyage, shot on hand-processed super-8 reversal stock and sound-recorded to compact audiocassette, was entirely unedited in terms of writing, performance and visuals, and designed as a homage to the spontaneous prose that emerged from the Beat movement. In the filmmaker’s hands, the grizzly old fisherman is transformed into a mythical poet.
synopsis_zh:
作为马克·詹金广受赞誉的长片处女作《海角上的渔夫》（Bait，2019年墨尔本国际电影节展映）的前奏，这部视听意识流影像以充满神话色彩的康沃尔西部为舞台，向垮掉派诗人致敬。

在马克·詹金2016年的这幅影像中，一位海湾渔夫或许正踏上人生最后一次出海。全片以手工冲洗的超8毫米反转片拍摄，声音用普通盒式磁带录制，无论文本、表演还是画面都完全未经剪辑，意在向垮掉派运动中喷涌而出的即兴散文致敬。在导演的镜头下，这位须发花白的老渔夫化身为一位神话般的诗人。
highlight_zh: 《海角上的渔夫》导演前奏之作，超8毫米胶片致敬垮掉派

synopsis_en:
Alonso’s hugely ambitious triptych explores the collision between Indigenous lives and colonisation.

Nineteenth-century Old West gunslinger Murphy (Viggo Mortensen), searching for his missing daughter, arrives in a lawless outpost, where the only justice to be found is by way of the gun. In the contemporary United States, Alaina (played by actual police officer Alaina Clifford) is a local cop at snowy South Dakota reservation Pine Ridge, who has her work cut out keeping an eye on colourful locals, crime at a casino and her disaffected teenage niece. Lastly, amid the Amazon gold rush of 1970s Brazil, two young men from a remote tribe fight over a girl – and one of them ends up dead.

Stitched together by the migratory flight of a jabiru and the shapeshifting presence of a character called El Coronel (Chiara Mastroianni), Alonso’s ambitious sixth feature is a triptych tripping through eclectic genres and varying aspect ratios. The film’s opening act reunites him with his Jauja stars in a gunslinging riff drawing from old-timey oaters, John Ford’s The Searchers (MIFF 1994) and Jim Jarmusch’s Dead Man; its second section feels like familiar Alonso minimalism steeped in Twin Peaks–style uncanniness and shot through with pop colour; while its third offers a subversive riff on ethnographic cinema. Throughout, Eureka’s thesis emerges: a commentary on the intersection of Indigenous cultures and colonial power across history, nations and modes of storytelling.
synopsis_zh:
阿隆索野心勃勃的三联画，探讨原住民生活与殖民历史的碰撞。

十九世纪的西部旧时代，枪手墨菲（维果·莫腾森 饰）为寻找失踪的女儿来到一处无法无天的边陲小镇，那里唯一的正义只能靠枪来伸张。而在当代美国，阿莱娜（由真实警察阿莱娜·克利福德出演）是南达科他州白雪皑皑的松岭保留地上的一名当地警察，她要盯着形形色色的居民、赌场里的犯罪，还有自己那个心灰意冷的少女侄女，忙得不可开交。最后，在上世纪七十年代巴西亚马逊的淘金热中，一个偏远部落的两名年轻人为一个女孩争斗——其中一人最终丧命。

一只裸颈鹳的迁徙飞行，以及名为“上校”的角色（基娅拉·马斯楚安尼 饰）变幻莫测的身影，将三段故事缝合在一起。阿隆索这部雄心之作是他的第六部长片，在不同类型与画幅比例之间自由穿行：开篇一幕让他与《安乐乡》的主演们重聚，是一段致敬老式西部片的枪战戏，灵感来自约翰·福特的《搜索者》（1994年墨尔本电影节展映）与吉姆·贾木许的《离魂异客》；第二段延续阿隆索标志性的极简主义，浸染着《双峰》式的诡异氛围，又点缀着流行色彩；第三段则是对民族志电影的一次颠覆性演绎。贯穿全片，《尤里卡》的主题渐渐浮现：一场关于原住民文化与殖民权力如何跨越历史、国界与叙事方式相互交织的评述。
highlight_zh: 维果·莫腾森主演，阿隆索三段式雄心之作，戛纳首映

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

In a virtuosic riff on a biopic standard, this Silver Bear–winning ensemble piece plays on the emotions of the people surrounding an anguished US jazz piano icon.

June 1961: the Bill Evans Trio have just live-recorded a New York residency that will spawn two celebrated jazz albums. Ten days later, a car crash kills bassist Scott LaFaro at just 25. Devastated, Evans can’t even touch a piano. He stays with his brother Harry, sister-in-law Pat and adoring niece Debby; shoots heroin with his girlfriend Ellaine; and journeys silently, scarily inward. Bill’s depressive black hole starts to claim Harry – a music conservatory teacher who envies his kid brother’s genius – and even shadows their working-class parents’ sunny Florida retirement.

British documentarian Grant Gee (Joy Division) won the Berlinale’s Silver Bear for Best Director with this fiction debut, whose jaunty title – borrowed from an early Evans album – belies its deeper themes. In elegant black-and-white, the film seeks its lost subject in negative space, emulating his subtle style; impressionistic montages shimmer like harmonic chords and slide across chronologies like modal progressions. Playing both Evans and his compositions, frequent Joachim Trier collaborator Anders Danielsen Lie (The Worst Person in the World, MIFF 2021) is magnetically quiet, while Bill Pullman and Laurie Metcalf are in career-best form as Bill’s parents.
synopsis_zh:
这部荣获柏林电影节银熊奖的群像之作，以精湛的即兴手法重新演绎传记片的套路，透过一位饱受煎熬的美国爵士钢琴巨匠身边众人的情感波澜，映照出他的内心世界。

1961年6月，比尔·埃文斯三重奏刚刚完成一场纽约驻场演出的现场录音，日后将从中诞生两张传世爵士名盘。十天后，一场车祸夺走了贝斯手斯科特·拉法罗年仅25岁的生命。悲痛欲绝的埃文斯连钢琴都无法触碰。他寄居在哥哥哈里、嫂子帕特和崇拜他的侄女黛比家中，与女友伊莱恩一起注射海洛因，沉默而骇人地滑向内心深渊。比尔那抑郁的黑洞开始吞噬哈里——这位音乐学院教师一直嫉妒着弟弟的天才——甚至连父母在佛罗里达阳光下的工薪阶层退休生活也蒙上了阴影。

英国纪录片导演格兰特·吉(《控制之声：乔伊·迪维辛》)凭借这部剧情片处女作摘得柏林电影节最佳导演银熊奖。影片片名借自埃文斯早期的一张专辑，轻快的名字之下藏着更深沉的主题。全片以优雅的黑白影像，在留白与负空间中追寻这位已然消逝的主人公，呼应他含蓄内敛的琴风；印象派式的蒙太奇如和声般闪烁流转，又如调式进行般在时间线之间自如滑动。约阿希姆·提尔的御用演员安德斯·丹尼尔森·李(《世界上最糟糕的人》，2021年墨尔本电影节)一人分饰埃文斯与他的音乐，安静中自有磁场；比尔·普尔曼和劳里·梅特卡夫饰演比尔的父母，双双奉献生涯最佳表演。
highlight_zh: 柏林银熊奖最佳导演，黑白影像追忆爵士钢琴诗人比尔·埃文斯

synopsis_en:
The thrilling tale of a Glasgow community’s spontaneous act of civil resistance that saved two of their own from a Home Office deportation raid.

On 13 May 2021, as the first day of Eid-ul-Fitr dawned, a Home Office immigration raid targeted an ordinary residential street in Pollokshields, Glasgow, bundling two local men into a van. But their neighbours wouldn’t let it leave; one protester flung his body under the van and hugged the axle. Word travelled quickly: soon, more than 2000 ordinary people had dropped their morning cuppas, walked out of work meetings and abandoned their daily routines to converge on Kenmure Street. There was no plan – most of these civil resisters didn’t even know one another – but they showed up instinctively nonetheless to bear witness and defend what was morally right.

Haunted by his own decision to stay home that morning – “I didn’t see the hope everyone on Kenmure Street did” – Scotland-based Chilean-Belgian director Felipe Bustos Sierra commemorates this day of spontaneous solidarity as a moment-by-moment mosaic of crowdsourced testimonies, archival fragments and self-aware dramatisations by actors Emma Thompson (also an executive producer on the film alongside Hugh Bonneville) and Kate Dickie (The Witch, MIFF 2015). Winning a Special Jury Award for Civil Resistance at Sundance 2026, this heartening film is a timely reminder that we never need permission to stop legalised injustice.
synopsis_zh:
一个格拉斯哥社区自发的公民抗命行动，从英国内政部的遣返突袭中救回了两位邻居——这是一个扣人心弦的真实故事。

2021年5月13日，开斋节第一天的清晨，内政部移民执法人员突袭了格拉斯哥波洛克希尔兹区一条普通的居民街道，将两名当地男子押上囚车。但邻居们不肯让车开走：一名抗议者钻到车底，紧紧抱住车轴。消息迅速传开，很快，两千多名普通人放下手中的早茶、离开工作会议、抛下日常事务，涌向肯缪尔街。没有任何计划——这些抗争者大多素不相识——但他们凭着本能站了出来，见证并捍卫道义上正确的事。

那天早上选择留在家中的决定一直萦绕在导演心头——“我没有看到肯缪尔街上每个人都看到的希望。”定居苏格兰的智利裔比利时导演费利佩·布斯托斯·谢拉以众人口述的证言、档案影像的碎片，以及由演员艾玛·汤普森（她同时与休·博内威利共同担任本片监制）和凯特·迪基（《女巫》，2015年墨尔本电影节）出演的自省式情景重现，将这一天的自发团结逐刻拼贴成一幅马赛克画卷，以此纪念。本片荣获2026年圣丹斯电影节公民抗命特别评审团奖，温暖人心，也适时地提醒我们：阻止合法化的不公，从来不需要谁的许可。
highlight_zh: 圣丹斯特别评审团奖，两千人挡下遣返车的真实群像

synopsis_en:
A couple locked out of the housing market roam the neighbourhood for a place to mark their territory. From there, things only get more disgusting.

Two drifters in love are on a mission: determinedly chugging water, they walk leafy streets and sneak into apartment blocks, methodically seeking an unlocked home. What will they do when they find one? And how will the home owner react? WTF Shorts alum Raghav Rampal (Shameless!, MIFF 2024) breaks yet another taboo with this impudent, frankly unhinged piss-take.
synopsis_zh:
一对被住房市场拒之门外的情侣在社区里四处游荡，想找个地方“标记领地”。接下来的事，只会越来越重口。

这对相爱的流浪情侣肩负着一项使命：他们拼命灌水，走过绿树成荫的街道，溜进一栋栋公寓楼，有条不紊地寻找一扇没上锁的家门。找到之后他们会做什么？屋主又会作何反应？曾入选“WTF 短片”单元的拉加夫·兰帕尔（《Shameless!》，2024 年墨尔本电影节）再度打破禁忌，献上这部放肆而近乎癫狂的恶搞之作——片中的“恶搞”（piss-take）一词，可谓字面意义上的双关。
highlight_zh: 买不起房就“撒尿占地”？打破禁忌的癫狂恶搞短片

synopsis_en:
Awarded the Un Certain Regard Prize at Cannes, this indelible study of loss joins a fragmented family as they take a trip to heal and confront the past.

Ella and her daughters Jessie and Melli have booked a trip to Tenerife to take a break from their busy life in Berlin. The night before they’re due to depart, Jessie and her boyfriend Lux head out to a party, where a cocktail of alcohol and drugs leads to tragedy. One year on, the thwarted trip to the Canary Islands is reattempted, but the heartache continues to reverberate beneath seemingly healed exteriors.

The third feature from Sandra Wollner eschews the oversimplification that often accompanies the trope of unexpected death, elegantly playing with time and perspective to shed new light on events. The film’s pensive, precise images – shot by Aftersun (MIFF 2022) DOP Gregory Oke – likewise command attention as they distil grief, guilt and their after-effects. Birgit Minichmayr (Everyone Else, MIFF 2016) is arresting as a bereaved mother whose performance of survival hinders her recovery, while newcomer Lotte Shirin Keiling impresses in embodying Melli’s wide-eyed, almost magical approach to coping with unthinkable loss.
synopsis_zh:
荣获戛纳电影节一种关注单元大奖，这部令人难忘的作品聚焦一个支离破碎的家庭，他们踏上一段旅程，试图疗愈伤痛、直面过去。

艾拉和两个女儿杰西、梅莉订好了去特内里费岛的行程，想暂时逃离柏林忙碌的生活。出发前夜，杰西和男友卢克斯外出参加派对，酒精与毒品的交织酿成悲剧。一年后，那趟被迫中断的加纳利群岛之旅重新启程，然而在看似愈合的表象之下，伤痛依然暗流涌动。

这是桑德拉·沃尔纳的第三部长片。她拒绝了「意外死亡」题材常见的简单化处理，以优雅的时间与视角游戏为事件投下新的光亮。影片沉静而精准的影像出自《晒后假日》（2022年墨尔本电影节）摄影师格雷戈里·奥克之手，将悲恸、愧疚及其余波凝练于画面之中，令人无法移开视线。比吉特·米尼希迈尔（《他人之爱》，2016年墨尔本电影节）饰演一位丧女的母亲，她那副「努力活下去」的姿态反而阻碍了自身的康复，表演摄人心魄；新人洛特·希琳·凯林同样出色，演活了梅莉面对无法承受之失时那种天真而近乎魔幻的自处方式。
highlight_zh: 戛纳一种关注大奖，《晒后假日》摄影师掌镜的哀恸之作

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

Visionary work from the avant-garde that reimagines the possibilities of cinema.

Expand your cinematic horizons with this formally daring line-up, including a hypnotic homage to three-strip Technicolor, a reimagining of The Decameron that flips Western perspectives and an ecstatic vision of the body as a newborn baby encounters their future digital mutation.
