Plus, the return of multiple MIFF award winner Maryam Tafakory (Razeh-del, MIFF 2025) and local fave Allison Chorn (The Plastic House, MIFF 2020).
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含频闪画面

来自先锋派的前卫之作，重新想象电影的种种可能。

用这组形式大胆的短片拓展你的电影视野：一部向三色特艺彩色工艺致敬的催眠之作、一部翻转西方视角的《十日谈》重构，还有一场关于身体的狂喜幻象——新生婴儿邂逅自己未来的数字变异。此外，多次斩获墨尔本电影节奖项的玛丽亚姆·塔法科里（《Razeh-del》，MIFF 2025）与本地人气作者艾莉森·乔恩（《塑料屋》，MIFF 2020）也携新作回归。
highlight_zh: 先锋实验短片集，MIFF获奖导演塔法科里新作回归

synopsis_en:
A self-assigned summer project leads to tough lessons in life, love and friendship for a precocious pair of boarding school BFFs.

Best friends Minna and Flic are on a mission to graduate from their English boarding school and get into Oxbridge. Keenly aware that they’ll need to go the extra mile to increase their chances of selection, the girls set themselves an extracurricular assignment to become more “worldly”. Their goal: to fall in love with the first person they see … and that just happens to be their totally oblivious geography teacher, Miss Delavigne (Alice Englert, Bad Behaviour, MIFF 2023).

With a punchy script penned by Miriam Battye and adapted from a short story by Rose Tremain, Extra Geography is a funny, bittersweet ode to teenage-girl friendship in the lineage of films like Ghost World, Clueless and Booksmart. BAFTA-winning TV director Molly Manners’s debut feature is led by remarkable performances from newcomers Galaxie Clear and Marni Duggan as Minna and Flic, whose convincingly cosy friendship is tested by the rocky terrain of adolescence, full of confusing hormones, co-dependency and competitiveness.
synopsis_zh:
一项自发的暑期课题，让一对早熟的寄宿学校闺蜜在人生、爱情与友谊上狠狠上了一课。

明娜和芙莉克是形影不离的好朋友，她们的目标是从英国寄宿学校顺利毕业、考入牛津或剑桥。深知想要脱颖而出就得付出更多，两个女孩给自己布置了一项课外作业——变得更加"见多识广"。她们的任务是：爱上见到的第一个人……而这个人，恰好是对此毫不知情的地理老师德拉维涅小姐（爱丽丝·英格勒特饰，曾出演2023年墨尔本电影节影片《行为不端》）。

影片剧本由米里亚姆·巴蒂执笔，改编自罗丝·特里梅因的短篇小说，笔触犀利有力。《额外地理课》是一曲献给少女友谊的幽默又苦乐参半的赞歌，与《幽灵世界》《独领风骚》《高材生》一脉相承。这是英国电视剧导演、BAFTA得主莫莉·曼纳斯的长片处女作，两位新人加拉克茜·克利尔与玛尔妮·达根分别饰演明娜和芙莉克，表演令人惊艳——她们亲密无间的友情令人信服，却要经受青春期的重重考验：懵懂的荷尔蒙、彼此依赖，还有暗暗较劲。
highlight_zh: 《独领风骚》式少女友谊喜剧，Variety盛赞的高中片新经典

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains themes of racial discrimination and instances of violence towards First Nations people

A unique mixture of different forms of Indigenous storytelling, this vibrant documentary finds the humanity behind all-too-familiar statistics.

The numbers don’t lie: First Nations people are disproportionately more likely to be separated from their families, incarcerated as both youths and adults, and become victims of police brutality. But, as Facing the Numbers states on opening: “The statistics tell one story; we tell another.” Sharing the voices of members of the Stolen Generations, those who have lost family members to deaths in custody and survivors of violence in custody, this unique hybrid anthology – a mixture of memoir, music video, poetry, dance, journalism and activism – lends space to the personal stories behind experience of disadvantage and institutionalised violence.

Faced with the seemingly intractable, insurmountable problems of colonial power structures, systemic oppression and endemic racism, First Peoples creatives Kieran Satour (Gurindji, Pertame and Worimi) and Tyson Perkins (Arrernte and Kalkadoon) have crafted a cinematic manifesto entirely built from Indigenous perspectives, connecting to ancient traditions of oral storytelling and songlines. At once sobering and optimistic, this mesmerising documentary showcases strength and resilience in the face of deeply entrenched inequality.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片包含种族歧视主题及针对原住民的暴力场景。

这部充满生命力的纪录片，融汇了原住民多种独特的叙事形式，在那些人们早已耳熟能详的统计数字背后，找回了一个个鲜活的人。

数字不会说谎：原住民被迫与家人分离、无论少年还是成年都更易身陷囹圄、更易沦为警察暴力受害者的比例，都远高于其他族群。但正如《直面数字》开篇所言：“统计数字讲述的是一个故事；我们要讲的，是另一个故事。”本片汇集了“被偷走的一代”成员、因亲人死于羁押而失去至亲者、以及在羁押中遭受暴力的幸存者们的声音，以回忆录、音乐录影带、诗歌、舞蹈、新闻报道与社会行动交织而成的独特混合选集，为这些身处弱势与制度性暴力之下的个人故事腾出了讲述的空间。

面对殖民权力结构、系统性压迫与积重难返的种族主义这些看似无解、难以逾越的困境，原住民创作者基兰·萨图尔（古林吉、佩尔塔梅与沃里米族）与泰森·帕金斯（阿伦特与卡尔卡顿族）打造出一部完全立足于原住民视角的电影宣言，与源远流长的口述传统和“歌之径”遥相呼应。这部摄人心魄的纪录片既发人深省又满怀希望，在根深蒂固的不平等面前，彰显出坚韧与力量。
highlight_zh: 原住民视角的影像宣言，在冰冷统计背后还原人的尊严与坚韧

synopsis_en:
Tayo na! Come along to MIFF’s Family Gala – a fun-filled centrepiece event for kids and adults alike – and enjoy the Australian premiere of new DreamWorks adventure Forgotten Island.

H.E.R., Liza Soberano, Manny Jacinto and Lea Salonga lend their voices to this fantastical animated tale of friendship, fearlessness and Filipino culture.

Best friends Jo and Raissa have just graduated from high school. They vow to remain close forever, even though Raissa’s about to move to the US for university. On their last night together, the girls accidentally open a portal to Nakali, a mysterious island populated by aswangs. The longer you stay in Nakali, the more your memories fade – so they must figure out how to get back home, fast, and also avoid the clutches of the Dreaded Manananggal.

From DreamWorks, the studio behind Shrek and How to Train Your Dragon, comes this immersive, exciting adventure in which two teenagers learn about bravery and unbreakable bonds. Steeped in Philippine mythology and rooted in the real-world friendship between directors Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado, the film boasts a voice cast of Filipino A-listers – including Grammy winner H.E.R.; actors Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place) and Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, MIFF 2022); Broadway icon Lea Salonga; and comedian Jo Koy – as well as fellow stars Dave Franco, Jenny Slate and Ronny Chieng. Capped off with resplendent anime-inspired visuals and folk-inspired music, Forgotten Island reminds us that growing up doesn’t have to mean growing apart.
synopsis_zh:
Tayo na!（走吧！）快来参加墨尔本国际电影节的家庭盛典——一场大人小孩都能尽兴的重磅活动，欣赏梦工厂新作冒险动画《遗忘之岛》的澳大利亚首映。

H.E.R.、丽莎·索贝拉诺、曼尼·哈辛托与莱亚·萨隆加倾情献声，共同演绎这个关于友谊、勇气与菲律宾文化的奇幻动画故事。

乔和拉伊莎是刚从高中毕业的一对挚友。尽管拉伊莎即将远赴美国读大学，两人仍立誓永远亲密无间。在共度的最后一晚，她们意外打开了一道通往纳卡利的传送门——那是一座栖息着「阿斯旺」妖怪的神秘岛屿。在纳卡利待得越久，记忆就消退得越多，所以她们必须尽快找到回家的路，还要躲开可怕的「马纳南加尔」的魔爪。

这部沉浸感十足、精彩刺激的冒险动画出自打造了《怪物史瑞克》和《驯龙高手》的梦工厂，讲述两个少女学会勇敢、缔结牢不可破羁绊的故事。影片深植于菲律宾神话，灵感更源自两位导演乔尔·克劳福德与贾努埃尔·梅尔卡多的真实友情。配音阵容云集菲裔一线明星——格莱美得主 H.E.R.，演员丽莎·索贝拉诺（《丽莎·弗兰肯斯坦》）、曼尼·哈辛托（《善地》）、多莉·德利昂（《悲情三角》，2022 年墨尔本电影节展映），百老汇传奇莱亚·萨隆加，以及喜剧演员乔·科伊——此外还有戴夫·弗兰科、珍妮·斯蕾特和钱信伊加盟。再配上华美的日式动画风格视觉与民谣风配乐，《遗忘之岛》提醒我们：长大，不一定意味着走散。
highlight_zh: 梦工厂菲律宾神话冒险，H.E.R.领衔全明星配音，澳洲首映

synopsis_en:
Reuniting the two ‘lonely men’ from Los muertos and La libertad, Lisandro Alonso’s third film wanders lost through the halls of a run-down movie house.

Argentino Vargas, the star of Los muertos, has arrived in Buenos Aires to attend a retrospective screening of the film at the grand Teatro General San Martín. Out of place and uneasy in the city, he soon gets lost within the cinema — a movie palace that, having fallen into disarray, is full of shadows and secrets. As he drifts through the labyrinthine building, he crosses paths with Misael Saavedra, the central figure of La libertad. Here, the two solitary subjects at the centre of Lisandro Alonso’s first two films are together yet apart, unable to find their place within the cinema.

Alonso calls his first three movies his ‘Lonely Men Trilogy’. Inspired by Tsai Ming-liang’s Goodbye, Dragon Inn (MIFF 2004), this unifying conclusion to the triptych is a self-reflexive exploration of the filmmaker’s own work, and particularly on how he took these rural non-actors and turned them into cinematic subjects. With little dialogue or narrative, Fantasma is built from evocative tracking shots and ultra-detailed sound design, full of strange elements such as the unexplained presence of a barking dog. As always, there is mystery in the film’s intention and its title. Is this a portrait of being haunted by the spectre of cinema itself? Or are each of these lonely men lost spirits, fated to forever live on in Alonso’s movies?
synopsis_zh:
利桑德罗·阿隆索的第三部长片，让《死者》与《自由》中的两个“孤独男人”重聚，在一座破败的电影院里迷失徘徊。

《死者》的主演阿根蒂诺·巴尔加斯来到布宜诺斯艾利斯，出席该片在宏伟的圣马丁将军剧院举行的回顾展放映。他与这座城市格格不入、浑身不自在，很快便在影院里迷了路——这座昔日的电影宫殿如今年久失修，处处是阴影与秘密。当他在迷宫般的建筑中游荡时，与《自由》的主角米萨埃尔·萨维德拉不期而遇。阿隆索前两部作品中的两位孤独主角，此刻同处一室却又彼此疏离，谁也无法在这座电影院里找到自己的位置。

阿隆索把自己的前三部电影称为“孤独男人三部曲”。这部为三部曲收官的作品受蔡明亮《不散》（2004年墨尔本电影节展映）启发，是导演对自身创作的一次自反式探索，尤其审视了他如何将这些来自乡野的非职业演员变成电影中的主体。全片几乎没有对白与叙事，由意味深长的移动长镜头和极为细密的声音设计构成，还夹杂着种种怪异元素，比如一条来历不明、吠叫不止的狗。一如既往，影片的意图与片名本身都笼罩着谜团：这是一幅被电影幽灵萦绕的肖像？还是说，这些孤独的男人本就是迷失的魂灵，注定永远活在阿隆索的电影里？
highlight_zh: 阿隆索“孤独男人三部曲”终章，致敬蔡明亮《不散》的影院迷宫之旅

synopsis_en:
In Paweł Pawlikowski’s third post-WWII meditation, exiled author Thomas Mann tours a devastated Germany whose divisions echo his own fractured family.

In 1949, ageing German Nobel laureate Thomas Mann breaks his long exile from his homeland to honour Johann Wolfgang von Goethe’s 200th anniversary in the latter’s birthplace of Frankfurt, West Germany. Next, he plans to visit the city where the literary giant died: Weimar, now in the communist East. Chauffeured by his resentful actor/writer daughter Erika, Thomas crosses a country he barely recognises, even as he waxes poetic about its heritage. Meanwhile, Erika notices in person – as her beloved, tormented brother Klaus does in his fiction – how two divergent but equally compromised regimes are being installed atop the still-festering wounds of Nazism. The country they grew up in is a fading memory; but can this intellectual family even feel at home with one another?

Paweł Pawlikowski’s drama is the third in a thematic triptych of European postwar reverberations – filmed, like its predecessors Ida and Cold War (MIFF 2018), in luminous black-and-white. Pawlikowski’s immaculate road trip through Germany’s cultural crossroads follows a crisp yet elliptical map of details: disgusted looks at parties; silences in half-empty restaurants; dryly ironic new uses for old infrastructure. Meanwhile, the Manns’ repressed tensions emerge gradually in masterful lead performances by Hanns Zischler (Kings of the Road, MIFF 1976) and Sandra Hüller (Rose, MIFF 2026; Anatomy of a Fall, MIFF 2023), whose brilliantly understated turn as Erika captures a breadth of emotions lurking just below the surface.
synopsis_zh:
在帕维乌·帕夫利科夫斯基的第三部战后沉思之作中，流亡作家托马斯·曼重返满目疮痍的德国，这片分裂的土地，恰似他自己支离破碎的家庭。

1949年，年迈的德国诺贝尔文学奖得主托马斯·曼打破多年流亡，回到故土，前往歌德的出生地——西德法兰克福，纪念这位文豪诞辰两百周年。接下来，他还计划造访歌德的辞世之地魏玛，而那里如今已属于共产主义阵营的东德。心怀怨怼的女儿埃丽卡——一位演员兼作家——开车载着他，穿越这个他几乎认不出的国家，而他仍在对着德意志的文化遗产大发诗兴。与此同时，埃丽卡亲眼目睹了她挚爱而饱受折磨的弟弟克劳斯在小说中写下的景象：两个道路迥异却同样妥协的政权，正被安放在纳粹主义尚未愈合的伤口之上。他们成长于斯的那个国家已成褪色的记忆；可这个知识分子家庭，彼此之间还能找到家的感觉吗？

帕夫利科夫斯基的这部剧情片，是他探讨欧洲战后余波的主题三部曲的终章——与前作《修女艾达》和《冷战》（2018年墨尔本电影节）一样，以流光溢彩的黑白影像拍摄。这场穿越德国文化十字路口的公路之旅工整无瑕，循着一张精准而又留白的细节地图展开：派对上嫌恶的眼神、半空餐厅里的沉默、旧日基础设施被赋予的带着冷峻反讽的新用途。与此同时，曼氏一家压抑的暗流在两位主演的精湛演绎下逐渐浮现：汉斯·齐施勒（《公路之王》，1976年墨尔本电影节）与桑德拉·惠勒（《坠落的审判》，2023年墨尔本电影节）——后者对埃丽卡的刻画极尽克制，将潜伏于平静表面之下的万千情绪尽收眼底。
highlight_zh: 《冷战》导演战后三部曲终章，桑德拉·惠勒主演，卫报五星

synopsis_en:
A spectral journey across modern America, as a man sees mountains – and sets out to recreate them.

The return of visionary experimental filmmaker and MIFF favourite Blake Williams (Laberint Sequences, MIFF 2023; 2008, MIFF 2021; Prototype, MIFF 2018) highlights the Canadian artist’s unique gift for crafting 3D images that put the viewer in states of transformation. A hallucinatory short that traverses the Southwest the day after the US presidential election, it casts the familiar in a fascinating new perspective, scrambling the nation in stereoscopic turmoil.
synopsis_zh:
一段穿越当代美国的幽灵之旅：一个男人看见了群山——于是动身去重造它们。

实验电影界的先锋、MIFF常客布莱克·威廉姆斯（《迷宫序列》，MIFF 2023；《2008》，MIFF 2021；《原型》，MIFF 2018）携新作回归，再次展现这位加拿大艺术家的独门绝技——用3D影像将观众带入变幻莫测的感知状态。这部迷幻短片在美国总统大选次日穿行于西南部大地，以令人着迷的全新视角重新审视熟悉的景观，让整个国家在立体影像的动荡中扭曲重组。
highlight_zh: 实验3D影像先锋Blake Williams新作，大选次日的迷幻美国之旅。

synopsis_en:
With this thriller headlined by Isaach de Bankolé and Matt Dillon, Claire Denis returns to Africa – and to the profound, prickly themes that have defined her oeuvre.

Overseeing a major West African construction site, Horn (Matt Dillon) has a lot on his plate: the imminent transition to new Chinese financiers; the arrival of his much younger wife (Mia McKenna Bruce, How to Have Sex, MIFF 2023); a tetchy engineer (Tom Blyth, Benediction); and, most pressingly, the on-the-job death of a local worker. As night falls, the deceased’s brother Alboury (Isaach de Bankolé, The Brutalist) arrives like an apparition. He demands to take possession of his sibling’s body, and won’t accept “no” – or bribes, threats or delays – for an answer.

One of the true living legends of art cinema, Claire Denis (Stars at Noon, MIFF 2022) has made a host of films sensuously and dramatically interrogating the European footprint in postcolonial Africa, including her magnum opus, Beau Travail (MIFF 2000), and two previous collaborations with de Bankolé in 1988’s Chocolat (MIFF 2000) and 2009’s White Material. For this late-career work, she has adapted a 1979 play by Bernard-Marie Koltès, whose dialogue-rich scenes mount a surreal, uneasy examination of exploitation, power and posturing.
synopsis_zh:
在这部由伊萨赫·德·班克尔与马特·狄龙领衔的惊悚片中，克莱尔·德尼重返非洲，也重返她毕生作品中那些深刻而尖锐的母题。

霍恩（马特·狄龙 饰）是西非一处大型建筑工地的负责人，眼下麻烦缠身：工程即将移交给新的中国出资方；年轻许多的妻子（米娅·麦克纳-布鲁斯 饰，《如何做爱》，2023年墨尔本影展）刚刚到来；还有一位脾气暴躁的工程师（汤姆·布莱斯 饰，《祝福》）。而最棘手的，是一名当地工人在工地上意外身亡。夜幕降临，死者的兄弟阿尔布里（伊萨赫·德·班克尔 饰，《粗野派》）如幽灵般现身。他要求带走兄弟的遗体，无论对方如何拒绝——贿赂、威胁、拖延，统统无法让他退让。

作为艺术电影界在世的真正传奇之一，克莱尔·德尼（《正午之星》，2022年墨尔本影展）曾拍摄多部影片，以感官化而富于戏剧张力的方式审视欧洲在后殖民非洲留下的印记，其中包括她的巅峰之作《军中禁恋》（2000年墨尔本影展），以及此前与德·班克尔的两次合作——1988年的《巧克力》（2000年墨尔本影展）和2009年的《白色物质》。在这部晚期作品中，她改编了贝尔纳-玛丽·科尔泰斯1979年的戏剧，以对白密集的场景，展开一场关于剥削、权力与虚张声势的超现实而令人不安的审视。
highlight_zh: 克莱尔·德尼重返非洲，携狄龙与班克尔上演后殖民惊悚。

synopsis_en:
Acclaimed stage and screen actor Geraldine Hakewill stars in her directorial debut, a near-future drama about a pregnant woman facing an impossible choice in a world gone to ruin.

Based on the award-winning short story, the debut short from actor, writer and director Geraldine Hakewill (Ms. Fisher’s Modern Murder Mysteries) tackles the dilemma of bringing new life into an environment that humanity is destroying. Beautifully shot by cinematographer Petra Leslie (Sound That Summons, MIFF 2026) and starring Hakewill and Mark Leonard Winter (The Rooster, MIFF 2023), this haunting work ponders a climate-ravaged dystopia that may soon become a reality.
synopsis_zh:
知名舞台与影视演员杰拉尔丁·哈克维尔携导演处女作亮相：这部近未来题材剧情片讲述一位孕妇在满目疮痍的世界中面临一个无解的抉择。

影片改编自获奖短篇小说，是演员、编剧兼导演杰拉尔丁·哈克维尔（《费雪小姐的现代谋杀之谜》）执导的首部短片，直面一个两难命题：在人类亲手摧毁的环境里，是否还应带来新生命。摄影师佩特拉·莱斯利（《召唤之声》，2026年墨尔本电影节）的镜头美不胜收，哈克维尔与马克·伦纳德·温特（《公鸡》，2023年墨尔本电影节）联袂主演。这部萦绕人心的作品所描绘的气候浩劫下的反乌托邦，或许离现实并不遥远。
highlight_zh: 澳洲实力派女演员导演处女作，气候末世下的生育抉择

synopsis_en:
In this Sundance-lauded debut, a young Filipina learns that subjugation and silence are par for the course at the golf club where she finds employment.

Having left rural Ilocos for Manila’s greener pastures, 17-year-old Isabel ends up on a different kind of green: working as a ‘tee girl’ for a country club. She quickly adopts a new routine teeing up balls for wealthy golfers, joining the staff to eat morsels of rice and fish while the clientele feast, and gradually growing infatuated with the wealthy doctor who runs the club. But as she discovers more about her patron and the institution to which he owes his fortune, Isabel finds herself drawn into a web of exploitation, displacement and unseen, sanitised violence.

Executive-produced by Jia Zhang-ke and receiving a Special Jury Award at Sundance, Rafael Manuel’s scathing and contemplative feature debut escalates with menace despite its languid, sun-drenched setting, whose sheen conceals the gendered dynamics of power and how the extremely rich prey on the aspirational poor. Supported by Filipino screen mavens Angeli Bayani (Ilo Ilo, MIFF 2013) and Ruby Ruiz (First Light, MIFF 2025), Jorrybell Agoto lends an unsettled defiance to her portrayal of Isabel, propelling a sly satire of oppression entrenched through polished appearances.
synopsis_zh:
在这部备受圣丹斯赞誉的处女作中，一位年轻的菲律宾女孩逐渐明白：在她谋得差事的高尔夫俱乐部里，屈从与沉默是理所当然的规矩。

17岁的伊莎贝尔离开伊罗戈斯乡下，奔向马尼拉的“绿色沃土”，最终却落脚在另一种“绿地”上——在一家乡村俱乐部当“球梯女孩”。她很快习惯了新的日常：为富有的球客架球，跟员工们分食几口米饭和小鱼，而客人们则大快朵颐；与此同时，她渐渐迷恋上执掌俱乐部的富有医生。但随着她对这位恩主以及成就他财富的这套体制了解得越多，伊莎贝尔发现自己正被卷入一张由剥削、流离与无形的、被粉饰的暴力织成的网。

拉斐尔·曼努埃尔的长片首作由贾樟柯监制，并获圣丹斯电影节评审团特别奖。影片犀利而沉静，虽置身慵懒的阳光胜地，却步步逼近、暗流汹涌——光鲜表象之下，藏着性别化的权力结构，以及巨富如何猎食怀抱憧憬的穷人。在菲律宾影坛名将安吉莉·芭雅妮（《爸妈不在家》，2013年MIFF）与鲁比·鲁伊斯（《第一道光》，2025年MIFF）的加持下，霍丽贝尔·阿戈托为伊莎贝尔注入一种不安的倔强，推动这部对以光鲜体面固化压迫的社会进行辛辣讽刺的作品。
highlight_zh: 贾樟柯监制、圣丹斯评审团特别奖，高尔夫球场上的阶级寓言

synopsis_en:
A lonely woman’s torrid affair with a severed finger turns toxic in a macabre Gothic tale that warns not to lose yourself to digital love.

When romance crooks a finger at a young woman, she doesn’t mind that nothing’s attached to it. After following her severed suitor to its mysterious palace, she surrenders to a bizarre, increasingly dark affair that points her somewhere horrifying. In simple, bold animation that sets its Gothic tone, Kim Yeonwoo gives fatal attraction a mordantly surreal swipe.
synopsis_zh:
一个孤独的女人与一根断指展开了一场炽烈的恋情，感情却逐渐变质。这则阴森的哥特寓言警示世人：不要在“指尖之爱”中迷失自己。

当爱情向一位年轻女子勾了勾手指，她并不介意这根手指后面空无一物。她追随这位断指追求者来到一座神秘宫殿，沉溺于一场诡异且日益黑暗的恋情，而这段感情正把她引向骇人的深渊。金延宇（Kim Yeonwoo）以简洁大胆的动画风格奠定哥特基调，为“致命吸引”写下一笔辛辣而超现实的注脚。
highlight_zh: 人指之恋的暗黑哥特动画，猎奇、超现实又辛辣。

synopsis_en:
World-premiering at MIFF, this generative-AI cinematic work explores the future of wildfires and the possibilities of immersive cinema.

As the world faces a probable super El Niño event in 2026/27, with wildfire conditions that may exceed those of 2019/20, picturing these unprecedented fires defies imagination. Using the latest scientific data, a custom machine-learning model and the Unreal Engine 3D-creation platform, Firestorm allows audiences to visualise historical Australian bushfires and then interactively adjust weather conditions to see how they would dramatically change under escalating global warming scenarios. Presented at the VCA, University of Melbourne, in a world-first conversion of an LED volume into a stereoscopic cinema, Firestorm fully immerses audiences in a panoramic fire landscape, allowing them to viscerally experience the look and feel of these possible futures firsthand.
synopsis_zh:
这部生成式 AI 电影作品在墨尔本国际电影节全球首映，探索野火的未来图景与沉浸式电影的可能性。

2026/27 年，世界很可能迎来一次超级厄尔尼诺事件，野火条件或将超过 2019/20 年——如此空前的大火，单凭想象已难以描绘。《火焰风暴》基于最新科学数据，结合定制的机器学习模型与虚幻引擎 3D 创作平台，让观众直观重现澳大利亚历史上的丛林大火，并可以亲手调整天气条件，看看在全球变暖不断加剧的情景下火势会发生怎样剧烈的变化。本片在墨尔本大学维多利亚艺术学院（VCA）呈现，全球首次将 LED 虚拟摄影棚改造为立体电影院，让观众完全沉浸于全景火场之中，切身感受这些可能到来的未来的样貌与温度。
highlight_zh: 全球首映的AI互动沉浸影像，亲身走进未来野火现场

synopsis_en:
Awarded the inaugural Queer Palm Revelation award at Cannes, this swooning feature debut trails the deepening romantic spark that forms between two long-haul truckers.

Due to the nature of their work, Étienne and Bartosz are ships – or semitrailers – in the night. And while the Frenchman and the Pole both drive trucks carrying all manner of goods across Europe, they couldn’t be more different: whereas reticent Étienne has been hardened by his experiences, gregarious Bartosz retains his zest for life despite its hardships. What was meant to be a one-off hook-up by the side of the road transforms into a profound, continent-spanning romance.

There’s no dearth of works tackling the difficult pursuit of queer love, but Pierre Le Gall’s indelible answer to God’s Own Country (MIFF 2017) and Brief Encounter enriches its tale of unexpected connection by implicating clashes of culture and economy and exploring questions of self-acceptance, ambition and blue-collar alienation. Bolstered by Antoine Cormier’s sensitive lensing and Paul Sabin’s affecting score, actors Alexis Manenti and Julian Świeżewski enthral as the film’s central couple, magnetically portraying their chemistry and their distinct responses to this tricky relationship. Flesh and Fuel shows how love can bloom in the most unlikely of places, so long as we’re willing to take a different route.
synopsis_zh:
这部令人心醉的长片处女作荣获戛纳首届酷儿棕榈新人奖，讲述两位长途卡车司机之间逐渐升温的爱情火花。

由于工作性质，艾蒂安和巴托什就像黑夜中擦肩而过的船只——或者说，擦肩而过的半挂车。这个法国人和这个波兰人都开着货车穿梭欧洲各地运送各类货物，但两人性格截然不同：沉默寡言的艾蒂安被生活的历练磨得坚硬，而热情外向的巴托什纵使饱经艰辛，依然对生活充满热忱。一场本该只是路边的一夜露水情缘，最终演变成一段深刻而横跨欧洲大陆的恋情。

讲述酷儿之爱之艰难的作品并不少见，但皮埃尔·勒加尔这部令人难忘的电影——堪称对《上帝之国》（2017年墨尔本电影节展映）与《相见恨晚》的回应——将文化与经济的碰撞融入这段不期而遇的情感故事，并探讨了自我接纳、人生抱负与蓝领阶层疏离感等议题。安托万·科尔米耶细腻的摄影与保罗·萨班动人的配乐为影片增色，两位主演阿列克西·马年蒂与朱利安·希维热夫斯基魅力十足，生动演绎出角色间的化学反应，以及各自面对这段棘手关系的不同姿态。《血肉与燃油》告诉我们：只要愿意换一条路走，爱可以在最意想不到的地方绽放。
highlight_zh: 戛纳酷儿棕榈新人奖，卡车司机版《断背山》式公路爱情

synopsis_en:
A dark, claustrophobic and unsettling slice of social satire and body horror, in which a struggling farmer looks to a sickly stranger to turn his fortunes around.

After enduring weeks of flooding that have destroyed his livelihood, a farmer encounters a mysterious man who washes up on his property in a sickly condition – one that he soon discovers he can exploit. A grotesque, grubby and often very funny blend of social realism, satire and post-apocalyptic fantasy, Madison Hislop-Stoessel’s short is equal parts horrific and absurd.
synopsis_zh:
一部阴暗、幽闭而令人不安的短片，融合社会讽刺与身体恐怖：一位陷入困境的农夫，把翻身的希望寄托在一个病恹恹的陌生人身上。

连日洪水冲毁了农夫赖以为生的一切。就在此时，一个神秘男人被冲上他的土地，浑身病态——农夫很快发现，这副病躯竟有利可图。麦迪逊·希斯洛普-施托塞尔的这部短片将社会写实、讽刺与末世奇想熔于一炉，怪诞、肮脏又常常令人捧腹，恐怖与荒诞兼而有之。
highlight_zh: 社会讽刺混搭身体恐怖，怪诞又爆笑的澳洲短片。

synopsis_en:
A closed-off curmudgeon connects with a young boy left in her care in this bittersweet charmer that won two Berlinale prizes.

Finally admitting she’s in financial dire straits, elderly sourpuss Olga rents out the spare room in her Mexico City apartment. Heeding her ad are Tulio and his nine-year-old son Cristian, who need lodgings as the mum of the family receives cancer treatment at the nearby hospital. At first, Olga begrudges them, hesitant to have a child in her living quarters. But as Tulio ventures out to look for work, she finds herself traversing the city alone with Cristian, whose wide-eyed optimism begins to melt her frosty exterior.

Receiving the Competition Prize of the Ecumenical Jury and the Berliner Morgenpost Readers’ Jury Award at the Berlinale, Fernando Eimbcke’s fifth feature is a disarmingly winsome portrait of two people who come together despite – or perhaps because of – tragic circumstances. Shot in evocative black-and-white, Flies gender-flips the dynamic of films such as Alice in the Cities (MIFF 1975) and Paper Moon in its tale of an unwilling adult thrown together by fate with a child who is not their own, while the film’s humour is droll without dismissing the weightier themes at play: mortality, imminent grief, and the irreversibility of both time and loss of innocence. Anchored on powerhouse performances from Teresita Sánchez (Tótem, MIFF 2023) and first-timer Bastian Escobar, Flies portrays the alchemy between the resignation of old age and the curiosity of youth that, in combination, paves the way for healing.

“A sharply observed portrait of family and connection, wherein the comedy can suddenly sigh with a bittersweet sense of loss … humbly poignant.” – Sight and Sound

The Wednesday 19 Aug screening of this film is a sensory-friendly session. More information about our access offerings is available here.
synopsis_zh:
一位性情孤僻的暴脾气老太太，与一个被托付给她照看的小男孩渐渐走近——这部苦乐参半的暖心之作在柏林电影节上斩获两项大奖。

年迈刻薄的奥尔加终于承认自己经济拮据，只好把墨西哥城公寓里的空房间租出去。应租而来的是图利奥和他九岁的儿子克里斯蒂安——孩子的妈妈正在附近医院接受癌症治疗，父子俩急需落脚之处。起初奥尔加对他们心存芥蒂，不情愿让一个孩子住进自己的生活空间。但随着图利奥外出找工作，她发现自己不得不独自带着克里斯蒂安穿行于城市之间，而男孩天真烂漫的乐观，正一点点融化她冷若冰霜的外壳。

费尔南多·艾姆布克的第五部长片在柏林电影节上获得天主教人道精神奖竞赛单元奖及《柏林晨邮报》读者评审团奖，以令人卸下防备的动人笔触，描绘了两个人在悲剧境遇中——或许正因为这悲剧境遇——走到一起的故事。影片以富有质感的黑白影像拍摄，将《爱丽丝城市漫游记》（1975年MIFF展映）和《纸月亮》式的经典设定做了性别翻转：一个不情愿的大人被命运抛向一个与自己毫无血缘的孩子。影片的幽默冷面而克制，却并未回避那些更沉重的主题：死亡、迫近的哀恸，以及时间与纯真逝去的不可逆转。凭借特蕾西塔·桑切斯（《图腾》，2023年MIFF展映）与首次出演电影的巴斯蒂安·埃斯科瓦尔两位演员的精彩表演，《苍蝇》呈现了暮年的认命与童年的好奇之间奇妙的化学反应——正是这种结合，为治愈铺平了道路。

“一幅观察入微的家庭与羁绊的肖像，喜剧中会突然涌起苦乐参半的失落感……朴素而动人。”——《视与听》

本片8月19日（周三）场次为感官友好专场。有关我们无障碍观影服务的更多信息，请点击此处查看。
highlight_zh: 柏林电影节双奖黑白暖心之作，老太与男孩的治愈之旅

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

MIFF and the AFL, supported by VicScreen, present five short documentaries centred on Australia’s game.

A group of young Chinese Australian footballers come together; the first openly queer ex-AFL player steps back onto the field; a community fights for the safety and dignity of its children; a former AFLW player traces a path from her heroes to the new generation of African Australian stars; and cheer squad members prepare to face a club they haven’t beaten in a decade.

Films in this package: Carn the Chinese! (dir. Angela How), For the Boys (dir. Mitchell Withers), Invincible Spirit (dir. Mark Thomson, David Callow), KURA: An African AFL Story (dir. Akec Makur Chuot, Meg Duncan) and North Melbourne Cheer Squad (dir. Jasper Caverly, Andrew Goode).
synopsis_zh:
由 MIFF 与澳式足球联盟（AFL）联合呈现，VicScreen 支持，五部短纪录片聚焦这项属于澳大利亚的运动。

一群年轻的华裔澳大利亚球员走到一起；首位公开出柜的前 AFL 球员重返赛场；一个社区为孩子们的安全与尊严而抗争；一位前 AFLW 女子联赛球员追溯从自己的偶像到新一代非裔澳大利亚球星的传承之路；还有一支拉拉队正准备迎战一支他们十年未曾战胜过的俱乐部。

本片单包含：《华人加油！》（导演：Angela How）、《为了男孩们》（导演：Mitchell Withers）、《不屈之魂》（导演：Mark Thomson、David Callow）、《库拉：非洲人的 AFL 故事》（导演：Akec Makur Chuot、Meg Duncan）与《北墨尔本拉拉队》（导演：Jasper Caverly、Andrew Goode）。
highlight_zh: 五部短纪录片透视澳式足球，含华裔球员故事，了解澳洲文化的窗口。

title_zh: 澳式足球短片首映专场
synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

MIFF and the AFL, supported by VicScreen, present five short documentaries centred on Australia’s game.

A group of young Chinese Australian footballers come together; the first openly queer ex-AFL player steps back onto the field; a community fights for the safety and dignity of its children; a former AFLW player traces a path from her heroes to the new generation of African Australian stars; and cheer squad members prepare to face a club they haven’t beaten in a decade.

Films in this package: Carn the Chinese! (dir. Angela How), For the Boys (dir. Mitchell Withers), Invincible Spirit (dir. Mark Thomson, David Callow), KURA: An African AFL Story (dir. Akec Makur Chuot, Meg Duncan) and North Melbourne Cheer Squad (dir. Jasper Caverly, Andrew Goode).
synopsis_zh:
特别呈现

墨尔本国际电影节与澳式足球联盟（AFL）联合呈现、VicScreen 支持，五部聚焦澳大利亚国民运动的纪录短片。

一群年轻的华裔澳大利亚球员因足球走到一起；首位公开出柜的前 AFL 球员重返赛场；一个社区为孩子们的安全与尊严而抗争；一位前 AFLW 女子联赛球员追溯从自己的偶像到新一代非裔澳大利亚球星的传承之路；还有一支拉拉队正准备迎战一家他们十年未曾战胜的俱乐部。

本单元包含影片：《华人加油！》（安吉拉·豪执导）、《为了兄弟们》（米切尔·威瑟斯执导）、《不屈之魂》（马克·汤姆森、大卫·卡洛执导）、《KURA：非洲人的 AFL 故事》（阿凯克·马库尔·乔特、梅格·邓肯执导）与《北墨尔本拉拉队》（贾斯珀·卡弗利、安德鲁·古德执导）。
highlight_zh: 五部纪录短片透视澳式足球，华裔球员故事尤为亲切

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

SUPPORTED BY

For his sons, he came out. For himself, he plays again.

Australia’s first openly queer ex-AFL player steps back onto the field, bringing his whole self for the first time.
synopsis_zh:
为了儿子们，他公开了自己的性取向。为了自己，他重返赛场。

澳大利亚首位公开出柜的前澳式足球（AFL）球员再次踏上球场——这一次，他终于可以毫无保留地做完整的自己。
highlight_zh: 澳洲首位出柜前AFL球员重返赛场的真诚故事

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

This Palme d’Or–awarded portrait of a Mexican boy boxer quietly referees a contest between dreams and expectations.

In the tough neighbourhood of Tepito, becoming a boxing champion is the great Mexican dream. But when little Damián is in the ring, cheered on by the family and coaches who’ve poured their ambition into him, his hunger to win battles a yearning for childhood. Modest and humane, Cannes 2026’s Short Film Palme d’Or winner trusts in your empathy to intuit quieter kinds of violence.
synopsis_zh:
这部获得金棕榈奖的作品刻画了一位墨西哥拳击少年，在梦想与期望的较量之间，他默默充当着裁判。

在民风彪悍的特皮托街区，成为拳击冠军是伟大的墨西哥梦。但当小达米安站上拳台，被倾注了全部野心的家人和教练们呐喊助威时，他求胜的渴望却与对童年的眷恋暗自角力。这部2026年戛纳短片金棕榈得主克制而温厚，相信你能凭共情体察那些更安静的暴力。
highlight_zh: 戛纳短片金棕榈：拳台少年在冠军梦与童年之间的无声角力

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

Experience time on a planetary scale as rhythms of day and night pulsate in harmony with the celestial bodies in a landscape’s seasonal light.

Over a 22-month time lapse, a glassy Austrian lake reflects chasing clouds. Day and night set sky-rhythms for seasonal light pulses, from bright translucence to milky monochrome. Time accelerates to heartbeats, then eye blinks; sun and stars flash across the screen like exhilarating lightning strikes. In letting us glimpse infinite planetary time, Johann Lurf – the subject of a mini-retrospective within MIFF 2026’s special 3D shorts package Cinema of Spectacle: Experimental Visions – reminds us that we are the quick ones.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片包含频闪画面

以行星的尺度体验时间——昼夜的律动与天体共振，在四季流转的光线中脉动于同一片风景之上。

历经22个月的延时摄影，一面如镜的奥地利湖泊映照着追逐嬉戏的云影。昼与夜为季节性的光之脉冲定下天空的节律，从透亮的清澈渐变为乳白的单色。时间不断加速，先是心跳的节拍，继而快如眨眼；太阳与星辰如令人振奋的闪电般掠过银幕。约翰·卢尔夫——2026年墨尔本电影节3D短片特别单元「奇观电影：实验视界」中小型回顾展的主角——让我们得以一瞥无垠的行星时间，并提醒我们：匆忙的其实是人类自己。
highlight_zh: 22个月延时摄影凝视一面湖，实验影像大师卢尔夫的时间奇观。

synopsis_en:
Winning a trio of Un Certain Regard Best Actress awards at Cannes, this poignant, emotionally textured drama about a fractured family interrogates the practical limits of love.

After years studying in Europe, Elsa returns to San José, Costa Rica, where she grew up. She finds her younger sister Amalia, now a broke university dropout, loafing around the unkempt family home, hooking up with older men and gorging on conspiracy theories. Their divorced parents seem comparably adrift: their mother is obsessing about the erotic poems she’s rediscovered from her youth, and their father fills his calendar with romantic affairs. Believing herself to be the only put-together member, Elsa decides to fix this family in shambles.

Valentina Maurel’s (Lucía en el limbo, MIFF 2019) second feature is at once a sagacious study of the complexities of womanhood and a shrewd depiction of how distance can cleave relationships. Powerhouse performances from Marina De Tavira (Roma) and newcomers Daniela Marín and Mariangel Montero animate the women’s well-meant misgivings, capturing the way that existential pressures complicate their immediate concerns. Touches of magic realism visualise memories, wishes and wounds as the haunting cinematography of Nicolás Andrés (Domingo and the Mist, MIFF 2022) rounds out this affecting portrait of the erratic yet enduring bonds of kinship.
synopsis_zh:
这部情感细腻、令人动容的家庭剧情片在戛纳电影节一举摘得“一种关注”单元三位最佳女演员奖，讲述一个支离破碎的家庭，追问爱的现实边界究竟在哪里。

在欧洲求学多年后，艾尔莎回到了她长大的地方——哥斯达黎加圣何塞。她发现妹妹阿玛莉亚已从大学辍学、身无分文，终日在疏于打理的老宅里游荡，跟年长的男人厮混，沉迷于各种阴谋论。离异的父母同样各自漂泊：母亲痴迷于重新翻出的年轻时写下的情色诗篇，父亲则用一段接一段的风流韵事填满日程。自认为是全家唯一“正常人”的艾尔莎，决定亲手修补这个一地鸡毛的家。

这是瓦伦蒂娜·毛雷尔（《悬置的露西亚》，2019年墨尔本电影节）的第二部长片，既是对女性生命复杂性的睿智审视，也犀利地刻画了距离如何撕裂亲密关系。玛丽娜·德·塔维拉（《罗马》）与新人丹妮拉·马林、玛丽安赫尔·蒙特罗奉献了极具爆发力的表演，将这些女性满怀善意却又疑虑重重的心境演绎得淋漓尽致，捕捉到生存压力如何搅乱她们眼前的生活。片中点缀的魔幻现实主义笔触让记忆、心愿与创伤化为可见的影像，尼古拉斯·安德烈斯（《雾中的多明戈》，2022年墨尔本电影节）萦绕人心的摄影则为这幅亲情画像收束成篇——血缘的羁绊反复无常，却始终牢不可破。
highlight_zh: 戛纳“一种关注”三影后加冕，《罗马》女主坐镇的家庭群像

synopsis_en:
H.E.R., Liza Soberano, Manny Jacinto and Lea Salonga lend their voices to this fantastical animated tale of friendship, fearlessness and Filipino culture.

Best friends Jo and Raissa have just graduated from high school. They vow to remain close forever, even though Raissa’s about to move to the US for university. On their last night together, the girls accidentally open a portal to Nakali, a mysterious island populated by aswangs. The longer you stay in Nakali, the more your memories fade – so they must figure out how to get back home, fast, and also avoid the clutches of the Dreaded Manananggal.

From DreamWorks, the studio behind Shrek and How to Train Your Dragon, comes this immersive, exciting adventure in which two teenagers learn about bravery and unbreakable bonds. Steeped in Philippine mythology and rooted in the real-world friendship between directors Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado, the film boasts a voice cast of Filipino A-listers – including Grammy winner H.E.R.; actors Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place) and Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, MIFF 2022); Broadway icon Lea Salonga; and comedian Jo Koy – as well as fellow stars Dave Franco, Jenny Slate and Ronny Chieng. Capped off with resplendent anime-inspired visuals and folk-inspired music, Forgotten Island reminds us that growing up doesn’t have to mean growing apart.
synopsis_zh:
H.E.R.、丽莎·索伯拉诺、曼尼·哈辛托与莉亚·萨隆加联袂献声，共同演绎这个关于友情、无畏与菲律宾文化的奇幻动画故事。

乔和瑞莎是刚从高中毕业的一对挚友。尽管瑞莎即将远赴美国上大学，两人仍立誓要永远亲密如初。就在相聚的最后一晚，她们意外打开了一道通往纳卡利的传送门——那是一座神秘的岛屿，栖息着菲律宾传说中的妖怪「阿斯旺」。在纳卡利待得越久，记忆就消逝得越快，所以她们必须尽快找到回家的路，同时还要躲开可怕的「马纳南加尔」的魔爪。

这部沉浸感十足、精彩刺激的冒险之作出自梦工厂——《怪物史瑞克》和《驯龙高手》背后的动画厂牌——讲述两个少女学会勇敢、懂得羁绊牢不可破的成长故事。影片浸润于菲律宾神话，灵感更源自两位导演乔尔·克劳福德与贾努尔·梅尔卡多在现实中的友谊。配音阵容云集菲裔一线明星：格莱美得主 H.E.R.、演员丽莎·索伯拉诺（《丽莎·弗兰肯斯坦》）、曼尼·哈辛托（《善地》）、多莉·德莱昂（《悲情三角》，MIFF 2022）、百老汇传奇莉亚·萨隆加以及喜剧演员乔·科伊，戴夫·佛朗哥、珍妮·斯蕾特和钱信伊也倾情加盟。再配上绚丽的日式动画风格视觉与民谣韵味的配乐，《遗忘之岛》提醒我们：长大，不一定意味着疏远。
highlight_zh: 梦工厂新作，菲律宾神话奇幻冒险，H.E.R.领衔全明星配音

synopsis_en:
Jai Courtney stars – and Olivia Colman and Sam Neill voice a fox and a magpie respectively – in this absurdist black comedy about small-town duplicity and discontent.

Affable oaf Nick (Jai Courtney, Felony, MIFF Closing Night 2014) cruises through life courtesy of his rich daddy’s money, and his fiancée Kori (Emily Browning, One More Shot, MIFF 2025) has just accepted his marriage proposal. But when he discovers she’s been cheating on him – with the husband of her best friend! – everything unravels. While out hunting one day, he catches a talking fox, who tells him there’s a magical pit in the forest that can fix all of his problems. Nick hatches a plan … but they don’t call foxes tricksters for nothing.

Marking the feature directorial debut of Danger 5 co-creator Dario Russo – who also writes, edits and composes here – this tale of dissatisfied couples and the percipient animals that gawk and gossip about their silly human foibles deftly showcases his singular brand of dark humour. Alongside the animatronic critters, the star-studded cast – which also includes Australian actors Damon Herriman (Once Upon a Time in Hollywood, MIFF 2019) and Miranda Otto (Love Serenade, MIFF 1996) – goes ham with the film’s audacious concept, building a ‘be careful what you wish for’ fable like no other.
synopsis_zh:
贾伊·科特尼主演，奥利维娅·科尔曼和萨姆·尼尔分别为一只狐狸和一只喜鹊配音——这部荒诞黑色喜剧讲述小镇上的口是心非与人心不满。

尼克（贾伊·科特尼，《重罪》，2014年墨尔本电影节闭幕片）是个和气的憨货，靠着有钱老爹的钱过着优哉游哉的日子，未婚妻科丽（艾米莉·布朗宁，《One More Shot》，2025年墨尔本电影节）刚刚答应了他的求婚。可当他发现她一直在偷情——对象还是她闺蜜的丈夫！——一切开始分崩离析。某天外出打猎时，他抓到一只会说话的狐狸，狐狸告诉他森林里有一个魔法坑洞，能解决他所有的烦恼。尼克盘算出一个计划……但狐狸被称作狡诈的骗子，可不是没有原因的。

本片是《危机五人组》联合主创达里奥·鲁索的长片导演处女作——他还身兼编剧、剪辑和配乐。这个关于貌合神离的伴侣，以及在一旁围观、议论人类愚蠢弱点的机灵动物们的故事，巧妙展现了他独树一帜的黑色幽默。除了电子机械动物，星光熠熠的演员阵容——还包括澳大利亚演员达蒙·海瑞曼（《好莱坞往事》，2019年墨尔本电影节）和米兰达·奥托（《爱情小夜曲》，1996年墨尔本电影节）——把这个大胆的设定演得淋漓尽致，构筑出一则独一无二的"许愿需谨慎"寓言。
highlight_zh: 科尔曼配音狐狸，荒诞黑色喜剧，《综艺》盛赞的想象力处女作

synopsis_en:
In what she describes as a “small theatre of the world”, Ulrike Ottinger explores the span of human history in this deeply surreal, outré romp.

Across five sweeping, nonlinear adventures, the multi-named, gender-fluid and barely ageing Orlando (played by avant-garde New German Cinema star Magdalena Montezuma) explores the history of civilisation. From a modern department store in Freak City to medieval times, and from the Spanish Inquisition to a carnival sideshow, Orlando ultimately lands in Northern Italy for a competition crowning “The Ugliest Person of the Year”. A punk shapeshifter, our hero jostles with a wild cast of acrobats and performers with a diverse array of bodies and identities – including self-flagellating leather boys, the “Freak Orlando bunnies”, and conjoined twins memorably played by legendary French New Wave figure Jackie Raynal and frequent Ulrike Ottinger collaborator Delphine Seyrig (who appears throughout in multiple roles).

A loose adaptation of Virginia Woolf’s epic 1928 novel Orlando: A Biography by way of Tod Browning’s infamous 1932 horror Freaks, this is the second in Ottinger’s ‘Berlin Trilogy’, wedged between Ticket of No Return and Dorian Gray in the Mirror of the Yellow Press. Described by Ottinger as a “histoire du monde”, or “small theatre of the world”, Freak Orlando is perhaps her most unclassifiable film. A cinematic fever dream, it challenges idealised norms of beauty, gender and sexuality through pageantry – an assemblage of irreverent tableaux vivants in lush colour and extravagant costuming.

“A freewheeling, confounding, frequently hilarious, often opaque, and awe-inspiring picaresque paean to, indeed, letting one’s freak flag fly … visually sumptuous”– Screen Slate

2K Digitisation
synopsis_zh:
乌尔莉克·奥廷格将本片形容为一座“世界的小剧场”，以极度超现实、离经叛道的狂想之旅，纵览人类历史的全貌。

在五段恢弘而非线性的冒险中，拥有多重名字、性别流动、几乎不会衰老的奥兰多（由新德国电影先锋明星玛格达莱娜·蒙特祖玛饰演）游历文明史：从“怪胎之城”的现代百货商场到中世纪，从西班牙宗教裁判所到嘉年华杂耍场，最终来到北意大利，参加一场评选“年度最丑之人”的大赛。这位朋克变形者一路与一群狂野的杂技艺人和表演者同行——他们拥有各式各样的身体与身份，包括自我鞭笞的皮衣男孩、“怪人奥兰多兔女郎”，以及令人过目难忘的连体双胞胎，分别由法国新浪潮传奇人物杰基·雷纳尔和奥廷格的老搭档德菲因·塞里格出演（后者在片中一人分饰多角，贯穿始终）。

本片松散地改编自弗吉尼亚·伍尔夫 1928 年的史诗小说《奥兰多》，又糅入了托德·布朗宁 1932 年那部声名狼藉的恐怖片《畸形人》的血脉。它是奥廷格“柏林三部曲”的第二部，居于《有去无回的票》与《黄色新闻镜中的道林·格雷》之间。奥廷格称之为一部“世界史”，或“世界的小剧场”——这或许是她最难以归类的作品。这是一场影像的热病之梦，以盛大的庆典场面挑战关于美、性别与性的理想化规范：一连串不敬的活人画，色彩浓艳，服装极尽奢华。

“一部天马行空、令人困惑、常常爆笑、时而晦涩、却叫人叹为观止的流浪汉史诗，礼赞的正是‘让你的怪胎旗帜飘扬’……视觉上华美至极。”——Screen Slate

2K 数字修复版
highlight_zh: 塞里格一人分饰多角，伍尔夫《奥兰多》的怪胎狂欢梦

title_en: Free Eliza (notes on an anatomical imperfection)
title_zh: 解放伊丽莎（关于一处解剖学缺陷的笔记）
synopsis_en:
In this deadpan class satire, a luxury hotel worker pushes back against a world that demands women perform happiness at any cost.

Eliza works at a five-star hotel and she’s great at it, except for one thing – anatomically, she cannot smile. In a droll voiceover, she notes the professional setbacks of being a woman unable to fawn and pander to the idle rich. Coming to MIFF direct from its premiere at Cannes Directors’ Fortnight, this poker-faced satire in the vein of Yorgos Lanthimos will have you doing what Eliza can’t.
synopsis_zh:
在这部冷面阶级讽刺片中，一位豪华酒店员工奋起反抗这个不惜一切代价要求女性表演快乐的世界。

伊丽莎在一家五星级酒店工作，业务能力无可挑剔——只有一个问题：从解剖学上讲，她不会微笑。在冷幽默的旁白中，她细数一个无法对有闲阶级富人谄笑逢迎的女人所遭遇的职业挫折。本片从戛纳导演双周首映后直接来到墨尔本国际电影节，这部颇有兰斯莫斯风格的扑克脸讽刺片，会让你做出伊丽莎做不到的事——开怀大笑。
highlight_zh: 戛纳导演双周直送，兰斯莫斯式冷面阶级讽刺

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

An inspired act of micro-budget filmmaking, this playful gig economy parable set in the Sydney fashion scene introduces an impressive array of new Australian talent.

Mia is floating through life: dating a small-time scammer; killing time in front of screens; working a menial job in construction. When the unexpected opportunity arises for her to exchange hi-vis for high fashion, she reluctantly falls into the world of modelling, where there’s ample money, prestige, gossip … and just as much boredom. Lost between old friends who judge her new job and new friends she can’t quite trust, Mia keeps floating along. Via a series of questionable choices and increasing misadventures, however, she will ultimately become infamous.

Made for just $28,000 and drawn from her own experiences as a fashion photographer, Korean-Australian writer/director Hyun Lee’s (Asian Girls, MIFF 2018) debut feature film is a DIY portrait of the drudgery of labour that punches well above its weight. Shot in Sydney locations by cinematographer Dimitri Zaunders (The Golden Spurtle, MIFF 2025) with a host of non-professional actors – including impressive newcomer Mia Kidis in the central role – it’s at once a comedy about the absurdities of the fashion industry, a commentary on the construction of imagery and a film in open dialogue with the Nouvelle Vague.
synopsis_zh:
这部以悉尼时尚圈为背景的零工经济寓言，是一次充满灵气的微成本电影创作，俏皮灵动，也让一批澳大利亚新面孔集体亮相。

米娅的人生正随波逐流：交往着一个小骗子男友，在屏幕前消磨时间，在建筑工地打着零工。一个意外的机会让她脱下反光背心、换上高级时装，她半推半就地踏入模特行业——这里有丰厚的报酬、光鲜的名头、八卦流言……以及同样多的无聊。夹在看不惯她新工作的老朋友和无法完全信任的新朋友之间，米娅继续漂着。然而，经过一连串可疑的选择和不断升级的荒唐事，她终将「声名狼藉」。

本片成本仅2.8万澳元，取材自韩裔澳大利亚编剧兼导演李贤（Hyun Lee，其作品《亚洲女孩》曾入围2018年墨尔本电影节）担任时尚摄影师的亲身经历。这部处女作长片以DIY手法描绘劳动的枯燥日常，却爆发出远超其体量的能量。影片由摄影师迪米特里·藻德斯（《金搅拌棒》，2025年墨尔本电影节）在悉尼实地取景拍摄，启用大量非职业演员——包括表现亮眼的新人米娅·基迪斯担纲主演。它既是一部讽刺时尚行业荒诞的喜剧，也是对影像建构的评论，更是一部与法国新浪潮公开对话的电影。
highlight_zh: 2.8万澳元微成本拍出的时尚圈寓言，致敬法国新浪潮的澳洲新声。

synopsis_en:
Both a charismatic hangout movie and a courageous act of dissent, this Sundance winner spends quality time with two young women trying to make art in Iran.

Hanna (Hana Mana) is a contemporary dancer who posts videos of her work online, while playwright Pari (Mahshad Bahram) stages experimental theatre productions. In Iran, both of these acts are illegal. Thick-as-thieves besties and housemates who participate in Tehran’s underground art communities, they live their lives – as artists, feminists and unwed women – in defiance of an authoritarian government that is openly hostile to everything they do. Armed with their friendship, their ideologies and a serious streak of rebellion, Hanna and Pari try to make art and make it through another day.

Nearly four decades after Iranian cinema legend Abbas Kiarostami’s breakout 1987 film posed the eternal question Where Is the Friend’s House?, Hossein Keshavarz and Maryam Ataei deliver a playful answer. Inspired by classic Iranian art movies, Jean-Luc Godard’s political films of the 1960s and the US indie mumblecore movement, The Friend’s House Is Here is a movie about how to live your best, most creative life under a repressive regime. Shot in secret and smuggled out of Iran to make its Sundance premiere, the film went on to receive the festival’s U.S. Dramatic Special Jury Award for Ensemble Cast – a just reward for the non-professional actors (many themselves working artists) who appear in this film.
synopsis_zh:
既是一部魅力十足的“厮混电影”，也是一次勇敢的异见表达——这部圣丹斯获奖之作，把镜头对准两位在伊朗坚持创作的年轻女性，与她们共度一段珍贵时光。

汉娜（哈娜·玛娜 饰）是一名现代舞者，常把自己的作品视频发到网上；帕丽（玛赫夏德·巴赫拉姆 饰）是剧作家，执导实验戏剧。在伊朗，这两件事都属违法。她们是形影不离的闺蜜兼室友，活跃于德黑兰的地下艺术圈，以艺术家、女性主义者和未婚女性的身份生活着——而这一切，都是对一个公开敌视她们所作所为的威权政府的公然反抗。凭着友谊、信念和一股不服输的叛逆劲儿，汉娜和帕丽努力创作，努力撑过每一天。

近四十年前，伊朗电影大师阿巴斯·基亚罗斯塔米以1987年的成名作抛出那个永恒之问——《何处是我朋友的家？》；如今，侯赛因·凯沙瓦尔兹与玛丽亚姆·阿塔伊给出了一个俏皮的回答。本片从经典伊朗艺术电影、戈达尔六十年代的政治电影以及美国独立“呢喃核”运动中汲取灵感，讲述如何在高压体制下活出最精彩、最有创造力的人生。影片秘密拍摄并偷运出伊朗，最终登陆圣丹斯首映，随后斩获电影节美国剧情片单元评审团特别奖（最佳群像表演）——片中的非职业演员（许多本身就是仍在坚持创作的艺术家）实至名归。
highlight_zh: 秘密拍摄偷运出境的圣丹斯获奖之作，致敬阿巴斯，讲伊朗女性以艺术抗争。

synopsis_en:
MIFF’s program of jaw-dropping fulldome screenings at the Melbourne Planetarium is back.

Don’t miss this rare opportunity to take in a truly unique cinematic experience, lying back and immersing yourself in the stereo surround sound and super high-resolution images projected onto the 180-degree hemispherical dome ‘screen’ above your head.

In the first of two showcases pairing incredible immersive experiences exploring the world around us, embark on a mesmerising odyssey into the world of trees, unveiling the breathtaking biodiversity flourishing within the woods, and explore the most southerly and remote atoll of the Cook Islands, Mangaia.
synopsis_zh:
墨尔本国际电影节的招牌节目——在墨尔本天文馆举行的震撼穹顶放映又回来了。

千万别错过这次难得的机会：躺在座椅上，让立体环绕声与超高分辨率影像将你包裹，画面投射在头顶180度半球形穹顶“银幕”之上，带来一场真正独一无二的观影体验。

本届共设两场展映，以沉浸式影像探索我们身边的世界。第一场将带你踏上一段迷人的树木之旅，揭开林间蓬勃生长的惊人生物多样性；随后前往库克群岛最南端、最偏远的环礁——曼加亚岛一探究竟。
highlight_zh: 躺进天文馆180度穹顶，环绕声画沉浸式漫游森林与南太环礁

synopsis_en:
MIFF’s program of jaw-dropping fulldome screenings at the Melbourne Planetarium is back.

Don’t miss this rare opportunity to take in a truly unique cinematic experience, lying back and immersing yourself in the stereo surround sound and super high-resolution images projected onto the 180-degree hemispherical dome ‘screen’ above your head.

In the second of two showcases pairing incredible immersive experiences exploring the world around us, take a sensory dive into a dark and enigmatic aquatic universe, and experience a sensory journey through the various states of sleep and consciousness.
synopsis_zh:
墨尔本国际电影节令人叹为观止的全穹幕展映项目重返墨尔本天文馆。

切勿错过这难得的机会，去体验一场真正独一无二的观影盛宴——舒展身体向后靠去，让自己完全沉浸在立体环绕声场，以及投射在头顶那面 180 度半球形穹幕上的超高分辨率影像之中。

本次是探索我们身边世界、结合非凡沉浸体验的两场展映中的第二场：你将纵身潜入一个幽暗而神秘的水下宇宙，展开一场感官之旅，穿行于睡眠与意识的种种层次之间。
highlight_zh: 躺进墨尔本天文馆，180度穹幕沉浸海底与梦境

title_en: An Fylmow Berr | The Shorts of Mark Jenkin
synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

A retrospective dedicated to the mysterious world of the singular Cornish filmmaker.

In celebration of his latest time-travelling oddity Rose of Nevada, join us for a haunting head-trip through the hand-crafted shorts of Cornish artist Mark Jenkin (Enys Men, MIFF 2022; Bait, MIFF 2019), a world in which ghostly dogs, grizzled fishermen and desolate coastlines commune on the director’s spellbinding super-8 stock.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含频闪画面

一场向这位独树一帜的康沃尔导演的神秘世界致敬的回顾展。

为庆祝他的最新时间旅行奇作《内华达玫瑰》，请随我们一同踏上一段迷离恍惚的旅程，走进康沃尔艺术家马克·詹金（《恩尼斯的男人》，2022年墨尔本电影节；《诱饵》，2019年墨尔本电影节）手工打造的短片世界——幽灵般的狗、饱经风霜的渔民与荒凉的海岸线，在导演摄人心魄的超8毫米胶片上彼此相遇。
highlight_zh: 康沃尔鬼才詹金超8毫米手工短片回顾展

synopsis_en:
Hilarious small-town hijinks ensue as a young queer Aboriginal woman falls head over heels for an apparently indifferent new colleague.

In her regional hometown of Broome, Lilah struggles to reconcile her queerness with a narrow small-town mindset – until she falls for a new co-worker and puts her desire to the test. Yawuru, Bardi and Kija filmmaker Kimberley Benjamin turns the parochial workplace comedy upside down, delivering a blast of comedic fresh air that’s full of warm, vibrant performances.
synopsis_zh:
一位年轻的原住民酷儿女孩对一位看似不为所动的新同事一见倾心，小镇上由此上演一连串爆笑闹剧。

在家乡布鲁姆这个偏远小镇，莱拉一直难以在保守狭隘的小镇氛围中安放自己的酷儿身份——直到她爱上一位新来的同事，决心放手一试。拥有雅乌鲁、巴尔迪与吉贾血统的导演金伯莉·本杰明将老套的职场喜剧彻底翻转，带来一股清新畅快的喜剧之风，表演温暖鲜活、元气满满。
highlight_zh: 原住民酷儿小镇职场喜剧，笑料十足又温暖治愈

synopsis_en:
Gracefully condensing a decade’s worth of footage, this tender nonfiction gem out of Cannes chronicles the adolescence of a boy in northern France.

Young Gabin Jourdel lives in Artois, an agricultural region in economic decline. His mother, Patricia, is a cattle farmer; his father, Dominique, a butcher. Dominique intends for Gabin to one day take over his business, but even at the age of eight, the boy has reservations; demonstrably less at ease with his peers than with the Brown Swiss cows tended to by his mother, he would prefer to work with “living animals”. Over 10 years, as he grows up in front of director Maxence Voiseux’s camera, Gabin negotiates not only the burdens of familial expectation but also the limitations of his rural environment.

Voiseux achieves a seamless, effortlessly intimate vérité style that suggests immense trust on the part of the Jourdel family, who first appeared in the director’s 2016 mid-length film The Heirs (this earlier documentary focusing on Dominique, his two brothers and their own cattle dealer father). Recalling both Richard Linklater’s Boyhood (MIFF 2014) and the beloved Up series (MIFF 1986), Gabin, with its quietly grand scope, is a poignant, truly impressive feature-length debut.
synopsis_zh:
影片将十年间拍摄的素材从容凝练，这部出自戛纳的温柔纪录片佳作，记录了法国北部一个男孩的青春期。

小男孩加宾·茹尔代尔生活在阿图瓦，一个经济衰退中的农业地区。母亲帕特里夏养牛，父亲多米尼克是屠夫。多米尼克希望加宾将来接手自己的生意，可年仅八岁的他就已心存顾虑：比起同龄人，他和母亲照料的瑞士褐牛相处得更自在，他更想跟“活着的动物”打交道。十年间，加宾在导演马克桑斯·瓦佐的镜头前长大，他要面对的不只是家庭期望的重担，还有乡村环境的种种局限。

瓦佐的镜头呈现出一种浑然天成、毫不费力的亲密真实感，这背后是茹尔代尔一家的深深信任——他们早在导演2016年的中长片《继承者》中就已出镜（那部纪录片聚焦多米尼克、他的两个兄弟以及他们做牛贩的父亲）。《加宾》令人想起理查德·林克莱特的《少年时代》（2014年墨尔本电影节）和备受喜爱的《人生七年》系列（1986年墨尔本电影节），格局静水流深，是一部动人且极为出色的长片处女作。
highlight_zh: 十年跟拍法国乡村少年成长，纪录片版《少年时代》，出自戛纳

title_en: Gail Daughtry and the Celebrity Sex Pass
synopsis_en:
Laugh your Oz off in this delightfully ludicrous farce as genre parody king David Wain sends a perky Kansas gal off on a whirlwind quest to seduce Jon Hamm.

Wholesome young Kansas hairdresser Gail (Zoey Deutch, Nouvelle Vague, MIFF 2025) is about to marry her perfect guy … until they attend a Jennifer Aniston book signing and she catches him and Jen being way more than Friends. Fair’s fair: now Gail gets a pass to chase her own celebrity crush, Mad Men’s studly Don Draper. Gail and her sassy hair salon pal Otto head for Hollywood, gathering a ragtag band of LA helpers including budding talent agent Caleb, jaded paparazzo Vincent and washed-up ex–Mad Men actor John Slattery. Will TV’s wonderful wizard of ohhhs grant Gail’s sexy wish? After all, there’s no place like Hamm …

David Wain has been wrangling retro comedy tropes since his 2001 debut, the cult-hit summer camp parody Wet Hot American Summer. He’s spoofed rom-com clichés (They Came Together) and lampooned the founder of National Lampoon magazine (A Futile and Stupid Gesture). For over a decade, Wain worked mainly in TV, until he popped up at Sundance 2026 to ruin the festival’s gravitas with this absolutely gag-stuffed, star-studded Tinseltown romp shot entirely on location. Behind the curtain of its determined silliness is an affectionate, surprisingly wholesome ode to a city that runs on desire.

Viewer Advice: Contains themes of child sexual abuse

Léa Seydoux is riveting as a wife and mother coming to grips with the emotional, moral and practical fallout when her husband is charged with a shocking crime.

When avant-garde concert pianist Lucy agrees to move her family from the city to the countryside, the goal is to provide her husband Philip with respite following a burnout-induced panic attack. Instead, the move leaves her isolated and emotionally unprepared when the police arrive to execute a search warrant on Philip’s computers. As she struggles to process her shattered new reality and to protect herself and her young son, Lucy must untangle truth from love.

Gentle Monster had its origins in a news story that director Marie Kreutzer read while preparing to film Corsage (MIFF 2022). Three years later, she found herself dealing with the collateral damage of a similar story as Corsage star Florian Teichtmeister was charged with the same offence. Here, Kreutzer shrewdly orients her focus around the women left to deal with the emotional aftermath of the crimes men commit, and her leads are up to the task: Léa Seydoux is magnificent as she navigates Lucy’s complex, multifaceted response; Jella Hasse provides a stoic counterpoint as the investigating officer managing her own wayward family member; and Catherine Deneuve is excellent in cameo as Lucy’s suffer-no-fools mother. With a striking score by Camille, Gentle Monster is a psychologically pointed exploration of shifting emotional sands, as devastating as it is vital.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：包含儿童性侵相关主题

蕾雅·赛杜奉献了摄人心魄的表演——当丈夫被控犯下骇人罪行，一位妻子和母亲不得不直面随之而来的情感、道德与现实的多重崩塌。

先锋派钢琴演奏家露西同意举家从城市搬往乡下，本意是让丈夫菲利普在因过劳引发惊恐发作后得以休养。不料这次搬迁让她陷入孤立无援的境地——当警察上门对菲利普的电脑执行搜查令时，她在情感上毫无准备。破碎的新现实扑面而来，为了保护自己和年幼的儿子，露西必须在爱与真相之间理出头绪。

本片的缘起，是导演玛丽·克罗伊策在筹备《束胸》（Corsage，2022年墨尔本影展）时读到的一则新闻。三年后，类似的事件竟落到她自己头上——《束胸》主演弗洛里安·泰希特迈斯特被控同样的罪行，她亲历了随之而来的连带伤害。在这部作品中，克罗伊策敏锐地将镜头对准那些被迫收拾情感残局的女性——男人犯下罪行，善后的却是她们。几位主演也不负所托：蕾雅·赛杜细腻演绎露西复杂多面的内心反应，光彩夺目；耶拉·哈泽饰演的调查警官自己也有一位失足的家人，她的隐忍克制与之形成呼应；凯瑟琳·德纳芙客串出演露西那位眼里不揉沙子的母亲，戏份不多却极为出彩。配上歌手Camille令人惊艳的配乐，《温柔的怪物》以锋利的心理笔触描摹情感流沙的暗涌，既令人心碎，又不容错过。
highlight_zh: 蕾雅·赛杜携手德纳芙，《束胸》导演直面切肤之痛的道德困局

synopsis_en:
When a vengeful ghost starts mutilating the inmates of one of Indonesia’s toughest prisons, the men must work together to stay alive in this socially conscious action-horror-comedy.

The newest inmate to join cell block C of Labuan Angsana prison is Dimas, a weedy journalist doing time for the brutal murder of his editor. Suspiciously soon after Dimas’s arrival, prisoners start getting picked off one by one, their bodies found gruesomely maimed and arranged into macabre sculptures that would make Hannibal Lecter proud. The prisoners panic, pointing the finger at Dimas, but one clairvoyant inmate is adamant that there’s a sinister supernatural entity behind the killings. He warns the others that they’d better keep their auras clean through art, prayer and dance, lest they become the ghost’s next victim.

The 12th feature by Indonesian genre master Joko Anwar (Satan’s Slaves), this action-packed horror-comedy has a lot on its mind. Smuggled in between the film’s visually imaginative gore and twisted sense of humour is an astute commentary on systemic inequality and corruption, using the prison setting and its ensemble of colourful characters as a microcosm of society at large – with a few dance battles thrown in for good measure.
synopsis_zh:
当一只复仇厉鬼开始在印尼最严酷的监狱里残害囚犯，狱中众人不得不联手求生——这是一部兼具社会关怀的动作恐怖喜剧。

拉布安·安萨纳监狱C区新来了一名囚犯：瘦弱的记者迪马斯，罪名是残忍杀害自己的主编。蹊跷的是，迪马斯刚一入狱，囚犯们便接连遇害，尸体被血腥肢解、摆成足以让汉尼拔·莱克特都叹服的诡异“雕塑”。众人陷入恐慌，纷纷把矛头指向迪马斯，但一位有阴阳眼的狱友坚称，幕后凶手是某种邪恶的超自然存在。他警告大家：必须靠艺术、祈祷和舞蹈保持“气场”洁净，否则就会成为恶鬼的下一个猎物。

这是印尼类型片大师佐科·安瓦尔（《撒旦的奴隶》）的第12部长片。这部动作满载的恐怖喜剧野心不小：在天马行空的血腥场面和黑色幽默之间，暗藏着对体制性不平等与腐败的犀利批判——监狱及其中形形色色的角色，正是整个社会的缩影。当然，片中还不忘加上几场斗舞。
highlight_zh: 《撒旦的奴隶》导演新作，血浆、黑色幽默与社会批判齐飞

synopsis_en:
In this gorgeous, multiple award-winning tale, a young woman comes of age and searches for her identity in the era of China’s one-child policy.

Amid the sunny splendour of 1980s coastal China, six-year-old tomboy Juan enjoys a sweet life: going to school, swimming, playing soccer, flying kites, getting into fights. But soon things are thrown into flux: her widowed mother remarries, then falls pregnant. Because families are only permitted to have a single child, Juan is quickly adopted out to an older couple in the city. A decade later, against the backdrop of the changing cultural landscape of the 1990s, a now-teenage Juan looks for a place that feels like home. When she finds that her factory work only amplifies her dislocation, she finally takes the plunge and seeks contact with her birth family.

Zou Jing (Lili Alone, MIFF 2021) sets her beautiful, difficult drama against the real-life phenomenon of mass adoption in China that followed the 1979 establishment of the one-child policy. Gorgeously shot by DOP Liang Zhongqiang and featuring stirring performances by newcomer Cao Ruofan and Li Gengxi (Resurrection, MIFF 2025) – who embody the film’s protagonist as a child and young adult respectively – A Girl Unknown earned acclaim on the Croisette, taking home three Cannes Critics’ Week awards.
synopsis_zh:
在这部斩获多项大奖的动人之作中，一个年轻女孩在中国独生子女政策的年代里成长，寻找属于自己的身份。

上世纪八十年代的中国海滨小城，阳光明媚。六岁的假小子小娟过着无忧无虑的日子：上学、游泳、踢球、放风筝、打打闹闹。然而生活很快天翻地覆：守寡的母亲改嫁后再度怀孕，因为一家只能有一个孩子，小娟被匆匆送养给城里的一对年长夫妇。十年后，在九十年代变迁的时代浪潮中，已是少女的小娟渴望找到一个像家的地方。当工厂里的日子只让她愈发无所归依时，她终于下定决心，去寻找自己的亲生家庭。

邹静（《小小的我一个人》，2021年墨尔本电影节）将这部美丽而沉重的剧情片，置于1979年独生子女政策实施后中国大规模送养这一真实历史背景之下。影片由摄影指导梁忠强掌镜，画面动人；新人曹若凡与李庚希（《复活》，2025年墨尔本电影节）分别饰演童年与青年时期的主人公，表演令人动容。本片在戛纳广受赞誉，一举拿下影评人周三项大奖。
highlight_zh: 戛纳影评人周三奖加身，独生子女时代的送养往事，李庚希主演。

synopsis_en:
Hollywood siren Jennifer Jones gives an unforgettable performance as a free spirit caught between the passions of a clergyman and a fox-hunting squire in Powell and Pressburger’s ravishing, rarely screened melodrama.

In a rural England somewhere between the late 19th century and a Technicolor dream, headstrong nature girl Hazel Woodus – played by a swooning, windswept Jennifer Jones (The Song of Bernadette) – lives a carefree existence communing with the animals and fairies of the untamed country. Like the foxes with whom she shares a spiritual kinship, Hazel finds herself hunted by both a dark, dashing squire (David Farrar, Black Narcissus) and a straitlaced clergyman (Cyril Cusack), two men to whom she refuses to be shackled.

Steeped in mysticism and eerie folklore – and serving as vivid inspiration for Kate Bush’s Hounds of Love – this expressionistic romance from the legendary Michael Powell and Emeric Pressburger (The Red Shoes; A Matter of Life and Death) was the British filmmakers’ lone foray into Hollywood, in part due to co-producer (and Jones’s husband) David O. Selznick later bowdlerising the film for its US release as The Wild Heart. Presented here in its original version – and on a vibrant 35mm print, courtesy of Martin Scorsese’s personal collection – the film is a haunting tale of doomed love and the liberating power of nature, led by Jones’s foxy, ferocious performance.
synopsis_zh:
好莱坞女神珍妮弗·琼斯奉献了一场令人难忘的表演：一个自由不羁的灵魂，夹在牧师与猎狐乡绅两种炽烈情感之间。这是鲍威尔与普雷斯伯格一部华美动人、难得在大银幕放映的情节剧。

故事发生在英格兰乡间，时代介于十九世纪末与一场特艺彩色的绮梦之间。倔强的自然之女黑泽尔·伍杜斯——由风姿摇曳、仿佛被旷野之风吹拂而来的珍妮弗·琼斯（《圣女之歌》）饰演——终日与荒野中的动物和精灵为伴，过着无拘无束的生活。正如与她灵魂相通的狐狸一样，黑泽尔也成了被追猎的对象：一边是阴郁英俊的乡绅（大卫·法拉尔，《黑水仙》），一边是古板拘谨的牧师（西里尔·库萨克），而她拒绝被任何一个男人套上枷锁。

这部浸透神秘主义与诡异民间传说的表现主义爱情片——凯特·布什的《Hounds of Love》正是从中汲取了鲜活灵感——出自传奇的迈克尔·鲍威尔与埃默里克·普雷斯伯格（《红菱艳》《平步青云》）之手，是这对英国电影搭档唯一一次进军好莱坞的尝试；部分原因在于联合制片人（也是琼斯的丈夫）大卫·O·塞尔兹尼克后来将影片删改成《狂野之心》在美国上映。本次放映的是未经删改的原始版本，胶片为色彩浓烈的35毫米拷贝，来自马丁·斯科塞斯的私人收藏。这是一个关于注定破灭的爱情与自然解放之力的凄美故事，由琼斯狐性十足、野性凛冽的表演领衔。
highlight_zh: 《红菱艳》双导传奇之作，斯科塞斯私藏35mm拷贝放映

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains suicide themes

In Cannes Critics’ Week’s tender, strikingly shot closing-night film, two lonely teenagers find an unlikely connection.

In a village tucked in the mountains of Normandy, 14-year-old Otto (Milo Machado-Graner, the astonishing young star of Anatomy of a Fall, MIFF 2023) just wants to disappear. Relentlessly persecuted by his classmates, he writes a farewell letter, sends it out to all and sundry, and heads to a bridge to end it all – but botches it. As everyone thinks he’s dead anyway, he decides to hide out on the outskirts of town. There, he’s discovered by fellow student Léna, who offers him shelter and an affection that fills his void.

The feature directorial debut of Félix de Givry – the breakout star of Mia Hansen-Løve’s Eden – taps into contemporary concerns around bullying and mental health, but focuses more poetically on the adolescent search for belonging and purpose. Machado-Graner delivers a lodestone performance as Otto, portraying his disaffection mostly through wordless gesture, while the 16mm cinematography by Tara-Jay Bangalter – son of Daft Punk’s Thomas Bangalter – amplifies emotion through striking depictions of light. Evoking the films of François Truffaut and Robert Bresson and capped off with fable-like narration by screen legend Françoise Lebrun (The Mother and the Whore, MIFF 2014), Goodbye, Cruel World is a tale about escaping pain and finding solace in the kindness of others.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：包含自杀相关内容

戛纳影评人周温柔动人、影像出众的闭幕片，讲述两个孤独少年之间一段意想不到的联结。

在诺曼底山间的一座村庄里，14岁的奥托（米洛·马查多-格拉纳，《坠落的审判》中令人惊艳的少年主演，MIFF 2023）只想从这个世界上消失。他在学校饱受同学欺凌，写下一封告别信寄给所有人，然后走上一座桥打算了结一切——却没能成功。既然所有人都以为他已经死了，他索性躲到了小镇边缘。在那里，同校的女生莱娜发现了他，为他提供了栖身之所，也用一份温情填补了他内心的空洞。

这是费利克斯·德·吉夫里的长片导演处女作——他曾凭米娅·汉森-洛夫的《伊甸园》一举成名。影片触及校园霸凌与心理健康等当下议题，但更以诗意的笔触聚焦青春期对归属感与人生意义的追寻。马查多-格拉纳的表演堪称全片的定盘星，他几乎全靠无言的肢体语言演绎奥托的疏离苦闷；而塔拉-杰伊·邦加尔特（傻朋克成员托马斯·邦加尔特之子）掌镜的16毫米胶片摄影，则用对光线的惊艳捕捉放大了情绪的张力。影片令人想起特吕弗与布列松的作品，并由影坛传奇弗朗索瓦丝·勒布伦（《母亲与娼妓》，MIFF 2014）献上寓言般的旁白。《再见，残酷世界》是一个关于逃离伤痛、在他人善意中寻得慰藉的故事。
highlight_zh: 《坠落的审判》少年主演再献封神级表演，戛纳影评人周闭幕片

synopsis_en:
Amid the breathtaking vistas of the Kimberley, a groundbreaking equine sanctuary helps First Nations teenagers discover reconnection and healing.

The natural beauty of Western Australia’s Kimberley region hides a shocking truth: the youth suicide rate in this remote part of the country is among the highest in the world. Pioneering Aboriginal researcher Professor Juli Coffin is seeking to change that with a unique program that pairs young people with horses, offering a culturally safe sanctuary in which they navigate their paths to adulthood, forming life-changing bonds along the way. Director Sean O’Reilly works closely with Coffin – whose own life was once saved by a horse – to document their remarkable journeys.

Executive-produced by Hunter Page-Lochard, Huna Amweero, Daniel Gordon, Mark Coles Smith and Stephen Page, O’Reilly’s documentary combines observational footage with first-person testimony, set against the stunningly cinematic backdrop of some of Australia’s most majestic landscapes. Full of charm, joy and gentle humour, Guided by Horses is an engaging reminder of where we can turn to for our inner spirit to be ignited.
synopsis_zh:
在金伯利地区壮丽的风光之中，一座开创性的马匹疗愈庇护所正帮助原住民青少年重建联结、疗愈心灵。

西澳大利亚金伯利地区的自然美景背后，隐藏着一个令人震惊的事实：这片偏远土地上的青少年自杀率位居全球前列。原住民先驱研究者朱莉·科芬教授正试图改变这一切——她创立了一个独特的项目，让年轻人与马结伴，为他们提供一个文化上安全的庇护空间，陪伴他们走向成年，并在过程中缔结改变一生的情谊。导演肖恩·奥莱利与科芬紧密合作——她自己的生命也曾被一匹马所挽救——记录下这些动人的旅程。

本片由亨特·佩奇-洛查德、胡娜·阿姆维罗、丹尼尔·戈登、马克·科尔斯·史密斯与斯蒂芬·佩奇担任监制，将观察式影像与第一人称讲述相结合，以澳大利亚最壮美的风景为电影感十足的背景。影片充满魅力、欢乐与温柔的幽默，提醒着我们：总有一处所在，能重新点燃内心的火光。
highlight_zh: 金伯利壮景中，马匹疗愈原住民少年的动人纪录片。

synopsis_en:
In this magic-realist charmer that won a Sundance Directing Award, a ballroom dancer struck down by tragedy gets her feisty, flirty groove back.

Middle-aged Haru and her husband Luis are serious about ballroom, performing the rumba, tango and paso doble in competitions all over Tokyo. But after enduring a catastrophic loss, Haru loses her spark. Nine months on, her sister and her cousin decide something must change, so they cajole her back into the studio. Enter: sexy new dance instructor Fedir (complete with open marriage!), who might just pull Haru out of her rut.

Josef Kubota Wladyka’s third feature is a refreshing spin on the grief drama, while Oscar nominee Rinko Kikuchi (Kumiko, the Treasure Hunter, MIFF 2014) – as balletic on the dance floor as she is in her portrayal of emotional overload – delivers an affecting, multifaceted performance. Also starring Alejandro Edda, Alberto Guerra, You (Nobody Knows, MIFF 2004) and Yoh Yoshida (Like Father, Like Son, MIFF 2013), the film deftly moves between languages (English, Spanish, Japanese) and tones (melodramatic, soap-operatic, surrealist) – all of which are buoyed by magnificent choreography, vibrant production design and a joyous pop soundtrack. Dedicated to Wladyka’s dancer mother, Ha-Chan, Shake Your Booty! shows that when life gets tough, all it takes is to get back on your feet.
synopsis_zh:
在这部斩获圣丹斯电影节导演奖的魔幻现实主义暖心之作中，一位被悲剧击倒的国标舞者，重新找回了她泼辣又风情的舞步。

中年的小春和丈夫路易斯对国标舞一片痴心，常年辗转东京各地参赛，跳伦巴、探戈和斗牛舞。然而一场巨大的变故之后，小春失去了往日的神采。九个月过去，她的妹妹和表亲看不下去了，决定连哄带劝把她拉回舞蹈教室。这时登场的，是性感的新舞蹈老师费迪尔（还自带开放式婚姻设定！）——他或许正是把小春拽出低谷的那个人。

约瑟夫·库勃塔·瓦拉迪卡的第三部长片为哀伤题材注入了一股清新气息，而奥斯卡提名演员菊地凛子（《寻宝人久美子》，2014年墨尔本电影节）在舞池中身姿翩然，演绎情感崩溃时同样举重若轻，奉献了一场动人而层次丰富的表演。影片还集结了亚历杭德罗·埃达、阿尔贝托·格拉、YOU（《无人知晓》，2004年墨尔本电影节）和吉田羊（《如父如子》，2013年墨尔本电影节），在英语、西班牙语、日语三种语言之间自如切换，情节剧、肥皂剧与超现实主义的调子交错流转——托起这一切的，是华丽的编舞、鲜亮的美术设计和一张欢腾的流行金曲原声带。这部献给导演舞者母亲的作品告诉我们：生活再难，只要重新站起来跳就好。
highlight_zh: 圣丹斯导演奖加持，菊地凛子领衔的魔幻舞蹈疗愈之作

synopsis_en:
A critically endangered language is passed from grandmother to grandson in this sensory 16mm docufiction set among Vietnam’s Rục people.

At 60-plus years of age, Cao Thị Hậu dreams of returning to the traditional Rục cave dwelling where she was born. Instead, she travels from her modest village home to the hustle and bustle of Saigon, where she’ll spend time with her daughter and grandchildren. The Rục vocabulary lessons that Mrs. Hậu offers her Vietnamese-speaking young grandson, who is also learning English at school, become invitations to the filmmakers to play with text as a graphic element.

Trương Minh Quý (Viet and Nam, MIFF 2024) and Nicolas Graux’s richly textured, impressionistic documentary – which won the top prize in Locarno’s Filmmakers of the Present sidebar – is a thoughtfully layered extension of the relationship between director and subject that began with Trương’s science fiction-tinged 2019 docufiction The Tree House. Hair, Paper, Water…’s contemplative pacing is perfectly complemented by its lush, rain-misted palette, courtesy of Graux’s 16mm cinematography.
synopsis_zh:
一门濒临消亡的语言，在祖母与孙儿之间悄然传递。这部以16毫米胶片拍摄的感官化纪录剧情片，将镜头对准越南的鹿族（Rục）人。

年过六旬的高氏后（Cao Thị Hậu）梦想回到自己出生的鹿族传统洞穴居所，现实却是她从简朴的乡村家中启程，前往喧嚣繁忙的西贡，与女儿和孙辈共度时光。她的小孙子说越南语，还在学校学英语，而她教给孙子的鹿语词汇课，也成了两位导演的灵感来源——让文字作为一种视觉元素在银幕上自由嬉戏。

张明贵（《越与南》，2024年墨尔本电影节）与尼古拉·格罗联合执导的这部质感丰盈、印象派气质浓郁的纪录片，摘得洛迦诺电影节“当代影人”单元最高奖。它也是导演与拍摄对象之间情谊的延续——这段缘分始于张明贵2019年带有科幻色彩的纪录剧情片《树屋》。影片沉静从容的节奏，与格罗掌镜的16毫米摄影所呈现的氤氲雨雾、丰润色调相得益彰。
highlight_zh: 洛迦诺获奖之作：16毫米胶片记录祖孙间濒危语言的温柔传承。

synopsis_en:
A motley crew of para ice hockey skaters fight to keep their grassroots sporting club on the rink in this stirring, often hilarious documentary.

The Perth-based Garden Island Pirates are the best para ice hockey team in Western Australia. There’s no competition … literally. A scrappy, mixed-gender group of amateurs, they strap on sledges to play against one another as stoically deadpan founder and would-be figure-skater Dan Perrett calls the shots from the sidelines. Booking the rink is half the trouble, and much of the group’s time away from it is spent negotiating volunteer committee positions and wrangling sponsorships. That all changes, however, when three women on the team earn the opportunity to represent Australia in its first ever appearance at the Women’s World Para Ice Hockey Championships in Slovakia. Scheduled to compete against heavyweights like Norway and the United States in a bruising, physically demanding sport, the newcomers aren’t given a snowflake’s chance in hell – but that doesn’t mean that they’re not about to go down swinging.

An affectionate portrait of a niche sporting institution and the weird and wonderful personalities who help it scrape by, Isaac Elliott’s debut documentary feature – supported by the MIFF Premiere Fund – is a laugh-out-loud edge-of-your-sled ride that brings together the underdog drive of Cool Runnings, the behind-the-scenes intrigue of Rats in the Ranks (MIFF 1996) and the irrepressible community spirit of The Golden Spurtle (MIFF 2025).
synopsis_zh:
一群五花八门的残奥冰球（冰橇冰球）选手，为了让自己的草根俱乐部能继续留在冰场上而奋力拼搏——这部纪录片既让人热血沸腾，又常常笑料百出。

来自珀斯的「花园岛海盗队」是西澳大利亚最强的残奥冰球队——因为压根没有对手，字面意义上的没有。这是一支不拘一格的男女混编业余队伍，队员们绑上冰橇彼此对练，而一脸冷面、曾梦想当花样滑冰选手的创始人丹·佩雷特则在场边发号施令。光是订到冰场就够折腾了，冰场之外的大部分时间，大家还得为志愿者委员会的职位讨价还价、四处张罗赞助。然而一切都变了：队里三名女队员获得机会，将代表澳大利亚首次出征在斯洛伐克举行的女子残奥冰球世锦赛。在这项激烈冲撞、极耗体能的运动中，她们要迎战挪威、美国等劲旅，外界认为这群新人毫无胜算——但这不妨碍她们放手一搏、战斗到底。

这是一幅深情的群像：一个小众体育机构，和一群古怪又可爱、支撑它艰难前行的人。艾萨克·艾略特的这部纪录长片处女作由 MIFF 首映基金支持，让人从头笑到尾、全程坐不住——它兼具《冰上轻驰》式的逆袭热血、《队伍里的老鼠》（1996 年 MIFF）式的幕后角力，以及《金搅拌棒》（2025 年 MIFF）式生生不息的社区精神。
highlight_zh: 澳洲草根残奥冰球队爆笑逆袭，首征世锦赛的热血纪录片。

title_zh: 记忆碎片（Hear My Eyes 现场配乐版）
synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

See Christopher Nolan’s breakthrough film, complete with an all-new live score by Michael “CAVS” Cavanagh (King Gizzard & the Lizard Wizard).

Before the billion-dollar blockbusters, before Batman, before Oppenheimer, Christopher Nolan released his second feature: Memento. The independent thriller quickly became a cultural phenomenon, earning Oscar nominations for Best Original Screenplay and Best Film Editing, and introduced audiences to the narrative puzzles, fractured timelines and obsessive attention to detail that would come to define the director’s work.

For this special presentation, Michael “CAVS” Cavanagh of King Gizzard & the Lizard Wizard reimagines the film with an all-new live score, performing solo across multiple drum kits and a suite of electronic instruments. Technical and bombastic, Cavanagh’s performance will mirror the intensity and precision at the heart of Nolan's most audacious work. Part film screening, part live concert, Hear My Eyes has spent over a decade creating immersive cinema experiences, building a loyal following through collaborations including Terminator 2: Judgment Day with Peter Van Hoesen and Robin Fox, Chopper with Springtime and Mick Harvey, Wake in Fright with Surprise Chef, and Pan’s Labyrinth with Sleep D. For Nolan devotees and anyone who loves cinema that takes risks, this is a chance to revisit a cult classic, live and reimagined.
synopsis_zh:
特别呈现

重温克里斯托弗·诺兰的成名之作，本场放映将由 King Gizzard & the Lizard Wizard 乐队的 Michael “CAVS” Cavanagh 献上全新现场配乐。

在十亿票房大片之前，在蝙蝠侠之前，在《奥本海默》之前，诺兰推出了他的第二部长片《记忆碎片》。这部独立惊悚片迅速成为一种文化现象，获得奥斯卡最佳原创剧本和最佳剪辑两项提名，也让观众第一次领教了日后定义这位导演的标志性手法：叙事迷宫、碎裂的时间线，以及对细节的偏执打磨。

在这场特别放映中，King Gizzard & the Lizard Wizard 的 Michael “CAVS” Cavanagh 将以全新现场配乐重新演绎这部电影——他一人独奏，穿梭于多套鼓组和一整套电子乐器之间。Cavanagh 的演奏既硬核又炸裂，恰好呼应了诺兰这部最大胆作品内核中的强度与精准。半是电影放映、半是现场音乐会，Hear My Eyes 团队十余年来一直致力于打造沉浸式影院体验，凭借一系列合作积累了忠实拥趸：与 Peter Van Hoesen 和 Robin Fox 合作的《终结者2：审判日》、与 Springtime 和 Mick Harvey 合作的《斩人快手》、与 Surprise Chef 合作的《惊醒》，以及与 Sleep D 合作的《潘神的迷宫》。无论你是诺兰死忠，还是热爱敢于冒险的电影，这都是一次以现场重构方式重温邪典经典的难得机会。
highlight_zh: 诺兰成名作《记忆碎片》，配以全新现场鼓乐震撼演绎

synopsis_en:
A mesmerising odyssey into the world of trees, unveiling their interconnected lives and the breathtaking biodiversity flourishing within the woods.

Deep within the woods stands an ancient and all-knowing oak, the Tree of Life, who serves as both the protagonist and the narrator of the story. The story reveals the forest as a living, breathing organism, full of wisdom, connection and resilience.

The Heart of the Forest is a poetic call to protect what remains of our ancient forests and a reminder that their fate is intimately tied to our own.
synopsis_zh:
一场引人入胜的树木世界之旅，揭示树木之间紧密相连的生命网络，以及林间蓬勃生长、令人惊叹的生物多样性。

森林深处矗立着一棵古老而全知的橡树——生命之树，它既是故事的主角，也是叙述者。影片将森林呈现为一个有呼吸、有生命的整体，充满智慧、联结与坚韧。

《森林之心》是一封写给古老森林的诗意呼吁，提醒我们：森林的命运，与人类自身息息相关。
highlight_zh: 以古树为叙事者的诗意自然纪录片，沉浸式感受森林生命网络

synopsis_en:
A chicken crosses the road and discovers adventure on the other side in this offbeat, moving and utterly unique bird’s-eye view on the suffering of the world.

A poultry transport driver steals a factory-farmed hen, planning to put her in a tasty soup. When he stops his truck at a servo, she escapes, evading a hungry fox and braving a busy highway before getting cooped up in a run-down seaside restaurant. All she wants is to find a safe nest to brood her own chicks – but as she repeatedly strives to find out what becomes of her eggs, she encounters a world in which hens aren’t the only creatures to be exploited.

Fans of animal-centred dramas like Andrea Arnold’s Cow (MIFF 2021) and Jerzy Skolimowski’s EO (MIFF 2022) – or even the Oscar-winning animation Flow (MIFF 2024) – will adore this feathery fancy from György Pálfi (Taxidermia, MIFF 2006). Filmed vividly at chook’s-eye level, its allegory is compelling but never didactic, witty without being gimmicky. There are no animatronics or CGI – just thrilling action and set pieces that need to be seen to be believed, along with the genuine emotion that the inimitable Hungarian auteur draws from an all-star flock of trained birds.
synopsis_zh:
一只鸡穿过马路，在路的另一边发现了冒险。这部影片另类、动人、独一无二，以一只鸡的视角俯瞰人间疾苦。

一名家禽运输司机从养殖场偷走一只母鸡，打算炖一锅美味的鸡汤。卡车在加油站停靠时，母鸡趁机逃脱，一路躲过饥饿的狐狸、穿越车流滚滚的公路，最终被关进一家破败的海边餐馆。它只想找个安全的窝孵出自己的小鸡——可当它一次次想弄清自己的蛋去了哪里，却发现在这个世界上，被剥削的远不止母鸡。

如果你喜欢安德里亚·阿诺德的《奶牛》（2021年墨尔本电影节）、杰兹·斯科利莫夫斯基的《驴叫》（2022年墨尔本电影节）这类以动物为主角的剧情片，甚至是奥斯卡获奖动画《猫猫的奇幻漂流》（2024年墨尔本电影节），你一定会爱上帕尔菲·久尔吉（《人体雕像》，2006年墨尔本电影节）的这部“羽毛之作”。影片以鸡的视线高度进行生动拍摄，寓言引人深思却不说教，机智幽默而不耍花招。全片没有电子仿真道具，也没有CG特效——只有令人叹为观止的精彩动作场面，以及这位独树一帜的匈牙利导演从一群训练有素的“全明星”鸡演员身上挖掘出的真挚情感。
highlight_zh: 《人体雕像》导演新作，全实拍母鸡主演的动物寓言，《驴叫》爱好者必看

synopsis_en:
Unvoiced emotions and cultural tensions shimmer in this restrained story of a Singaporean couple visiting their daughter in Sydney.

An international student hosts her visiting parents in her Sydney flat, and spends two fraught days wrestling with her mother’s unspoken social expectations and apprehensions about the life her daughter has chosen to build in Australia. This finely wrought, elegantly shot family drama expresses the complex emotions of intergenerational diaspora through closely observed everyday moments.
synopsis_zh:
未曾说出口的情感与文化的张力，在这个克制的故事中静静流淌：一对新加坡夫妇远赴悉尼，探望在那里生活的女儿。

留学的女儿在悉尼的公寓里接待来访的父母，两天的相处却处处暗流涌动——母亲无言的社会期待，以及对女儿选择在澳大利亚扎根生活的种种不安，都压在她心头。这部制作精良、影像考究的家庭剧情片，以细致入微的日常瞬间，道出跨代移民之间复杂难言的情感。
highlight_zh: 新加坡母女悉尼重逢，两天相处道尽移民家庭的无言隔阂。

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

When an inventive cult filmmaker decides to make a Hallmark-style documentary on concrete, he paves a path to something far more profound and hilarious.

Idle during the 2023 Writers Guild of America strike, documentarian John Wilson attends a workshop on how to make Hallmark Christmas rom-com movies. Inspired by his apartment building’s crumbling foundations, he tests this aspirational, escapist formula on the world’s love affair with concrete. Unsurprisingly, Wilson struggles to pitch his idea to prospective investors – and, fretting that he might be falling through the industry’s cracks, he takes a pilgrimage from the celebrity handprints outside LA’s Chinese Theatre to the dome atop Rome’s ancient Pantheon and more, finding surprising insights along the way.

Fans of HBO comedy series How To With John Wilson will rejoice that the director’s Sundance-premiering debut feature continues along his curious perambulation. But whether you want eccentric tales embedded in urban history or are hard-set on formalist documentaries like Architecton (MIFF 2024), Wilson delivers it all in slabs. As entertainment grows gimmickier and ever more disposable, The History of Concrete offers a rich, hearteningly humane meditation on life and death, on the things we either leave in ruins or care enough to fix.
synopsis_zh:
当一位鬼才邪典纪录片导演决定拍一部贺曼式（Hallmark）风格的混凝土纪录片时，他铺出的这条路，通向了远比预期更深刻、也更爆笑的地方。

2023 年美国编剧工会大罢工期间，闲下来的纪录片导演约翰·威尔逊去上了一门教人拍贺曼圣诞爱情片的工作坊。受自家公寓楼地基开裂的启发，他决定把这套励志、逃避现实的公式，套用在全世界对混凝土的迷恋上。不出所料，威尔逊向潜在投资人推销这个点子时四处碰壁——担心自己正从行业的裂缝中坠落的他，索性踏上一场朝圣之旅：从洛杉矶中国剧院门前的明星手印，到罗马万神殿古老的穹顶，一路走来，收获了许多意想不到的领悟。

HBO 喜剧剧集《约翰·威尔逊的十万个怎么做》的粉丝会欣喜地发现，这部在圣丹斯首映的导演长片处女作延续了他标志性的好奇漫游。无论你想看嵌在城市历史里的古怪故事，还是钟情于《建筑纪元》（2024 年墨尔本电影节）那样的形式主义纪录片，威尔逊都成板成块地一并奉上。在娱乐越来越花哨、越来越用完即弃的今天，《混凝土史》献上了一场丰厚而温暖人心的沉思：关于生与死，关于那些我们任其倾颓、或愿意用心修补的东西。
highlight_zh: 《十万个怎么做》导演首部长片，圣丹斯首映的爆笑暖心纪录片

synopsis_en:
In this tender tale of cultural dislocation, a lonely young immigrant in Iceland struggles to find her place at the local baths.

Neema’s weekly trips to the pool only intensify her feelings of isolation as a young Black French-Malian woman in Iceland, grieving her grandmother’s recent passing from afar. In soft, painterly animation, her body seems to come apart with every microaggression she faces. Just as she’s about to lose herself altogether, she meets someone who understands what she’s going through.
synopsis_zh:
这是一个关于文化错位的温柔故事：一位孤身在冰岛的年轻移民，努力在当地的泳池浴场找到自己的位置。

妮玛每周都去泳池，但这只让她更加孤独——作为一名身在冰岛的法国-马里裔黑人女孩，她还要遥遥承受祖母离世的悲痛。在柔和如画的动画笔触中，每一次遭遇微歧视，她的身体都仿佛在一点点散架。就在她即将彻底失去自己的时候，她遇见了一个懂得她所经历一切的人。
highlight_zh: 柔美手绘动画，用身体的碎裂讲述移民孤独与治愈。

synopsis_en:
A young girl connects with her miscreant father via small-time hustle in this beautifully photographed, emotionally deft, Sundance Audience Award–winning debut.

Over a never-ending Cypriot summer, mischievous 11-year-old Iris has all the freedom she could want. With a mother who’s always working and an older brother who has a brand new girlfriend, she’s left to her own devices, and takes the opportunity to run wild. When Iris ends up in a police station, the only one to bail her out is her estranged father, Aris (Christos Passalis, Dogtooth, MIFF 2009), unexpectedly back in town and in her life. These two misfits soon find that they’re a lot alike, striking a deal to work – or more specifically, hustle – together.

With echoes of Peter Bogdanovich’s 1973 classic Paper Moon and recent MIFF favourites Aftersun (MIFF 2022) and Scrapper (MIFF 2023), Myrsini Aristidou’s impressive debut is a poignant riff on the young-father/daughter dynamic as well as a study of two charismatic, complicated characters. Bolstered by brilliant images of the Mediterranean, evocative sound design and a perfectly tuned score from Alex Weston (The Farewell, MIFF 2019), Hold Onto Me is a work of heady atmosphere and heartfelt emotion.
synopsis_zh:
一个小女孩在坑蒙拐骗的小生意中与不着调的父亲重新建立联结。这部处女作摄影优美、情感细腻，斩获圣丹斯电影节观众奖。

在仿佛没有尽头的塞浦路斯夏日里，古灵精怪的11岁女孩伊丽丝拥有她想要的一切自由。母亲总在工作，哥哥刚交了新女友，没人管束的她乐得撒野。直到伊丽丝进了警局，唯一来保释她的，是久未谋面的父亲阿里斯（克里斯托斯·帕萨利斯，《狗牙》，2009年墨尔本电影节）——他意外回到镇上，也重新回到她的生活里。这对格格不入的父女很快发现彼此何其相似，于是达成协议携手“做生意”——更准确地说，是一起行骗。

影片令人想起彼得·博格丹诺维奇1973年的经典《纸月亮》，以及近年墨尔本电影节的口碑之作《晒后假日》（2022）和《小家伙》（2023）。米尔西妮·阿里斯提杜这部令人惊艳的处女作，既是对年轻父亲与女儿关系的动人变奏，也是对两个魅力十足又满身缺点的人物的深入刻画。地中海的绚烂影像、富有质感的声音设计，以及亚历克斯·韦斯顿（《别告诉她》，2019年墨尔本电影节）恰到好处的配乐，共同成就了这部氛围醉人、情感真挚的作品。
highlight_zh: 圣丹斯观众奖处女作，塞浦路斯夏日版《纸月亮》父女行骗记

title_en: Hollywood Heretic: The Many Faces of Kim Novak
title_zh: 好莱坞异类：金·诺瓦克的千面人生
synopsis_en:
Take a deeper look at the life of actor Kim Novak with MIFF Senior Programmer Kate Fitzpatrick, Critics Campus mentor and writer Philippa Hawker, and Melbourne Cinémathèque co-curator and lecturer Eloise Ross.

To celebrate the work of screen icon Kim Novak and the six films screening in the Kim Novak: Hollywood Heretic strand, the panel will share some of their personal favourite performances and iconic moments from her life through clips and commentary. They’ll also look back at her storied career, diving into her early appearance in The Man With the Golden Arm, legendary performances in Vertigo and Bell, Book and Candle opposite James Stewart in the same year, through to lesser-known but no less stunning roles in Middle of the Night, Strangers When We Meet and The Legend of Lylah Clare. They’ll look at the struggles Novak faced coming up in the studio system: fighting to keep her name, protesting at being underpaid, her position among peers and her uneasy relationship with her craft. Come learn about her filmography before meeting the woman herself in the documentary Kim Novak’s Vertigo.

Kate Fitzpatrick is a film programmer and general doer of no good. At MIFF, she programs new features, retrospectives and XR, and curates the MIFF Schools section of the program.

Philippa Hawker is a writer on film and the arts whose recent writing has appeared in Inside Story, The Saturday Paper, Rough Cut and Australian Book Review. She was formerly a film reviewer and arts writer at The Age, film writer at The Australian, literary editor at The Sunday Herald and editor at Cinema Papers, and taught creative writing at RMIT and the School of Studies in the Arts at the Victorian College of the Arts. She is working on a book about Jean-Pierre Léaud.

Eloise Ross is a lecturer in Film and Television at Swinburne University, occasional radio broadcaster and regular contributor to Blu-ray release special features. Her PhD specialised in Hollywood history and sound studies. She is a co-curator of the Melbourne Cinémathèque and a co-owner of the Theatre Royal Castlemaine.

This event has a ‘Pay What You Wish’ ticket option. This means that if you are not in a position to pay for your ticket but would like to attend this event, you can simply enter an amount over $0 you feel comfortable paying and select the number of tickets you would like to book. If you are not in a position to pay for your tickets, please select the Talk Free option.
synopsis_zh:
跟随 MIFF 资深策展人 Kate Fitzpatrick、影评人训练营导师及作家 Philippa Hawker，以及墨尔本电影资料馆联合策展人、大学讲师 Eloise Ross，一同深入了解演员金·诺瓦克的一生。

为致敬银幕偶像金·诺瓦克，并配合「金·诺瓦克：好莱坞异类」单元展映的六部影片，三位嘉宾将通过影片片段与现场讲评，分享各自最爱的诺瓦克表演与她人生中的经典时刻。她们还将回顾她传奇的演艺生涯：从早期出演《金臂人》，到同一年与詹姆斯·斯图尔特搭档的《迷魂记》和《夺情记》中的传奇演出，再到《深夜》《陌路相逢》《丽拉·克莱尔传奇》等知名度稍逊却同样惊艳的角色。她们也会谈到诺瓦克在片厂制度下的挣扎：为保住自己的名字而抗争、抗议片酬过低、她在同辈中的位置，以及她与表演这门手艺之间微妙而紧张的关系。先来了解她的作品，再在纪录片《金·诺瓦克的迷魂记》中与她本人相见。

Kate Fitzpatrick 是电影策展人，自嘲「不干正事专家」。她在 MIFF 负责新片、回顾展与 XR 单元的选片，并策划 MIFF 学校放映单元。

Philippa Hawker 是电影与艺术领域的作家，近期文章见于 Inside Story、The Saturday Paper、Rough Cut 与 Australian Book Review。她曾任《世纪报》影评人及艺术记者、《澳大利亚人报》电影记者、《星期日先驱报》文学编辑及 Cinema Papers 编辑，并曾在皇家墨尔本理工大学和维多利亚艺术学院教授创意写作。她目前正在撰写一本关于让-皮埃尔·利奥德的书。

Eloise Ross 是斯威本大学影视专业讲师，偶尔主持电台节目，常为蓝光碟花絮特辑撰稿。她的博士研究方向为好莱坞历史与声音研究。她是墨尔本电影资料馆联合策展人，也是卡斯尔梅恩皇家剧院的共同所有人。

本活动提供「随心付」购票选项：如果你暂时无力支付票价但希望参加，只需输入任意高于 0 澳元、你觉得合适的金额并选择票数即可。如果完全无法付费，请选择免费讲座（Talk Free）选项。
highlight_zh: 三位策展人与影评人带你走近《迷魂记》女神金·诺瓦克的传奇与抗争

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains archival footage of war and conflict; distressing scenes

Drawing on thousands of films and TV shows about the Holocaust, this gripping, rigorously crafted supercut queries the ethics of representing atrocity.

“Fiction is a transgression,” stated Claude Lanzmann, maker of the definitive Holocaust documentary, Shoah (MIFF 1987), in reference to Schindler’s List. “It is my belief that the depiction of certain things is prohibited.” And yet, World War II – and, at its core, the mass murder that was perpetrated by the Nazis – remains the most popular historical subject in cinema. Michal Kosakowski’s found-footage essay film takes Lanzmann’s famous statement as its provocative point of departure, assembling clips culled from a corpus of more than 3000 narrative works – from Rome, Open City to Inglourious Basterds – to reveal both the constants and the contradictions of this genre.

A Polish-German filmmaker and artist, Kosakowski previously used a similar but almost inverted approach to the representation of tragedy in his experimental 2006 short Just Like the Movies, which is composed of clips from films whose images, in retrospect, seem to anticipate the September 11 attacks. With Holofiction, Kosawkowski offers a compelling meditation on the not-always-harmonious relationship between history, memory and media – one that resonates far beyond the events depicted on screen.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含有战争与冲突的历史影像资料；部分场景令人不适。

本片取材自数千部关于大屠杀的电影与电视剧，以一部扣人心弦、匠心独运的混剪之作，叩问再现暴行的伦理边界。

"虚构是一种僭越，"权威大屠杀纪录片《浩劫》（Shoah，1987 年墨尔本电影节展映）的导演克劳德·朗兹曼在谈及《辛德勒的名单》时如是说，"我坚信，某些事物的再现是被禁止的。"然而，第二次世界大战——及其核心，纳粹所犯下的种族屠杀——始终是电影中最热门的历史题材。米哈尔·科萨科夫斯基的这部拾得影像论文电影，正是以朗兹曼这句著名论断为其充满挑衅意味的出发点，从三千余部叙事作品中撷取片段——从《罗马，不设防的城市》到《无耻混蛋》——由此揭示这一类型片中恒定不变的成规与自相矛盾之处。

作为一名波兰裔德籍电影人与艺术家，科萨科夫斯基曾在其 2006 年的实验短片《恰如电影》中，以一种相似却几近相反的路径处理悲剧的再现——该片全由若干电影片段组成，这些画面事后看来仿佛预言了 9·11 袭击。而在《浩劫虚构》中，科萨科夫斯基就历史、记忆与媒介之间并不总是和谐的关系，献上一场引人深思的沉思——其回响远远超越了银幕上所呈现的那些事件。
highlight_zh: 三千部大屠杀影片混剪，叩问再现暴行的伦理

title_en: How to Divorce During the War
synopsis_en:
A collapsing marriage collides with geopolitical catastrophe to breathtaking effect in this satirical, Sundance-awarded exploration of identity and hypocrisy.
