It’s 2022. In Vilnius, Lithuania, successful executive and breadwinner Marija tells her unemployed filmmaker husband Vytas she wants a divorce. He’s blindsided; she’s resolute. Tomorrow, they’ll inform their daughter. But they wake the next morning to the news that Russia has invaded Ukraine, and their private crisis is suddenly enveloped by a much larger political one. As Marija evicts Vytas in favour of a refugee family and Vytas moves back in with his Russophile parents, the former couple must navigate their new individualities – are they good people? What do they stand for? – as they simultaneously reckon with their country’s compounding existential dread.

Andrius Blaževičius’s wry film offers a masterclass in visual storytelling: it’s little wonder he walked away from Sundance with the World Cinema Dramatic section’s Directing Award. With precision, he threads the tension between comfort and conflict through every strand of the story’s DNA, continually testing Vytas’s and Marija’s moral convictions. Marius Repšys’s and Žygimantė Elena Jakštaitė’s outstanding performances underscore the ironies of their actions, while the deadpan script, off-kilter score and coolly detached cinematography combine to solidify a sense of growing unease that makes How to Divorce During the War both timely and universally resonant.
synopsis_zh:
一段濒临破碎的婚姻与一场地缘政治灾难迎面相撞，迸发出惊人的戏剧张力。这部斩获圣丹斯奖项的讽刺之作，借此深入叩问身份认同与人性虚伪。

时值2022年，立陶宛维尔纽斯。事业有成、身为家庭经济支柱的玛丽娅，向失业的电影人丈夫维塔斯提出离婚。他措手不及，她去意已决。他们本打算次日一同告知女儿，却在清晨醒来时听到俄罗斯入侵乌克兰的消息——两人的私人危机骤然被一场更为庞大的政治风暴所吞没。玛丽娅赶走维塔斯，腾出住处收留一户难民家庭，维塔斯则搬回亲俄父母的家中。曾经的夫妻二人不得不各自面对全新的身份处境——我们是好人吗？我们究竟为何而立？——与此同时，还要直面整个国家日益深重的生存焦虑。

安德留斯·布拉热维丘斯这部辛辣的影片堪称视觉叙事的典范，也难怪他凭此摘得圣丹斯电影节世界剧情片单元最佳导演奖。他以精准的笔触，将安逸与冲突之间的张力编织进故事的每一根脉络，不断拷问维塔斯与玛丽娅的道德信念。马里乌斯·雷普希斯与日基曼特·埃莱娜·雅克什泰特的精湛演出，凸显出角色行为中的种种反讽；而冷面幽默的剧本、别扭失谐的配乐与冷静疏离的摄影相互交织，共同酿出一种步步逼近的不安氛围，令《战时离婚指南》既紧贴时代脉搏，又引发普世共鸣。
highlight_zh: 圣丹斯最佳导演奖，战火中拷问婚姻与人性的辛辣黑色喜剧

synopsis_en:
Bratislava’s fountains have had enough, spitting back with dry wit at the slow erosion of civic culture and making a spirited case for great public design.

Once the bubbling heart of public gathering places, Bratislava’s neglected water features now sit empty, dry and sidelined, while billboards promise shinier visions of culture to come. Giving the city’s fountains a voice, Eva Sajanová’s playful short blends stop motion, sharp urban observation and a splashy retro synth score into a witty lament for the shared spaces we allow to disappear.
synopsis_zh:
布拉迪斯拉发的喷泉受够了，它们以冷面幽默反唇相讥，抗议城市公共文化的缓慢流失，并为出色的公共设计慷慨陈词。

这些喷泉曾是公共聚集地欢腾涌动的心脏，如今却遭到冷落，干涸、空置、无人问津，而广告牌上还在许诺一个更光鲜的文化未来。伊娃·萨亚诺娃这部俏皮的短片赋予城中喷泉以声音，将定格动画、犀利的城市观察与一段活泼的复古合成器配乐糅合在一起，为那些被我们任其消逝的公共空间，谱写了一曲妙趣横生的挽歌。
highlight_zh: 定格动画＋复古合成器，喷泉开口吐槽城市公共文化流失

synopsis_en:
A Bangkok HR manager keeps her pregnancy secret from both her employers and her husband in this sly study of corporate culture.

HR manager Fren is so busy navigating the complexities of her corporate role that she’s not sure if she should tell her own partner – let alone her employers – that she’s pregnant. As she screens job applicants, manages competing workplace personalities and tries to be a supportive spouse to a frustrating husband, Fren begins to wonder whether this unfeeling metropolis populated with people trapped in soul-crushing, screen-centric jobs is a world that she even wants to bring a child into.

Premiering in Venice’s Orizzonti section, Human Resource received a special award for its exploration of work and environmental issues. Though set in the specific environs of Bangkok, there’s a globally relevant quality to its depiction of overly demanding workplace drudgery. Capturing the callousness with which large corporations treat their workers and the harsh realities awaiting anyone setting out on a new career, Nawapol Thamrongrattanarit’s film is a steely, thoughtful meditation on workplaces – and the place of work – in the age of late-stage capitalism.
synopsis_zh:
一位曼谷的人力资源经理向雇主和丈夫双双隐瞒了自己怀孕的消息，本片借此对企业文化展开了一场狡黠的审视。

人事经理弗伦忙于应付职场角色中的种种复杂状况，以至于她拿不准该不该把怀孕的事告诉伴侣——更别提告诉雇主了。在筛选求职者、周旋于形形色色的职场性格、努力做一个体贴妻子去包容令人心累的丈夫之余，弗伦开始怀疑：这座冷漠的大都市里挤满了被困在扼杀灵魂、终日盯着屏幕的工作中的人，这样的世界，她究竟愿不愿意把一个孩子带进来？

《人力资源》在威尼斯电影节地平线单元首映，并因对工作与环境议题的探讨获颁特别奖。影片虽然扎根于曼谷的具体环境，但它对过度苛刻的职场苦役的描绘却具有放之四海皆准的意味。纳瓦彭·坦荣拉达纳拉的这部作品捕捉了大企业对待员工的冷酷无情，以及每一个初入职场者所要面对的残酷现实，是一则冷峻而深思的沉思录，叩问的是晚期资本主义时代的职场——以及工作本身的位置。
highlight_zh: 威尼斯地平线获奖，泰国版欧丝伦德式职场黑色讽刺

title_en: I Saw the Face of God in the Jet Wash
title_zh: 我在喷流中看见了神的面孔
synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

Mark Jenkin’s most recent cinematic diary is a fascinating return to – and reckoning with – his work and cultural influences.

This 2025 work finds director Mark Jenkin, a quarter-century and a trio of acclaimed features into his career, in a reflective mood. He returns to his cine-diary and to the Cornwall locations that inspired Enys Men (MIFF 2022), and muses on the influences that have shaped him as an artist. In a series of super-8 shots and accompanying voiceover, he considers the liminal spaces that define the life of a working filmmaker, ponders decades of cultural history and – of course – turns his thoughts towards the sea.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片含频闪影像。

马克·詹金最新的这部影像日记，是一次令人着迷的回望——回到他的创作本身，也回到塑造他的文化影响，并与之对话。

这部2025年的作品，让入行已四分之一世纪、拍出三部广受赞誉长片的导演马克·詹金陷入沉思。他重拾自己的电影日记，重返曾启发《宁灵岛》（2022年墨尔本国际电影节）的康沃尔外景地，回味那些将他塑造成艺术家的种种影响。在一组超8毫米胶片镜头与旁白之中，他思索着界定职业电影人生活的那些临界空间，回望数十年的文化历史，并——一如既往地——把思绪投向大海。
highlight_zh: 《宁灵岛》导演马克·詹金的胶片影像日记，回望创作本源

title_en: I See Buildings Fall Like Lightning
title_zh: 我看见高楼如闪电崩塌
synopsis_en:
Five working-class Gen Z friends drift apart in this deeply felt study of adulthood that won the Directors’ Fortnight Audience Award at Cannes.

Patrick, Shiv, Conor, Rian and Oli have been thick as thieves since they were kids growing up in Birmingham council towers. Now, at the end of their twenties, Shiv’s a proud mum of two, while her childhood sweetheart Patrick is a humiliated gig-economy courier and hard-partying Oli has fallen into drug dealing. On the other side of the tracks, upwardly mobile stresshead Conor runs his own construction firm, while London financier Rian languishes in lonely wealth. As the economic realities of late-stage capitalism demolish their dreams, fissures appear in their once-unbreakable friendships.

Adapting Keiran Goddard’s acclaimed novel of the same name, director Clio Barnard (The Selfish Giant, MIFF 2013) and scenarist Enda Walsh (Hunger, MIFF 2008) compassionately observe their young characters’ social-realist dilemmas, while leads Daryl McCormack (Good Luck to You, Leo Grande), Joe Cole, Jay Lycurgo and reunited Say Nothing breakouts Lola Petticrew (Tuesday, MIFF 2024) and Anthony Boyle deliver poignant, lived-in performances.
synopsis_zh:
五个工人阶级出身的 Z 世代好友渐行渐远——这部关于成年之痛的深情之作，斩获戛纳导演双周单元观众奖。

帕特里克、希芙、康纳、里安和奥利从小在伯明翰的廉租公寓楼里一起长大，情同手足。如今年近三十，希芙已是两个孩子骄傲的母亲，她的青梅竹马帕特里克却沦为受尽屈辱的零工快递员，终日纵情狂欢的奥利则陷入贩毒的泥潭。而在另一头，一心向上、压力缠身的康纳经营着自己的建筑公司，身在伦敦的金融从业者里安则在孤独的财富中日渐消沉。当晚期资本主义的经济现实碾碎他们的梦想，曾经牢不可破的友情也开始出现裂痕。

影片改编自基兰·戈达德广受赞誉的同名小说，导演克里奥·巴纳德（《自私的巨人》，2013 年墨尔本电影节）与编剧恩达·沃尔什（《饥饿》，2008 年墨尔本电影节）以悲悯的目光凝视这群年轻人在社会写实困境中的挣扎。主演达里尔·麦考马克（《善意的谎言》）、乔·科尔、杰·莱克格斯，以及在《什么都别说》中崭露头角、再度携手的萝拉·佩蒂克鲁（《星期二》，2024 年墨尔本电影节）与安东尼·博伊尔，共同奉献了细腻动人、真实可感的表演。
highlight_zh: 戛纳导演双周观众奖，Z世代青年在阶级裂缝中散场的青春挽歌

synopsis_en:
In its Australian-premiering 4K restoration, Mary Harron’s fictionalised portrait of radical-feminist avenger Valerie Solanas still aims truly at manufactured cool and exploitative notoriety.

On 3 June 1968, writer Valerie Solanas (Lili Taylor) walks into Andy Warhol’s Factory, points a handgun at the art superstar and fires three times. Previously, Valerie has been introduced – along with her notorious man-hating polemic, the SCUM Manifesto – to the Factory demimonde. She sees fellow iconoclasts; Warhol sees satirical performance art; Olympia Press publisher Maurice Girodias sees profitable controversy. But Valerie’s abusive past has made her both urgently ambitious and hyper-alert to exploitation, and she suspects that Girodias has been conspiring against her with Warhol – who becomes, in her eyes, a valid target for her rage.

Many debates about gender and celebrity have raged since Mary Harron’s astonishing debut feature screened at MIFF 1996, but the complex agency the film grants its protagonist still blows most biopics away. Harron meticulously researched Warhol’s Factory in consultation with its key living figures; but rather than further mythologising its glamour, she emphasises the hollowness of its artifice – a theme she’d revisit in her stylish American Psycho (MIFF 2000). Featuring a score by avant-garde legend John Cale and a stunning cast including Jared Harris, Martha Plimpton and Michael Imperioli – as well as indie band Yo La Tengo standing in for The Velvet Underground – I Shot Andy Warhol returns after a long absence from screens as a vivid, timely provocation.
synopsis_zh:
在这部澳大利亚首映的 4K 修复版中，玛丽·哈伦为激进女权主义复仇者瓦莱丽·索拉纳斯描摹的这幅虚构肖像，依旧精准地刺向那被人为制造的时髦光环与靠剥削博取的恶名。

1968 年 6 月 3 日，作家瓦莱丽·索拉纳斯（莉莉·泰勒 饰）走进安迪·沃霍尔的"工厂"，举起手枪对准这位艺术巨星连开三枪。此前，瓦莱丽已带着她那篇臭名昭著的仇男檄文《人渣宣言》，踏入了"工厂"这个半明半暗的圈子。她视身边众人为志同道合的反叛者；沃霍尔却把她当成讽刺性的行为艺术；奥林匹亚出版社的莫里斯·吉罗迪亚斯则嗅到了可牟利的争议。然而屡遭欺凌的过往，让瓦莱丽既急于出人头地，又对被利用极度敏感——她怀疑吉罗迪亚斯正与沃霍尔合谋算计自己，于是沃霍尔在她眼中，成了她怒火理所应当的宣泄对象。

自玛丽·哈伦这部惊艳的长片处女作在 1996 年墨尔本国际电影节放映以来，围绕性别与名声的争论从未停歇，但影片赋予主人公的那份复杂能动性，至今仍令绝大多数传记片望尘莫及。哈伦曾走访沃霍尔"工厂"仍在世的核心人物，对其做了一丝不苟的考据；但她没有进一步神化那份浮华，反而着力揭示其虚饰之下的空洞——这一主题她后来又在风格凌厉的《美国精神病人》（2000 年墨尔本国际电影节）中重访。影片由先锋派传奇约翰·凯尔配乐，云集贾里德·哈里斯、玛莎·普林顿与迈克尔·因佩里奥利等出色演员，并由独立乐队 Yo La Tengo 出演"地下丝绒"乐队。久违银幕之后，《我杀了安迪·沃霍尔》以一记鲜活而应景的挑衅重返人间。
highlight_zh: 4K修复重返银幕，凌厉重现枪击沃霍尔的女权复仇者

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

In a rollicking return for queer provocateur Gregg Araki, an adorable Gen Z art assistant finds wild erotic joy in submitting to his insatiable boss.

Elliot starts working for debauched artist Erika Tracy, who foxed the fine-art world into intellectualising her giant papier-mâché phalluses and labial canvases. She immediately grooms her wide-eyed young assistant as her submissive muse, awakening his nascent appetites. Dazzled by the pleasures of pegging, handcuffs, ball gags and pig masks, Elliot shares all the steamy tea with his horny gay co-worker and his repressed housemate. But nine-and-a-half weeks of candy-coloured erotic mayhem later, Elliot’s in pink lingerie and in trouble with the law …

Queer punk provocateur Gregg Araki (Mysterious Skin, MIFF 2005) titillated Sundance 2026 with his first big-screen outing since 2014: a delirious dom-com that’s a raunchy blast for everyone, teasing Gen Z with the fun they’re missing while also satirising the Teen Apocalypse Trilogy auteur’s own permissive cultural sphere. Delightful as the down-for-anything Elliot, Cooper Hoffman (Licorice Pizza) sparks with Olivia Wilde (Don’t Worry Darling; Drinking Buddies, MIFF 2013), whose Erika is a hilariously unhinged mix of Norma Desmond, Miranda Priestly and Maude Lebowski. Joining this game cast are Daveed Diggs, Margaret Cho, Johnny Knoxville, Chase Sui Wonders and Charli xcx (Erupcja, MIFF 2026), playing against type as Elliot’s uptight med student girlfriend.
synopsis_zh:
酷儿挑衅者格雷格·阿拉基强势回归，一名可爱的 Z 世代艺术助理在臣服于欲壑难填的老板时，�find到了狂野的情欲快感。

艾略特开始为放荡不羁的艺术家艾丽卡·特雷西工作——正是她用巨型纸浆阳具和阴唇画布把整个艺术界唬得一愣一愣，逼着大家去做学理解读。她立刻把这个天真烂漫的年轻助理调教成自己俯首帖耳的缪斯，唤醒了他初萌的欲望。在角色反攻、手铐、口塞和猪面具带来的快感里目眩神迷之余，艾略特把这些香艳猛料一股脑儿讲给同样欲火中烧的男同事和那位压抑克制的室友听。可在这场糖果色的情欲狂欢闹腾了九周半之后，艾略特却穿着粉色情趣内衣、惹上了官司……

酷儿朋克挑衅者格雷格·阿拉基（《神秘肌肤》,2005 年 MIFF）以自 2014 年以来的首部大银幕作品撩拨了 2026 年圣丹斯电影节：这是一部令人晕眩的“支配喜剧”，荤味十足、老少咸宜，一边逗弄 Z 世代错过了多少乐子，一边又戏谑这位《青春末日三部曲》作者自己那片放纵的文化土壤。库珀·霍夫曼（《甘草披萨》）把百无禁忌的艾略特演得妙趣横生，与奥利维亚·王尔德（《别担心亲爱的》；《醉乡伴侣》，2013 年 MIFF）火花四溅——她饰演的艾丽卡是诺玛·戴斯蒙、米兰达·普利斯特里与莫德·勒博斯基三者荒诞不经的爆笑混合体。加盟这支活力四射的卡司阵容的还有达维德·迪格斯、赵牡丹、约翰尼·诺克斯维尔、蔡思·苏·旺德斯，以及一反戏路、饰演艾略特刻板拘谨的医学生女友的 Charli xcx（《喷发》，2026 年 MIFF）。
highlight_zh: 阿拉基阔别十二年回归，奥利维亚·王尔德爆笑颠覆演出

synopsis_en:
When a lost little boy is found, his father is sceptical that it’s really him. But don’t be fooled – this mind-bender isn’t really about changelings or revenants.

New York cop Paul hasn’t been the same since a near-fatal gunshot injury. Together with their baby, Theo, he and his wife Marie move to a quiet suburb in the hope of reviving their failing marriage. But after Theo vanishes mysteriously at his own first birthday party, an odd neighbour – who seems somehow connected to their house – tells the distraught parents about a cave that can “give back things you have lost”. Venturing into the darkness, Marie re-emerges with Theo, having lost all memory of what happened inside the cave. Paul begins to suspect that whatever she’s brought back, it isn’t their son …

Writer/director Caleb J. Phillips won SXSW’s Midnight Shorts Jury Award in 2019 for Other Side of the Box. This, his feature debut, also premiered at SXSW, offering a surprisingly speculative twist on a horror trope you thought you knew. Jessica Rothe (Happy Death Day) stuns in a wrenching, primal performance as the increasingly erratic Marie, while Charlie Barnett (Russian Doll) holds compassion for the otherwise off-puttingly selfish, passive Paul. Shrewd yet slippery, Imposters suggests a true self is whatever we can live with.
synopsis_zh:
当走失的小男孩被找回，他的父亲却怀疑这是否真的是自己的儿子。但别被表象迷惑——这部烧脑之作真正讲的并不是什么被掉包的孩子或死而复生的亡魂。

纽约警察保罗在一次险些致命的枪伤后，就再也不是从前的自己了。他和妻子玛丽带着幼子西奥搬到一处静谧的郊区，希望借此挽救濒临破碎的婚姻。然而，就在西奥的周岁生日派对上，孩子离奇失踪。一位古怪的邻居——似乎与他们的房子有着某种莫名的关联——告诉这对悲痛欲绝的父母，附近有一个山洞，能够“归还你失去的东西”。玛丽独自走进那片黑暗，再出来时怀里已抱着西奥，却对洞中所发生的一切失去了全部记忆。保罗开始怀疑，无论她带回来的是什么，那都不是他们的儿子……

编剧兼导演卡莱布·J·菲利普斯曾凭借《盒子的另一边》斩获2019年西南偏南电影节午夜单元短片评审团奖。这部长片处女作同样在西南偏南首映，为一个你自以为熟知的恐怖套路，带来了出人意料的思辨式反转。杰西卡·罗德（《忌日快乐》）贡献了一段撕心裂肺、原始而生猛的表演，饰演日渐失控的玛丽；查理·巴内特（《俄罗斯玩偶》）则为原本自私、消极、令人反感的保罗注入了一份悲悯。既精明又难以捉摸，《冒名者》暗示：所谓真正的自我，不过是我们能够与之共存的那一个。
highlight_zh: 《忌日快乐》女主领衔，西南偏南首映的烧脑恐怖片

synopsis_en:
Take a masterclass with visiting filmmaker Tamra Davis exploring her directorial career, from iconic music videos to Crossroads, from Billy Madison to Basquiat, and now to her own 90s past in The Best Summer. Hosted by Kate Jinx.

Visiting MIFF from Los Angeles with her new documentary The Best Summer – made from archival footage she filmed in Australia while on the 1995–96 Summersault festival tour – Tamra will spend an hour speaking about her incredibly varied career to date. Having made a name for herself directing music videos for a litany of musical luminaries such as Sonic Youth (‘Bull in the Heather’; ‘Kool Thing’), The Smiths (‘Shoplifters of the World Unite’; ‘Sheila Take a Bow’), Young MC (‘Bust a Move’) and Bette Midler (‘From a Distance’), Davis has gone on to make nine feature films. Her directorial credits include Guncrazy (1994), starring Drew Barrymore; Adam Sandler breakout Billy Madison (1995); Britney Spears road-trip feature Crossroads (2022); and Netflix’s 13: The Musical (2022), as well as episodes for Grey’s Anatomy and Dead to Me. Previously, her acclaimed documentary Jean-Michel Basquiat: The Radiant Child premiered at the Sundance Film Festival in 2010, where she returned in 2026 to premiere The Best Summer.

Kate Jinx is a writer, critic and film curator. She is a Senior Programmer at the Melbourne International Film Festival, film critic for The Monthly, founding program director of Sydney’s Golden Age Cinema and host of the culture podcast See Also.
synopsis_zh:
跟随到访影人塔姆拉·戴维斯（Tamra Davis）上一堂大师课，回顾她多元跨界的导演生涯——从标志性的音乐录影带到《十字路口》，从《比利·麦迪逊》到《巴斯奇亚》，再到如今这部回望她自己九十年代过往的《最美的夏天》。本场由凯特·金克斯（Kate Jinx）主持。

戴维斯从洛杉矶带着新纪录片《最美的夏天》来到 MIFF——影片取材自她 1995–96 年随 Summersault 音乐节巡演在澳大利亚拍下的档案影像。她将用一小时畅谈自己迄今丰富多彩的创作历程。她最初以音乐录影带崭露头角，为一众乐坛名家掌镜，包括音速青年（《Bull in the Heather》《Kool Thing》）、史密斯乐队（《Shoplifters of the World Unite》《Sheila Take a Bow》）、Young MC（《Bust a Move》）和贝特·米德勒（《From a Distance》）。此后她执导了九部长片，作品包括由德鲁·巴里摩尔主演的《枪疯》（1994）、亚当·桑德勒的成名作《比利·麦迪逊》（1995）、布兰妮·斯皮尔斯的公路电影《十字路口》（2022），以及 Netflix 的《13：音乐剧》（2022），还执导过《实习医生格蕾》和《消消气》的剧集。此前，她广受好评的纪录片《让-米歇尔·巴斯奇亚：光芒之子》于 2010 年在圣丹斯电影节首映，2026 年她再度回到圣丹斯，为《最美的夏天》举行首映。

凯特·金克斯是作家、影评人兼电影策展人。她是墨尔本国际电影节高级策展人、《The Monthly》影评人、悉尼 Golden Age Cinema 的创始节目总监，也是文化播客《See Also》的主持人。
highlight_zh: 《巴斯奇亚》《十字路口》导演现场大师课，畅谈跨界生涯

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

A Ukrainian couple clear rubble from their devastated home as their reality begins to distort.

After Russian forces retreat, Heorhiy and Yaryna return to their home and work to repair the damage; their trauma lingers like the danger hidden beneath the fridge. Engrossingly suspenseful, Roman Volosevych’s short is also a movingly humane testament to the ordinary Ukrainians whose lives the Russian invasion has destroyed.
synopsis_zh:
一对乌克兰夫妇清理着被战火摧毁的家园，眼前的现实却开始悄然扭曲。

俄军撤退后，赫奥尔希与雅琳娜回到家中，动手修补残破的一切；创伤如同藏在冰箱下的危险，久久萦绕不散。罗曼·沃洛谢维奇的这部短片悬念丛生、扣人心弦，同时也是一曲饱含人文关怀的挽歌，献给那些被俄罗斯入侵摧毁了生活的普通乌克兰人。
highlight_zh: 乌克兰战火下的家园，悬念与人文并重的短片

synopsis_en:
On a scarcely inhabited Scottish island, a visiting bureaucrat attempts to wrangle a pair of eccentric siblings in this charmingly off-kilter Sundance award-winning comedy.

Adult siblings Isla and Sandy have lived their entire lives on a remote and otherwise uninhabited Orkney island. Decades ago, before he died, their father warned them about “incomers” from the mainland; thus, apart from hunting seabirds and communing with imaginary beasts, the siblings spend their days training to fend off invaders. But when awkward government official Daniel is dispatched to evict the pair, nothing goes quite to plan.

Winning the Innovator Award in Sundance’s NEXT program for new filmmaking talent, The Incomer heralds writer/director Louis Paxton as an excitingly fresh voice in cinema. With a keen eye for the picturesque vistas of the northern Scottish environment where he spent his childhood and shot this film, Paxton mines the mysterious magic of the landscape – its beauty, decay and embedded mythology – as a key part of his storytelling, hilariously brought to life by a superb cast. House of the Dragon’s Gayle Rankin deserves special mention for the audacity of her performance as Isla, but Grant O’Rourke (Outlander), Domhnall Gleeson, John Hannah and Michelle Gomez are also magnificent. With quirky wit and heartwarming pathos, The Incomer is a smart and absurd crowdpleaser about the importance of remaining true to oneself.
synopsis_zh:
在一座人迹罕至的苏格兰小岛上，一位前来公干的官僚试图管束一对古怪的兄妹——这部在圣丹斯电影节斩获奖项的喜剧，透着一股迷人的荒诞劲儿。

成年兄妹伊斯拉和桑迪一辈子都生活在偏远荒僻、别无他人的奥克尼小岛上。几十年前，他们的父亲临终前警告二人要提防大陆来的“外乡人”；于是，除了猎捕海鸟、与想象中的野兽为伴，兄妹俩每天都在操练如何击退入侵者。可当笨拙的政府官员丹尼尔奉命前来驱逐这两人时，事情的发展全然出乎所有人的意料。

凭借本片，编剧兼导演路易斯·帕克斯顿荣获圣丹斯电影节专为新锐影人设立的 NEXT 单元“创新者奖”，一举成为影坛令人眼前一亮的新声音。帕克斯顿在苏格兰北部度过童年，也在这里拍下本片，他以敏锐的目光捕捉当地如画的风光，深入挖掘这片土地神秘的魔力——它的秀美、它的凋敝、以及深植其间的神话传说——将其作为叙事的关键，并由一众出色的演员妙趣横生地演绎出来。《龙之家族》的盖尔·兰金饰演的伊斯拉大胆张扬，尤其值得一提；格兰特·奥罗克（《古战场传奇》）、多姆纳尔·格里森、约翰·汉纳与米歇尔·戈麦斯同样光彩夺目。凭借古怪的机锋与暖人心扉的情感，《外乡人》是一部聪明而荒诞、老少咸宜的佳作，讲述了忠于自我的可贵。
highlight_zh: 圣丹斯获奖处女作，《龙之家族》兰金领衔的苏格兰荒诞喜剧

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

Overlapping highways become a tableau of automotive lunacy.

In this striking short from veteran US filmmaker Peter Rose, the familiar sights and sounds of the continental highway are overlaid to mesmerising effect, as vehicles zip back and forth across the screen and lights form an incantatory illusion.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片含频闪影像。

交错纵横的高速公路，化作一幅汽车狂想的画卷。

在这部出自美国资深影像艺术家彼得·罗斯之手的惊艳短片中，那些我们再熟悉不过的公路景象与声响被层层叠加，营造出令人目眩神迷的效果——车辆在银幕上往复穿梭，灯光交织成一场如咒语般的幻境。
highlight_zh: 美国实验影像大师彼得·罗斯，把高速公路拍成一场频闪幻境

synopsis_en:
This wistful, warm-hearted winner of the prestigious GdA Director’s Award at Venice follows a young man making the bittersweet choice to leave his home city of Tehran.

Whizzing through Tehran on his bicycle, Amir is preoccupied by a decision he’s been avoiding. His plan is to emigrate to Italy to join his girlfriend, Tara, who has already moved there to study; but he remains torn between staying in the city he’s known all his life and leaving it all behind for a new adventure. As he awaits visa approval, Amir visits his uncle, plays poker with his buddies and replays memories from his relationship with Tara. Meanwhile, his life-changing decision looms, and the distance between him and Tara weighs heavier on his heart.

Writer/director Amir Azizi won two awards at the Venice International Film Festival – including the top prize in the festival’s Giornate degli Autori section – for this humanistic portrayal of a young man at a crossroads. Spotlighting the beauty in the everyday, Inside Amir poignantly captures a side of Tehran that we rarely see depicted, as well as a feeling that will resonate with anyone who’s ever moved far from home.
synopsis_zh:
这部温情而怅惘的影片荣获威尼斯电影节颇具分量的作者电影日最佳导演奖，讲述一个年轻人做出苦乐参半的决定——离开他的故乡德黑兰。

阿米尔骑着自行车穿行于德黑兰的大街小巷，心里始终萦绕着一个他一直在回避的决定。他打算移民意大利，去与已经先行赴意求学的女友塔拉团聚；然而在留守这座他生活了一辈子的城市，还是抛下一切奔赴全新冒险之间，他始终举棋不定。在等待签证批复的日子里，阿米尔去探望叔叔，和哥们儿打牌，一遍遍回味着他与塔拉相恋的点滴。与此同时，那个足以改变人生的决定步步逼近，他与塔拉之间的距离也越来越沉重地压在心头。

凭借这部对身处人生十字路口的年轻人充满人文关怀的刻画，编剧兼导演阿米尔·阿齐兹在威尼斯国际电影节斩获两项大奖，其中包括电影节作者电影日单元的最高荣誉。《阿米尔的抉择》聚焦日常生活中的美好，动人地捕捉了一个我们鲜少在银幕上见到的德黑兰侧影，也道出了每一个曾远离家乡的人都会为之共鸣的心绪。
highlight_zh: 威尼斯作者电影日双奖得主，献给德黑兰的深情情书

synopsis_en:
Festival hits, dynamic stories and discoveries from across the globe.

Your window on the short-form cinematic world, including films about a genderqueer photographer returning to their hometown Chinese village, a femme-presenting son confronting violence in Nigeria and a deadpan, Lanthimos-esque satire set in a Greek luxury hotel. Plus, the insanity of Danish bros who roll the dice on ever-riskier dares.
synopsis_zh:
汇聚各大电影节口碑之作、充满张力的故事，以及来自全球的新锐发现。

这是你窥见短片世界的一扇窗：一位性别酷儿摄影师重返中国家乡的村庄；一个阴柔气质的儿子在尼日利亚直面暴力；还有一部冷面幽默、兰斯莫斯式的讽刺短片，故事发生在希腊的一家奢华酒店。此外，还有一群丹麦兄弟在层层加码、愈发危险的赌局中一路癫狂到底。
highlight_zh: 环球短片精选，兰斯莫斯式冷幽默与酷儿叙事并陈

synopsis_en:
A selection of the world’s brightest and bravest short-form storytelling.

A Chinese man wanders through a dystopian simulacrum of a German city; a Ukrainian couple’s reality collapses in the wake of the Russian invasion; and a Palestinian woman confronts an existential threat on the road to Ramallah. Plus, catch Cannes’ Palme d’Or–winning short, a moving portrait of a young Mexican boxer.
synopsis_zh:
汇聚全球最耀眼、最勇敢的短片叙事。

一名中国男子游走于一座反乌托邦式的德国城市幻影之中；一对乌克兰恋人的生活在俄罗斯入侵后轰然崩塌；一位巴勒斯坦女子在通往拉马拉的路上直面生存的威胁。此外，还有荣获戛纳金棕榈奖的短片——一部动人的年轻墨西哥拳击手肖像。
highlight_zh: 戛纳金棕榈短片领衔，全球锐利之作

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains archival footage of war and conflict; distressing scenes

Personal memories and collective trauma, home video and news footage intertwine in a powerful portrait of a Palestinian childhood under occupation.

Shayma’ was six when the Second Intifada erupted in 2000. In voiceover addressing her mother, she recalls crisp school uniforms and birthday cakes over archival footage of endless checkpoints, tanks blocking Hebron streets and children moving through carnage and destruction. These harrowing images – reminiscent of those live-streamed today – are captured with disturbing calm, underscoring the humanity we lose when grave violence comes to seem banal.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含有战争与冲突的历史影像资料，画面令人不适。

私人记忆与集体创伤、家庭录像与新闻影像交织在一起，勾勒出一幅震撼人心的图景——一个巴勒斯坦孩童在占领之下的童年。

2000 年第二次巴勒斯坦大起义爆发时，谢玛只有六岁。在以旁白向母亲倾诉的讲述中，她回忆起笔挺的校服与生日蛋糕，而画面上却是无尽的检查站、封锁希伯伦街道的坦克，以及在杀戮与废墟中穿行的孩子们。这些令人痛心的影像——与今天被实时直播的画面如出一辙——却以一种令人不安的平静被记录下来，映照出当骇人的暴力沦为寻常，我们所失去的那份人性。
highlight_zh: 以孩童视角凝视被占领的巴勒斯坦，私人记忆与战争档案交织

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

SUPPORTED BY

Invincible Spirit explores the immense strength of a club that must be everything to its people.

In the heart of the Goulburn Murray, the Rumbalara Football and Netball Club stands as a modern-day fortress of Yorta Yorta pride, a sanctuary of cultural healing where a community fights not just for points, but for the safety and dignity of its children.
synopsis_zh:
《不屈之魂》探寻一家俱乐部所蕴藏的巨大力量——它必须成为族人生命中的一切。

在古尔本-默里河流域（Goulburn Murray）的心脏地带，朗巴拉拉橄榄球与无挡板篮球俱乐部（Rumbalara Football and Netball Club）如同一座当代堡垒，守护着约尔塔约尔塔（Yorta Yorta）民族的尊严与骄傲。这里是文化疗愈的庇护所，一个社群在此奋力争夺的，不只是赛场上的比分，更是孩子们的安全与体面。
highlight_zh: 澳洲原住民社区的球场堡垒，一部关于尊严与疗愈的动人纪录片

synopsis_en:
A revisionist western interrogating colonisation, Alonso’s beguiling historical feature reinvents itself with a mystifying final act.

Captain Gunnar Dinesen (Viggo Mortensen, Crimes of the Future, MIFF 2022) is a Danish military explorer, charting the lands of Patagonia in the late 19th century. Travelling with his teenage daughter, Ingeborg (Viilbjørk Malling Agger), Gunnar feels under constant threat from Spanish settlers, Indigenous peoples and the myth of Zuluaga, a Danish officer turned wilderness-dwelling killer. When Ingeborg disappears into the desert with a Spanish soldier, Gunnar heads after her alone. Coming face to face with both hostile men and a hostile landscape, he grows increasingly lost and desperate.

Winning the Un Certain Regard FIPRESCI Prize at Cannes and chosen as one of Cahiers du Cinéma’s top 10 films of 2015, Jauja marked Lisandro Alonso’s first work of historical cinema and his first collaboration with Mortensen. Though its vignetted corners and Academy frame give the film an antique appearance, Alonso’s fifth feature is a revisionist western that, in using genre tropes to reflect on the colonisation of Argentina, takes narrative turns as enigmatic as they are unexpected.
synopsis_zh:
一部审视殖民历史的修正主义西部片。阿隆索这部迷人的历史题材作品在扑朔迷离的终章中完成了一次自我重塑。

古纳·迪内森上尉（维果·莫腾森饰，代表作《未来罪行》，曾亮相2022年墨尔本电影节）是一位丹麦军方探险家，正在勘测19世纪末的巴塔哥尼亚土地。他带着少女般年纪的女儿英格堡（薇尔比约克·马灵·阿格尔饰）同行，时刻感到自己受到西班牙移民、原住民，以及那个关于祖鲁阿加的传说的威胁——祖鲁阿加是一名沦为荒野杀手的丹麦军官。当英格堡与一名西班牙士兵一同消失在荒漠中时，古纳独自踏上追寻之路。面对怀有敌意的人与同样凶险的旷野，他愈发迷失，愈发绝望。

《篱笆墙外》曾荣获戛纳电影节一种关注单元的费比西国际影评人奖，并入选《电影手册》2015年度十佳影片。这是利桑德罗·阿隆索首次涉足历史题材，也是他与莫腾森的首度合作。尽管暗角画面与学院画幅赋予影片一种古旧质感，但阿隆索这部第五部长片实为一部修正主义西部片——它借类型片的套路反思阿根廷的殖民历史，其叙事转折既出人意料，又谜团重重。
highlight_zh: 维果·莫腾森主演，戛纳获奖修正主义西部片，塔可夫斯基式神秘余味

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

Take a 30-year journey with the beloved Australian alternative rock band, from humble beginnings to the harder aspects of growing up.

Perth alt rockers Jebediah were a breed apart in the halcyon days of the late-90s and early-2000s Australian indie music scene. In stark contrast to the often volatile and soon-to-splinter groups they toured with, the easygoing quartet – lead singer Kevin Mitchell (aka Bob Evans), his drummer brother Brett, bassist Ness Thornton and lead guitarist Chris Daymond – stuck fast to one another. Commanding national attention on Triple J and soon channelling the cred of multiple studio albums into their own record label, Jebediah seemed like quintessential industry survivors. But as the band entered its third decade, the freewheeling lifestyle of their youth had begun to cast a shadow. With recreation shifting to addiction and connections fraying, will these lifelong friends and creative partners find a way to keep the music alive?

Built from a wealth of archival and home-movie footage ranging from the band’s humble high school beginnings through to the current day, as well as firsthand perspectives from local music icons such as Tim Rogers, Phil Jamieson and Janet English, Arlo Dean Cook’s MIFF Premiere Fund–supported documentary is a rocking roller-coaster ride and a candid cautionary tale about the price of fame.
synopsis_zh:
跟随备受喜爱的澳大利亚另类摇滚乐队走过三十年历程，从卑微的起点一路走到成长中那些更为艰难的时刻。

在上世纪九十年代末、本世纪初澳大利亚独立音乐界的黄金岁月里，来自珀斯的另类摇滚乐队杰贝迪亚（Jebediah）显得与众不同。与那些同台巡演、动辄剑拔弩张、不久便分崩离析的乐队截然相反，这支性情随和的四人组——主唱凯文·米切尔（Kevin Mitchell，艺名鲍勃·埃文斯）、担任鼓手的哥哥布雷特、贝斯手奈斯·索恩顿和主音吉他手克里斯·戴蒙德——始终彼此紧密相依。他们在电台 Triple J 上赢得全国瞩目，很快又将数张录音室专辑积累下的声望注入自己创办的唱片厂牌，看上去俨然是这个行业里典型的幸存者。然而，当乐队步入第三个十年，年少时那种无拘无束的生活方式开始投下阴影。消遣渐渐滑向成瘾，彼此间的联系也日益松动——这些相伴一生的挚友与创作伙伴，能否找到让音乐延续下去的办法？

阿洛·迪恩·库克（Arlo Dean Cook）这部由墨尔本国际电影节首映基金（MIFF Premiere Fund）资助的纪录片，取材于大量珍贵的档案影像与家庭录像，时间跨度从乐队在高中时的青涩起步一直延伸到今天，同时还收入了蒂姆·罗杰斯、菲尔·贾米森、珍妮特·英格利希等本土音乐偶像的第一手讲述。这是一趟酣畅淋漓、跌宕起伏的摇滚过山车，也是一则关于成名代价的坦率警世寓言。
highlight_zh: 澳洲另类摇滚传奇三十年，MIFF基金力挺的坦诚警世纪录片

synopsis_en:
Come for a gleefully filthy romp through Gay Paree as a buff influencer and his twink fight to cure a heinous virus that makes queer people straight!

Jim Parfait is the top gay gymfluencer in Paris. When he’s not posting his daily workouts, he’s flaunting his gigantic rig at parties with his best pal Nina. She’s the first to spot that one of Jim’s 24 magnificent abs has vanished. Quelle horreur! Jim has heterosis: the dreaded virus that’s turning queer Parisians … straight. As Jim’s fickle followers abandon him for his brawny nemesis Pavel, he teams up with Lucien – closeted twink son of France’s villainous conservative health minister – on a hero’s cruise for a cure. In the city’s degenerate demimonde, they’ll encounter bears, techno-blasting leather puppies, Glamydia of the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence and the militant ‘Gaystapo’ threatening Jim with reverse-conversion therapy.

There’s serious commentary on the state of the modern world to be found in Nicolas Athane and Marco Nguyen’s outrageous Cannes-premiering satire. But be prepared nonetheless for a barrage of the world’s silliest, lewdest jokes, while the macaron-toned Rick and Morty-esque animation stuffs the frame with as much absurdity as the protein that Jim gorges on.
synopsis_zh:
来一场欢乐又下流的巴黎冒险吧——一位肌肉网红和他的小鲜肉伙伴，要联手对抗一种把酷儿变成直人的恶毒病毒！

吉姆·帕菲是巴黎头号男同健身网红。不发每日锻炼视频的时候，他就带着巨硕的身板和死党妮娜出没于各种派对。正是妮娜第一个发现，吉姆那令人叹为观止的二十四块腹肌里，竟少了一块。真是骇人听闻！吉姆染上了「异性化症」——那种正把巴黎酷儿一个个变成直男直女的可怕病毒。眼看见异思迁的粉丝纷纷倒戈，投向他那肌肉发达的死对头帕维尔，吉姆决定与吕西安联手踏上寻找解药的英雄征程——吕西安是法国那位反派保守派卫生部长深柜里的小鲜肉儿子。在这座城市堕落的边缘世界里，他们将遇上熊族、放着重低音电音的皮革小狗、「永恒放纵修女会」的格兰米迪亚，还有扬言要对吉姆施以「逆向扭转治疗」的激进组织「同志盖世太保」。

在尼古拉·阿塔纳与马可·阮这部戛纳首映的癫狂讽刺片里，藏着对当今世界状况的严肃观察。但也请做好准备，迎接一连串全世界最蠢萌、最猥琐的笑料；与此同时，那马卡龙色调、酷似《瑞克和莫蒂》的动画，把画面塞得满满当当，其荒诞程度堪比吉姆狂啃的蛋白质。
highlight_zh: 戛纳首映癫狂动画，酷儿版《瑞克和莫蒂》讽刺喜剧

synopsis_en:
In Ulrike Ottinger’s ultimate ethnographic odyssey, a group of women travelling by train are taken hostage by a Mongolian princess.

The carriages of the Trans-Siberian Railway have never seen such a theatrical ensemble of strangers: the chic, high-society ethnologist Lady Windermere (Delphine Seyrig) can speak several languages; American Broadway star Fanny Ziegfeld (Gillian Scalici) is always threatening to break into song; Russian cabaret trio the Kalinka Sisters are always breaking into song; the reserved German schoolteacher Frau Müller-Vohwinkel (Irm Hermann) has a quiet but curious eye; and Giovanna (Inés Sastre) is a naive young woman with little else but a rucksack, a walkman and a yearning for adventure. After transferring to the Trans-Mongolian Railway, their fantastical train journey makes a sharp turn when a group of mounted Mongolian warriors under the command of Princess Ulun Iga (Xu Re Huar) take them as captives to their nomadic summer village. There, the women observe and attempt to adapt to the customs of their new society.

Cast with Western actors and Mongolian non-professionals, Ulrike Ottinger’s 1989 epic was the first feature film permitted to be made in Inner Mongolia by a Western director. An ever-curious artist who would soon after return to film the people, environment and cultural customs of this land for her eight-hour 1992 documentary Taiga, Ottinger has stated that Johanna d’Arc of Mongolia “is not trying to create an exotic image, but to explore the issue of cultural transfer”. Depicting a dazzling clash of traditions and a stunning assemblage of colours and costumes against a vast landscape, this masterwork was frequent collaborator Seyrig’s final performance onscreen.

“A rare and remarkable film … Ottinger has an unrestrainedly lyrical sense of composition that blends lucidly analytical observation with a sugar-spangled touch of wonder.” – The New Yorker

2K Digitisation
synopsis_zh:
在乌尔莉克·奥廷格这场终极民族志漫游中，一群乘火车旅行的女性被一位蒙古公主劫为人质。

西伯利亚大铁路的车厢里从未见过如此戏剧化的陌生人组合：时髦的上流社会民族学者温德米尔夫人（德菲因·塞里格饰）通晓数国语言；美国百老汇明星范妮·齐格菲（吉莉安·斯卡利奇饰）动不动就要放声高歌；俄罗斯歌舞三人组卡林卡姐妹更是随时引吭高歌；矜持的德国女教师穆勒-福温克尔太太（伊尔姆·赫尔曼饰）沉默寡言，目光却透着好奇；而乔凡娜（伊内丝·萨斯特雷饰）则是个天真的年轻姑娘，除了一个背包、一台随身听和对冒险的渴望，几乎一无所有。转乘蒙古大铁路之后，这趟奇幻的列车之旅陡然转折——一队由乌伦·伊嘎公主（Xu Re Huar 饰）统领的蒙古骑手将她们掳往游牧的夏季营地。在那里，这些女性观察并试图适应这个新社会的种种习俗。

影片由西方演员与蒙古非职业演员共同出演，是奥廷格1989年的史诗之作，也是首部获准由西方导演在内蒙古拍摄的故事长片。这位永葆好奇的艺术家不久之后便重返此地，拍摄了长达八小时的1992年纪录片《泰加》，记录这片土地上的人、环境与文化习俗。奥廷格曾表示，《蒙古的圣女贞德》"并非要塑造一种异域猎奇的形象，而是要探讨文化迁移的命题"。影片在辽阔的地景之上，呈现出传统的璀璨碰撞与色彩、服饰的惊艳交织，堪称杰作，也成为奥廷格长期合作者塞里格的银幕遗作。

"一部难得而非凡的电影……奥廷格拥有一种毫不拘束的抒情式构图感，将清晰理性的观察与如糖霜闪烁般的惊奇触感融为一体。"——《纽约客》

2K数字修复
highlight_zh: 首部西方导演获准在内蒙古拍摄，塞里格银幕遗作

title_en: John Cameron Mitchell Presents: Hedwig and the Angry Inch 25th Anniversary
synopsis_en:
Watch a cult-classic genderqueer musical in the best way – with a witty live commentary by its transgressive and talented director/star.

Hedwig is an East German punk singer on a quest for her other half. As a teenager named Hansel, she seeks a soulmate in American soldier Luther, becoming his wife after a botched genital surgery leaves her with an “angry inch” of flesh between her legs. After Luther abandons Hedwig in Kansas, she sees herself in shy, repressed Tommy, inviting him to share her rock-star dreams. Tommy spurns Hedwig, but goes on to steal her songs to fuel his own success. As she chases Tommy’s tour on a string of low-rent gigs with her band, the Angry Inch, Hedwig doesn’t see how desperately her husband and bandmate Yitzhak yearns to be her …

John Cameron Mitchell’s genderfluid rock musical, based on his off-Broadway stage show, has been reuniting film audiences with their true selves for 25 years. Festivals instantly saw it was special: Hedwig’s clutch of prizes included the Teddy Award at the 2001 Berlinale as well as Sundance audience and directing awards. But Mitchell’s fluid portrayal of love and identity remains a life-changing cult classic because it defiantly troubles categories of drag and trans, nonbinarity and androgyny.

Award-winning director, writer, star and special guest of the festival John Cameron Mitchell joins us for an unforgettable evening of live commentary to accompany his foundational film. Celebrating the 25th anniversary of Hedwig and the Angry Inch in stunning 4K, Mitchell will lead audiences on a carousing, mind-bending, behind-the-scenes journey through one of the most transformative creative processes of his career.

Viewer Advice: Contains themes of sexual violence

A heartbreaking portrait of innocence lost, this acclaimed Sundance award winner and surefire Oscar contender is one of the most essential films of 2026.

Eight-year-old Josephine (Mason Reeves) is out running with her father in San Francisco’s Golden Gate Park when she witnesses a brutal sexual assault. Her parents, Damien (Channing Tatum) and Claire (Gemma Chan), are unsure of how to help their daughter process this experience, working through their own feelings of futility, helplessness and horror. As a court case prosecuting the attacker draws closer, Josephine is haunted not only by the memory of what she saw but also by the presence of the perpetrator, who lingers in her mind – and, she imagines, in her bedroom – like a ghost.

The winner of the Grand Jury Prize and Audience Award in Sundance’s U.S. Dramatic Competition, this meticulous, humanist drama finds incredible power in its child’s-eye view. Beth de Araújo follows her impressive first feature, the equally politically charged thriller Soft & Quiet, with a remarkable portrayal of an incomprehensibly cruel, violent world. Tatum gives a career-best performance as a wounded, disempowered father searching for answers, and Chan is similarly impressive; but it’s the tiny Reeves, in her debut film, who is the real revelation, carrying the complex emotions of a devastating narrative.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：影片包含性暴力相关主题

这部感人至深的作品，描绘了纯真的消逝。它斩获圣丹斯大奖，堪称奥斯卡的有力竞争者，也是 2026 年最不容错过的影片之一。

八岁的约瑟芬（梅森·里维斯 饰）和父亲在旧金山金门公园跑步时，目睹了一起残忍的性侵。她的父母达米安（查宁·塔图姆 饰）和克莱尔（陈静 饰）不知该如何帮女儿走出这段经历，同时也在与自身的无力、无助与恐惧苦苦搏斗。随着起诉施暴者的庭审日益临近，约瑟芬不仅被目睹的记忆所困扰，更被施暴者的存在所纠缠——那身影萦绕在她脑海，也仿佛游荡在她的卧室里，如同一个幽灵。

影片荣获圣丹斯美国剧情片竞赛单元评审团大奖与观众奖，这部精雕细琢、饱含人文关怀的剧情片，以孩童的视角迸发出惊人的力量。贝丝·德·阿劳若在其令人印象深刻的处女作、同样充满政治张力的惊悚片《温柔与安静》之后，再度呈上这部作品，刻画出一个残酷得难以理喻、充满暴力的世界。塔图姆奉献了生涯最佳表演，演活了一位受伤、无力、苦寻答案的父亲，陈静的演出同样出色；而真正令人惊艳的，是首次触电的小演员里维斯，她稚嫩的肩膀扛起了这个催人泪下的故事中层层叠叠的复杂情感。
highlight_zh: 圣丹斯评审团+观众双奖，塔图姆生涯最佳，奥斯卡种子

synopsis_en:
Inspiring Apple’s Steve Wozniak and Steve Jobs, the telephone hacker who was born blind made headlines as both a tech prodigy and a big-hearted iconoclast.

Before internet hackers popularised the concept of scrambling technology, the analog pioneers known as ‘phone phreaks’ discovered that they could manipulate landlines simply by whistling at certain frequencies. Born Josef Engressia in 1949 before adopting his cheerful mononym in 1991, Joybubbles was one such phreaker. From the tender age of four he was obsessed with the telephone, and he first discovered he could perform the magical 2600-hertz whistle aged just seven. As a whiz-kid, he was drawn to experiment with technology, but it also represented a kind of lifeline: born blind, Joybubbles used the phone to forge connections with people – and to help others connect, too.

Though he died in 2007, Joybubbles can narrate his own story thanks to filmmaker Rachael J. Morrison, who uncovered a treasure trove of his audio recordings. In chronicling its singular subject’s life, underpinned by trauma but still overflowng with kindness, this loving and suitably uplifting Sundance-premiering documentary – produced by Sarah Winshall, who also produced By Design (MIFF 2025) and served as a consulting producer on Maddie’s Secret (MIFF 2026) – takes viewers back to a pre-internet era via its wealth of archival material, spotlighting a sidelined but fascinating chapter of hacking history.
synopsis_zh:
他天生失明，却成了操纵电话的黑客，既是技术神童，又是宅心仁厚的特立独行者，一度登上头条，还启发了苹果公司的史蒂夫·沃兹尼亚克和史蒂夫·乔布斯。

早在互联网黑客让“破解技术”这一概念广为人知之前，一群被称为“电话飞客”（phone phreaks）的模拟时代先驱就发现，只要对着话筒吹出特定频率的口哨，就能操控固定电话线路。Joybubbles 本名约瑟夫·恩格雷西亚，1949 年出生，1991 年改用了这个洋溢着欢乐的单名，正是这样一位电话飞客。他从四岁起就对电话着迷，年仅七岁便发现自己能吹出神奇的 2600 赫兹口哨。作为一名神童，他被技术实验深深吸引，而这对他还意味着一条生命线：天生失明的 Joybubbles 用电话与人建立联系，也帮助他人彼此相连。

他已于 2007 年离世，但导演蕾切尔·J·莫里森发掘出一批珍贵的音频录音，让 Joybubbles 得以亲口讲述自己的故事。这部满怀深情、令人振奋的纪录片在圣丹斯电影节首映，制片人萨拉·温肖尔曾监制《By Design》（MIFF 2025），并担任《Maddie’s Secret》（MIFF 2026）的顾问制片。影片记录下这位独一无二的主人公的一生——底色是创伤，却依旧满溢着善意——凭借丰富的档案素材带观众重返前互联网时代，聚焦这段被忽视却引人入胜的黑客历史篇章。
highlight_zh: 圣丹斯首映：启发乔布斯的盲人电话黑客传奇

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

In studio-era Hollywood, Kim Novak fought to craft her own identity. In this affectionate documentary portrait, she elegantly redefines her legacy.

People have rarely given Kim Novak the credit she deserves. She has been dismissed as a generic 1950s studio blonde; her slippery performance in 1958 psychological thriller Vertigo (MIFF 1984) is too often attributed only to director Alfred Hitchcock’s genius; and her long, fiercely private retirement is treated as the wreckage of Hollywood misogyny. All the while, however, Novak has been her own auteur. She fought Columbia Pictures boss Harry Cohn to keep her own surname, and went on strike for better pay. Now 93, she recalls Vertigo as a satisfyingly metatextual collaboration, reframing her life’s dizzying, spiralling narratives as “a big, beautiful circle”.

In the prolific Alexandre O. Philippe, Novak finds an avid, erudite listener. His documentaries on cinema craft are frequently valentines to individual films: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre (Chain Reactions, MIFF 2025), Alien (Memory – The Origins of Alien, MIFF 2019) and Psycho(78/52, MIFF 2017). Here, as in his William Shatner portrait You Can Call Me Bill (MIFF 2023), Philippe illuminates a complex person rather than worshipping a star. Kim Novak’s Vertigo celebrates an unforgettable movie through its subject’s refreshingly candid musings on the tensions between authenticity and mystique.
synopsis_zh:
呈现

在好莱坞制片厂制度的年代，金·诺瓦克努力打造属于自己的身份认同。在这部饱含深情的纪录片肖像中，她以优雅的姿态重新定义了自己的传奇。

人们很少给予金·诺瓦克应得的赞誉。她曾被轻描淡写地视为1950年代千篇一律的制片厂金发花瓶；她在1958年心理惊悚片《迷魂记》（墨尔本国际电影节1984年放映）中扑朔迷离的表演，也常被单单归功于导演阿尔弗雷德·希区柯克的天才；而她漫长、极度注重隐私的隐退生涯，则被当作好莱坞厌女文化留下的一片废墟。然而在这一切之中，诺瓦克始终是自己人生的导演。她曾与哥伦比亚影业老板哈里·科恩抗争，只为保留自己的本姓，还为争取更高的片酬而罢工。如今93岁的她，回忆起《迷魂记》时，将其视为一次令人满足、充满互文意味的合作，并把自己人生中那些令人眩晕、盘旋回环的叙事，重新诠释为"一个巨大而美丽的圆"。

在多产的亚历山大·O·菲利普这里，诺瓦克遇到了一位如饥似渴、博学多识的倾听者。他关于电影艺术的纪录片，常常是写给某一部影片的情书：《德州电锯杀人狂》（《连锁反应》，墨尔本国际电影节2025年放映）、《异形》（《记忆——异形的起源》，墨尔本国际电影节2019年放映）以及《惊魂记》（《78/52》，墨尔本国际电影节2017年放映）。在这里，正如他为威廉·夏特纳拍摄的肖像片《你可以叫我比尔》（墨尔本国际电影节2023年放映）一样，菲利普照亮的是一个复杂的人，而非对一位明星的顶礼膜拜。《金·诺瓦克的迷魂记》通过其主人公坦率得令人耳目一新的沉思——关于真实与神秘之间的张力——礼赞了一部令人难忘的电影。
highlight_zh: 93岁金·诺瓦克首度亲述，重解希区柯克《迷魂记》台前幕后

synopsis_en:
Amid all the colour and chaos of Venice Beach, (ultra-)competitive paddle tennis players are a band apart. The only thing that can unite them? A hatred of pickleball.

In the Los Angeles neighbourhood of Venice Beach, 11 paddle tennis courts are under threat from an encroaching enemy: pickleball. The hugely popular monolith, like some ruthless developer, is taking up increasing space in its expansion, threatening to wipe out a small community playing an exceedingly similar sport. From Scott, the self-described GOAT of paddle tennis, to hot-tempered Italian model Ernesto, these misfits unite to stage a paddlers vs pickleballers tournament. Winner gets $50,000 – and the right to control these courts.

title_en: Knife: The Attempted Murder of Salman Rushdie
title_zh: 刀:刺杀萨尔曼·拉什迪未遂
synopsis_en:
A religious zealot stabbed him 15 times. But the outspoken novelist survived – and, as this documentary shows, retained his belief that creative freedom is the sharpest weapon.

In 1989, an Iranian fatwa called for author Salman Rushdie’s death over his theologically provocative novel The Satanic Verses. Booksellers were firebombed and international publishers and translators attacked, even killed. Rushdie went into hiding … but his eventual assailant hadn’t yet been born. In 2022, with more than three decades having passed and the danger seemingly over, the 75-year-old author was speaking on exiled artists’ safety in a relaxed, informal event in upstate New York when a young Shia extremist invaded the stage and stabbed him repeatedly. Despite the horrendous, life-changing injuries he endured, Rushdie refused to become a tragic symbol of ideological violence. Now, doubling down on his commitment to free expression, he documents his own survival.

Acclaimed documentarian Alex Gibney (Zero Days, MIFF 2016) has profiled plenty of creative mavericks, political dissidents and repressive institutions. Here, he allows his subject’s clever, poetic voice to lead an unexpectedly meditative and allusive film that offers deep archival context for the home-video footage of the attack’s aftermath and the arduous recovery that followed, captured with unflinching love by the author’s poet wife Rachel Eliza Griffiths. Physically weakened and spiritually fragile, Rushdie nonetheless takes back his narrative, showing that resistance against authoritarian censorship is sharpened by wit, imagination and a defiantly imperfect humanity.
synopsis_zh:
一名宗教狂热分子朝他连刺十五刀。但这位直言不讳的小说家活了下来——正如这部纪录片所展现的,他依然坚信创作自由才是最锋利的武器。

1989年,伊朗的一纸追杀令(fatwa)因作家萨尔曼·拉什迪那部在神学上极具挑衅意味的小说《撒旦诗篇》而下达,要取他性命。书店遭到燃烧弹袭击,各国的出版商与译者被袭击,甚至被杀害。拉什迪从此隐姓埋名……而那个最终行凶的人当时还没有出生。2022年,三十多年过去,危险看似早已消散,75岁的拉什迪正在纽约州北部一场轻松随意的活动上谈论流亡艺术家的安全问题,一名年轻的什叶派极端分子突然冲上讲台,朝他连刺数刀。尽管遭受了骇人的、彻底改变人生的重创,拉什迪拒绝沦为意识形态暴力的悲情符号。如今,他愈加坚定地捍卫言论自由,亲自记录下自己劫后余生的历程。

广受赞誉的纪录片导演亚历克斯·吉布尼(《零日》,2016年墨尔本电影节)曾刻画过众多特立独行的创作者、政治异见人士与压迫性的体制。这一次,他让拉什迪那睿智而富有诗意的声音引领全片,成就了一部出人意料地充满冥思与隐喻的作品:片中为那些拍摄袭击善后与艰难康复过程的家庭录像提供了深厚的历史档案语境,而这些影像正是由拉什迪的诗人妻子瑞秋·伊莱扎·格里菲斯以毫不回避的深情记录下来的。尽管身体虚弱、精神脆弱,拉什迪依然夺回了属于自己的叙事,证明了对抗威权审查的抵抗力量,会因智慧、想象力与一种倔强而不完美的人性而愈发锋利。
highlight_zh: 吉布尼执导,拉什迪亲述遇刺重生,以创作自由对抗审查

title_zh: KURA：非洲裔澳式足球的故事
synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

SUPPORTED BY

Australians call it footy, but Akec and her community call it kura.

Former AFLW player Akec Makur Chuot traces a path from her heroes to the new generation of African Australian stars navigating two worlds to find belonging.
synopsis_zh:
澳大利亚人管它叫"footy"，但阿凯克和她的族群称之为"kura"。

前澳式足球女子联赛（AFLW）球员阿凯克·马库尔·楚奥特追溯了一条道路——从她心目中的英雄，到新一代在两种文化间穿行、寻找归属感的非洲裔澳大利亚球星。
highlight_zh: 前AFLW球员亲述：非洲裔澳人的球场与归属

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

Sharing the Best Director Prize at Cannes, this sublime time-hopping triptych recounts three men’s experiences of love, legacy and the unending fight for queer liberation.

In 1937, musician Sebastián is conscripted into the Spanish Civil War by the pro-Franco army; there, he meets and falls for a handsome leftist prisoner. In 1932, Carlos attempts to gain membership to an exclusive casino but is rejected due to rumours about his homosexuality. And in 2017, historian Alberto inherits a gift from his estranged grandfather that exacerbates tensions with his mother. Across the decades, these men’s stories interweave and bleed into one another, revealing threads that connect them in profound, unexpected ways.

Associate-produced by Pedro Almodóvar (Bitter Christmas, MIFF 2026) and featuring supporting turns by Penélope Cruz, Glenn Close and Julio Torres (Problemista, MIFF 2024), the arrestingly poetic second feature from directorial duo Javier Ambrossi and Javier Calvo depicts how each generation faces its own forms of prejudice. Yet as much as it lays bare the present’s debts to the past, the film also challenges our notions of linear time, its dazzling collisions of image and sound coming together as palimpsests of personal and societal memory. Inspired by Federico García Lorca’s unfinished stageplay of the same name, La Bola Negra is a sweeping meditation on the battles we wage for ideology and belonging.
synopsis_zh:
荣获戛纳电影节最佳导演奖，这部瑰丽的时空跳跃三联画讲述了三个男人关于爱、传承以及酷儿解放这场无尽抗争的故事。

1937年，音乐家塞巴斯蒂安被亲弗朗哥的军队征召，投入西班牙内战；在那里，他遇见并爱上了一名英俊的左翼战俘。1932年，卡洛斯试图取得一家高级赌场会所的会员资格，却因关于其同性恋身份的传言而遭到拒绝。而在2017年，历史学家阿尔贝托继承了疏远已久的祖父留下的遗物，令他与母亲之间的紧张关系愈发加剧。跨越数十载光阴，这些男人的故事彼此交织、相互渗透，揭示出将他们以深刻而出人意料的方式连结在一起的丝丝脉络。

影片由佩德罗·阿尔莫多瓦（《苦涩圣诞》，2026年墨尔本电影节）联合监制，佩内洛普·克鲁兹、格伦·克洛斯与胡里奥·托雷斯（《问题人生》，2024年墨尔本电影节）出演配角。导演组合哈维尔·安布罗西与哈维尔·卡尔沃奉上这部诗意慑人的第二部长片，描摹出每一代人各自面对的偏见形态。影片在袒露当下对过往所欠债务的同时，也挑战着我们对线性时间的认知，其影像与声音令人目眩的碰撞交融，宛如个人记忆与社会记忆层层叠写的重写本。本片灵感源自费德里科·加西亚·洛尔迦同名未竟舞台剧，《黑球》是一曲关于我们为信念与归属而战的恢弘沉思。
highlight_zh: 戛纳最佳导演，阿尔莫多瓦监制，克鲁兹、克洛斯加盟

synopsis_en:
Simmering desires erupt among a group of teens visiting the ruins of Pompeii in this Cannes Critics’ Week Grand Prize winner.

Passionate but put-upon teacher Madame Mercier (Antonia Buresi, Rodeo, MIFF 2022) shepherds 20 of her students from Paris to Naples, where they will visit the sites devastated by Mount Vesuvius two millennia prior. Being in such close quarters for an extended period heightens the high schoolers’ extant dynamics. Boisterous Toni yearns for his best friend James, who canoodles with his classmate Angela, herself vexed by masculine insensitivity. Meanwhile, ostracised star pupil Suzanne observes and fantasises about how she might become embroiled. Surrounded by scenes of calamity, the teenagers confront the crises within themselves.

Inspired by Wilhelm Jensen’s novella Gradiva: A Pompeiian Fancy and Sigmund Freud’s analysis of it, César-nominated cinematographer Marine Atlan’s searing full-length debut is a rare work that dramatises the turmoil of adolescence without recycling tired tropes about caprice or rebellion. Juxtaposing the transitory nature of youth with the timelessness of Pompeii’s ruins, Atlan also captures the human penchant for concealing emotions and their inevitable eruption when surface and substance no longer coincide. Glorious, sun-dappled cinematography enriches the film’s illuminating studies of each character, while the naturalistic performances of its breakout cast bring authenticity and verve to this visionary coming-of-age tale.
synopsis_zh:
在这部荣获戛纳影评人周单元大奖的影片中，一群少年造访庞贝古城遗址，暗涌的欲望在他们之间骤然爆发。

满怀热忱却饱受磨难的老师梅西耶夫人（安东尼娅·布雷西饰，代表作《罗迪欧》，曾入选2022年墨尔本电影节）带着二十名学生从巴黎远赴那不勒斯，去探访两千年前被维苏威火山吞噬的遗迹。长时间朝夕相处、近在咫尺，让这群高中生原本微妙的关系愈发紧张。喧闹的托尼暗恋着好友詹姆斯，而詹姆斯却与同学安吉拉打得火热，安吉拉本人又因男生的迟钝无感而心烦意乱。与此同时，遭到排挤的尖子生苏珊娜冷眼旁观，幻想着自己该如何卷入这场纠葛。在满目疮痍的灾难遗迹中，少年们直面着内心深处的危机。

影片灵感源自威廉·延森的中篇小说《格拉迪瓦：庞贝的幻想》以及西格蒙德·弗洛伊德对它的分析。曾获凯撒奖提名的摄影师玛丽娜·阿特兰以这部锋芒毕露的长片处女作，罕见地呈现了青春期的动荡，却不落任性或叛逆的俗套。她将青春的转瞬即逝与庞贝废墟的永恒并置，捕捉人性隐藏情感的本能，以及当表象与本质不再吻合时情感终将喷薄而出的必然。绚烂而洒满阳光的影像，为每个角色的细腻刻画增添了光彩；崭露头角的新人演员们自然真挚的表演，则为这则极具想象力的成长故事注入了鲜活与真实。
highlight_zh: 戛纳影评人周大奖处女作，《卫报》五星盛赞的青春成长佳作

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains depictions of violence towards animals

Made on a shoestring when the director was just 25, Lisandro Alonso’s groundbreaking first feature gatecrashed Cannes with a hypnotic depiction of rural labour.

In the remote La Pampa province of Argentina, Misael ekes out an ascetic existence. Living alone in an isolated corner of a rural property, he rarely sees other people, and barely says a word when he does. Working as a woodcutter, he chops trees, shaves them down and loads them for transport. In quieter moments, he smokes, takes a shit or lies in the sun. And at the end of the day, he kills, prepares and barbecues his dinner: a classic woodcutter’s meal of roasted armadillo.

Premiering in Competition at Cannes and scoring two special mentions at Rotterdam, La libertad showcased a new foundational work of slow cinema and the arrival of an unlikely auteur – who, as a young man, shot his debut feature film in nine days on his parents’ property with a tiny budget. Alonso’s observational approach blends documentary with cine-minimalism, blurring the lines between fact and fiction. Despite its relative absence of traditional plot, La libertad poses a big question: what is freedom? Is Misael, living completely off the grid, truly liberated? Or is he, as the film’s circular construction might suggest, trapped in an unending cycle of his own making?
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片含有虐待动物的画面。

里桑德罗·阿隆索这部开创性的处女作拍摄于他年仅25岁之时，成本极其低廉，却以对乡野劳作近乎催眠般的呈现闯入了戛纳。

在阿根廷偏远的潘帕斯草原，米萨埃尔过着苦行僧般的日子。他独居于一处乡间地产的僻静角落，鲜少见到旁人，即便见到也几乎不发一言。他以伐木为生：砍树、削枝、装车待运。闲下来的时候，他抽抽烟、拉泡屎，或是躺在阳光下晒太阳。一天将尽，他便动手宰杀、料理并烧烤自己的晚餐——一顿伐木工的经典大餐：烤犰狳。

《自由》入围戛纳主竞赛单元，并在鹿特丹斩获两项特别提及。它既标志着慢电影的又一部奠基之作，也宣告了一位不按常理出牌的作者导演的登场——这位年轻人当年仅用九天时间、在父母的地产上以微薄的预算拍完了自己的长片处女作。阿隆索的观察式手法糅合了纪录片与极简电影，模糊了真实与虚构的界线。尽管几乎没有传统意义上的情节，《自由》却抛出了一个宏大的问题：何为自由？完全脱离世俗生活的米萨埃尔，真的获得了解放吗？抑或正如影片的环形结构所暗示的那样，他被困在了一个由自己亲手织就、永无止境的循环之中？
highlight_zh: 戛纳主竞赛处女作，慢电影奠基之作，25岁天才导演惊艳登场

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains depictions of violence towards animals

From Cannes Directors’ Fortnight comes a haunting tale of a woman with a troubled past and the free-spirited dog that gives her life renewed meaning.

In a wind-lashed, sparsely inhabited island off the coast of Chile, Silvia (Manuela Oyarzún, No, MIFF 2012) supplements her fishmonger husband’s income by harvesting seaweed. One day, she crosses paths with a puppy, whom she decides to adopt and name Yuri. Over time, she and this wayward creature – both seemingly forsaken by life – become inseparable. But when Yuri suddenly disappears, unhealed wounds from Silvia’s childhood are reopened.

Adapted from the novel of the same name by Pilar Quintana, La Perra is an affecting, revelatory portrait of loneliness, commiseration and the sometimes-cyclical nature of time and trauma. Director Dominga Sotomayor’s characteristically intimate style, seen especially in her earlier works Mar and Too Late to Die Young (MIFF 2019), is complemented here by the dreamy cinematography of Simone D’Arcangelo (The Tale of King Crab, MIFF 2022), which captures the exhilaration of cohabiting with the untameable elements. Oyarzún alluringly portrays Silvia as stoic and unsettled in equal measure – a turbulent foil for the strong-minded wildness of Yuri, whose canine performer was awarded the Palm Dog at Cannes.

A reimagined spin on a canonical tale that flips Western narratives about North Africa.

Adapting a parable from Giovanni Boccaccio’s The Decameron, Franco-Tunisian visual artist Fredj Moussa assembles striking images of veiled faces, secondhand fabrics and majestic animals that humorously evoke Western ideas about the former Barbary Coast. A playful, politically charged work of revisionist myth-making, filled with vibrant colours and costumes.
synopsis_zh:
一次对经典故事的大胆重构，颠覆了西方关于北非的叙事想象。

法籍突尼斯视觉艺术家弗雷吉·穆萨（Fredj Moussa）取材于薄伽丘《十日谈》中的一则寓言，用一幕幕充满张力的影像——蒙面的脸孔、二手的织物、雍容的走兽——诙谐地映照出西方人对昔日"巴巴里海岸"的种种臆想。这是一部俏皮而饱含政治锋芒的修正主义神话之作，满溢着浓烈的色彩与斑斓的服饰。
highlight_zh: 《十日谈》寓言新编，以斑斓影像戏谑颠覆西方的北非想象

synopsis_en:
Thirteen years in the making, Lucrecia Martel’s potent true-crime documentary connects the murder of an Indigenous leader to a national history of violence.

In October 2009 in northern Argentina, members of the Diaguita community of Los Chuschagasta attempted to resist eviction from their native land. In the confrontation that followed, 68-year-old resident Javier Chocobar was shot dead and two others were wounded – a crime that was captured on video, but only taken to court after a decade-long process of protest and agitation. Even now, justice for Chocobar’s people remains hard to come by.

Winner of Best Film at the 2025 BFI London Film Festival, the first feature-length documentary from acclaimed filmmaker Lucrecia Martel (The Headless Woman) serves as an unexpected companion piece to her satirical colonialist parable Zama (MIFF 2018). At once true-crime story, legal drama and big-picture portrait of Argentina, Landmarks offers not only an indictment of systemic shortcomings but also a deeper exploration of her nation’s centuries-long history of colonial settlement, land grabs and silencing of its Indigenous populations.
synopsis_zh:
历经十三年打磨，卢奎西娅·马特尔以这部极具冲击力的真实罪案纪录片，将一位原住民领袖之死与阿根廷暴力横行的民族史紧紧勾连。

2009年10月，在阿根廷北部，洛斯丘沙加斯塔的迪亚吉塔社区成员试图抵抗被逐出祖辈家园。在随后爆发的冲突中，68岁的居民哈维尔·乔科巴尔中枪身亡，另有两人受伤——这桩罪行被摄像机全程记录，却在长达十年的抗争与呼号之后才终于被送上法庭。而即便到了今天，乔科巴尔族人所期盼的正义依然遥不可及。

本片荣获2025年英国电影协会伦敦电影节最佳影片，是备受赞誉的导演卢奎西娅·马特尔（《无头的女人》）的首部长片纪录片，也意外地与她那部殖民主义讽喻寓言《扎马》（2018年墨尔本国际电影节）互为呼应。《地标之殇》既是一桩真实罪案的记录，是一场法庭较量，也是一幅阿根廷的宏观群像。它不仅是对制度性积弊的控诉，更是对这个国家数百年殖民拓殖、土地掠夺与压制原住民之声的深层叩问。
highlight_zh: 《扎马》导演首部纪录长片，伦敦影展最佳影片，直击原住民血案

synopsis_en:
In this cosmic coming-of-age gem, a casual abduction takes a pair of estranged besties on a rural road trip – and towards a looming celestial event.

Crystal awakes in rural Victoria to discover she’s been ‘kidnapped’ by Chester, the best friend who mysteriously vanished from her life two years prior. Rising Melbourne auteurs Andrew Dang and Jak Scanlon’s short is a stargazing tale of friendship, cultural connection and youthful malaise, shimmering with eerie, awe-inspiring cinematography.
synopsis_zh:
在这部关于成长的科幻佳作中，一场随性的"绑架"，让一对疏远的挚友踏上乡间公路之旅——迎面而来的，还有一场迫近的天文奇观。

克丽丝托在维多利亚州的乡下醒来，发现自己被"绑架"了，而绑匪竟是切斯特——两年前神秘地从她生命中消失的那位好友。墨尔本新锐作者型导演安德鲁·邓与雅克·斯坎伦的这部短片，是一则仰望星空的寓言，讲述友谊、文化联结与青春的迷惘，配以诡谲而令人惊叹的绝美影像。
highlight_zh: 墨尔本新锐导演操刀，星空下的青春公路寓言

synopsis_en:
A breathtaking examination of hubris colliding full-force with the limits of human endurance as competing teams of adventurers aim to make history on the world’s most dangerous mountain.

At the turn of 2021, 13 of the world’s 14 highest mountains had been summitted in winter. The exception? The second-highest mountain on Earth, K2, a notoriously perilous western Himalayan peak towering 8600 metres above sea level. In the northern winter of late 2020, in the depths of the COVID pandemic and with violent snowstorms on the way, Icelandic alpinist John Snorri Sigurjónsson and Pakistani father and son Ali and Sajid Sadpara – all veteran mountaineers – prepare their bid to enter the record books; without warning, they’re joined at base camp by throngs of others vying to be the first, including Nepalese mountaineering rock star Nirmal Purja and commercial climbing tourists of varying experience. As ego, capitalism and the deep scars of colonialism clash with ethics, physics and the indifference of howling winds and infinitesimally icy temperatures, the stage is set for an epic and catastrophic competition.

Bringing together stunning big-screen visuals courtesy of influencer GoPros and professional film crews who accompanied the would-be summiteers, director Amir Bar-Lev (Long Strange Trip, MIFF 2017) masterfully layers a gripping, heartbreaking and nuanced picture of the moral and philosophical conundrums at the heart of extreme achievement.
synopsis_zh:
当狂妄自负与人类耐力的极限正面相撞，数支探险队伍齐聚地球上最危险的高山，只为创造历史——这是一部令人屏息的纪录片。

2021年伊始，全球14座八千米级高峰中已有13座被人类在冬季登顶，唯一的例外，正是地球第二高峰、海拔8600米、以凶险著称的喜马拉雅西段山峰——K2（乔戈里峰）。2020年冬末，在新冠疫情最深重的时刻，暴风雪又将来袭，冰岛登山家约翰·斯诺里·西古尔永松，与巴基斯坦父子阿里·萨德帕拉和萨吉德·萨德帕拉——三位身经百战的登山老手——正筹备着向纪录发起冲击。然而毫无征兆地，大批人马涌入大本营，都想争当冬季首登者，其中包括尼泊尔登山界的超级明星尼尔马尔·普尔加，以及经验参差不齐的商业登山客。当自我、资本与殖民主义留下的深痛伤疤，与道德、物理法则、呼啸寒风的无情和极寒冰温碰撞交织，一场史诗般而又灾难重重的角逐就此拉开帷幕。

影片汇集了网红们的GoPro影像与随行专业摄制组拍下的震撼大银幕画面，导演阿米尔·巴尔-列夫（《漫长而奇异的旅程》，2017年墨尔本电影节）以精湛手法层层铺陈，勾勒出一幅扣人心弦、令人心碎而又细腻入微的图景，直抵极限成就背后那些道德与哲学的两难困境。
highlight_zh: 《漫长奇异旅程》导演新作，直击冬攀K2的史诗与灾难

synopsis_en:
Accelerator Lab alum James Hunter makes his feature debut with this psychological thriller about motherhood and the monstrous clutches of grief.

American midwife Alice lives in an isolated house in rural Australia. Worn out by her job and wearied by an unspoken tragedy, she experiences waking nightmares and starts sensing an eerie presence creeping in from the shadowy bushland. As desolation overwhelms her, and with the threat inching closer, her only refuge is the very home where she lost everything. Can she vanquish her demons before they corrode what’s left of her sense of self?

Inspired by horror classics Rosemary’s Baby and Don’t Look Now as well as fairytales and folklore, this startling, thematically complex feature debut uses atmosphere and symbolism to explore the repercussions of loss, silence and solitude. Informed by interviews with bereavement midwives and a mother who had lost her baby, director James Hunter (Nest, MIFF 2021) prioritised visual and narrative restraint to create “an uncanny feeling of unease”; this laid the foundations for Lucy Lovegrove’s affecting lead performance, which brims with polished physicality and nuanced interiority. Gripping and full of gravitas, The Latcher portrays one woman’s unravelling and her eventual journey towards healing.
synopsis_zh:
加速器实验室（Accelerator Lab）出身的詹姆斯·亨特带来长片处女作——一部探讨母性与丧亲之痛如魔爪般紧攫人心的心理惊悚片。

美国助产士爱丽丝独居在澳大利亚乡间一栋与世隔绝的房子里。工作的重压与一桩难以言说的悲剧将她消磨殆尽，她在清醒时也陷入梦魇，并渐渐察觉到有一个诡异的存在正从幽暗的丛林中悄然逼近。当荒凉将她彻底吞没、威胁一步步迫近，她唯一的避难所，竟正是那座令她失去一切的家。在心魔啃噬掉她仅存的自我之前，她能否将其战胜？

影片从《魔鬼圣婴》《威尼斯疑魂》等恐怖经典及童话与民间传说中汲取灵感，以氛围与象征手法，探讨失去、沉默与孤独所留下的余波，令人心惊，主题层次丰富。导演詹姆斯·亨特（《巢》，2021年墨尔本国际电影节）在拍摄前采访了多位专为丧婴家庭服务的助产士以及一位痛失爱子的母亲，并刻意在影像与叙事上保持克制，只为营造出“一种诡异难安的不祥感”；这也为露西·洛夫格罗夫细腻动人的主演表演奠定了基础——她的演绎兼具精准的肢体张力与幽微的内心世界。《依附者》扣人心弦、庄重深沉，刻画了一个女人的崩解，以及她最终走向自愈的旅程。
highlight_zh: 加速器新锐处女作，母性丧痛化魔的心理惊悚

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains strong-impact mental health and suicide themes

A remarkable Tim Blake Nelson and Vera Farmiga are out of this world as Heaven’s Gate co-founders Marshall Applewhite and Bonnie Lu Nettles.

In 1972, Marshall Applewhite overdoses on a bottle of pills and ends up in hospital in the care of nurse Bonnie Lu Nettles, a spiritual seeker feeling empty in her personal life. Dubbing themselves “Do” and “Ti” as their sense of cosmic connection escalates into a Messianic bond, they manifest a doctrine that fuses biblical prophecy with new-age UFO utopianism and strict asexuality, drawing other broken souls into their orbit. Their goal: to leave their weak flesh behind and ascend to the stars. The reality of their Heaven’s Gate cult was grimmer: after Nettles died of cancer in 1985, Applewhite infamously staged a 1997 mass suicide together with 38 of his followers.

Having grown up in San Diego, not far from the Heaven’s Gate compound, writer/director Michael Gallagher channels a lifelong fascination and a decade-plus of research into this darkly gripping true-crime drama. Its documentary-like authenticity frames two unnerving lead performances from Tim Blake Nelson and Vera Farmiga, while Jim Parsons and Simon Rex (Magic Farm, MIFF 2025) shine in support as loyal believers. Driving The Leader is the urgent question of why – and, in answer, the film becomes both a compelling psychological study and a chilling psychological horror.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含强烈的心理健康与自杀相关题材

蒂姆·布雷克·尼尔森与维拉·法米加的表演惊为天人，两人分别饰演“天堂之门”邪教的联合创始人马歇尔·阿普尔怀特与邦妮·卢·奈特尔斯。

1972年，马歇尔·阿普尔怀特吞下整瓶药片自杀未遂，被送进医院，护士邦妮·卢·奈特尔斯负责照料他——她本是一位精神追寻者，内心却始终空虚无依。随着彼此间的“宇宙连结”不断升温，直至凝结成一种救世主般的羁绊，两人自封为“Do”与“Ti”，炮制出一套将圣经预言、新纪元UFO乌托邦幻想与严格禁欲主义熔于一炉的教义，把一个又一个残缺破碎的灵魂吸入他们的轨道。他们的目标：抛弃孱弱的肉身，飞升群星。而“天堂之门”邪教的真实结局却远为惨烈：1985年奈特尔斯病逝于癌症后，阿普尔怀特于1997年带领38名信徒集体自杀，震惊世人。

编剧兼导演迈克尔·加拉格在圣迭戈长大，离“天堂之门”的据点不远。他将毕生的痴迷与十余年的调研倾注于这部阴郁而扣人心弦的真实罪案剧情片。影片以纪录片般的真实质感，托起蒂姆·布雷克·尼尔森与维拉·法米加两段令人不寒而栗的主演；吉姆·帕森斯与西蒙·雷克斯（《魔法农场》，2025年墨尔本电影节）也贡献了出色的配角表演，饰演忠贞的信徒。驱动《教主》一路向前的，是那个迫在眉睫的追问——为什么。而在寻找答案的过程中，影片既成为一则引人入胜的心理研究，也化作一部令人毛骨悚然的心理恐怖片。
highlight_zh: 尼尔森×法米加封神级演技，还原“天堂之门”邪教惊悚往事

synopsis_en:
Kim Novak once again tackles dual roles in this wildly unhinged satire of the Hollywood system and power in the film industry.

Lylah Clare is a mythical movie star whose death has long been shrouded in mystery. When unknown ingenue Elsa Brinkman (Kim Novak) is cast in the principal role in a biopic about the doomed thespian, she is almost immediately seduced by the heady Hollywood lifestyle, not to mention by tyrannical director Lewis Zarken (Peter Finch, Network); she quickly assumes Lylah’s previous status on his arm, in his film and in his bed. Soon, the lines between reality and delusion begin to blur: the spirit of Lylah herself lays claim to Elsa, at times taking hold just long enough to deliver blistering take-downs of her adversaries.

With echoes of her iconic role in Vertigo and references to her own transformation at the behest of Columbia Pictures head Harry Cohn, she plays the role with trademark empathy while embracing the inspired chaos of the piece. Robert Aldrich (Kiss Me Deadly, MIFF 1998) directs with feverish intensity, transforming sound stages, mirrors and camera lenses into sites of psychological entrapment, while Novak delivers a haunting dual performance that blends innocence (quickly lost) and bravado. The Legend of Lylah Clare remains a savage, self-reflexive meditation on Hollywood’s capacity to consume the women it immortalises. Largely dismissed on release, it has since been reclaimed as a camp cult classic.
synopsis_zh:
金·诺瓦克在这部对好莱坞体制与电影业权力极尽癫狂的讽刺之作中再度一人分饰两角。

莱拉·克莱尔是一位传奇影星，她的死亡多年来始终笼罩在谜团之中。当默默无闻的新人埃尔莎·布林克曼（金·诺瓦克 饰）被选中出演这位薄命女伶传记片的女主角时，她几乎立刻就沉醉于好莱坞纸醉金迷的生活，更迷失在专横的导演刘易斯·扎肯（彼得·芬奇 饰，《电视台风云》）身上；她很快便取代了莱拉从前的位置——挽着他的手臂、出演他的影片、睡在他的床上。不久，现实与幻觉之间的界线开始模糊：莱拉的亡魂对埃尔莎步步紧逼，时不时短暂附体，只为对她的敌人们发出一连串火辣尖刻的痛骂。

此片既呼应了诺瓦克在《迷魂记》中的经典角色，也影射了她本人当年应哥伦比亚影业掌门人哈里·科恩之命完成的自我蜕变。她以标志性的共情演绎这一角色，同时全身心投入影片天马行空的癫狂气质。罗伯特·奥尔德里奇（《死吻》，1998 年墨尔本电影节）以近乎狂热的强度执导，将摄影棚、镜子与摄影机镜头统统化作囚禁心灵的场域，而诺瓦克贡献了一场令人难忘的双重表演，将（转瞬即逝的）纯真与虚张的傲气糅为一体。《莱拉·克莱尔传奇》至今仍是一则对好莱坞——那台吞噬它所封神的女性的机器——冷峻而自省的沉思。影片上映时大体遭到冷遇，此后却被重新发掘，奉为坎普风格的邪典经典。
highlight_zh: 《迷魂记》女神金·诺瓦克一人分饰两角，奥尔德里奇癫狂邪典

synopsis_en:
This amusingly deadpan portrait of loneliness, the death of cinema and technology’s seductive appeal combines animation and live action in visionary ways.

In a near future in which affordable space travel has sent the film industry into freefall, Zha is a humble caretaker at an unused studio lot in snowbound northern China, tending to the decaying ruins of past productions. When the studio can’t afford to pay his salary, he’s gifted a VR headset instead. Zha soon grows obsessed with the virtual realm, and the borders between reality and illusion begin to blur.

Moving between hand-drawn animation and digital live action in its VR sequences, Light Pillar offers a remarkably refreshing blend of romance, sci-fi and drama. Blessed with both a sense of Ghibli-esque whimsy and a cultural critique of modernisation-mad China that’s reminiscent of the works of Jia Zhang-ke, the film is at once an achingly sad portrait of loneliness, an epitaph for the glory days of cinema and a smart critique of people turning to technology to solve their problems. Enthusiastically received on its Berlin premiere, this low-key crowdpleaser is sure to charm MIFF audiences.
synopsis_zh:
这幅关于孤独、电影之死与技术诱惑的肖像冷面而妙趣横生，以极具想象力的方式将动画与真人实拍融为一体。

在不远的未来，廉价太空旅行让电影工业急转直下、一落千丈。查是中国北方冰雪覆盖的一座废弃摄影棚里一名卑微的看守人，日复一日照看着昔日片场留下的残垣断壁。当片场付不出他的薪水时，他得到的报酬是一副 VR 头显。很快，查便沉迷于虚拟世界，现实与幻象的边界开始变得模糊。

《光柱》在 VR 段落中于手绘动画与数字真人实拍之间自如切换，将爱情、科幻与剧情熔于一炉，带来令人耳目一新的观影体验。影片既有吉卜力式的灵动奇思，又如贾樟柯作品般对狂奔于现代化之路的中国投以文化反思——它是一曲关于孤独的椎心之痛，一篇献给电影黄金时代的墓志铭，也是一记对世人妄图以技术解决一切问题的机敏批判。本片在柏林首映时反响热烈，这部含蓄内敛却直抵人心的佳作，注定将俘获墨尔本电影节观众的心。
highlight_zh: 柏林首映口碑爆棚，动画与真人交织的科幻寓言，贾樟柯式中国现代化反思

synopsis_en:
While driving along an eerie ocean road, a teenage boy and his mother hit something with their car. She insists it was nothing, but he begins to doubt her story.

Inspired by a trip through Auckland’s spooky Waitākere Ranges, the latest work from award-winning filmmakers Prisca Bouchet and Nick Mayow is a unique take on the coming-of-age drama, transforming a routine drive into a mysterious thriller told from the boy’s perspective. Produced in conjunction with Jane Campion’s film school A Wave in the Ocean, this brilliantly executed short film premiered at Venice last year.
synopsis_zh:
在一条阴森的海滨公路上行驶时，少年和母亲的车撞到了什么东西。母亲坚称什么都没发生，但他渐渐开始怀疑她的说辞。

屡获殊荣的电影人普里斯卡·布歇与尼克·梅约的这部新作，灵感源自一次穿越奥克兰阴森的怀塔克雷山脉之旅。影片以少年的视角，将一段寻常的车程化作一桩扑朔迷离的惊悚事件，为成长题材提供了独辟蹊径的诠释。本片由简·坎皮恩创办的电影学校 A Wave in the Ocean 联合出品，制作精良，去年在威尼斯电影节首映。
highlight_zh: 简·坎皮恩电影学校出品，威尼斯首映的成长惊悚短片

synopsis_en:
A sailor travels through a harsh but beautiful landscape in search of his old hometown and what remains of his family.

Farrel (Juan Fernández) is a merchant seaman, toiling away below deck on long-haul shipping routes. When his ship is forced to dock at Ushuaia, southern Argentina’s gateway to Antarctica, he requests permission to go ashore to find out if his ailing mother is still alive. Downing drinks as he goes, the permanently soused sailor eventually manages to hitch a ride on a logging truck headed for his old hometown, to the place and the people he left behind. There, he discovers that his mother is still alive, but barely – and that she’s living with Farrel’s own daughter, Analía, whom he abandoned prior to her birth.

Lisandro Alonso’s fourth feature – which, like its predecessors, bowed at Cannes – marshals a larger budget to follow another of his lonely men across a vivid landscape. Shot amid the icy surrounds of Tierra del Fuego, it’s a sensorial work aswirl with wind and snow, aching with isolation both environmental and emotional. Though armed with more traditional narrative elements than Alonso’s first three movies, Liverpool is another work in which so much story – and backstory – is conveyed silently, perceptible only to engaged viewers.
synopsis_zh:
一名水手穿越严酷而壮美的土地，回去寻找久别的故乡，以及家人如今剩下的一切。

法雷尔（胡安·费尔南德斯 饰）是一名商船海员，常年在远洋航线的甲板之下辛苦劳作。当货轮被迫停靠在乌斯怀亚——阿根廷南端通往南极的门户——他请假上岸，想弄清楚重病的母亲是否还在人世。这个终日醉醺醺的水手一路买醉，最终搭上一辆运木料的卡车，回到他多年前离开的故乡，回到他抛下的那些人和地方。在那里，他发现母亲尚在人世，却已奄奄一息——而陪在她身边的，正是法雷尔在其出生前就抛弃的亲生女儿安娜莉娅。

这是利桑德罗·阿隆索的第四部长片，与他此前的作品一样在戛纳首映。影片动用了更充裕的预算，追随又一个孤独的男人穿越一片鲜活的土地。它在火地岛的冰雪环抱中拍摄，是一部被风雪裹挟的感官之作，浸透着环境与情感的双重孤寂。尽管相比阿隆索前三部作品，本片配备了更多传统叙事元素，《利物浦》依旧延续了那种以沉默来传递大量故事与前情的手法——唯有投入的观众，方能有所体悟。
highlight_zh: 阿隆索戛纳名作，火地岛冰雪中的极致慢电影

synopsis_en:
A nuanced portrait of Kiwi Tongan rugby union superstar Jonah Lomu, history’s youngest All Black, whose legend remains a beacon for Pasifika pride.

In 1994, at the age of 19, Jonah Lomu donned his first All Blacks jersey – the youngest ever to wear it. At the next year’s World Cup, the Tongan New Zealander winger’s jaw-dropping combination of power and agility redefined rugby union. Nearly 2 metres tall and 120 kilograms, Lomu could run 100 metres in 11 seconds and evade every tackle – former Wallaby Peter FitzSimons described him as “a freight train in ballet shoes”. Having grown up bilingual between Tonga and South Auckland, he used his cultural connection and Christian faith to transform the glaring spotlight of sporting glory into a torch to ignite cultural pride across the Pacific. But Lomu wasn’t superhuman. Privately, he battled nephrotic syndrome, a rare kidney disorder that would extinguish his stupendous, record-setting career.

A humble, staunch Lomu emerges here in intimate interviews with his closest family, friends and coaches, along with archival footage and previously unseen family videos. Sensitively stewarding Lomu’s world-spanning legacy are Dublin native Gavin Fitzgerald, known for documentary profiles of Liam Gallagher and Conor McGregor, and Kiwi Tongan trailblazer Vea Mafile’o (Lea Tupu’anga, MIFF 2024; For My Father’s Kingdom, MIFF 2019).
synopsis_zh:
这是一部细腻的人物纪录片，讲述了汤加裔新西兰橄榄球巨星乔纳·洛穆的传奇一生。他是历史上最年轻的"全黑队"球员，其传奇至今仍是太平洋岛民民族自豪感的一座灯塔。

1994年，年仅19岁的乔纳·洛穆首次披上"全黑队"球衣，成为有史以来最年轻的入选者。在次年的世界杯上，这位汤加裔新西兰边锋以令人瞠目的力量与灵敏，重新定义了橄榄球联合会运动。身高近2米、体重120公斤的洛穆，能在11秒内跑完百米，躲过任何拦截——前澳大利亚国家队球员彼得·菲茨西蒙斯形容他是"穿着芭蕾舞鞋的货运列车"。在汤加与南奥克兰之间双语成长的他，凭借自身的文化纽带与基督教信仰，将耀眼夺目的运动荣光化作一支火炬，点燃了整个太平洋地区的文化自豪感。但洛穆并非超人。私下里，他饱受肾病综合征的折磨——正是这种罕见的肾脏疾病，最终熄灭了他那创下纪录的辉煌职业生涯。

通过与洛穆最亲近的家人、朋友和教练的贴身访谈，辅以珍贵的历史影像与从未公开的家庭录像，一个谦逊而坚韧的洛穆跃然眼前。两位导演满怀敬意地守护着洛穆这份横跨全球的遗产：都柏林出身的加文·菲茨杰拉德以为利亚姆·加拉格尔和康纳·麦格雷戈拍摄的纪录片人物特写而闻名；汤加裔新西兰开拓者维亚·马菲莱奥则曾执导《舌尖上的故乡》（2024年墨尔本电影节）与《为了父亲的王国》（2019年墨尔本电影节）。
highlight_zh: 橄榄球史上最年轻全黑队巨星的传奇与心碎，太平洋岛民之光

synopsis_en:
An ageing Austrian blues musician faces up to the fact that the times they are a-changin’ in this poignant tale rooted in real life.

Resembling a pompadoured, older Robert Mitchum, Al Cook (born Alois Koch in Vienna, 1945) has lived in the same apartment all his life. In the basement, he maintains a humble recording studio – also the site of a shrine to his musical idols, Elvis chief among them. But Al’s building is under threat by developers; he is, in fact, the last remaining resident. Contemplating the upheaval to come, Al is drawn to the idea of finally visiting Memphis, the faraway, foreign city that gave birth to the music to which he’s dedicated his life.

As in their previous films Vera, Mister Universo and La Pivellina (MIFF 2010), directors Tizza Covi and Rainer Frimmel centre a 16mm character study on a non-professional actor whom they’ve invited to enact a version of themselves for their camera – in this case, a minor celebrity in his home country who is possessed of a mellowed, graceful swagger. Pricked with the dry humour of Aki Kaurismäki, this Berlinale Competition selection is a laconic, bittersweet portrait of a man who is beautifully – and, in some ways, tragically – out of sync with his time.
synopsis_zh:
一位年迈的奥地利布鲁斯乐手不得不直面时代变迁——这部感人至深的作品取材于真实人生。

阿尔·库克（Al Cook，本名阿洛伊斯·科赫，1945 年生于维也纳）长着一头飞机头，模样酷似上了年纪的罗伯特·米彻姆，一辈子都住在同一套公寓里。地下室里，他经营着一间简陋的录音棚，那里也是他供奉音乐偶像的圣殿，其中以猫王为尊。然而，他所住的楼房正面临开发商的威胁；事实上，他已是这栋楼里最后一位住户。眼看剧变将至，阿尔萌生了一个念头：终于去一趟孟菲斯看看——那座遥远而陌生的城市，正是他为之奉献一生的音乐的发源地。

如同此前的《薇拉》《宇宙先生》和《小家伙》（2010 年墨尔本电影节）一样，导演蒂莎·科维与雷纳·弗里梅尔再度用 16 毫米胶片，围绕一位非职业演员展开人物写照，请他在镜头前演绎另一个版本的自己。这一次的主角在祖国称得上小有名气，浑身透着一股沉静而优雅的洒脱。影片带着阿基·考里斯马基式的冷面幽默，作为柏林电影节主竞赛入围之作，它简约克制、苦中带甜，勾勒出一个与自己所处时代美丽地——某种意义上也悲剧地——格格不入的男人。
highlight_zh: 柏林主竞赛入围，考里斯马基式冷幽默下的动人真实人生

synopsis_en:
Winner of four AFI Awards, Sarah Watt’s prismatic and improbably funny tale of looming tragedy is independent Australian cinema at its off-kilter best.

An Adelaide artist who earns her crust as a painter of sympathy card seascapes, Meryl – played by Justine Clarke, stepping out from Play School’s square window – is prone to morbidly nightmarish fantasies, lovingly rendered in hand-drawn animations. On her way home from her father’s funeral, Meryl has a genuine run-in with the reaper when she witnesses the death of a pedestrian in a train accident. This tragedy becomes the unlikely basis for a fraught whirlwind romance with a photojournalist (William McInnes) dealing with demons of his own, as well as the fulcrum of the film’s multiple interlocking portraits of grief.

This auspicious live-action debut by Sydney-born, Melbourne-schooled animator and filmmaker Sarah Watt premiered in 2005, when it screened at MIFF alongside a retrospective of her animated shorts. In addition to sweeping that year’s AFI Awards, Watt also picked up the Toronto International Film Festival’s Discovery Award. Two decades on, Look Both Ways stands as a prime and, against all odds, uplifting example of the breezily black humour that has characterised a number of the nation’s most iconic films.
synopsis_zh:
萨拉·瓦特这部棱镜般多面、又出人意料地诙谐的作品，讲述灾难迫近的故事，堪称澳大利亚独立电影不落窠臼的巅峰之作，一举摘得四项澳大利亚电影学院奖（AFI）。

梅丽尔住在阿德莱德，是一位靠画慰问卡上的海景画谋生的艺术家——由曾在儿童节目《Play School》方形窗口里露脸的贾丝廷·克拉克饰演。她动辄陷入阴郁如噩梦般的幻想，这些幻想以饱含深情的手绘动画呈现出来。父亲葬礼归来的路上，梅丽尔与死神真切地打了个照面：她目睹一名行人死于火车事故。这场悲剧竟意外成了她与一位摄影记者（威廉·麦金尼斯饰）之间一段紧张而炽烈的旋风恋情的开端——他也正与自己内心的魔鬼纠缠——同时也成了全片对哀伤的多重交织描摹的支点。

瓦特生于悉尼、求学于墨尔本，是一位动画师兼电影人，这部气势不凡的真人长片处女作于2005年首映，当年在墨尔本国际电影节（MIFF）放映时，还同期举办了她动画短片的回顾展。除横扫当年的AFI奖外，瓦特还捧回了多伦多国际电影节的发现奖。二十年过去，《瞻前顾后》依然是一个绝佳的范例，出人意料地令人振奋——它所展现的那种举重若轻的黑色幽默，正是这个国家众多最具标志性影片的共同气质。
highlight_zh: 横扫四项AFI大奖，澳洲独立电影举重若轻的黑色幽默

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains depictions of violence towards animals

Lisandro Alonso’s sophomore feature follows a newly freed ex-con on an upriver trip into the jungle, seeking either redemption or retribution.

Vargas is a convicted murderer coming to the end of decades of incarceration in the ramshackle, sun-dappled rural prison that has long been his home. On his release, seemingly ill at ease with his newfound freedom, he sets out on a journey into the Argentine jungle armed with his trusty machete. He has two goals in mind: one is to deliver a letter to the wife of another prisoner; the second is to see his estranged daughter, for whom he’s splurged on a new green blouse. As he journeys north along the Paraná River into increasingly wild surrounds, we’re left to wonder if Vargas is a man rehabilitated, or if violence is bound to follow wherever he goes.

Premiering at Cannes, Lisandro Alonso’s second feature is another singular portrait of a man at work, patiently watching on as non-professional actor Argentino Vargas goes about his daily labours, including lengthy sequences of him rowing through densely forested landscapes. Beneath the long takes and cyclic rhythms, however, are uneasy, menacing details lurking in the film’s subtext, subtly implied through the film’s soundscape.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片含有虐待动物的画面。

利桑德罗·阿隆索的第二部长片，跟随一名刚获释的前囚犯溯河而上、深入丛林，去寻求救赎——或是复仇。

巴尔加斯是一名被定罪的杀人犯，在那座破败、洒满阳光的乡间监狱里度过了数十年，如今刑期将满，这里早已成了他的家。获释后，他似乎对这份失而复得的自由并不自在，带着那把趁手的砍刀，踏上了深入阿根廷丛林的旅程。他心里揣着两个目标：一是替另一名囚犯给他的妻子捎去一封信；二是去见自己久未谋面的女儿，为此他还咬牙给她买了一件崭新的绿色衬衫。当他沿着巴拉那河一路向北、走进愈发荒莽的天地，我们不禁揣度：巴尔加斯究竟是一个已被改造的人，还是无论走到哪里，暴力都注定如影随形？

本片首映于戛纳，是利桑德罗·阿隆索独树一帜的又一幅劳作之人的肖像。他不动声色地凝视着非职业演员阿根蒂诺·巴尔加斯操持日常劳作，其中包括他划船穿行于密林景致的长段镜头。然而在悠长镜头与循环往复的节奏之下，暗流涌动、令人不安的细节潜伏于影片的潜文本之中，借由声景被不着痕迹地暗示出来。
highlight_zh: 戛纳首映，阿根廷极简主义诗人阿隆索的溯河救赎之旅

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

Drops of water open portals to memory in this immersive, mysterious new work from MIFF alum Allison Chhorn.

Cambodian-Australian filmmaker Allison Chhorn (The Plastic House, MIFF 2020) returns with a gorgeous evocation of daily life along the Mekong River – comprised of fragments of archival footage recreated on super-8 film stock – in this work that captures the fluidity of time and the fragility of light, caressed by an ethereal, dreamlike sound design.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片含频闪影像。

在墨尔本国际电影节旧友、导演艾莉森·丘恩的这部沉浸而神秘的新作中，滴滴水珠开启了通往记忆的门扉。

柬埔寨裔澳大利亚导演艾莉森·丘恩（《塑料屋》，2020年墨尔本国际电影节）携新作归来，以极为唯美的笔触勾勒出湄公河畔的日常生活——影片由一帧帧档案影像用超8毫米胶片重新拍摄而成，捕捉了时间的流动与光的脆弱，并被一层空灵、梦幻的声音设计温柔环抱。
highlight_zh: 《塑料屋》导演新作，超8胶片重塑湄公河畔的光影记忆

synopsis_en:
Winner of the Orizzonti Special Jury Prize at Venice, this groundbreaking Rohingya docu-fiction presents the perilous, disorienting experience of seeking asylum from a child’s-eye view.

When nine-year-old Somira and her four-year-old brother Shafi (played by real-life siblings Shomira Rias Uddin and Muhammad Shofik Rias Uddin) find themselves suddenly and inexplicably ripped from their lives in a Bangladeshi refugee camp, all they are told is that they going to find an uncle in Malaysia. Thus begins an uncertain, hazardous journey over days and then weeks – over land and by sea – that will take everything the siblings have to give and then some.

As the first ever film spoken entirely in Rohingya, Lost Land approaches Somira and Shafi’s story with an intimate realism that invites audiences to do more than merely bear witness: the film envelops us in the children’s confusion and determination, embodying the instability of their lives on the move. Japanese director Akio Fujimoto spent years working with Rohingya people to bring this story to life, and he does so with tender empathy, while Yoshio Kitagawa’s beautifully immersive cinematography aids the film’s authenticity and emotional weight. Lost Land is a profound and poignant document of the human lives at the heart of a too-often-overlooked humanitarian crisis.
synopsis_zh:
本片荣获威尼斯电影节地平线单元评审团特别奖，是一部开创性的罗兴亚题材纪实剧情片，以孩童的视角呈现寻求庇护途中那段危机四伏、令人迷失方向的经历。

九岁的索米拉和四岁的弟弟沙菲（由现实中的姐弟肖米拉·里亚斯·乌丁与穆罕默德·肖菲克·里亚斯·乌丁饰演）毫无预兆、莫名其妙地被迫离开了他们在孟加拉国难民营的生活，得到的唯一说法是要去马来西亚投奔一位叔叔。就这样，一段前途未卜、险象环生的旅程拉开序幕——先是数日，继而数周，翻山越岭，漂洋过海，几乎榨干了这对姐弟的全部气力，甚至更多。

作为影史上首部全程以罗兴亚语讲述的电影，《失落之地》以亲密而写实的笔触讲述索米拉和沙菲的故事，邀请观众不只是旁观见证：影片将我们裹入孩子的困惑与坚毅之中，让人真切感受到他们颠沛流离、动荡不安的处境。日本导演藤元明绪耗费数年时间与罗兴亚人一同工作，才让这个故事得以呈现，其间饱含温柔的共情；北川喜雄唯美而沉浸的摄影，更为影片增添了真实感与情感分量。《失落之地》是一份深沉而动人的记录，映照出这场太常被世人忽视的人道主义危机核心处，那一个个鲜活的生命。
highlight_zh: 威尼斯获奖，影史首部罗兴亚语片，孩童视角看难民逃亡

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

This distinctly Māori Gothic horror, set in a haunted seaside manor, tells a terrifying tale of dark family secrets and one woman’s wrath in the face of colonial violence.

In 1859, Māori teacher Mary Stevens receives a mysterious letter summoning her from Aotearoa New Zealand to North Yorkshire, England, with the promise of revelations about her family history. Upon her arrival, lord of the local manor Nathaniel Cole offers Mary board and work as a governess for his niece. Nathaniel proudly shows off his collection of Māori artefacts and fluency in te reo Māori; he claims to have a deep affection for Mary’s culture and people. But the longer Mary stays in the windswept manor, the more she senses someone – or something – in the house is trying to communicate a grave warning.

Taratoa Stappard’s striking debut feature is a chilling ghost story reckoning with the violence of British colonialism, taking the tropes and visual language of classic Victorian Gothic horror and redeploying them through a uniquely Māori lens. Ariāna Osborne runs the gamut from grief to righteous fury in her ferocious performance as Mary, while the lavish costume and production design combine with the tale to elevate Mārama to the pantheon of great ghost stories.
synopsis_zh:
这部极具毛利特色的哥特式恐怖片，以一座闹鬼的海滨庄园为背景，讲述了一个关于黑暗家族秘密的惊悚故事，以及一个女人在殖民暴力面前的滔天怒火。

1859 年，毛利女教师玛丽·史蒂文斯收到一封神秘信件，召唤她从新西兰奥特亚罗瓦远赴英格兰北约克郡，信中许诺将揭开她家族历史的真相。抵达之后，当地庄园的领主纳撒尼尔·科尔为玛丽提供食宿，并聘她担任其侄女的家庭教师。纳撒尼尔骄傲地向她展示自己收藏的毛利文物和流利的毛利语，声称自己对玛丽的文化与族人怀有深厚的情感。然而，玛丽在这座饱受海风侵袭的庄园里住得越久，就越发觉得屋中有某个人——或某种存在——正试图向她传递一个严峻的警告。

塔拉托阿·斯塔帕德这部惊艳的长片处女作，是一则令人毛骨悚然的鬼故事，直面英国殖民主义的暴行，它借用维多利亚时代经典哥特恐怖片的套路与视觉语言，却透过独一无二的毛利视角重新演绎。阿里亚娜·奥斯本在片中贡献了一场凶悍的表演，将玛丽从悲痛到正义怒火的全部情绪层次演绎得淋漓尽致；而奢华的服装与美术设计与这个故事相得益彰，将《玛拉玛》推上了伟大鬼故事的殿堂。
highlight_zh: 毛利视角重构维多利亚哥特恐怖，惊艳处女作，直面殖民暴行

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

A young woman gets caught in an elaborate phone scam which sends her on a twisted odyssey through the Melbourne CBD.

Madisha’s morning couldn’t get any worse: a rootless Gen Z already struggling to find her purpose in life, she’s just learned that her housemate is ditching her and is still reeling from having lost her most recent job under cloudy circumstances. So when she gets a call advising her of fraudulent activity on her bank account and urgently requesting that she withdraw all of her money in cash, Madisha is sent on a panicked odyssey through the Melbourne CBD – a pursuit that leads her to ominous alleyways, busy street corners, an alcohol-soaked house party and, perhaps, the fledgling desire to take charge of her own life.

Supported by the MIFF Premiere Fund, this visually striking debut feature film by Accelerator Lab alum Maddelin McKenna (Patterns of the Afternoon, MIFF 2022) is a nuanced, deeply relatable portrait of a spiky but vulnerable young woman caught in a web tightening around her. Anchored around a stunning lead performance from Senuri Chandrani (Of an Age, MIFF 2022) as the film’s Alice-like protagonist, Mad Rush turns our city into a gritty, disorienting urban Wonderland.
synopsis_zh:
一位年轻女子落入一场精心设计的电话诈骗，被卷入一段穿越墨尔本市中心的荒诞旅程。

玛迪莎的早晨已经糟得不能再糟：作为一个漂泊无依、仍在苦苦寻找人生意义的 Z 世代，她刚得知室友要抛下她搬走，而不久前又因说不清道不明的原因丢了工作，至今心有余悸。就在这时，一通电话打来，声称她的银行账户出现欺诈交易，急催她把所有存款全部取现——玛迪莎就此被推入一场惊慌失措的市中心大逃亡：阴森的小巷、熙攘的街角、一场浸泡在酒精里的家庭派对，还有，或许是那一丝刚刚萌生的、想要掌控自己人生的渴望。

本片由墨尔本国际电影节首映基金（MIFF Premiere Fund）支持，是 Accelerator Lab 出身的导演玛德琳·麦肯纳（《午后的纹样》，MIFF 2022）视觉风格鲜明的长片处女作。影片细腻入微、极具代入感地刻画出一个外表带刺、内心脆弱的年轻女性，眼看着一张大网在自己周围越收越紧。塞努里·钱德拉尼（《似水年华》，MIFF 2022）贡献了惊艳的主演表演，将这位宛如爱丽丝般的女主角撑起全片，《疯狂奔逃》把整座城市化作一个粗粝而令人晕眩的都市仙境。
highlight_zh: MIFF基金力挺的视觉系处女作，一场都市版爱丽丝惊魂

synopsis_en:
Gold. Love. Adventure. Tabea Blumenschein stars as the leather-clad lesbian pirate Madame X, who promises a new way of life to the brave women who dare to join her crew.
