The most successful and cruellest pirate on the Far Eastern Seas, Madame X (Tabea Blumenschein) rules her junk Orlando with a gloved iron fist from which extends a long spike, having lost her real hand to a deadly jellyfish years ago while attempting to save her lover (played by Ulrike Ottinger herself in flashback). Now in desire of “total domination”, she sends out a signal to women across the globe – including an Australian bush pilot with a wildly shorn haircut and Yvonne Rainer in a green visor and rollerskates – inviting them to join her for a life of excitement. Journeying from all corners, they leave their ordinary lives behind in search of something new; but no-one expects the tyranny that awaits.

Shot on 16mm, Ottinger’s first scripted feature is a swashbuckling sadomasochistic reverie that caused much controversy for its brightly coloured, often humorous, depictions of queer violence. With its fetishistic costuming designed by Blumenschein (the director’s romantic partner and collaborator at the time) and wild aesthetic, Madame X was a call to arms for a new avant-garde; yet it still pays homage to its queer predecessors, with references to Virginia Woolf and a Sapphic take on the Shangri-Las’ 1964 pop hit ‘Leader of the Pack’.
synopsis_zh:
黄金。爱情。冒险。塔贝娅·布卢门沙因饰演一身皮衣的女同性恋海盗X夫人,她向每一个敢于加入船队的勇敢女人许诺一种全新的生活方式。

身为远东海域最成功也最残忍的海盗,X夫人(塔贝娅·布卢门沙因饰)戴着手套、以铁腕统治着她的帆船“奥兰多号”——那只手上伸出一根长长的尖刺,因为多年前她在试图营救爱人(闪回中由乌尔丽克·奥廷格本人饰演)时,真正的手被一只致命的水母夺去了。如今渴求“绝对支配”的她,向全球各地的女性发出信号——其中包括一位顶着狂野短发的澳大利亚丛林飞行员,以及戴着绿色遮阳帽、脚踏旱冰鞋的伊冯娜·瑞纳——邀请她们加入自己,共赴一段刺激的人生。她们从四面八方启程,抛下平淡的日常去追寻新的possibility;然而没有人料到,等待她们的将是何等的暴政。

这部以16毫米胶片拍摄的作品是奥廷格的首部剧情长片,一场充满冒险气息、施虐与受虐交织的绮梦,因其色彩明艳、往往不乏幽默的酷儿暴力呈现而引发诸多争议。片中恋物癖式的服装由布卢门沙因(当时导演的伴侣兼合作者)设计,加之狂放不羁的美学,X夫人俨然是一份面向新先锋派的战斗檄文;然而它仍不忘向酷儿前辈致敬,既援引弗吉尼亚·伍尔夫,又以萨福式的笔调重新演绎了Shangri-Las乐队1964年的流行金曲《飞车党头目》。
highlight_zh: 奥廷格女同海盗邪典狂想,高级坎普美学，酷儿影史之作

synopsis_en:
Cult comedian John Early directs and stars as a budding foodie in this big-hearted paean to womanhood and camp TV melodramas.

Maddie’s (John Early, Stress Positions, MIFF 2024) culinary gifts impress her husband and her best friend. But at the food content-creation company Gourmaybe, where she works, the shy kitchen whiz prefers to stick to washing dishes. When a video of Maddie cooking unexpectedly goes viral, she’s catapulted into the spotlight, but the pressure leads her to revert to a former destructive outlet: bulimia. Can she get away with peddling delectable food while secretly purging it?

With visual touches recalling Douglas Sirk and John Waters, the feature directorial debut of actor and comedian Early is a stunning throwback to the golden age of the made-for-TV movie. But it’s also a tragicomic masterpiece all its own: alongside the inevitable laughs, the film is a winning blend of tender character study, ode to feminine resilience and critique of egoistic influencer culture. Supported by a sterling cast that includes Kate Berlant, Claudia O’Doherty, Eric Rahill, Conner O’Malley and Saturday Night Live’s Vanessa Bayer, Early is formidable as Maddie, sensitively portraying her kindness, candour and weakness for both validation and rejection.
synopsis_zh:
邪典喜剧人约翰·厄尔利自导自演，饰演一位初露锋芒的美食达人，为女性与浮夸煽情的电视情节剧献上这封满怀深情的告白。

玛蒂（约翰·厄尔利饰，代表作《紧张体位》，2024年墨尔本电影节）的厨艺令丈夫和闺蜜赞叹不已。可在她供职的美食内容创作公司Gourmaybe，这位腼腆的厨房高手却宁愿只待在角落洗碗。当一段她下厨的视频意外走红，她被猛然推到聚光灯下，压力却让她重新落入曾经的自毁出口——暴食催吐。她能否一边兜售令人垂涎的美食，一边把它们偷偷吐掉而不被识破？

影片的视觉笔触令人想起道格拉斯·瑟克与约翰·沃特斯，作为演员兼喜剧人厄尔利的导演处女作，它是对电视电影黄金时代惊艳的致敬。但它同样是一部自成一格的悲喜剧杰作：在意料之中的笑料之外，影片精妙融合了细腻的人物研究、对女性韧性的礼赞，以及对自恋网红文化的批判。凯特·柏兰特、克劳迪娅·奥多尔蒂、埃里克·拉希尔、康纳·奥马利以及《周六夜现场》的凡妮莎·贝尔等一众好戏之人倾力助阵，而厄尔利饰演的玛蒂更是气场十足，将她的善良、坦率，以及对认可与拒绝的双重脆弱，演绎得丝丝入扣。
highlight_zh: 《周六夜现场》班底加盟，喜剧与煽情剧惊艳杂糅的悲喜杰作

synopsis_en:
In this utterly original vignette, a dying man visits a unique sex worker who can give him the release he craves.

Clutching a bouquet, a nervous elderly man arrives for his date with sex worker Kitty, whose pink lingerie hood conceals her uncanny beauty. Emily Lawson’s SXSW-premiering short boasts gobsmacking practical and digital visuals – but the most special effect is Kitty’s tenderness as she guides her awed client into an all-consuming kiss.
synopsis_zh:
在这部极具原创性的短片里，一个行将就木的男人造访了一位特别的性工作者——她能给予他梦寐以求的解脱。

一位紧张的老者手捧花束，赴约与性工作者「凯蒂」相会，她那粉色的蕾丝头罩掩住了一张诡谲而绝美的面容。艾米莉·劳森这部曾在西南偏南影展首映的短片，拥有令人瞠目结舌的实体与数字特效——但最动人的「特效」，是凯蒂的温柔：她引领着满心敬畏的客人，坠入一个吞噬一切的深吻。
highlight_zh: 西南偏南首映，惊艳特效包裹温柔奇想的成人黑色寓言

synopsis_en:
Rami Malek captivates as an HIV-positive man who combats mortality with moxie in Ira Sachs’s Cannes-competing ode to queerness and libertinism.

New York, late 1980s. Having just left hospital, ebullient theatre artist Jimmy wants to take on life itself: partying with other figures from the West Village demimonde; preparing a spectacular oeuvre for the stage; being seen and loved in every way possible. He is loved, of course, despite his mercurial ego: by Dennis, his devoted partner, and by Brenda, his sister. But Jimmy’s HIV meds don’t guarantee survival; so, when a handsome young Brit moves into the building, Jimmy proceeds with abandon.

Following Peter Hujar’s Day (MIFF 2025), Ira Sachs crafts another stirring time capsule of queer New York; The Man I Love also recalls his immediately previous work, Passages (MIFF 2023), in featuring a love triangle, but here the focus is less on erotic foibles than on the impetuousness of living on borrowed time. Working from a script from Sachs and his regular co-writer Mauricio Zacharias, and acting alongside a formidable Tom Sturridge, Rami Malek brilliantly incarnates Jimmy’s unapologetic audacity and the yearning fragility beneath his bravado. More than an AIDS drama, The Man I Love is a story of perseverance and performativity – about the shows we put on despite the obstacles of health and the heart.
synopsis_zh:
拉米·马雷克在伊拉·萨克斯这部入围戛纳主竞赛的作品中光芒四射，饰演一位以无畏姿态对抗死亡的HIV感染者，为酷儿身份与放浪不羁写下一曲赞歌。

上世纪八十年代末的纽约。刚刚出院的戏剧艺术家吉米热情洋溢，渴望全身心地拥抱生活：与西村风月场的浪荡人物们纵情狂欢；为舞台筹备一部惊世之作；以一切可能的方式被看见、被爱着。尽管性情反复无常，他当然是被爱着的——被忠贞不渝的伴侣丹尼斯，也被姐姐布伦达。但吉米的抗艾滋药物并不能保证他活下去；于是,当一位英俊的英国青年搬进这栋楼时，吉米便肆无忌惮地放纵起来。

继《彼得·胡加尔的一天》（2025年墨尔本国际电影节）之后，伊拉·萨克斯再度打造出一部动人的酷儿纽约时光胶囊；《我爱的男人》也令人想起他前一部作品《南法撩情》（2023年墨尔本国际电影节），同样围绕一段三角恋展开，但这一次的焦点不在情欲的荒唐，而在于借来的时日里那份莽撞求生的冲动。萨克斯与长期合作的编剧毛里西奥·扎卡里亚斯共同执笔，拉米·马雷克与气场强大的汤姆·斯图里奇同台飙戏，出色地演绎出吉米毫不悔改的胆识，以及虚张声势之下那份渴望与脆弱。《我爱的男人》不只是一部艾滋病题材的剧情片，更是一个关于坚韧与表演的故事——讲述我们如何在健康与情感的重重阻碍之下，依然把这场戏演下去。
highlight_zh: 拉米·马雷克戛纳主竞赛封神演出，酷儿纽约动人挽歌

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains themes of racial discrimination and instances of violence towards First Nations people

Haunting fragments of colonial violence testify to First Nations trauma and survival in this unflinching short.

As Aboriginal boys are stolen from their families and brought to a rural mission, astonishingly visceral and discomforting truths about our collective past emerge. Sublimely shot on richly textured black-and-white 16mm film with an atmospheric soundscape, this short’s expressionistic, powerfully direct storytelling will linger in memory far beyond its brief running time.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片含有种族歧视主题及针对原住民的暴力场景。

这部毫不回避的短片以殖民暴力的幽灵般碎片，为原住民的创伤与幸存作证。

当原住民男孩被从家人身边掠走、带往乡间的教会驻地，那些关于我们共同过往的真相便浮出水面——它们惊人地直击感官，令人如坐针毡。影片以质感浓郁的黑白16毫米胶片拍摄，画面绝美，配以极具氛围感的声景；其表现主义式而又直抵人心的叙事，将在短暂的片长之后，长久萦绕于记忆之中。
highlight_zh: 16毫米黑白胶片，直面原住民创伤的震撼短片

title_en: The Man With the Golden Arm
synopsis_en:
An early-career milestone for Kim Novak, who stars alongside Frank Sinatra, this honest, raw depiction of a man’s addiction to heroin was a shocking outlier in its era of release.

A landmark of postwar American cinema, 1955 classic The Man With the Golden Arm takes an unflinching look at the psychological impacts of addiction with a startling candour that shattered Hollywood taboos at the time. After a stint getting clean in prison, aspiring jazz drummer Frankie Machine (Frank Sinatra, From Here to Eternity) returns to Chicago’s chaotic backstreets, where he struggles to rebuild his life within the constraints of a manipulative marriage and the suffocating pull of old habits, battling the allure of heroin.

Columbia Pictures agreed to loan Kim Novak to United Artists after Otto Preminger specifically requested to cast her in the role of Molly Novotny, Frankie’s sympathetic girlfriend; it proved to be a breakthrough role for her. Sinatra likewise delivers a career-defining performance, while Eleanor Parker (The Sound of Music) is deliciously wicked as Frankie’s seemingly hapless wife. Adapted from Nelson Algren’s uncompromising novel and featuring a groundbreaking jazz score by Elmer Bernstein, Preminger’s Oscar-nominated film – released without the Production Code seal of approval – remains a devastating character study laden with moral ambiguity.
synopsis_zh:
本片是金·诺瓦克早期的重要作品，她与弗兰克·辛纳屈联袂主演。影片对一个男人海洛因毒瘾的刻画真实而赤裸，在其上映的年代堪称惊世骇俗的异类。

作为战后美国电影的里程碑，1955 年的经典之作《金臂人》以直面现实的态度审视毒瘾对心理的摧残，其惊人的坦率在当时打破了好莱坞的重重禁忌。有志成为爵士鼓手的弗兰基·马辛（弗兰克·辛纳屈饰，《乱世忠魂》）在狱中戒毒一段时间后，重返芝加哥混乱的街巷。在一段处处操控他的婚姻的束缚下，在旧习难改的窒息拉扯中，他挣扎着重建生活，与海洛因的诱惑苦苦搏斗。

奥托·普雷明格特别点名要金·诺瓦克出演弗兰基善解人意的女友莫莉·诺沃特尼一角，哥伦比亚影业才同意将她外借给联美公司；事实证明这成了她演艺生涯的突破之作。辛纳屈同样奉献了奠定其演员地位的表演，而埃莉诺·帕克（《音乐之声》）饰演弗兰基看似无助的妻子，坏得令人拍案叫绝。影片改编自纳尔逊·阿尔格伦毫不妥协的小说，配以埃尔默·伯恩斯坦开创性的爵士配乐。这部获奥斯卡提名、未通过《海斯法典》审查便公映的普雷明格作品，至今仍是一部充满道德暧昧、令人心碎的人物研究。
highlight_zh: 辛纳屈奥斯卡提名之作，直面毒瘾、打破好莱坞禁忌的战后经典

synopsis_en:
Made in her signature intimate style, Sofia Coppola’s debut documentary invites long-time friend Marc Jacobs to share his creative sensibility.

Filmmaker Sofia Coppola met fashion designer Marc Jacobs in 1993, when her downtown New York minimalism intrigued the upstart who’d just brought grunge to the Perry Ellis runway. They shared a taste for poised perfectionism, as well as an unusually self-effacing temperament among the big egos in their respective professions. Thirty years on, as Marc’s spring 2024 show approaches, his one-time muse hangs out in his studio, watching him plan the staging as meticulously as the clothes. “In another life I really want to be a theatre director,” sighs the 60-year-old as he enthuses about a creative practice they both know intimately.

Jacobs and Coppola both intuitively gravitate towards the playful and attainable rather than confronting or luxuriating in wealth. Despite its familiar ‘prepping for the big show’ template, Coppola’s disinterest in both industry drama and didactic biography separates this Venice-premiering A24 documentary from more conventional couturier profiles; her fascination with the evanescent is instead perfectly suited to tracing the wandering pathways of creative inspiration and influence that guide her subject’s creative sensibility. Fans of Coppola’s fiction work will appreciate these generous conversations and associative flurries of archival montage alike.

A man’s failed pilgrimage to his father’s Moroccan hometown instigates a more sensual search for his place in the world.

Vincent travels to Rabat in the hope of finding the house where his dad grew up. At a train station back in France, on the way to see his father for the last time, he instead meets Ahmed, a Moroccan university student. Across a transformative day, the two share intimacy, conversation, grief and soul-searching. Mardochi is a gorgeously moving queer meditation on belonging, desire and the search for home.
synopsis_zh:
一个男人前往父亲的摩洛哥故乡朝圣，却以失败告终，这反而促使他开始一场更为感性的追寻，去寻找自己在世界中的位置。

文森特来到拉巴特，希望找到父亲成长的那座房子。此前在法国的一座火车站，正当他准备去见父亲最后一面时，他却邂逅了艾哈迈德——一名摩洛哥大学生。在改变彼此的一天里，两人分享了亲密、交谈、悲伤与对内心的探问。《马多奇》是一部极为动人的酷儿沉思之作，叩问归属、欲望与对家园的追寻。
highlight_zh: 细腻动人的酷儿公路片，一日邂逅叩问归属与家园

synopsis_en:
The story of a pioneering female palaeontologist, whose discoveries – at just 12 years of age – changed our understanding of prehistory.

Pre-teen Mary Anning loves nothing more than scouring the local seaside cliffs on fossil-finding expeditions with her father, who encourages her passion. It’s an activity typically frowned upon for a girl in 1811 – and, when her father dies suddenly, it seems like the grieving Mary’s dinosaur-hunting career is over before it started. But he leaves behind a mysterious drawing that might offer the one chance she has to change her fortunes … and, in so doing, change the world.

Inspired by the true story of the groundbreaking English fossil collector of the same name, Locarno Kids Award winner Marcel Barelli’s debut feature is built on a bedrock of enchanting handcrafted 2D animation. Exploring a key moment in Anning’s much-mythologised but little-known childhood – the discovery of the world’s first complete identified ichthyosaur skeleton – and accompanied by a deliberately anachronistic soundtrack of lo-fi punk rock, Mary Anning is a big-hearted tale of friendship and adventure for the young and not-so-young alike.
synopsis_zh:
一位开创性的女性古生物学家的故事——年仅12岁时,她的发现便改变了人类对史前世界的认知。

少女玛丽·安宁最喜欢的事,莫过于和父亲一起在家乡的海边悬崖上四处搜寻,踏上寻找化石的探险之旅,而父亲也一直鼓励着她的这份热爱。在1811年,这样的活动对一个女孩来说通常是不被认可的——当父亲骤然离世,悲痛中的玛丽刚刚起步的"猎龙"生涯,似乎还未真正开始便要就此终结。然而,父亲身后留下了一幅神秘的图画,或许正藏着她改变自身命运的唯一机会……而她也将由此改变整个世界。

影片灵感源自那位同名的英国化石收藏家的真实故事,这位开拓者曾轰动一时。洛迦诺儿童单元奖得主马塞尔·巴雷利的这部长片处女作,以令人着迷的手绘二维动画为根基,聚焦安宁那段被神话渲染却鲜为人知的童年中的关键一刻——世界上第一具被完整鉴定的鱼龙骨架的发现;再配上刻意制造出时代错位感的低保真朋克摇滚配乐。《玛丽·安宁》是一则满怀赤诚的友谊与冒险故事,无论老少都能从中获得感动。
highlight_zh: 洛迦诺获奖导演手绘动画,12岁女孩改写史前认知

title_en: Mary Oliver: Saved by the Beauty of the World
synopsis_en:
Bestselling Pulitzer Prize–winning poet Mary Oliver was famously private; a loving look at her one wild and precious life sheds new light on her cherished work.

If a winner of major contemporary poetry awards were ever simultaneously a pop-cultural icon, Mary Oliver is it. Openly queer but fiercely private, Oliver – who died in 2019, aged 83 – was an American mystic, enamoured by the transcendental natural beauty she encountered on her daily walks through Provincetown’s woods and wilds. Influenced by Whitman, Thoreau, Keats and Emerson, and often compared with Dickinson and Rumi, Oliver’s celebrated nature poems have inspired ordinary folk for generations.

Now, in this documentary on the poet’s life, director Sasha Waters respectfully shows us the woman behind the words adored by millions, exploring Oliver’s lonely and sometimes traumatic childhood as well as her salvation: in love, in nature and in writing. Friends and admirers including Stephen Colbert, Lucy Dacus, John Waters, Steve Buscemi and Helena Bonham Carter share memories and read favourite poems, while previously unseen photos, prose, essays and correspondence offer insights into Oliver’s inner world. Interspersed with stunning visuals of the landscapes that so inspired her, the film offers a tender, authentic and enlivening study of her life, loves and letters.

In this timely, incisive Rotterdam award winner, an idealistic rural schoolteacher turns local politician – then slowly submits to the inexorable weight of corruption.

In a remote Bangladeshi community surrounded by protected woodlands, beloved schoolteacher Jahir (Nasir Uddin Khan) is running in the local election. With his progressive values and gift for eloquent oration, Jahir seems like the perfect progressive candidate, a voice who can represent this rural community on the national level. Soon, however, his ideals come into conflict with crushing reality, as campaign donors, influential businessmen, local thugs, shady police, petty bureaucrats and political powerbrokers all lean on Jahir for favours, preferential treatment and dirty deals.

The recipient of the Big Screen Award at Rotterdam, this sober political drama is a morality play of compromised ethics and the slow rot of corruption. The son of a former government minister, director Rezwan Shahriar Sumit knows all too well the personal cost of a political career. Openly evoking the real-life controversies of former prime minister Sheikh Hasina’s authoritarian rule, Master is a classical political parable that’s both local in its specifics and universal in its themes.
synopsis_zh:
在这部题材切中时弊、笔锋犀利的鹿特丹获奖影片中，一位理想主义的乡村教师投身地方政坛，却渐渐屈服于腐败那股不可抗拒的重压。

孟加拉一处偏远社区四周环绕着受保护的林地，深受爱戴的教师贾希尔（纳西尔·乌丁·汗 饰）正在参加地方选举。他秉持进步理念，又长于雄辩，看上去正是理想的进步派候选人，能把这个乡村社区的声音带上国家层面。然而不久，他的理想便与残酷的现实迎面相撞——竞选金主、有权势的商人、地方恶霸、勾当不清的警察、斤斤计较的官僚，以及政治掮客，纷纷向贾希尔施压，索要好处、特殊照顾和肮脏交易。

本片荣获鹿特丹电影节大银幕奖，是一出关于道德妥协与腐败缓慢侵蚀的严肃政治剧，宛如一则道德寓言。导演雷兹万·沙赫里亚尔·苏米特是前政府部长之子，对从政的个人代价再清楚不过。影片毫不避讳地影射前总理谢赫·哈西娜威权统治的现实争议，《校长》是一则经典的政治寓言——既有孟加拉本土的具体质感，又直抵普世的主题。
highlight_zh: 鹿特丹大银幕奖，孟加拉政坛腐败寓言，《综艺》盛赞

synopsis_en:
The mythology of the fateful 1986 World Cup quarter-final clash between England and Argentina is untangled in this thrilling documentary.

The date 22 June 1986 is etched into the collective mythologies of two nations and football fans around the globe. The FIFA World Cup quarter-final match played that day between arch rivals England and Argentina is infamous for the contentious “hand of god” goal from Diego Maradona, followed minutes later by his “goal of the century”. But it’s not just the golden boy’s feats that set the match apart; geopolitical tensions that had been brewing for years had only recently boiled over in the deadly Falklands War, and fans on both sides viewed this game through a prism of revenge.

Forty years later, directors Juan Cabral and Santiago Franco reinvestigate this historic moment in exhilarating detail, echoing the structure of the game and thoughtfully reflecting on the historical, cultural and sociopolitical context that gave it so much charge. Cathartic interviews with former on-field opponents including Gary Lineker, Peter Shilton, Ricardo Giusti, Jorge Burruchaga and Julio Olarticoechea, shot in exquisite monochrome, are juxtaposed against lively archival footage of the match in vivid colour, all framed in the same boxy 4:3 ratio through which that day’s audiences viewed the action on their TV sets. Whether you’ve seen the match 100 times or never, The Match makes for a suspenseful, riveting and ultimately moving watch.
synopsis_zh:
这部扣人心弦的纪录片，层层剥开1986年世界杯英格兰对阵阿根廷那场命运之战的传奇迷雾。

1986年6月22日，这个日期铭刻在两个国家和全球球迷的集体记忆之中。当天，宿敌英格兰与阿根廷在国际足联世界杯四分之一决赛中狭路相逢——迭戈·马拉多纳那记备受争议的“上帝之手”进球臭名昭著，而仅仅几分钟后，他又踢出了那记“世纪进球”。然而，让这场比赛与众不同的，绝不只是这位天才少年的球场壮举：多年积压的地缘政治紧张局势，不久前刚在惨烈的马岛战争中彻底爆发，双方球迷都是透过复仇的棱镜来看待这场较量。

四十年后，导演胡安·卡布拉尔与圣地亚哥·佛朗哥以令人血脉偾张的细腻笔触重新审视这一历史时刻。影片呼应了比赛本身的结构，深入而审慎地反思了赋予这场对决如此张力的历史、文化与社会政治背景。加里·莱因克尔、彼得·希尔顿、里卡多·朱斯蒂、豪尔赫·布鲁查加、胡里奥·奥拉蒂科埃切亚等昔日场上对手的采访极具情感释放的力量，以精致的黑白影像拍摄，与鲜艳彩色的生动比赛档案影像交相辉映——两者都被框在同一个4:3的方正画幅中，正如当年观众在电视机前观看这场对决时所见。无论你已把这场比赛看过一百遍，还是从未看过，《世纪对决》都是一次悬念迭起、引人入胜、最终动人心弦的观影体验。
highlight_zh: 《综艺》盛赞：马拉多纳“上帝之手”世纪之战四十年后重审

synopsis_en:
In her only film role, opera singer Maria Callas stars as the infamous sorceress in Pier Paolo Pasolini’s mesmeric take on the immortal Greek tragedy.

High priestess Medea, the granddaughter of the Greek sun god Helios, has her life fatefully ruptured when Jason and the Argonauts arrive on her homeland of Colchis to steal the Golden Fleece. Together, she and Jason abscond to Corinth, where she attempts to relinquish her spiritual past and subsume herself in the role of dutiful wife and mother to their two sons. When Jason abandons her to follow a more politically beneficial marriage, Medea is driven to a shocking act of vengeance.

In this visually stunning adaptation of Euripides’s canonical work, Pier Paolo Pasolini infuses the mythical tragedy with biting colonial allegory. A close friend of the visionary director, the legendary Maria Callas – dressed in brilliant costumes by Piero Tosi, who had previously worked with her on opera productions – delivers a powerhouse performance of diva proportions in the title role. The dramatic landscapes of Türkiye’s Central Anatolian region are further emphasised by the production design of Dante Ferretti, who worked on eight of Pasolini’s films before his Oscar-winning Hollywood career.

“Full of eccentric imagination and real passion … In its eerie evocation of Medea's world, which (according to Pasolini) is our subconscious world, it is superb.” – The New York Times

2K Digitisation
synopsis_zh:
帕索里尼以这部令人着迷的作品重新演绎了不朽的希腊悲剧，歌剧名伶玛丽亚·卡拉斯在她唯一一次银幕演出中饰演那位声名狼藉的女巫。

美狄亚是女祭司，希腊太阳神赫利俄斯的孙女。当伊阿宋率领阿尔戈号勇士来到她的故乡科尔基斯盗取金羊毛时，她的命运被彻底改写。她与伊阿宋私奔至科林斯，试图割舍自己的灵性过往，全身心投入贤妻良母的角色，抚养他们的两个儿子。然而当伊阿宋为攀附一桩更有政治利益的婚姻而抛弃她时，美狄亚被逼上了一条令人震骇的复仇之路。

在这部对欧里庇得斯经典之作视觉上惊艳夺目的改编中，帕索里尼为这则神话悲剧注入了尖锐的殖民寓言。作为这位极具远见的导演的挚友，传奇的玛丽亚·卡拉斯身着皮耶罗·托西为她量身打造的华美戏服（托西此前已在她的歌剧演出中与其合作），在这一主角身上奉献了一场歌剧天后气派的震撼演出。土耳其中安纳托利亚地区壮阔的自然景观，因丹特·费雷蒂的美术设计而愈发夺目——费雷蒂曾参与帕索里尼的八部影片，此后在好莱坞开启了荣获奥斯卡奖的辉煌生涯。

“充满怪诞的想象力与真挚的激情……它对美狄亚世界那种诡谲的召唤——按帕索里尼所言，那正是我们的潜意识世界——精彩绝伦。”——《纽约时报》

2K 数字修复版
highlight_zh: 歌剧女神卡拉斯唯一银幕演出，帕索里尼重述希腊悲剧

synopsis_zh:
感谢麦德曼娱乐（Madman Entertainment）的鼎力支持，我们诚邀墨尔本影展会员参加6月23日周二举行的《夺命引线》专属会员优先场。

1977年2月8日清晨，44岁的安东尼·G.“托尼”·基里希斯闯入美利丹抵押贷款公司总裁理查德·O.·霍尔的办公室，用一支锯短的12号霰弹枪将他挟持为人质，枪口用一根“死亡引线”绑在霍尔的头上，触发即致命。这部影片改编自这场轰动全球的真实对峙事件：托尼要挟索要500万美元、不予起诉，并要霍尔一家亲口向他道歉，为他们“欺骗”走本该属于他的钱财。

本片由格斯·范·桑特执导，比尔·斯卡斯加德、戴克·蒙哥马利、科尔曼·多明戈和阿尔·帕西诺主演。

订票须知：本场放映的订票通道将于5月27日周三晚6点开放——若名额订满，请在订票页面加入候补名单。座位安排：墨尔本影展会员专场不设指定座位，采取先到先得原则，请准时入场以选择心仪座位。
highlight_zh: 范·桑特执导，帕西诺、斯卡斯加德重现真实劫持惊魂

synopsis_en:
Visually imaginative and richly symbolic, this filmic collage recalls the writer/director’s own childhood in Chechnya, where she witnessed the atrocities of war firsthand.

In the late 1980s, six-year-old Vladlena Sandu was sent from Crimea to Grozny, Chechnya, to live with her grandparents. Little did she, or her family, know that the horrors of war would be right on their doorstep over the following decades through the fall of the Soviet Union and the ensuing Russo-Chechen Wars. In this poetic, autobiographical hybrid documentary, Sandu revisits her traumatic childhood memories, confronting the ways in which geopolitical conflict impacts children, and asking what can be done to break these generational cycles of violence.

The influence of Andrei Tarkovsky, Pier Paolo Pasolini and Sergei Parajanov looms large in the evocative and lyrical imagery that makes up Memory, which incorporates live-action re-enactment, puppetry, animation, archival material and surreal vignettes shot on 16mm film. Nevertheless, this staggering, unique cinematic tapestry is thoroughly Sandu’s own. Depicting her tumultuous past with breathtaking intimacy and artistry, she also bears singular witness to the children whose lives are being threatened today by wars and conflict the world over.
synopsis_zh:
这部影像拼贴之作充满视觉想象、饱含象征意味，回望编剧兼导演本人在车臣度过的童年——她曾亲眼目睹战争的暴行。

上世纪八十年代末，六岁的弗拉德列娜·桑杜从克里米亚被送往车臣的格罗兹尼，与祖父母一同生活。无论是她还是家人都未曾料到，在此后数十年间，随着苏联解体以及接踵而至的俄罗斯-车臣战争，战火竟会烧到自家门前。在这部诗意的自传式混合纪录片中，桑杜重返自己创伤累累的童年记忆，直面地缘政治冲突对孩子造成的伤害，并追问：我们能做些什么，才能斩断这世代相传的暴力轮回？

安德烈·塔可夫斯基、皮埃尔·保罗·帕索里尼与谢尔盖·帕拉杰诺夫的影响，在《记忆》那如梦如诗、意境深远的影像中清晰可辨——影片融合了真人搬演、木偶戏、动画、档案资料，以及用16毫米胶片拍摄的超现实片段。然而，这幅震撼人心、独一无二的电影织锦，从头到尾都属于桑杜自己。她以令人屏息的亲密与艺术性描摹自身动荡的过往，也为今天全世界那些生命正被战争与冲突所威胁的孩子，留下了一份独特的见证。
highlight_zh: 车臣战火下的童年自白，塔可夫斯基式诗意影像，《综艺》盛赞非凡

synopsis_en:
In this forward-thinking drama, a widowed businessman becomes involved with a much younger employee at his textiles factory.

Jerry Kingsley (played by two-time Academy Award winner Fredric March), a recently bereaved Manhattan textiles manufacturer, is encouraged by all around him to take a new wife. What his family and buddies don’t expect is that the 56-year-old man’s affections will land on Betty Preisser (Kim Novak), the 24-year-old divorced receptionist who works at his factory. Even as the two tentatively pursue this May–December romance, they soon grasp the complexities of sharing the relationship with their families and friends.

Marilyn Monroe had originally campaigned to play Betty after seeing the Broadway production on which the film was based, but the role instead went to Novak, keen to prove her acting chops and break free of the bombshell image Columbia Pictures had created for her. Adapted for the screen by playwright Paddy Chayefsky (Marty) and shot in striking black-and-white, the emotional performances from March and Novak – who cites it as her favourite turn – devastate. Premiering in Competition at the 1959 Cannes Film Festival, where Novak’s appearance on the Croisette was among the event’s most documented, Middle of the Night is a deeply human and compassionate portrait of people reaching for connection in a world determined to judge them for it.
synopsis_zh:
在这部颇具前瞻性的剧情片中，一位丧偶的商人与自己纺织厂里一名远比他年轻的员工陷入了感情。

杰里·金斯利（由两届奥斯卡得主弗雷德里克·马奇饰演）是曼哈顿一位新近丧偶的纺织品制造商，身边所有人都劝他再娶一位太太。然而，家人和朋友们万万没想到，这位五十六岁男人的爱意，竟落在了在他厂里当接待员、二十四岁的离异女子贝蒂·普赖瑟（金·诺瓦克饰）身上。当两人小心翼翼地展开这段忘年恋时，他们很快便体会到，要与各自的家人和朋友共同面对这段关系，是何等的复杂。

玛丽莲·梦露在看过本片所改编的百老汇舞台剧后，曾极力争取出演贝蒂一角，但这个角色最终花落诺瓦克——她一心想证明自己的演技，摆脱哥伦比亚影业为她打造的"性感尤物"形象。本片由剧作家帕迪·查耶夫斯基（《君子好逑》）改编成银幕剧本，以极具张力的黑白影像拍摄，马奇与诺瓦克饱含深情的表演令人心碎——诺瓦克更将其视为自己最钟爱的一次演出。影片入围1959年戛纳电影节主竞赛单元首映，诺瓦克现身红毯的身影是当届最受瞩目的画面之一。《午夜情缘》是一幅深刻而充满悲悯的人性画卷，描绘了一群人在一个执意评判他们的世界里，努力伸手去触碰彼此的情感联结。
highlight_zh: 两届奥斯卡影帝携手金·诺瓦克，戛纳主竞赛忘年恋经典

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

Over one cool indie-sleaze summer in the city of poutine and Arcade Fire, a self-sabotaging rising rock critic played by Barbie Ferreira falls for two guys in the same band.

In 2011, ambitious young music critic Grace plans a summer sabbatical in Montreal, sick of getting exploited by her Toronto alt-weekly editor and snubbed by chin-stroking bro colleagues. Moving in with chic DJ Madeleine and drummer Hugo, Grace starts promoting Hugo’s band Bone Patrol to impress its vain frontman Chevy, “the worst guy in Montreal” – though something slower and sweeter simmers with floppy-haired guitarist Archie. Things go off the frets as Grace’s planned 33 ⅓ book on Alanis Morissette’s Jagged Little Pill falls by the wayside, her funds run perilously low and past traumas resurface as bad choices.

Writer/director Chandler Levack (Netflix’s Roommates) based her sophomore feature on her own youth in Montreal’s alt trenches. Her affectionate but bittersweet romantic dramedy – more Reality Bites than Almost Famous – premiered at TIFF and toured to Vancouver, Stockholm and SXSW. As Grace, Barbie Ferreira (Bob Trevino Likes It, MIFF 2024) brings fierce empathy to an impulsive, sometimes exasperating but easily recognisable protagonist, while Bone Patrol’s personnel include members of real-life Montreal band TOPS.

The winner of this year’s Grand Prix at Cannes, Andrey Zvyagintsev’s first film in almost a decade is an immaculate, sometimes darkly funny howl of rage at the corruption and moral entropy of Vladimir Putin’s war-enmeshed Russia.

In the immediate wake of his nation’s invasion of Ukraine, wealthy company CEO Gleb is directed to provide cannon fodder for Russia’s war machine. As he is ‘volunteering’ men to be drafted from within his employee pool, he learns that his wife Galina is having an affair with a handsome young artist. This intersection of Gleb’s professional and private crises becomes a trigger point for a shocking showdown.

After recovering from a near-fatal coma in 2021, dissident Russian director Andrey Zvyagintsev (Loveless, MIFF 2017) has returned to reinterpret Claude Chabrol’s 1969 classic The Unfaithful Wife as a staunchly contemporary study of masculinity, both personal and political. His life in exile in France has only sharpened his fury at the current state of his fatherland, which is directed with exquisite precision not just at Putin and his cronies but also at the everyday collaborators, deliberate or accidental, who proliferate in the shadow of war. Shot in Latvia, Minotaur is a merciless thriller for our present times, with a crisp and cunning eye for detail and a savage streak of wry humour – a pièce de résistance in more ways than one.
synopsis_zh:
本届戛纳电影节评审团大奖得主、安德烈·萨金塞夫近十年来的首部作品，是一声无懈可击、时而透着黑色幽默的愤怒呐喊，直指普京治下深陷战争泥潭的俄罗斯，控诉其腐败与道德的全面崩坏。

就在俄罗斯入侵乌克兰之后不久，富有的公司总裁格列布被要求为俄国的战争机器输送炮灰。当他正从自己的员工中"自愿"挑人送去应征时，却得知妻子加林娜与一位年轻英俊的艺术家有染。格列布事业与私生活的双重危机在此交汇，最终引爆了一场惊心动魄的对决。

2021年从一场几近致命的昏迷中康复后，持不同政见的俄罗斯导演安德烈·萨金塞夫（《无爱可诉》，2017年墨尔本国际电影节）回归影坛，将克洛德·夏布洛尔1969年的经典之作《不忠的妻子》重新诠释为一则彻底当代的男性气质研究，兼及个人与政治两个层面。流亡法国的生活只让他对祖国现状的怒火愈发炽烈——他以极其精准的笔触，不仅将矛头指向普京及其党羽，更指向那些在战争阴影下滋生蔓延、或有意或无意的日常帮凶。影片摄于拉脱维亚，《弥诺陶洛斯》是一部为当下时代而作的冷峻惊悚片，观察细节的目光锐利而狡黠，还带着一抹辛辣的冷幽默——无论从哪个意义上说，都堪称一部压轴杰作。
highlight_zh: 戛纳评审团大奖，萨金塞夫十年回归，怒斥战时俄罗斯

synopsis_en:
From first feature to 20th, our panel of emerging and established directors will discuss making movies in the current micro-positive moment and beyond.

Take a temp check on the current indie scene and what it’s like making a film today – whether it’s your debut or you’re a couple of decades deep. Discussing their recent projects and what might lie ahead are celebrated American director Joe Swanberg (Happy Christmas, MIFF 2014; Drinking Buddies, MIFF 2013), who is screening the Dakota Johnson-starring The Sun Never Sets at MIFF 2026; Hyun Lee (Asian Girls, MIFF 2018) whose buzzy first feature French Girls is set in Sydney’s fashion world; Maddelin McKenna (Patterns of the Afternoon, MIFF 2022), with her thrilling first feature Mad Rush, shot on the streets of Melbourne; and phenomenally prolific filmmaker Alice Maio Mackay, whose new feature Our Effed Up World, co-produced by Jane Schoenbrun (I Saw the TV Glow, MIFF 2024), is her seventh at age 21.

Joe Swanberg is an indie mainstay who has directed more than 20 features, including Drinking Buddies, Digging for Fire, Happy Christmas and Nights and Weekends, which he co-directed with Greta Gerwig. In addition to writing and directing all 25 episodes of Netflix’s Chicago anthology Easy, he’s directed in TV for HBO, 20th Century Fox and Netflix.

Hyun Lee is a Korean-Australian writer and director based in Sydney. Her feature film debut French Girls premiered at the 2026 Sydney Film Festival, and her short film Asian Girls had its world premiere at SXSW South by Southwest Film Festival in 2018 and was a recipient of the ScreenNSW: Emerging Filmmakers’ Fund. Her recent TV writing credits include Paramount+ series Fake, starring Asher Keddie and David Wenham. The series broke subscription and streaming records and won the Australian Writers’ Guild Award for Limited Series.

Alice Maio Mackay is a 21-year-old award-winning filmmaker. Her latest feature film, Our Effed Up World, premiered at the 2026 Frameline Festival and has its international premiere this year at MIFF. Her films, including The Serpent’s Skin, Carnage for Christmas and Satranic Panic, have premiered at Frameline, Fantasia, SXSW Australia and Outfest festivals. Her features have had theatrical releases in Australia and North America and are Shudder/AMC+ exclusives.

Maddelin Mckenna is a writer/director from Naarm/Melbourne. Her 2026 debut feature film Mad Rush will have its world premiere at the 74th Melbourne International Film Festival as part of the prestigious MIFF Premiere Fund. Her 2022 short film Patterns of the Afternoon premiered at MIFF 70, where Maddelin participated in the Accelerator Lab program; it also won Best Short Film at Melbourne Women in Film Festival in 2024. She has also worked as an executive assistant to renowned producers Tony Ayres and Andrea Denholm at Tony Ayres Productions.

This event has a ‘Pay What You Wish’ ticket option. This means that if you are not in a position to pay for your ticket but would like to attend this event, you can simply enter an amount over $0 you feel comfortable paying and select the number of tickets you would like to book. If you are not in a position to pay for your tickets, please select the Talk Free option.

The summer of 2002 changes everything for shy Arkansas teenager Minnie in this critically lauded queer coming-of-age marvel co-starring Sophie Okonedo.

Minnie and Callie are chalk and cheese. Callie is the star of every school play and has her sights set on Juilliard after graduation. Minnie hasn’t quite figured out what she wants to be yet, and has always been content cheering her best friend on from the sidelines. When a tragic accident tears their friendship apart just before the start of senior year, Minnie embarks on a close friendship with Callie’s elegant mother, Helen – a complicated dynamic that causes friction between Minnie and her own perpetually frazzled working mother, Barbara.

The third feature collaboration from husband-and-wife duo Kelly O’Sullivan and Alex Thompson (Saint Frances; Ghostlight), Mouse is a heartfelt and deeply humanistic portrayal of the complexities of navigating loss at any age. The film deftly shifts between wincing humour, sincerity and heartbreak thanks to committed performances from Katherine Mallen Kupferer as Minnie, Sophie Okonedo (Clarissa, MIFF 2026) as Helen and Tara Mallen (Kupferer’s real-life mother, whom she also appeared alongside in Ghostlight) as Barbara, while David Hyde Pierce contributes a poignant turn as Minnie’s emotionally intuitive drama teacher.
synopsis_zh:
2002 年的那个夏天,改变了阿肯色州腼腆少女明妮的一切——这部广受赞誉的酷儿成长佳作,由索菲·奥康内多联袂主演。

明妮和凯莉是截然不同的两个人。凯莉是每一出校园戏剧的主角,毕业后一心想考进茱莉亚学院。明妮还没想清楚自己想成为什么样的人,一直甘愿在场边为好友加油喝彩。就在高三开学前夕,一场悲剧性的意外撕裂了她们的友情,明妮转而与凯莉优雅的母亲海伦结下深厚情谊——这段微妙复杂的关系,也在明妮与她那位终日焦头烂额的职场母亲芭芭拉之间埋下了摩擦。

《小老鼠》是凯莉·奥沙利文与亚历克斯·汤普森这对夫妻档继《圣弗朗西斯》《幽灵之光》之后的第三度长片合作,以真挚而深切的人文视角,描摹了任何年龄都要面对的失去之痛。影片在令人心头一紧的幽默、真诚与心碎之间游刃有余地切换,这有赖于三位主演的倾情演绎:凯瑟琳·马伦·库普费雷尔饰演明妮,索菲·奥康内多(《克拉丽莎》,2026 墨尔本电影节)饰演海伦,塔拉·马伦(库普费雷尔现实中的母亲,两人曾在《幽灵之光》中同台演出)饰演芭芭拉;大卫·海德·皮尔斯则贡献了一段动人的表演,饰演明妮那位善解人意的戏剧老师。
highlight_zh: 《圣弗朗西斯》夫妻档新作,酷儿成长佳作,好评如潮

synopsis_en:
A twentysomething homebody is stuck carrying more than she bargained for in this gleefully gloopy Kiwi body-horror comedy.

After an unusual erotic encounter with a neighbour in the laundry room of their apartment building, Mary finds herself unexpectedly knocked up. But worse, Mary’s unborn offspring is a rapidly gestating alien foetus – the baby daddy is part alien (the part that counts). An underachieving millennial who still lives with her oversharing, open-minded-to-the-extreme single mother, Mary must now navigate dismissive doctors, a useless parenting partner and a whole host of discombobulating physical side effects if she is to reclaim autonomy over her body and her life.

Expanding on their 2024 short, director duo Sean Wallace and Jordan Mark Windsor – aka THUNDERLIPS – bring an unmistakeably Kiwi self-deprecating humour to this outrageous comedy positively dripping in extraterrestrial bodily fluids. Hannah Lynch (Petrol, MIFF 2022) shines as the unapologetically pissed-off Mary, and the visceral practical effects and tentacled prosthetics are a sight to behold.
synopsis_zh:
在这部欢乐黏腥的新西兰身体恐怖喜剧里，一位二十来岁的宅女意外背上了远超预期的负担。

在公寓楼的洗衣房里与邻居来了一场不同寻常的情欲邂逅后，玛丽发现自己意外中招怀孕了。但更糟的是，她腹中未出世的孩子竟是一个飞速孕育的外星胎儿——孩子他爸有一部分是外星人（而且恰恰是关键的那部分）。作为一个至今仍和口无遮拦、思想开放到离谱的单身老妈同住的一事无成的千禧一代，玛丽如今必须周旋于爱搭不理的医生、毫无用处的育儿伴侣，以及一连串让人晕头转向的身体副作用之间，才有望夺回对自己身体与人生的掌控权。

导演二人组肖恩·华莱士与乔丹·马克·温莎——即“THUNDERLIPS”——在其 2024 年短片的基础上加以扩展，为这部荒诞不经、从头到尾都淌满外星体液的喜剧注入了鲜明的新西兰式自嘲幽默。汉娜·林奇（《汽油》，2022 年墨尔本电影节）将一身怒气、毫不掩饰的玛丽演得光彩夺目，而那些逼真骇人的实体特效与触手假体更是不容错过的一大奇观。
highlight_zh: 新西兰重口身体恐怖喜剧，黏腻荒诞又走心，笑到失控

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains strong-impact themes

Mesmerising flights of starlings over Spain remind the director of the joy and hope that soar when we face hard times together.

Longing for his lover in Brazil during COVID lockdown, Xavier films starlings in flight over his hometown in Spain. The birds’ intuitive synchronicity awakens memories of his HIV diagnosis, the defiant spirit of early AIDS activism in New York and Afro-Brazilian Candomblé rituals. Whorls of politics, grief, tenderness and spirituality enlighten a luminous, poetic essay on resilience and connection.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：含强烈冲击性主题

西班牙上空椋鸟群令人着迷的飞舞，让导演想起当我们携手面对艰难时刻时，那份升腾而起的喜悦与希望。

新冠封城期间，泽维尔思念着身在巴西的爱人，于是在西班牙家乡拍摄翱翔的椋鸟。群鸟凭直觉展现的默契同步，唤醒了他关于确诊 HIV 的记忆、纽约早期艾滋病维权运动那不屈的斗志，以及非洲裔巴西人的坎东布雷宗教仪式。政治、悲恸、温柔与灵性交织回旋，成就了一篇关于坚韧与联结的璀璨诗意随笔。
highlight_zh: 椋鸟群飞入诗，交织HIV记忆与艾滋维权的坚韧散文诗

synopsis_en:
A man is jealous of his girlfriend’s uncomfortably close relationship with her dog in this gleefully grotesque love triangle.

There’s nothing wrong with a woman loving a big fat dog – except to her boyfriend, who’d rather be snuggling her himself! This whimsical and very unglamorous comedy uses simple, squashy animation to depict bodies and sex in a manner that teeters between cute and bizarre, playing in an ambiguous domestic space of love and loyalty, romance and companionship.
synopsis_zh:
在这部欢脱又怪诞的三角恋喜剧里，一个男人嫉妒女友与她的狗之间那份亲密得令人不安的感情。

女人爱一只肥嘟嘟的大狗有什么错呢——除非你问她男友，他倒是宁愿被搂在怀里的那个是自己！这部异想天开、毫不精致的喜剧以简单、软塌塌的动画描绘身体与情欲，风格游走在可爱与诡异之间，在爱与忠诚、浪漫与陪伴之间那片暧昧的居家空间里恣意游戏。
highlight_zh: 怪趣软萌动画，一场人狗争宠的欢脱三角恋

synopsis_en:
Almost as controversial as it was lauded, this gorgeous, rigorously composed reflection on a break-up is a landmark work of Australian feminist cinema.

“After you left, I moved in here for a year, hoping that the view would pull me out of the misery.” Over a series of domestic tableaux – a copper kettle on the boil; a bulging vase stuffed with white daisies – a woman delivers a discursive monologue: the musings of a wounded heart, rich with intertextual references from Roland Barthes to Laurie Anderson and Bob Dylan. The speaker is Liz, a semi-fictive creation voiced by Jenny Vuletic but seen only fleetingly, as a night-time reflection in the window of her apartment overlooking Sydney’s bustling Blackwattle Bay.

Inspired by the works of Chris Marker and Chantal Akerman and made during a notable period for women filmmakers in Australia, Gillian Leahy’s singular, sophisticated essay film – shot on lush 35mm – was honoured at MIFF, the Sydney Film Festival and the AFI Awards on its release. However, My Life Without Steve also ruffled feathers, with Liz’s exploratory and sometimes accusatory monologue critiqued by some as failing certain feminist ideals. Forty years later, in a culture attuned to prickly autofiction, the conversation seems to have finally caught up to Leahy.
synopsis_zh:
这部对一段分手关系的凝视之作华美而构图严谨，其争议之声几乎与赞誉同样响亮，堪称澳大利亚女性主义电影的里程碑。

"你走之后，我在这里住了一年，希望窗外的景致能把我从痛苦里拉出来。"在一组组家常静物画面之间——烧开的铜壶、插满白色雏菊的鼓胀花瓶——一个女人娓娓道出漫游般的独白：那是一颗受伤之心的沉吟，交织着从罗兰·巴特到劳丽·安德森再到鲍勃·迪伦的互文引用。说话者名叫莉兹，是一个半虚构的人物，由珍妮·武莱蒂克配音，但全片只有惊鸿一瞥——她夜里映在公寓窗上的倒影，窗外是悉尼熙攘的黑金合欢湾。

受克里斯·马克与香特尔·阿克曼作品的启发，诞生于澳大利亚女性电影人辈出的年代，吉莉安·莉希这部风格独具、精致老练的散文电影——以浓郁的 35 毫米胶片拍摄——在上映时便斩获墨尔本电影节、悉尼电影节及澳大利亚电影学院奖的荣誉。然而《没有史蒂夫的日子》也曾激起争议：莉兹那段探寻式、时而带着控诉意味的独白，被一些人批评为未能契合某些女性主义理想。四十年后，在一个对棱角分明的自我虚构日益敏感的文化语境里，人们的讨论似乎终于追上了莉希的脚步。
highlight_zh: 澳洲女性主义电影里程碑，三大电影节获誉的散文诗

synopsis_en:
The latest from leading Berlin School writer/director Angela Schanelec follows a middle-aged couple whose marriage unravels after a car accident brings a secret to light.

At work one day, crane operator Thomas receives a call from his wife, Carla. She’s been in a car accident and needs him to pick her up. Arriving at the hospital, he finds her on a park bench outside, physically unharmed but crying inconsolably. Eventually, Carla confesses something about the specific circumstances of the accident, leaving Thomas shattered. This revelation leads both Thomas and Carla to share intimate conversations with friends and loved ones about the fragility of romantic relationships and the impossibility of ever truly knowing someone – even those with whom we share a life.

Two-time Silver Bear–winning filmmaker Angela Schanelec (I Was at Home, But, MIFF 2019) returns with another characteristically austere, defiantly minimalist work that’s fascinated with the psychology of modern relationships but resists easy interpretation – the kind of filmmaking that will appeal to fans of directors like Hong Sang-soo, Aki Kaurismäki and Éric Rohmer. Shot on 35mm by regular Radu Jude collaborator Marius Panduru (Diary of a Chambermaid, MIFF 2026), the Berlinale Competition–selected film is constructed from formally controlled tableau-like sequences, each deeply attuned to the beauty of everyday life, whether it be a brass band playing in a park as it begins to rain or a group of friends performing a dance to a Leonard Cohen song.
synopsis_zh:
柏林学派领军编剧兼导演安格拉·夏娜莱克的最新力作，讲述一对中年夫妻在一场车祸揭开秘密后婚姻逐渐瓦解的故事。

某天工作时，起重机操作员托马斯接到妻子卡拉的电话。她出了车祸，需要他去接。赶到医院后，他发现她坐在外面的长椅上，身体并无大碍，却哭得不能自已。最终，卡拉坦白了这场车祸的某些具体隐情，令托马斯彻底崩溃。这一真相让托马斯和卡拉分别与各自的朋友和亲人袒露心声，谈起爱情关系的脆弱，以及人永远无法真正了解另一个人——哪怕是与我们共度一生的枕边人。

两度斩获柏林电影节银熊奖的安格拉·夏娜莱克（《我在家，但……》，2019年墨尔本国际电影节）再度回归，带来又一部一如既往冷峻克制、坚持极简主义的作品。影片着迷于探究现代亲密关系的心理，却拒绝给出简单的解读——正是那种会令洪常秀、阿基·考里斯马基和埃里克·侯麦影迷心动的电影。本片由拉杜·裘德的长期合作者马里乌斯·潘杜鲁（《女仆日记》，2026年墨尔本国际电影节）以35毫米胶片拍摄，入围柏林电影节主竞赛单元，由一组组形式严整、宛如画卷的场景构筑而成，每一幕都深切捕捉着日常生活之美——无论是公园里铜管乐队在雨落时分的演奏，还是一群朋友随着莱昂纳德·科恩的歌起舞。
highlight_zh: 两届银熊奖得主柏林学派极简新作，入围柏林主竞赛

synopsis_en:
Watt’s warm and keenly funny follow-up to Look Both Ways offers a portal into a suburban Aussie family home rocked by a health crisis.

Natalie (Sacha Horler, Body Blow, MIFF 2026) and Ross (Matt Day, Underbelly) haven’t let parenthood unduly interrupt their sex lives … but a brain aneurysm is a different story. When a worse-for-wear Natalie wakes up in the hospital, she discovers that a lot of activities, not just coitus, are going to be off the table for a bit. Chronicling the lives of the members of this loving, casually chaotic household in the Melbourne ’burbs, My Year Without Sex unfolds as a series of 12 endearingly offbeat episodes – one for each month of Natalie’s recovery year.

Writer/director Sarah Watt was already an accomplished animator when she made her award-winning live-action debut Look Both Ways in 2005. Her sophomore feature extends that film’s fascination with the tragedy and humour of serious illness, and would have been the second in a proposed trilogy if Watt herself had not tragically passed away from cancer in 2011 without completing another film. Her swan song evinces a distinctive, seasoned talent taken much too soon.
synopsis_zh:
继《左右逢源》之后，瓦特再度奉上这部温暖而妙趣横生的作品，带我们走进澳大利亚郊区一户被健康危机搅乱的家庭。

为人父母并没有太多影响娜塔莉（萨查·霍勒饰，《痛击》，2026年墨尔本国际电影节）和罗斯（马特·戴饰，《黑帮世家》）的性生活……可脑动脉瘤就是另一回事了。当状况欠佳的娜塔莉在医院醒来，她发现要暂别的远不止床笫之欢，还有许许多多日常活动。影片记录下墨尔本郊区这个充满爱意、又时时鸡飞狗跳的家庭中每位成员的生活，以十二段惹人喜爱、别具一格的篇章徐徐展开——对应娜塔莉康复之年的每一个月份。

编剧兼导演莎拉·瓦特在2005年推出广受好评的真人处女作《左右逢源》之前，早已是一位造诣深厚的动画师。这部第二部长片延续了前作对重病之悲与喜的深切关注，本应是她计划中三部曲的第二部，可惜瓦特本人于2011年因癌症不幸离世，未能再完成一部作品。这部天鹅之歌昭示着一位独具个性、炉火纯青的才女，却过早地被命运带走。
highlight_zh: 《左右逢源》导演遗作，以幽默笔触书写重病之年

synopsis_en:
Droll and (un)deadpan, this stylish David Lynch–produced 90s indie curio – newly 4K-restored – follows an elegant vampire stalking Manhattan by night.

The city that never sleeps suits Nadja, a Romanian migrant nepo vampire who spends her nights drinking coffee, smoking cigarettes and waxing philosophical in East Village dive bars alongside fellow ennui-afflicted New York scenesters. When her dad, Count Dracula, dies from a nasty case of stake-in-the-heart, Nadja finally has a chance to emerge from her father’s long, overbearing shadow. But before she can make a fresh start, a twist of fate romantically entangles Nadja with Lucy – an extended relative of her father’s murderer, Van Helsing.

Owing as much to André Breton’s 1928 novel of the same name as it does to 1936 horror classic Dracula’s Daughter, this magnetically cool black comedy by Michael Almereyda (Marjorie Prime, MIFF 2017) is shot on luminous monochrome 35mm with shimmering vampire POV sequences captured by a toy Pixelvision camcorder. The soundtrack, featuring My Bloody Valentine, Portishead and The Verve, is an education in 90s shoegaze; while the cast includes Hal Hartley regulars Elina Löwensohn and Martin Donovan, Peter Fonda as Van Helsing, and even the late, great David Lynch (one of the film’s key financiers) making a cameo as a morgue attendant, naturally.
synopsis_zh:
冷面幽默、(不)动声色，这部由大卫·林奇担任监制、极具风格的90年代独立奇片如今经过4K修复重现——影片跟随一位优雅的吸血鬼在曼哈顿的夜色中游荡。

这座不夜城正适合娜嘉——一位来自罗马尼亚的移民、含着金汤匙出生的吸血鬼二代。她的夜晚在东村的破旧酒吧里度过，喝着咖啡、抽着香烟、发着人生感慨，身旁尽是些同样倦怠厌世的纽约文艺客。当她的父亲德古拉伯爵因心口被钉入木桩而一命呜呼，娜嘉终于有机会走出父亲那漫长而专横的阴影。然而，还没来得及开始新生活，命运的捉弄便让娜嘉与露西陷入了一段情缘——而露西，正是杀死她父亲的凶手范海辛的远房亲戚。

本片既取材于安德烈·布勒东1928年的同名小说，也脱胎于1936年的恐怖经典《德古拉之女》。这部冷酷迷人的黑色喜剧出自迈克尔·阿尔梅雷达之手（《玛乔丽的记忆》，2017年墨尔本国际电影节），以流光溢彩的黑白35毫米胶片拍摄，其中闪烁跳跃的吸血鬼主观视角镜头则由一台玩具级Pixelvision摄像机捕捉。配乐网罗了My Bloody Valentine、Portishead和The Verve，堪称一堂90年代盯鞋摇滚（shoegaze）的入门课；演员阵容则包括哈尔·哈特利御用班底埃莉娜·勒文松与马丁·多诺万、饰演范海辛的彼得·方达，甚至已故的伟大导演大卫·林奇（本片主要出资人之一）也理所当然地客串出演了一名停尸房看守。
highlight_zh: 大卫·林奇监制并客串，90年代盯鞋摇滚配乐的吸血鬼黑色喜剧

synopsis_en:
This adaptation of classic Japanese play Tokyo Notes is a thoughtful character study set in a sublime modern art museum.

Yuri, an architect from Tokyo, arrives in regional Nagi, a small town that’s home to both a magnificent art museum and an active military base. She’s there to visit her ex-husband’s sister, Yoriko, a sculptor who wants Yuri to sit for her. Staging sessions in a workshop barn on her dairy farm, Yoriko chips away at a block of camphorwood and at Yuri’s guardedness, their conversation turning personal. Two boys who attend Yoriko’s art classes and workshops, Keita and Haruki, are fascinated by this outsider, unsure of what the relationship between the two women is. As the quartet try to make sense of one another, much is left unsaid.

Reminiscent of the films of Éric Rohmer and Ryusuke Hamaguchi (All of a Sudden, MIFF 2026), and having earnt comparisons to Kelly Reichardt’s Showing Up (MIFF 2023) for its gentle depiction of artistry, this latest work from Koji Fukada (Harmonium, MIFF 2016) adapts Oriza Hirata’s 1994 theatrical production Tokyo Notes (which itself drew from Yasujirō Ozu’s masterpiece Tokyo Story, MIFF 2016). Nagi Notes is a keenly observed character study with no real explosions – save for the sound of military munitions drills that periodically ring out through the town. Pondering the nature of creativity, queer identity and the challenges of finding belonging amid the social strictures of Japanese society, this is a thoughtful, low-key conversation piece that’s perfect for those who like their dramas intimate and deeply human.
synopsis_zh:
这部改编自日本经典舞台剧《东京笔记》的作品，是一则以一座超凡脱俗的现代美术馆为背景的细腻人物研究。

来自东京的建筑师由里来到偏远的奈义——这座小镇既坐落着一座宏伟的美术馆，也驻扎着一处运作中的军事基地。她此行是为了探访前夫的姐姐、雕塑家依子，后者希望由里能做她的模特。在自家奶牛场的工作坊谷仓里，依子一边凿刻着一块樟木，一边也一点点凿开由里的戒备，两人的交谈渐渐转向私密之处。两个在依子的美术课与工作坊上学习的男孩——启太与春树，被这位外来者深深吸引，却又摸不清两个女人之间究竟是何种关系。当这四人试图彼此理解时，许多话语始终未曾说出口。

影片令人想起埃里克·侯麦与滨口龙介（《骤然之间》，2026墨尔本电影节）的作品，又因其对艺术创作的温柔描摹而被拿来与凯莉·雷查德的《第一头牛的故事》式作品《展出》（2023墨尔本电影节）相比。这是深田晃司（《�221号房间/临渊而立》，2016墨尔本电影节）的最新力作，改编自平田织佐1994年的舞台剧《东京笔记》（而该剧本身又取材自小津安二郎的杰作《东京物语》，2016墨尔本电影节）。《奈义笔记》是一部观察入微的人物研究，全片没有真正意义上的爆发——除了那时不时响彻全镇的军事演习炮火声。影片沉思着创造力的本质、酷儿身份认同，以及在日本社会种种规训之下寻求归属感的艰难，是一部沉静克制、以对话见长的作品，最适合钟爱私密而深具人性之戏剧的观众。
highlight_zh: 深田晃司新作，侯麦、滨口式静水深流的人物小品

synopsis_en:
In 1884, an officer working for the native police, in service of a white constable, is ambushed by a small band of Arrernte men.

A glimpse into a brutal chapter of Australia’s past, this powerful short from emerging Arrernte/Kalkadoon filmmaker Charles Perrurle Perkins follows an Indigenous man forced to work as a tracker for a white expansionist group forging their way across the Central Desert. Tasked with escorting a young Arrernte girl, he is forced to reckon with the colonial-driven violence that is tearing his people apart.
synopsis_zh:
1884年，一名效力于白人警官、供职于土著警队的警员，遭到一小队阿伦特族人的伏击。

这部震撼人心的短片出自崭露头角的阿伦特/卡尔卡敦族导演查尔斯·佩鲁尔·帕金斯之手，为我们揭开澳大利亚历史中残酷一页的一角。影片讲述一名原住民男子被迫为一支向中部沙漠深处开拓的白人扩张队伍充当追踪向导。在奉命护送一名阿伦特族少女的途中，他不得不直面这场由殖民驱动、正在撕裂自己族人的暴力。
highlight_zh: 阿伦特族新锐导演，直面殖民暴力的震撼短片

title_zh: 纽波特与伟大的民谣梦
synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

In 1965, Bob Dylan took the stage at the Newport Folk Festival and changed music forever … or so the story goes, as this glorious, immersive documentary explores.

There are many interpretations of the heckling at the Newport Folk Festival that accompanied Bob Dylan plugging in for the first time, but one thing remains clear: it represented a key turning point in the history of American music. In Newport & the Great Folk Dream, that moment is treated as a starting point for investigating the broader phenomenon of Newport, and how the countercultural event became one of the most iconic of its kind.

Mining the archives of previously unseen footage shot over four successive years by Murray Lerner for his 1967 Oscar-nominated documentary Festival, director Robert Gordon (Best of Enemies, MIFF 2015) has assembled an ecstatic account of the Newport Folk Festival in its formative years. Featuring illuminating performances from Johnny Cash, Joan Baez, John Lee Hooker, Muddy Waters, Howlin’ Wolf, Taj Mahal, Buffy Sainte-Marie, The Staple Singers and many others, alongside contemporary interviews with those who were there, it’s a historical document par excellence. Placing this precious footage within its social and political context, Newport & the Great Folk Dream is an extraordinarily raw and energising music documentary.
synopsis_zh:
特别呈现

1965 年，鲍勃·迪伦登上纽波特民谣音乐节的舞台，从此永远改变了音乐……至少故事是这么讲的——这部绚烂而沉浸的纪录片，正要探究这段传奇。

迪伦首次插上电吉他时，纽波特民谣音乐节现场的嘘声有着诸多解读，但有一点始终清晰：那是美国音乐史上一个关键的转折点。在《纽波特与伟大的民谣梦》中，这一刻被当作起点，用以审视纽波特这一更宏大的文化现象，探寻这场反主流文化的盛会如何成为同类事件中最具标志性的一个。

默里·勒纳曾为其 1967 年获奥斯卡提名的纪录片《音乐节》，连续四年在此拍摄了大量此前从未公开的素材。导演罗伯特·戈登（《宿敌》，2015 年墨尔本国际电影节）从这批档案中取材，拼贴出一部记录纽波特民谣音乐节草创岁月的狂喜之作。片中收录了约翰尼·卡什、琼·贝兹、约翰·李·胡克、穆迪·沃特斯、豪林·沃尔夫、泰吉·玛哈尔、巴菲·圣玛丽、斯泰普歌手合唱团等众多艺人的精彩演出，并穿插对当年亲历者的今日访谈，堪称一份无与伦比的历史文献。影片将这些珍贵影像置于其社会与政治语境之中，成就了一部格外原始、催人振奋的音乐纪录片。
highlight_zh: 迪伦插电改变音乐史，奥斯卡提名素材重现民谣黄金年代

synopsis_en:
Vividly restored in 4K, this 1993 anime masterpiece follows a ronin, a ninja and a spy on their quest to defeat eight superhuman warriors.

In Edo period Japan, wandering ronin Jubei winds up in a village tyrannised by an iron giant; there, he saves the female ninja Kagero, who decides to join him. Crossing paths with Dakuan, a government spy, they are informed that Jubei must confront the Eight Devils of Kimon – a band of malevolent super-ninja hell-bent on overthrowing the shogunate. As the trio set out to vanquish evil, they quickly learn that it’s kill or be killed.

First released in 1993, this legendary Animate Film production sits alongside Akira and Ghost in the Shell as a classic of its genre – one whose influence is evident in titles such as The Matrix, Kill Bill and Scott Pilgrim vs. the World (MIFF 2005). Restored in 4K with the involvement of director Yoshiaki Kawajiri and publicly revived at this year’s Berlinale, this cel-animated wonder is renowned for its action sequences featuring both visceral brutality and virtuosic movement. Expect cutthroat scuffles for power, raunchy sex scenes and plentiful larger-than-life creatures including a snake lady, a living hornet’s nest and a gay assassin who kills with near-invisible electric wires!
synopsis_zh:
这部1993年的动画杰作以4K技术精细修复，讲述一名浪人、一名忍者与一名密探联手击败八名超人武士的历程。

江户时代的日本，浪人柳生十兵卫流落到一座被钢铁巨人暴虐统治的村庄；在那里，他救下了女忍者阿嫆，她决意追随他同行。途中，他们与幕府密探茶丸不期而遇，得知十兵卫必须直面“鬼门八人众”——一群妄图颠覆幕府的邪恶超级忍者。三人踏上除魔之路，很快便明白：不是你死，就是我亡。

这部1993年首映的传奇动画由Animate Film出品，与《阿基拉》《攻壳机动队》并列，堪称同类作品中的经典，其影响力在《黑客帝国》《杀死比尔》以及《歪小子斯科特》（2005年墨尔本国际电影节展映）等作品中清晰可见。本片由导演川尻善昭亲自参与、以4K修复，并于今年柏林电影节公开重映；这部赛璐璐动画佳作以其动作场面闻名遐迩，既有血腥残酷的凶险，又不乏出神入化的动态之美。片中充满了尔虞我诈的权力厮杀、露骨大胆的情欲场面，以及众多超乎想象的奇诡角色——蛇女、活生生的马蜂窝，还有一个用近乎隐形的电线杀人的男同刺客！
highlight_zh: 与《阿基拉》齐名的动画cult经典，4K修复重现凌厉杀阵

synopsis_en:
Viewer Advice: Contains stroboscopic imagery

A modern riff on Cléo from 5 to 7, this tender debut feature follows the weekend odyssey of a young Parisian man after receiving a surprising diagnosis.

Nino’s 29th birthday weekend kicks off with a gut punch. His doctor informs him that not only does he have throat cancer, but he must start chemotherapy on Monday and also produce a sperm sample to freeze in case the treatment renders him infertile. Over the course of the weekend, Nino moves through the world in a fog while life goes on as normal around him. He visits his mother, runs into an old schoolmate and attends the surprise party thrown for him by his best friend. At every turn, Nino struggles to break the news to his loved ones – because to say it out loud would make it real.

Québécois wunderkind Théodore Pellerin (Lurker, MIFF 2025) has received major plaudits for his nuanced and vulnerable performance as Nino, collecting the Louis Roederer Foundation Rising Star Award at Cannes Critics’ Week and Best Male Acting Hope at France’s César Awards. Writer/director Pauline Loquès also won the César for Best First Film for her sensitive and warm-hearted helming of a story that eschews doom and gloom for humanity and hopefulness.
synopsis_zh:
观影提示：本片含频闪影像。

这部细腻的处女作是对《五点到七点的克莱奥》的当代回响，讲述一名巴黎年轻人在收到一纸意外诊断后，度过的一个周末旅程。

尼诺的二十九岁生日周末，以一记重击拉开序幕。医生告诉他，他不仅患上了喉癌，还必须在周一开始化疗，并先留存一份精子样本冷冻保存，以防治疗导致他不育。整个周末，尼诺如在雾中穿行，而周遭的生活却一如往常地继续。他去看望母亲，偶遇一位昔日同窗，还参加了好友为他筹办的惊喜派对。然而每一次，尼诺都难以向所爱之人开口说出这个消息——因为一旦说出口，一切就成了真的。

魁北克天才演员泰奥多尔·佩勒兰（《潜伏者》，2025 年墨尔本电影节）凭借对尼诺细腻而脆弱的诠释赢得广泛赞誉，斩获戛纳影评人周路易王妃基金会新星奖，以及法国凯撒奖最佳男演员新秀奖。编剧兼导演波利娜·洛盖斯也凭借这部作品荣获凯撒奖最佳处女作——她以敏感而温暖的笔触执导了这个故事，摒弃了沉重与绝望，转而拥抱人性与希望。
highlight_zh: 凯撒双奖加身，戛纳新星演绎绝境中的温柔与希望

synopsis_en:
In this beguiling miniature, an owl returns the audience’s stare.

Offering a different kind of riff on his signature minimalism, Alonso enshrines a singular face-to-face encounter with an owl.
synopsis_zh:
在这部引人入胜的微型影像中，一只猫头鹰回望着注视它的观众。

阿隆索以有别于以往的方式，重新演绎了他标志性的极简主义美学，将一次与猫头鹰独一无二的面对面凝视郑重呈现。
highlight_zh: 阿隆索极简美学微缩之作，与猫头鹰四目相对的凝视实验

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

SUPPORTED BY

Meet the dedicated fans barracking for the AFL’s hardest team to love.

Members of the North Melbourne Football Club Cheer Squad prepare to face longstanding rivals Essendon: a club they haven’t beaten in a decade.
synopsis_zh:
呈现

协力支持

认识这样一群铁杆球迷——他们为澳式足球联盟里最难讨人喜欢的球队摇旗呐喊。

北墨尔本足球俱乐部助威团的成员们正备战老对手埃森登：一支他们已经十年未曾击败的球队。
highlight_zh: 为最难被爱的球队呐喊，一群铁杆球迷的十年执念

synopsis_en:
Chris Marker was a filmmaker, artist and writer who was as visionary as he was famously elusive. Now, he forms the mysterious locus of this documentary drawing on his expansive archives.

Chris Marker liked to describe himself as “the best-known author of unknown films”, but perhaps the opposite is true. Today, there is widespread reverence for works such as La Jetée, his fleet but haunting sci-fi almost entirely comprising still images (and that later formed the basis for Terry Gilliam’s 12 Monkeys), and Sans Soleil (MIFF 1983), the existential travelogue that redefined the essay film. But Marker – one of numerous pseudonyms he used in his 91 years – very rarely gave interviews; averse to being photographed, he often used a drawing of his cat as an avatar.

The director’s death in 2012 left behind 550 boxes of archival material. Together with excerpts from his groundbreaking body of work, these materials form the basis for Brecht Debackere’s probing but necessarily oblique portrait of the artist – as narrated by Charlotte Rampling (Swimming Pool, MIFF 2003), the magisterial actor here personifying an archivist. In tune with Marker’s preoccupations, Nostalgia for the Future is a meditation on the slippery persistence of memory, personal as well as cultural: a precious souvenir for existing fans, and a beguiling introduction for anyone who wishes to peer behind his Cheshire grin.

As animals and humans collide in the world’s “Polar Bear Capital”, this acclaimed doc pairs gorgeous photography with broader climate change questions.

Welcome to the snowy Canadian outpost of Churchill, Manitoba, the self-proclaimed “Polar Bear Capital of the World”. Driven towards urban developments by changing climate and the increasing encroachment of ‘civilisation’ into wilderness, the iconic animals arrive as both dangerous predators and photo-op fodder for tourists. As the bears forage for food and scrap for survival, indifferent to the circus that surrounds them, locals debate whether to welcome them, drive them away peacefully or follow a more traditional mode of coexistence informed by Indigenous practices.

Adapted from Gabriela Osio Vanden and Jack Weisman’s award-winning 2021 short of the same name, this stirring and beautifully observational film won the U.S. Documentary Grand Jury Prize at Sundance. Blessed with stunning photography of bear and landscape, narrated by Inuit Elder Mike Tunalaaq Gibbons, and highlighted by a playful score from The White Lotus composer Cristóbal Tapia de Veer, this tragicomic portrait of one of the animal realm’s most regal creatures gives rise to bigger conversations about climate change, displacement, migration and the rights of habitation.
synopsis_zh:
在这座全球闻名的"北极熊之都"，动物与人类狭路相逢。这部广受赞誉的纪录片以绝美的影像，牵引出关于气候变化的深层追问。

欢迎来到加拿大曼尼托巴省的雪原小镇丘吉尔，一个自封"世界北极熊之都"的边陲之地。气候变迁与"文明"对荒野日益无度的侵占，把这些标志性的动物驱赶向人类的聚居地；它们既是危险的猎食者，也成了游客镜头下的猎奇对象。当北极熊四处觅食、为生存挣扎，对身边的喧嚣马戏漠然置之时，当地居民却争论不休：究竟该欢迎它们、和平地把它们驱离，还是遵循原住民智慧所指引的更传统的共存之道。

本片改编自加布里埃拉·奥西奥·万登与杰克·魏斯曼2021年同名获奖短片，这部动人而极具观察力的作品荣获圣丹斯电影节美国纪录片单元评审团大奖。影片以北极熊与雪原的惊艳影像见长，由因纽特长者迈克·图纳拉克·吉本斯担纲旁白，并有《白莲花度假村》配乐师克里斯托瓦尔·塔皮亚·德·维尔操刀的俏皮配乐点睛。这幅关于动物界最雍容生灵之一的悲喜肖像，引出了关于气候变化、流离失所、迁徙与栖息权的更宏大议题。
highlight_zh: 圣丹斯纪录片大奖，《白莲花》配乐师加持的北极熊悲喜诗篇

synopsis_en:
Home for his mother’s funeral, a femme-presenting son confronts the violence and expectations that have shaped his fractured bond with his father.

Gender-nonconforming Obi returns home to rural Nigeria after his mother’s death, aware that relatives and old friends may not accept the person he is. But Obi’s own hesitancy clouds any attempts to reconcile with his traditionally minded father. Sensitively observed and buoyed by its use of music, this proud portrait of gendered family dynamics is alert to what people communicate without words.
synopsis_zh:
为参加母亲的葬礼而返乡，一个外表阴柔的儿子不得不直面那些暴力与期待——正是它们，塑造了他与父亲之间早已破碎的羁绊。

性别气质不循常规的俄比，在母亲去世后回到尼日利亚乡下的家。他心里清楚，亲戚与旧友未必能接纳如今的自己。然而，俄比自身的迟疑，也让他与思想传统的父亲之间任何和解的尝试都蒙上了阴影。影片观察细腻，又因音乐的运用而灵动昂扬；这幅关于性别与家庭关系的骄傲肖像，敏锐地捕捉着人们在无言之中传递的一切。
highlight_zh: 尼日利亚酷儿返乡故事，细腻直面父子隔阂与性别期待

synopsis_en:
Evading the hard truth of their religious matriarch’s death, three sisters gestate dark ecstasies of faith and folk horror. Blessed be Mother.

Three young women have been raised in innocence on a remote, dilapidated homestead, alone with their bedbound, intensely religious mother. Fuelled by a heady brew of existential terror, dogmatic belief and desire to dominate, The Eldest decides to hide Mother’s death from her siblings, telling them the Devil is lurking behind her closed bedroom door as sound and stench, ready to repay their curiosity with a terrible sickness. Among the paperbark trees, invented sacraments begin playfully but soon plunge the trio into a claustrophobic shared delirium, gasping towards a devastating collapse.

Inspired by their own religious upbringing and fascination with European arthouse witch tropes, debutant West Australian director Peter Firebrace shot Of Womb with a tiny, close-knit cast and crew in a heritage-listed South Fremantle house with its own morbid history. Belying its micro-budget, this visually stunning psychological fever dream thrums with the ritual gestures of Dogtooth (MIFF 2009) and The Witch (MIFF 2015) and evokes the landscape-horror tradition of Picnic at Hanging Rock (MIFF 2018). The film’s own gripping simplicity, however, announces an exciting new voice in Australian cinema – one poised to disturb, provoke and captivate.
synopsis_zh:
为了逃避笃信宗教的母亲离世这一残酷真相，三姐妹在信仰与民俗恐怖交织的暗黑迷狂中愈陷愈深。愿母亲蒙福。

三个年轻女孩在一处偏远破败的宅院里被无邪地养大，与卧床不起、宗教信仰极为狂热的母亲相依为命。在生存恐惧、教条信念与掌控欲望的强烈驱使下，大姐决定向妹妹们隐瞒母亲的死讯，谎称魔鬼正潜伏在那扇紧闭的卧室门后，化作声响与恶臭，只要她们心生好奇便会遭其报复、染上可怕的疾病。在白千层树林之间，她们自创的圣礼起初还带着游戏意味，却很快将三人拖入一种幽闭而共享的谵妄，喘息着奔向一场毁灭性的崩塌。

受自身宗教成长经历以及对欧洲艺术片女巫题材的痴迷启发，西澳大利亚新锐导演彼得·法尔布雷斯以极小而紧密的演职人员团队，在南弗里曼特尔一栋列入文化遗产名录、自带一段阴森往事的老宅中拍摄了本片。影片虽是微成本制作，却在视觉上惊艳夺目，这场心理狂热梦境涌动着《狗牙》（2009年墨尔本国际电影节）与《女巫》（2015年墨尔本国际电影节）般的仪式化姿态，又令人想起《悬崖上的野餐》（2018年墨尔本国际电影节）所代表的风景恐怖传统。然而影片自身那份扣人心弦的简约，宣告了澳大利亚电影一个令人振奋的新声音的诞生——一个注定要令人不安、发人深省、摄人心魄的声音。
highlight_zh: 西澳新导演处女作，《狗牙》《女巫》式宗教邪典恐怖

title_en: The Oligarch and the Art Dealer
synopsis_en:
The true story of one of the world’s richest men and one of the 21st-century art world’s greatest frauds. Or is it?

Unfolding like a Hollywood thriller, The Oligarch and the Art Dealer unpacks with exquisite precision all the shady details of the Bouvier Affair: a high-profile court case between Russian businessman Dmitry Rybolovlev, the notoriously private owner of the world’s most expensive art collection, and his former trusted art dealer and friend Yves Bouvier, a maestro of freeports – duty-free tax havens-cum-storage lockers for the ultra-wealthy’s Picassos, da Vincis, Klimts and Magrittes. It’s a case that shocked the world, not least because it forced Rybolovlev – a man without a phone number, email address or computer – into the open and shone a spotlight on the clandestine dealings and deliberate secrets of the global elite.

In this engrossing documentary, Andreas Dalsgaard digs into the decade-long battle that began when Rybolovlev accused Bouvier of a billion-dollar scam, blowing up the once-symbiotic relationship that had helped both men to stratospheric financial echelons. Approaching the scandal with an exacting eye, The Oligarch and the Art Dealer allows each man to make his case – Bouvier directly; the elusive Rybolovlev through his lawyers – and the audience to draw their own conclusions. But when the stakes are this high, and the eye-watering sums behind them are even higher, can you trust anyone’s story?

At once intense and intimate, Venice 2025’s Queer Lion winner follows a drifter who goes on the run – and finds a meaningful spark – with a middle-aged truck driver.

Foolhardy young Veneno makes ends meet by sleeping with drivers at truck stops in exchange for cash or drugs. He seemingly has no family nor long-term plans; so, when one of his clients stiffs him, he decides to hitch a ride to the other side of the country. Enter Muñeco, a hardened fortysomething trucker estranged from his wife and kids, who offers Veneno a seat in his 18-wheeler. As the men drive across northern Mexico, walls come down and feelings develop – but can the pair outrun the demons from Veneno’s past when they give chase?

Winning the Queer Lion at Venice as well as the festival’s Orizzonti Award for Best Film, the fifth feature from David Pablos (The Chosen Ones, MIFF 2015) – produced by Diego Luna (Y tu mamá también, MIFF 2002) – both fulfils and defies genre expectations with its noir-infused, violent and erotically charged tale of lust, longing and the winding road in search of connection. Newcomers Víctor Miguel Prieto and Osvaldo Sánchez have an undeniable chemistry, embodying Veneno and Muñeco’s shared hunger for the belonging that their hypermasculine, heteronormative blue-collar world has denied them.
synopsis_zh:
既炽烈又亲密，这部斩获威尼斯电影节 2025 酷儿金狮奖的影片，讲述一个四处漂泊的浪子踏上逃亡之路，并与一位中年卡车司机之间擦出了动人的火花。

莽撞的年轻人韦内诺（Veneno）靠在卡车休息站与司机们交易性、换取现金或毒品来维持生计。他似乎既无家人，也没有长远打算；于是当一名嫖客赖账后，他索性决定搭车前往这个国家的另一端。此时登场的是穆涅科（Muñeco）——一个心硬如铁、与妻儿疏离的四十来岁卡车司机，他让韦内诺坐上了自己那辆十八轮大卡车。当两人一路穿越墨西哥北部，彼此的心防逐渐瓦解，情愫悄然滋生——可当韦内诺过往的心魔穷追不舍时，这对恋人能否甩开它们？

本片摘得威尼斯电影节酷儿金狮奖，并斩获地平线单元最佳影片奖。这是大卫·帕布罗斯（David Pablos，代表作《天选之人》，2015 年墨尔本电影节）执导的第五部长片，由迭戈·卢纳（Diego Luna，代表作《你妈妈也一样》，2002 年墨尔本电影节）担任制片。影片以浸染黑色电影气质、暴力而情欲张扬的笔触，讲述一个关于欲望、渴慕以及在蜿蜒公路上寻觅联结的故事，既满足又颠覆了类型片的期待。新人演员维克多·米格尔·普列托（Víctor Miguel Prieto）与奥斯瓦尔多·桑切斯（Osvaldo Sánchez）之间有着不可否认的化学反应，将韦内诺与穆涅科的共同渴望演绎得淋漓尽致——他们所渴求的那份归属感，正是被他们身处的、崇尚极端男子气概与异性恋规范的蓝领世界所拒斥的。
highlight_zh: 威尼斯酷儿金狮奖，迭戈·卢纳监制的公路情欲片

synopsis_en:
Stunning, expressionist oil-painted visuals express how it feels to carry emotions so heavy they take on a life of their own.

A woman manifests the emotional burden she carries as a strange creature that burrows into her body, distorting her own sense of self. Through remembered adolescent encounters with her sister, she confronts her guilt-gremlin in order to understand and free herself. Boldly experimenting with how to depict interiority, this film’s astonishingly fluid oil-painted brushstrokes swirl and pulse with inner life.
synopsis_zh:
惊艳的表现主义油画影像，道出当情绪沉重到仿佛有了自己的生命时，是怎样一种感受。

一名女子把自己背负的情感重担，具象成一只钻入体内的古怪生物，它扭曲了她对自我的认知。透过对少女时代与姐妹相处的回忆，她直面那只由愧疚化成的小妖，试图理解并解放自己。本片大胆探索如何呈现人的内心世界，那些流动得令人惊叹的油画笔触，随着内在的生命力翻涌、搏动。
highlight_zh: 油画笔触流动搏动，把愧疚化成钻入体内的小妖

title_en: Once Upon a Time in Harlem
synopsis_en:
Gather alongside Harlem Renaissance luminaries in this incredible time capsule, finally completed more than 50 years after the footage was shot.

In 1972, groundbreaking Black filmmaker William Greaves – maker of the reality-bending 1968 vérité masterpiece Symbiopsychotaxiplasm: Take One (MIFF 2023) – issued an invitation to the surviving figureheads of the cultural boom that emanated from Harlem in the 1920s and 30s: to come together once again. The likes of Broadway pioneers Noble Sissle and Eubie Blake, artist Aaron Douglas and activist Louise Thompson Patterson convened one summer evening at the stately home of Duke Ellington, where the drinks and reminiscences flowed, crystallised by time.

Behind the camera at this historic gathering was William’s son, David Greaves. With the elder Greaves having passed in 2014, it fell to David to ensure that this remarkable footage could at last be seen and celebrated. In Once Upon a Time in Harlem, he skilfully blends roving scenes from the party with sit-down interviews, also filmed onsite, to create an inviting, immersive atmosphere that positively crackles with the revolutionary verve and commentary of its subjects.
synopsis_zh:
在这部珍贵的时光胶囊里，与哈莱姆文艺复兴的传奇人物齐聚一堂——影片在素材拍摄五十多年后终于宣告完成。

1972年，开创性的黑人电影人威廉·格里夫斯——他曾拍出颠覆现实的1968年直接电影杰作《共生心理分类增殖体：第一次拍摄》（MIFF 2023）——向那些仍然健在的文化领袖发出邀请：让20世纪二三十年代从哈莱姆迸发出的那场文化浪潮的旗手们再度重聚。百老汇先驱诺布尔·西塞尔与尤比·布莱克、艺术家阿伦·道格拉斯、活动家路易丝·汤普森·帕特森等人，在一个夏夜相聚于艾灵顿公爵的雅致宅邸，美酒与回忆交织流淌，被岁月凝练成晶。

在这场历史性聚会的镜头背后，是威廉的儿子大卫·格里夫斯。老格里夫斯于2014年离世后，让这批非凡影像终得面世、终得礼赞的重任，便落在了大卫肩上。在《哈莱姆往事》中，他将聚会上流动的场景与同样在现场拍摄的坐谈访谈娴熟地交织在一起，营造出一种引人入胜、身临其境的氛围，字里行间迸发着这群人物革命性的锐气与洞见。
highlight_zh: 尘封半世纪终成片，哈莱姆文艺复兴传奇亲述那段黑人文化黄金岁月

synopsis_en:
PRESENTED BY

A profound cinematic odyssey filmed over a decade, this portrait of the coming of age of a Syrian girl in exile won Sundance’s Documentary Competition Audience and Directing awards.

When we meet Israa, she’s 11 years old, hustling to help make money for her family. A refugee from Aleppo, Syria, she has only just embarked on a journey across countries, cultures and bureaucratic barriers to find asylum in Europe. Once she settles into her adopted home of Cologne, however, life offers different challenges: a new language and culture to learn, and newfound Western freedoms clashing with her family’s traditions. Finally returning to Aleppo a decade later as an adult and witnessing the devastation that lingers, Israa reflects that, for all the immediate hardships of war, “it’s not as hard as what comes after”.

Across 2015 and 2016, at the height of the Syrian Civil War, over one million refugees entered Germany; but the story didn’t end there. Filmed over 10 years, this astonishing documentary – its emotional foundation built on the close relationship between Israa’s family and its directors, husband-and-wife team Jack MacInnes and Itab Azzam (herself born in Syria) – zooms in to relate one of those accounts in intimate detail. Both a narrative of displacement and assimilation and a shrine to the resilience of Syrian culture, this is a moving portrait of life flourishing in the wake of destruction.
synopsis_zh:
这部历时十年拍摄的纪录片，是一曲深沉的银幕史诗，记录了一位流亡中的叙利亚少女的成长历程，荣获圣丹斯电影节纪录片竞赛单元观众奖与导演奖。

初见伊斯拉（Israa）时，她只有十一岁，正为贴补家用四处奔波。作为来自叙利亚阿勒颇的难民，她刚刚踏上一段跨越国界、文化与官僚壁垒的旅程，只为在欧洲寻得庇护。然而，当她在收留她的新家园科隆安顿下来后，生活又抛出了新的难题：要学习陌生的语言与文化，而初尝的西方自由也与家庭的传统屡屡碰撞。十年后，已然成年的伊斯拉终于重返阿勒颇，目睹战争遗留的满目疮痍，她感慨道，比起战火当下的种种苦难，“真正难熬的，是战后的日子”。

2015 至 2016 年间，正值叙利亚内战最惨烈之时，超过一百万难民涌入德国；但故事并未就此终结。这部震撼人心的纪录片历时十年拍摄，其情感根基源于伊斯拉一家与两位导演——夫妻档杰克·麦金尼斯（Jack MacInnes）与伊塔布·阿扎姆（Itab Azzam，本人即生于叙利亚）——之间的深厚情谊，以细腻入微的笔触，讲述了这百万分之一的故事。它既是一部关于流离失所与融入异乡的叙事，也是一座向叙利亚文化坚韧不屈致敬的丰碑，更是一幅动人的画卷，描绘着废墟之上重焕生机的生命。
highlight_zh: 圣丹斯双奖，十年跟拍叙利亚难民少女的成长史诗

title_en: The Only Living Pickpocket in New York
synopsis_en:
John Turturro stars as a pavement-pounding old-school thief who needs all his Big Apple savvy to save his wife – and his way of life – from a young crypto gangster.

Harry is a veteran fingersmith with a heart of pilfered gold, and equally collegial relationships with his long-time fence Ben (Steve Buscemi) and NYPD detective Allan (Giancarlo Esposito). By day, he nimbly relieves unsuspecting New Yorkers of their valuables; by night, he cares for his ailing wife Rosie in their modest Bronx apartment. Fatefully, Harry picks the wrong mark: the random data card he’s swiped is a crypto wallet belonging to petulant crime family scion Dylan Diamond, whose goons threaten Rosie while Harry scours all five boroughs for the lost trinket. Can his bone-deep bond with his city survive the crude transactions of digital crime, or is New York about to have no living pickpockets?

Actor-turned-director Noah Segan’s charming old-fashioned crime drama steals its vibe from the pockets of cinema’s 1970s and 1980s New York storytellers: the perfectly cast John Turturro roams the New York of John Cassavetes and Spike Lee, Robert Altman and Elaine May. The subtle, charismatic veteran of the screen owns this elegiac film, which doesn’t resist progress or ridicule digital natives but rather celebrates the evergreen value in human connections and well-honed skills.
synopsis_zh:
约翰·特托罗饰演一名走街串巷的老派窃贼，为了从一个年轻的加密货币黑帮手中保住妻子——也保住自己的生活方式——他必须使出浑身解数，动用他对这座大苹果城的全部老练本事。

哈里是个身手不凡的老牌扒手，虽以偷窃为生，却有一副难得的好心肠。他与合作多年的销赃人本（史蒂夫·布西密饰）以及纽约警局探员艾伦（吉安卡罗·埃斯波西托饰）都保持着一种亦敌亦友的融洽关系。白天，他灵巧地把毫无防备的纽约客身上的财物顺手牵羊；夜晚，他在布朗克斯那间简陋的公寓里照料病中的妻子萝西。命运弄人，哈里偏偏选错了下手对象：他随手扒来的一张数据卡，竟是纨绔的犯罪家族少爷迪伦·戴蒙的加密货币钱包。当哈里跑遍全城五个区寻找那件丢失的小物件时，戴蒙的打手却盯上了萝西。他与这座城市刻骨铭心的羁绊，能否在数字犯罪那冷冰冰的交易面前幸存下来？还是说，纽约即将再无一个活着的扒手？

演员出身的导演诺亚·西根，为这部迷人的老派犯罪剧偷师于上世纪七八十年代那些书写纽约的电影大师：选角精准的约翰·特托罗，游走在约翰·卡萨维茨与斯派克·李、罗伯特·奥特曼与伊莱恩·梅笔下的那个纽约。这位含蓄而富有魅力的银幕老将，将这部挽歌般的影片牢牢握在掌心。它既不抗拒进步，也不嘲弄数字原住民，而是礼赞那些历久弥新的珍贵之物——人与人之间的联结，与千锤百炼的一技之长。
highlight_zh: 特托罗近年最佳演出，重现七八十年代纽约黑色犯罪韵味

synopsis_en:
MIFF 2026 commences with an event that will get everyone talking: the Australian premiere of Eleanor Wilson and Alex Huston Fischer’s cheeky, star-studded and irresistible fable Wicker.

Mingle with the brightest stars of the film industry on the red carpet, enjoy a drink on arrival and settle in for one of the year’s most provocative and hilarious films.

Audiences can take in the atmosphere of the red carpet and the screening at Hoyts Melbourne Central with a film-only ticket, or book a spot at the legendary afterparty at Melbourne Town Hall with a film-and-party ticket.

Olivia Colman and Alexander Skarsgård lead this cheeky, star-studded and irresistible fable about a cranky fisherwoman and the sexy handwoven husband she wishes for.

In a seaside village lost to time, a fisherwoman delivers the food relied on by the townsfolk, who barely tolerate her cantankerous presence. Unexpectedly named the next to wed and sick of the disdain, she commissions the local basketmaker to weave her the perfect husband, and he goes above and beyond. When you’re married to the hottest and handiest man around, however, jealousies inevitably flare up.

Adapting Ursula Wills-Jones’s 2008 short story, this Sundance-premiering twist on a period love story – directed by Australian-born Eleanor Wilson and filmmaking (as well as real-life) partner Alex Huston Fischer, and including MIFF Accelerator alum David Michôd among its producers – is at once ingenious and charmingly irreverent. But it’s no straw-man depiction of middle-aged sexual wish fulfilment: the film uses its whimsical premise to critique small-mindedness, superstition and overzealous conservatism. Olivia Colman goes all-in for a role that recalls her fiery turn in The Favourite, while Alexander Skarsgård (Lee, MIFF 2024) is magnetic as a creature with more humanity than his human counterparts – testament to the practical effects by Joe Dunckley (Avatar) and WETA Workshop. Capped off with transportive cinematography by Oscar winner Lol Crawley (The Brutalist) and counting Peter Dinklage (The Toxic Avenger, MIFF 2025), Richard E. Grant and Melbourne’s own Elizabeth Debicki (The Tale, MIFF 2018) among its cast, Wicker is a fantasy romance that asks whether we truly know our heart’s desire.
synopsis_zh:
2026 年墨尔本国际电影节（MIFF）将以一场势必引发热议的盛事拉开帷幕——埃莉诺·威尔逊与亚历克斯·休斯顿·费舍尔联合执导的调皮、群星云集、令人无法抗拒的寓言之作《编织良人》，将在此举行澳大利亚首映。

与影坛最耀眼的明星共踏红毯，在入场时享用一杯美酒，然后落座欣赏这部年度最大胆、最令人捧腹的影片之一。

持“观影票”的观众可在霍伊茨墨尔本中心影院感受红毯与放映的现场氛围；若购买“观影+派对票”，还能预订墨尔本市政厅那场传奇般的映后派对席位。

奥利维娅·科尔曼与亚历山大·斯卡斯加德领衔主演这则调皮、群星云集、令人无法抗拒的寓言：一位脾气火爆的渔妇，与她一心求来的、手工编织而成的性感丈夫。

在一座被时光遗忘的海滨渔村里，一位渔妇为镇上居民提供赖以为生的鱼获，众人却对她乖戾的性子避之不及、勉强容忍。当她意外被指定为下一个成婚之人，又受够了旁人的鄙夷，她便委托本地的编篮匠为她编出一位完美的丈夫——而匠人的手艺远超所求。然而,当你的丈夫是全镇最帅、最能干的男人时，妒忌之火终究难免熊熊燃起。

本片改编自厄休拉·威尔斯-琼斯 2008 年的短篇小说，是一则在圣丹斯首映的、别出心裁的古装爱情故事新解——由澳大利亚出生的埃莉诺·威尔逊与其创作（亦是现实生活中的）伴侣亚历克斯·休斯顿·费舍尔共同执导，制片阵容中还包括 MIFF 新锐计划（Accelerator）校友大卫·米绍德。影片既巧思盎然，又带着迷人的不羁。但它绝非对中年性幻想的浅薄戏说：影片以其奇思妙想的设定，讽刺了狭隘、迷信与过度保守的心态。奥利维娅·科尔曼倾尽全力，献上一个令人想起她在《宠儿》中火辣演出的角色；而亚历山大·斯卡斯加德（《李》，MIFF 2024）饰演的“造物”，比片中的真人更具人性光辉，魅力四射——这有赖于乔·邓克利（《阿凡达》）与维塔工作室（WETA Workshop）打造的实体特效。影片辅以奥斯卡得主罗尔·克劳利（《粗野派》）令人神往的摄影，演员阵容还包括彼得·丁拉基（《毒液复仇者》，MIFF 2025）、理查德·E·格兰特，以及墨尔本本地的伊丽莎白·德比茨基（《讲述》，MIFF 2018）。《编织良人》是一部奇幻爱情片，它叩问的是：我们真的了解自己内心的渴望吗？
highlight_zh: 科尔曼＋斯卡斯加德领衔，圣丹斯首映奇幻寓言

title_en: Our Choir Has Always Been Travelling
title_zh: 我们的合唱团一直在路上
director: Marjorie "Nunga" Williams, Nelson Armstrong, Judith Pungarta Inkamala
synopsis_en:
Members of a central Australian choir celebrate community and creativity through their own voices and vibrant animation.

Meet six talented artists and singers in the Ntaria Choir of Hermannsburg as they perform together across Australia – and the world, as part of the larger Central Australian Aboriginal Women’s Choir – in a mixture of English, Western Aranda and Pitjantjatjara. With poise and warm humour, these First Nations women assert their own identities and stories through expressive artwork, language and music.
synopsis_zh:
中澳一支合唱团的成员们，用自己的歌声与灵动的动画，礼赞社群与创造力。

来认识赫尔曼斯堡恩塔里亚合唱团（Ntaria Choir）中六位才华横溢的艺术家与歌者。作为规模更大的中澳原住民女子合唱团的一部分，她们相伴走遍澳大利亚乃至世界各地登台献唱，歌声在英语、西阿兰达语与皮詹加加拉语之间流转。这些原住民女性从容优雅、幽默温暖，用富于表现力的画作、语言与音乐，宣告属于自己的身份与故事。
highlight_zh: 原住民女子合唱团巡演纪录，歌声与动画交织的身份之歌

synopsis_en:
To save Earth from an insatiable alien, this slacker will need her dad and her effing loyal mates, who make a crap planet worth fighting for.

Sheri (Sara Thompson, One of Us Is Lying) hasn’t been okay since her beloved grandma (Kerry Armstrong, Lantana, MIFF 2001) died. She’s over her annoying boyfriend Harry (Jordan Dulieu, The Serpent’s Skin), and resents her astronomer dad Hank (Scott Major, Neighbours) for avoidantly watching the skies. When a glowing green meteorite crash-lands near their small town and its passenger starts melding gruesomely with locals, humanity’s last hope is Sheri, her dad and her Scooby Gang of mates: Poppy (Annapurna Sriram, Fucktoys), Ash (Karis Oka, The Deb) and Finn (Jess McLeod, One of Us Is Lying), whose run-down video store has become the alien’s lair.

Prolific Aussie queer-horror phenom Alice Maio Mackay (T Blockers), directing her seventh feature at the age of 21, merges retro schlock and teen-culture cool with a sincere affection for chosen family. It’s the opposite of effed-up that Major – the 90s Heartbreak High OG himself – stars here, and that she’s casting North Americans as rural Aussie retail shitkickers. Meanwhile, Mackay is building her own enviable friend gang: Our Effed Up World is produced by Jane Schoenbrun (I Saw the TV Glow, MIFF 2024), and it’s a joy to spot cameos from TV Glow star Jack Haven and Lesbian Space Princess (MIFF 2025) co-writer/director Leela Varghese.

title_en: Palimpsest: The Story of a Name
synopsis_en:
Through a canny postcolonial lens, a filmmaker whose Western name is at odds with her Chinese heritage peels back conflicting layers of family history.

“All my life I’ve been asked about my family name,” reflects Mary Stephen (Justocoeur, MIFF 1981). She was born in British Hong Kong to Hilda and Henry Stephen, respectively known in earlier life as Chan Tik-Fong and Hilda Yik. Like their filmmaker daughter, both parents had a creative streak: she wrote poetry, while he was an avid amateur filmmaker and journal keeper, documenting their family life extensively. Poring over her father’s records, Stephen, as the film’s narrator, uncovers all manner of likely tall tales – including a claim of an Indigenous Australian grandfather – and meditates upon the mechanisms and functions of such mythologisation.

Together with her parents, Stephen emigrated to Montreal at age 15 before moving to Paris, where she would establish herself as the editor of some of Éric Rohmer’s most cherished films, including A Tale of Winter and A Summer’s Tale. Her own directorial work, largely unseen for decades, has recently enjoyed a much-deserved revival thanks to the restoration of her dreamy 1978 debut, Shades of Silk (MIFF 2026). Stephen’s latest film, which received two Golden Horse Awards, proves a richly personal new entry in an oeuvre dedicated to the exploration of identity across borders.

In this intensely moving montage, a life story is projected through a myriad of marks made on paper.

In the hands of Oscar-nominated minimalist animator Don Hertzfeldt (It’s Such a Beautiful Day, MIFF 2012), one man’s world folding smaller and smaller as his scribbles as a toddler, schoolwork and impassioned love notes yield to endless pragmatic signatures on contracts and receipts.
synopsis_zh:
在这部动人至深的蒙太奇短片中，一个人的一生透过纸上留下的万千痕迹徐徐展开。

在奥斯卡提名的极简主义动画大师唐·赫兹菲尔特（《美好的一天》，2012 年墨尔本电影节）笔下，一个人的世界越缩越小——从蹒跚学步时的涂鸦、学生时代的作业、饱含深情的情书，一路走向合同与收据上无尽而机械的签名。
highlight_zh: 奥斯卡提名动画大师赫兹菲尔特新作，纸痕写尽一生

synopsis_en:
In the latest Cannes-bowing psychological drama from Asghar Farhadi, Isabelle Huppert leads an all-star ensemble cast, playing a creatively blocked author whose voyeurism causes art and life to bleed into one another.

Sylvie, a reclusive and irascible novelist living in squalor in Paris, struggles to get the creative juices flowing. To address this, she decides to train her telescope on the apartment across the street, where she spies two men and a woman fumbling around with sound recording equipment. Fascinated, she conjures up a melodramatic backstory for the threesome and starts typing. But when a stranger enters her orbit, the lines between fantasy, fabrication and fixation begin to blur.

Asghar Farhadi’s follow-up to the Cannes Grand Prix–awarded A Hero (MIFF 2021) and Oscar winners The Salesman (MIFF 2016) and A Separation (MIFF 2011) is a suspenseful meta-thriller loosely based on the episode of Krzysztof Kieślowski’s Decalogue (MIFF 1990) that became A Short Film About Love. Co-written by Farhadi and his brother Saeed, the film evokes Hitchcock and Coppola but deploys its own psychologically complex provocation on truth, intention and interpersonal obsession. Elevated by Guillaume Deffontaines’s sumptuous cinematography and Zbigniew Preisner’s haunting score, the performances from Vincent Cassel (The Shrouds, MIFF 2024), Virginie Efira (A Private Life, MIFF 2025), Pierre Niney (The Count of Monte Cristo) and Adam Bessa (Ghost Trail, MIFF 2024) – along with screen legend Catherine Deneuve in cameo – are superb, while lead Isabelle Huppert shines as an ill-tempered artist desperate to cling on to fading relevance.
synopsis_zh:
在阿斯哈·法哈蒂这部戛纳首映的最新心理剧中，伊莎贝尔·于佩尔领衔一众明星组成的豪华阵容，饰演一位陷入创作瓶颈的作家——她的窥视癖让艺术与生活彼此交融、难分彼此。

西尔维是一位离群索居、性情暴躁的小说家，独居于巴黎一处脏乱的公寓，苦苦寻找灵感却始终文思枯竭。为了打破僵局，她把望远镜对准了街对面的公寓，窥见两男一女正笨手笨脚地摆弄着录音设备。她被深深吸引，为这三人臆造出一段情节剧般的往事，动笔敲下文字。然而，当一个陌生人闯入她的生活，幻想、虚构与执念之间的界限开始变得模糊。

阿斯哈·法哈蒂曾凭《一个英雄》（MIFF 2021）荣获戛纳评审团大奖，并以《推销员》（MIFF 2016）和《一次别离》（MIFF 2011）两度斩获奥斯卡。这部新作是一则扣人心弦的元惊悚片，灵感松散地取自克日什托夫·基耶斯洛夫斯基《十诫》（MIFF 1990）中后来拓展为《爱情短片》的那一集。影片由法哈蒂与其兄弟萨伊德共同编剧，既让人联想到希区柯克与科波拉，又以自身对真相、意图与人际执念的复杂心理拷问独树一帜。纪尧姆·德封丹华美的摄影与兹比格涅夫·普瑞斯纳萦绕人心的配乐令影片更添光彩；文森特·卡索（《裹尸布》，MIFF 2024）、维吉妮·艾菲拉（《私人生活》，MIFF 2025）、皮埃尔·尼内（《基督山伯爵》）与亚当·贝萨（《幽灵足迹》，MIFF 2024）的表演俱佳，银幕传奇凯瑟琳·德纳芙亦有客串；而领衔主演伊莎贝尔·于佩尔尤为出彩，将一位脾气乖戾、拼命想抓住日渐消逝的存在感的艺术家诠释得淋漓尽致。
highlight_zh: 法哈蒂戛纳新作，于佩尔领衔德纳芙客串的元惊悚

synopsis_en:
This layered, IDFA-awarded portrait of an Iranian family long divided by geography but reunited by technology exudes a keen and haunting resonance.

Aged 20, Maryam fled Iran in the aftermath of the 1979 revolution, crossing the border into Türkiye camouflaged among a flock of sheep. Now a political exile, she resides in the United States, while her parents still live in the house that she grew up in, which her architect father designed. Longing to somehow bridge the distance, Maryam – herself unseen in the film – has surveillance cameras installed in their home: together with super-8 home videos and archival materials, this dialogue-free footage of her ageing parents, moving around the house or at times performing for the camera, illustrates her reflective voiceover.

Morteza Ahmadvand and Firouzeh Khosrovani previously collaborated on Radiograph of a Family (MIFF 2021), in which Khosrovani explored the impacts of the Iranian Revolution through the prism of her own family history.
